C: （二） 「哈努努，他们的战力应该都在前线，但主舰内肯定还有兵力守备，你一定要小心。」 哈努兄弟手无寸铁地潜入了宾馆中，石头老板的爪牙在走廊里四处巡逻，生怕有人来偷走石头老板囤积于此的财宝。 得益于小小的身体，哈努兄弟在宾馆中闪避着坏蛋们的目光，寻找着石头老板的踪迹。 走到大堂，哈努兄弟看到了石头老板的得力干将「吃吃经理」拦在楼梯前，那是比石头老板还要大的鳄鱼，连一只蚊子都飞不过他身躯的阻拦。 在过去，哈努兄弟的「哈努火箭炮」一下就能把这个傻大个解决，可现在哈努兄弟只能想别的办法。 「我相信你的实力，但你现在的身体绝不能跟这种级别的公司装甲硬碰硬……」 该怎么办呢？ 哈努兄弟躲在宾馆的储物架上冥思苦想之时，吃吃经理突然朝货架走来。 「嗤嗤，我似乎闻到了狼的味道！」 面对逼近的吃吃经理，哈努兄弟避无可避，一场大战在所难免！ 哈努兄弟准备应战，朝吃吃经理扑了过去—— 但吃吃经理根本没看到小小的哈努兄弟，哈努兄弟一下子撞进了他的嘴里！难道哈努兄弟被吃掉了吗？ 机械对撞的杂音、怒吼、枪声。 「嗤嗤，难道是我的鼻子出问题了？」这个笨鳄鱼左顾右盼，挠了挠头。 吃吃经理感觉到牙里似乎塞了什么东西，但他并不在意，毕竟这个邋遢鬼从不剔牙——这也是哈努兄弟死里逃生的原因。 ——哈努兄弟刚刚小心地躲开了尖牙利齿，在血盆大口中闪转腾挪，躲到了吃吃经理的牙洞里！ 「哈努努，都说了不要动手，你这家伙也太不听劝了！」 「行了，教授，你又不是第一天认识他…正好，钻进这个机甲就不会引起守卫的怀疑了，里面的维生装置也能帮你处理一下伤势。」 这下，哈努兄弟找到了最好的藏身处。
E: Chapter Two "Most of their forces are probably deployed on the front lines, but they definitely have some troops guarding their main vessel. So, be careful, Hanunue." Hanu infiltrated the hotel unarmed while Boss Stone's minions patrolled the corridors, fearful that someone might steal the treasures amassed by their boss here. Thanks to his small stature, Brother Hanu skillfully evaded the villains within the hotel, his eyes scanning for any signs of Boss Stone. Upon entering the lobby, Brother Hanu spotted Lieutenant Chitters, Boss Stone's trusted sidekick. Lieutenant Chitters was an even larger crocodile than Boss Stone, creating an impenetrable barrier that not even a mosquito could pass through. Before, a single shot from the Hanu Launcher would have dealt with this big oaf. Now, however, Hanu needs to come up with another plan. "I trust in your abilities, but with your current stature, it's best to not go head-to-head with someone in high-grade IPC battlesuit..." What now? As Hanu hid atop a storage shelf to brainstorm, Lieutenant Chitters suddenly came walking over. "Chit-chit. Hm. I think I smell the scent of a wolf!" Confronted with the approaching Lieutenant Chitters, Brother Hanu had no means of evasion. A clash became inevitable! Bracing himself for the battle, Brother Hanu lunged at Lieutenant Chitters... However, Lieutenant Chitters didn't even notice the tiny Brother Hanu and accidentally swallowed him whole in an instant! Had Brother Hanu been devoured? Clamorous sounds of mechanical collisions, roaring, and gunshots. "Chit! Is something wrong with my nose?" The dumb crocodile glanced left and right, scratching his head in confusion. Lieutenant Chitters felt something between his teeth but paid it no mind. After all, this sloppy crocodile never bothered to floss his teeth, and that's how Brother Hanu escaped his jaws. Brother Hanu deftly maneuvered between Lieutenant Chitters's razor-sharp teeth and made his way through the dangerous mouth, hiding inside a tooth cavity! "I told you not to engage in a head-on clash, Hanunue! You really should have listened!" "Alright, Professor, we both know his style... Well, now that you're inside the mecha, you won't rouse any suspicion from the guards, and the life support devices contained within will help you address your injuries." With that, Hanu found the best hiding spot.

C: （一） 轰！ 哈努兄弟的火箭筒炸飞了石头老板，但也引爆了宅邸里的烟花。 巨大的爆炸震碎了小镇的每一扇窗户，掀翻了好几座房屋，巨大的冲击力把凝固的钟表小子吹到了池塘里——他终于能动了！ 「滴答！哈努兄弟！哈努兄弟呢！？」 钟表小子虽然一直被粘在广场上，但他也目睹了小镇发生的一切，看到了小小哈努兄弟钻进石头老板的据点，看到了刚刚发生的大爆炸。钟表小子顾不上倒出表盘里进的水，匆忙地跑向爆炸发生的方向…… 在一片残垣断壁中，钟表小子只找到了一顶小小的帽子。 「哈努努…为什么，如果你不能醒过来，匹诺康尼就……」 「打起精神来，『钟表匠』，现在必须有人主持局势…狼群如果突然失去了头领，那混乱必将接踵而至。」 听到外面动静逐渐平息，镇民们悄悄探出了头，他们发现街上的鳄鱼全都不见了，只有坐在废墟里掉眼泪的钟表小子。 「钟表小子，钟表小子，石头老板被打败了吗？」 「钟表小子，钟表小子，哈努兄弟跑去哪里了呀？」 钟表小子知道，镇民们刚刚摆脱了石头老板的威胁，现在必须让他们安心才行。所以，这次钟表小子还是撒了一个谎—— 「『钟表匠』先生，您说的是真的吗？」 「是的，哈努努家主在先前的保卫战中负伤严重，将暂停出席相关事务。但哈努努家主仍会负责匹诺康尼的重大决策，请诸位放心。」 「滴答，不用担心！哈努兄弟刚刚赶跑了石头老板，现在去休息啦！相信用不了多久，你们就能再在小镇里看到他*酷*得不行的身影了！」 听到这话，镇民们放下了悬着的心，欢呼庆祝了起来——他们终于赶走了石头老板，相信这次失败过后，那只可恶的大鳄鱼很长时间都不会来骚扰美梦小镇了。 大家为哈努兄弟举办了一场盛大的庆功宴，虽然作为主角的哈努兄弟不在场，但大家还是玩得很开心…除了钟表小子。 这晚，表盘里装满心事的钟表小子很晚很晚才睡着。 梦里，钟表小子来到了一片荒漠中，而哈努兄弟站在荒漠的远处，遥望着天空。 「滴答！哈努兄弟，你去哪了！」 「滴答，哈努兄弟，你快回来，美梦小镇没有你可不行！」 哈努兄弟只是看着钟表小子朝自己奔跑，默默摘下了自己的帽子。 「哼，这里很美，对吗？」 「是啊，所以你才不愿醒来吗？」 「不，我之所以不愿醒来…是因为你们都睡得太香了。」 「我……」 「那就来这里睡吧，『钟表匠』。你如果没胆量面对噩梦，那就先躲在美梦里吧——」 「但你要记住，只要是梦，早晚都要醒过来。」 他发出了一声很*酷*的哼。 钟表小子醒了，他的表盘上挂着一道泪痕。
E: Chapter One BOOM! Brother Hanu's powerful launcher blows Boss Stone away, but it also ignites the fireworks stored within the mansion. The violent explosion shatters every window in town, toppling several houses. The force of the impact sends the immobile Clockie hurtling into a nearby pond, finally granting him the freedom to move once more! "Tick-tock! Brother Hanu! Where are you, Brother Hanu!?" Back then, while Clockie was firmly attached to the town square, he still witnessed everything that happened within the town. He saw how Mini-Hanu infiltrated Boss Stone's fortress and witnessed that violent explosion. Not even stopping to pour out the water in his dial, Clockie sprints towards the origin of the explosion... Amidst the scattered debris, Clockie discovers nothing more than a small hat. "Hanunue... but why? If you don't wake up now, Penacony will..." "Pull yourself together, 'Watchmaker.' Someone must maintain control of the situation... If a wolf pack suddenly loses its leader, chaos is bound to ensue." The townsfolk cautiously emerge from their hiding places, their curiosity piqued by the abrupt silence that has befallen the streets. All the crocodiles that once roamed the town have vanished, leaving only Clockie amidst the ruins, shedding inconsolable tears. "Clockie, Clockie, did you kick Boss Stone's tush?" "Clockie, Clockie, where has Brother Hanu gone?" Clockie understands that the townsfolk seek reassurance now that they have just become free of Boss Stone's terror. And so, this time, Clockie tells them a lie yet again... "Is that true, Mr. 'Watchmaker'?" "Yes. The family head Hanunue sustained grave injuries during the previous defensive battle and will be temporarily unable to fulfill his duties. But rest assured, Hanunue will continue making significant decisions for Penacony." "Tick-tock, don't worry! Brother Hanu has just kicked Boss Stone's derriere and is now resting! It won't be long before you see his cool figure in the town once more!" Reassured by Clockie's words, everyone casts aside their fears and revels in the grand victory, knowing that they finally kicked out Boss Stone. They believe the terrible big crocodile won't trouble Dreamville again anytime soon after this defeat. They throw a grand celebration in honor of Brother Hanu, even though he himself is absent. Everyone enjoys a cheerful time... except for Clockie. That night, Clockie's mind is burdened with thoughts that keep him awake until the early hours. In his dreams, Clockie finds himself standing in a vast desert, with Brother Hanu positioned at the far end, gazing up at the sky. "Tick-tock! Where have you been, Brother Hanu?" "Come back to us, Brother Hanu! Dreamville simply can't exist without you!" In silence, Brother Hanu only watches as Clockie runs towards him, then gently removes his hat. "Hmph, it's beautiful here, don't you think?" "Yeah, is that why you don't want to wake up?" "No, the reason I don't want to wake up... is because all of you are sleeping so deeply." "I..." "Then come here and rest, 'Watchmaker.' If you lack the courage to face the nightmares, then seek refuge in sweet dreams for now..." "But remember, as long as this is a dream, you'll have to wake up from it sooner or later." He lets out a really cool sounding *hmph*. Then Clockie awakens, his clock face adorned with a tear stain.

C:
本书旨在记录晖长石号历任船长的生平事迹，通过他们的故事，揭开晖长石号这艘神秘豪华浮空艇的面纱，展现其在匹诺康尼历史中的重要地位。

在梦海之上近乎永恒地巡航，这并不意味着梦海本身平静无波，静谧安好。笔者曾统计过历任船长的任职时长，发现他们的在职年限并不长。在早期的巡航中，连续十任船长均因负伤而卸任。尽管家族曾多次派出筑梦师团队，对晖长石号进行了专项改造，旨在保证巡航的安全性。但在此之后，每位船长的任期并不长，有阴谋论者认为这与空艇住客的身份有关，巨大的人际关系网意味着泼天的利益……

[……]
<align="center">【初代船长】筑梦先驱丹尼</align>
晖长石号的故事，始于一位来自橡木家系的筑梦师丹尼。丹尼以优异的成绩于折纸大学毕业后，并未继续从事筑梦工作，反而热衷于探险。他在梦境和现实间的边缘游走，寻找连接这两个世界的可能性。而晖长石号的建造灵感，据说正是来源于他在一次深入忆质之海的迷雾中，体验到的既虚幻又真实的奇妙经历。他不仅是晖长石号的首位船长，更是其创造者，把这艘豪华飞空艇视为连接匹诺康尼十二时分的纽带，以及向外界展示家族辉煌的发展成果。

在丹尼的指挥下，晖长石号完成了它的首次巡航，从匹诺康尼大剧院为始，缓缓启航。在他的引领下，晖长石号不仅成为了家族的骄傲，也成为了银河中的传奇。丹尼对晖长石号的贡献，不仅仅在于他对这艘飞空艇的设计和建造，更在于他以自身的探险经历，为这艘飞空艇制定了最初的巡航路线，自此晖长石号的故事正式开始。

<align="center">【第二任船长】穿越风暴的琥珀</align>
继丹尼之后，晖长石号的第二任船长琥珀，是一位出身于猎犬家系的杰出女性。在她的领导下，晖长石号不仅成功地驶过了一次又一次的忆域风暴，还在这些风暴中发现了新的航线路径，为匹诺康尼的探索做出了巨大的贡献。琥珀对晖长石号的掌控能力堪称完美，甚至在最为恶劣的环境下，也能保证晖长石号和船上各位乘客的安全。

琥珀的英勇和决断，使她成为晖长石号历史上最为人尊敬的船长之一。

[……]

<align="center">【第十八任船长】启明星加雷斯</align>
加雷斯，晖长石号的第十八任船长，以他对梦海的深入了解而著称。加雷斯出生于一个世代以航行为生的皮皮西家族，从小便对航行一事充满了无限的好奇和热爱。

他的上任，为晖长石号的航线带来了革命性的变化。在他的指导下，晖长石号不仅能够在梦海中航行自如，还能准确无误地找到抵达十二时分的最佳路径，将匹诺康尼的梦境与外界的星系连接得更为紧密。

加雷斯的贡献不仅在于改进航线，他还在晖长石号上设立了一个小型观测站，用于研究梦海中的出现的各类异常事件。这些研究不仅增进了学界对忆质与梦海的理解，还为匹诺康尼的技术发展做出了深远卓绝的贡献。

[……]

<align="center">【第五十三任船长】梦境的守护者：伊莉娜</align>
在晖长石号的历史上，少有人能像伊莉娜那样，对梦境世界理解得如此深刻。伊莉娜出身于隐夜鸫家系，自小便对梦境世界充满了深厚的兴趣和独到的见解。当她成为晖长石号的船长时，她的首要任务就是探索梦海中的新航道，为被过往忆域风暴所堵塞的航道找到新的通路。

伊莉娜最为人称道的事迹，是她在一次意外中，利用自己对筑梦技术的精湛控制力，成功将一条即将崩溃的航道稳定下来，救回了甲板上的所有生命。这一壮举不仅证明了她作为船长的能力，也展示了筑梦师对匹诺康尼的深远贡献。

[……]

<align="center">【第九十二任船长】旋律共振的卢卡斯</align>
卢卡斯，天环族出身，以其对音乐的热爱和在晖长石号上创立神奇的音乐演出而闻名。

卢卡斯认为，音乐是连接不同生命和文化的桥梁，也是探索各个星球的钥匙。在他的领导下，晖长石号变成了一艘漂浮的音乐殿堂，每当有新的住客登上飞艇时，他都会组织一场盛大的音乐会，邀请来自各个星系的音乐家共同演出，用音乐的力量为初来匹诺康尼的贵客带来最深远的震撼。

在一次前所未有的音乐会上，卢卡斯成功地利用音乐的共振，将听众转移到大歌剧院内，为歌剧院的演出季带来最神奇的观礼体验。这一成就不仅为他个人赢得了极高的荣誉，也为晖长石号的传奇故事增添了浓墨重彩的一笔。
E:
This book aims to chronicle the life of past captains of the Radiant Feldspar. Through their stories, this book wishes to unveil the secrets surrounding the mysterious luxury airship known as the Radiant Feldspar, and showcase the ship's importance in the history of Penacony.

Being able to cruise along the Sea of Dreams almost endlessly does not mean that the Sea of Dreams itself is tranquil and serene. Indeed, this writer once calculated the length of service of past captains, only to realize that these captains did not hold their positions for long. During the Radiant Feldspar's early days, ten consecutive captains had to step down as a result of injuries. This is even after The Family had, on numerous occasions, dispatched Dreamweaver teams to upgrade certain components of the Radiant Feldspar in the hope of ensuring her safety while cruising. Subsequent captains did not serve any longer as a result of these improvements. Some conspiracy theorists believe this to be related to the social status of guests aboard the airship. After all, having an extensive network of connections typically signifies huge profits are involved...

...
<align="center">The First Captain: Danny, the Pioneer of Dreamweavers</align>
The story of the Radiant Feldspar begins with a Dreamweaver from the Oak Family: Danny. Despite graduating from Paperfold University with stellar grades, Danny, who saw adventure as his true passion, did not continue to work as a Dreamweaver. Instead, he wandered along the border of Dreamscape and reality, searching tirelessly for a way to link the two worlds. It is said that the inspiration for building the Radiant Feldspar came from the first time he ventured deep into the dense fog of the sea of memoria, where he went on a wondrous adventure that felt nearly dream-like. To the creator and first-ever captain of the Radiant Feldspar, the luxurious airship was not only a bond that linked all of Penacony's Twelve Hours, but also a glorious achievement that showcased The Family's status.

Under Danny's command, the Radiant Feldspar completed her very first cruise. Departing from the Penacony Grand Theater, the Radiant Feldspar slowly embarked on her maiden cruise under Danny's leadership, becoming not only a source of pride for The Family, but ultimately a legend in the Cosmos itself. Danny's contributions toward the Radiant Feldspar did not lie with her design and construction alone. More importantly, with his extensive expeditionary experience, he also drew up the initial cruise route for this airship, officially marking the start of the Radiant Feldspar's storied tale.

<align="center">2nd Captain: Amber, the Captain Who Weathered the Storm</align>
Taking over the helm from Danny, the second captain of the Radiant Feldspar was Amber, an extraordinary lady from the Bloodhound Family. Under her leadership, the Radiant Feldspar not only successfully rode out Memory Zone storms time and again, but also discovered new cruise routes amid the tempests, thereby making significant contributions to the exploration of Penacony. Amber's control of the Radiant Feldspar was arguably perfect. Ensuring the safety of the airship and all the guests aboard her was all in a day's work for her, even in the most perilous of conditions.

Amber's admirable courage and resolve led her to become one of the most respected captains of the Radiant Feldspar across its storied history.

...

<align="center"><unbreak>18</unbreak>th Captain: Gareth, the Morning Star</align>
As the <unbreak>18</unbreak>th captain of the Radiant Feldspar, Gareth was renowned for his in-depth understanding of the Sea of Dreams. Born to a Pepeshi family that sailed for a living for generation after generation, Gareth had always held boundless curiosity and passion toward sailing.

After assuming the position of captain, he brought revolutionary changes to the Radiant Feldspar's cruise routes. Under his guidance, the Radiant Feldspar could not only cruise at will along the Sea of Dreams, but also accurately determine the optimal route to the Twelve Hours. With this, the link between Penacony's Dreamscape and the planetary system of the outside world was tightened.

Gareth's contributions did not stop at just improving the Radiant Feldspar's cruise routes. Aboard the airship, he also established a miniature observation station that could be used to research the various bizarre phenomena witnessed in the Sea of Dreams. These studies not only improved understanding of memoria and the Sea of Dreams among academic circles, but they also significantly contributed to the development of Penaconian technology.

...

<align="center"><unbreak>53</unbreak>rd Captain: Irina, the Guardian of the Dreamscape</align>
Across the long history of the Radiant Feldspar, few understood the world of the Dreamscape as well as Irina did. Hailing from the Nightingale Family, Irina demonstrated a keen interest in the Dreamscape even as a child, often offering unique insights into the world. When she assumed the post of Radiant Feldspar captain, her foremost mission was to explore the Sea of Dreams for new cruising lanes, to replace old lanes that had since been blocked by Memory Zone storms.

The most commendable deed that Irina ever accomplished was the time when the Radiant Feldspar met with an accident. Irina's masterful control over Dreamweaving technology allowed her to successfully stabilize a cruising lane on the brink of collapse, thereby saving all the lives on deck. This feat not only proved her abilities as a captain, but it also demonstrated just how significant the contributions that Dreamweavers made toward Penacony were.

...

<align="center"><unbreak>92</unbreak>nd Captain: Lukas, the Resonator of Melodies</align>
Born a Halovian, Lukas was renowned for his passion for music and his genius that spurred a legend of a music concert aboard the Radiant Feldspar.

Lukas believed that music was the bridge that connected different lives and cultures, as well as the key to exploring the various planets. Under his leadership, the Radiant Feldspar was transformed into a floating palace of music. Each time a new guest boarded the airship, he would always organize a grand concert and invite musicians from different star systems to perform at the event. He used the power of music to astound esteemed guests who were arriving at Penacony for the first time to their very beings.

During an unprecedented concert, Lukas successfully used the resonance of music to transport the listeners to the Grand Theater, creating the most miraculous of viewing experiences at the theater across that performance season. This feat not only garnered him glory and honor of the highest degree, it also added another amazing chapter to the legendary story of the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 如果重视知识却轻视身体，就如同用最好的墨水在最烂的纸张上书写。 1.门扉时 清醒后不要立即起床，而是在床上简单地伸展一下躯体，促进血液的流动。起床后以冷水洗脸，做祈祷、进行思维训练、吃第一餐（七成饱即可）。与民间常识相反，睡醒后至用餐前是进行抽象思维的最佳时间，不宜剧烈运动。 2.明晰时 这是一天中人们最为健谈、论辩最为敏捷的时段，身为学者应该积极参加学术活动和课题讨论（注意不要久坐或久站，以自由的站坐结合为宜）。作为调剂，可以在此时段组织如奇兽球、冲击球、棍球等团队项目作为锻炼（兼娱乐）内容。 3.践行时 在践行时，大家头脑中的灵光开始枯竭，是时候补充能量并投入体力活动了。在吃过第二餐后，稍作二十到三十分钟的休息，便可以开始慢跑活动（注意做好准备运动！）。有条件的人士可以用游泳代替慢跑，这能将运动对关节的损耗降至最低（注意：不要因噎废食，跑步是仅次于游泳的最佳锻炼方式，这绝不是拒绝跑步的理由）。 跑步或游泳的距离没有必然的标准，总体上每当你感到无法坚持需要休息的时候，就休息五分钟，然后进行新的一轮即可（注意：不可过度休息）。总锻炼时长控制在一小时之内为宜。如果恰好有某种劳动能够兼顾此类锻炼（如递送包裹等），那么适度参加这种劳动也是不错的选择。 如果在践行时没有诸如做实验、参与特种训练、进行社交活动或私人娱乐等事项安排，那么就可以在上述针对心肺耐力的锻炼结束后开展针对肌肉力量的锻炼科目。此种练习以每周2~4次为宜，保持自身肌肉的爆发力不致退化即可。此外，参与如前所述的种种团队项目也是不错的选择。 4.离愁时 经过践行时的刻苦锻炼，现在是享受第三餐的最佳时机。一定不要把每天的最后一餐拖进幕匿时！过晚用餐会给你的身体带来沉重的负担，让所有的锻炼都变得事倍功半。 享用第三餐之后，如果践行时的运动量已经较大，那么就可以将私人娱乐安排在这段时间；反之，则应该在此时段补足必要的锻炼项目（如心肺功能类）。 健身贵在坚持——没有人能把自己的时间表安排得天衣无缝不受任何因素的打扰，而所有人也都有惰性——关键是如何与这些无法避免的因素积极共存。因此，既不要因为某段时间没有及时锻炼就自暴自弃，也不要把所有的科目都拖延到每天的最后再加以解决。从经验上来说，结伴锻炼是最容易让人养成良好习惯的方式——而且这也方便去参加比个人项目更有趣味的团队项目。 总而言之……参与锻炼的同时要记得多交朋友！ 5.幕匿时 这是睡觉时间，你不应该做除了睡觉以外的任何事。切记：熬夜会让你的所有锻炼效果都大打折扣，并且会给第二天的生活增加种种不必要的风险和负担。 如果熬夜无法避免——那么宁可赖床，也不要强行早起。
E: Valuing knowledge over health is like writing with the finest ink on the cheapest parchment. 1. Entry Hour Do not get out of bed immediately after waking up. Instead, do some basic stretches to stimulate blood flow. After getting out of bed, wash your face with cold water, say your prayers, practice thought training, and have your first meal (only eat until about 70% full). Contrary to popular belief, the time between waking and eating is the best time for abstract thought. Intense exercise is not recommended. 2. Lucid Hour The time of the day in which people are most talkative and quick-minded in disputation. As a scholar, one should actively take part in academic activities and research discussions (make sure not to be seated for too long; it is better to freely switch between sitting and standing). Team sports such as beast ball, smash ball, and stickball can also be organized during this time as a change of pace (as well as entertainment). 3. Action Hour Action Hour is the time of day when everyone's brains begin to slow down and the time comes to charge your energy and engage in physical activity. After eating your second meal and resting for twenty to thirty minutes, you can begin jogging (please make ample preparations before exercising!) Those with extenuating circumstances can swim instead of jogging. This can reduce the damage to joints caused by exercise. (Note: Do not disregard jogging entirely for this reason. Jogging is the best form of exercise, second only to swimming. Joint damage is never an excuse not to jog.) There is no set requirement for the distance that you jog or swim. Generally, when you feel that you cannot continue any longer and must rest, then rest for five minutes before continuing. (Note: Do not take excessive rests). We recommend keeping your total exercise duration within one hour. If you happen to have a form of manual work that can replace this form of exercise (such as transporting packages etc.), then taking part in this kind of manual labor is also a good option. If you have no plans during Action Hour, such as conducting experiments, attending special training, joining social events, or personal recreation, you can begin a muscle strength training regimen straight after the aforementioned cardiovascular exercise program is complete. Strength training is best completed 2–4 times a week to maintain the explosive power of your muscles and prevent deterioration. Furthermore, participating in the various team activities mentioned above is also a good option. 4. Parting Hour Having completed the harsh training of Action Hour, now is the best time to enjoy your third meal of the day. Make sure you don't push your final meal of the day back to Curtain-Fall Hour every day! Eating too late in the day will place a heavy burden on your body and halve the effectiveness of all your exercise. After finishing your third meal, if you have already completed a considerable amount of exercise during Action Hour, you can use this time to engage in personal recreation activities. If not, this time should be used to supplement necessary daily exercise (such as those for cardiovascular function). Gaining muscle is about persistence — no one is capable of perfectly planning their time without interference from external factors, and everyone feels lethargic from time to time — the key is learning to coexist with these inevitable factors. Therefore, do not feel like just giving up because you were not able to exercise during a set time, and do not push all of your projects back to the end of the day and deal with them then. I can tell you from experience that exercising with others is the easiest way to nurture good habits. What's more, this also makes it easier for you to participate in group activities that are more interesting than solo ones. In short... Be sure to make lots of friends while you are exercising! 5. Curtain-Fall Hour This is the time for sleep. You should not engage in any activities other than sleep during this time. Remember: Staying up late will greatly decrease the effectiveness of all the exercise you do and make the next day that much harder, adding all kinds of unnecessary risks and strain. If you are unable to avoid staying up late, then it is best to sleep in and not force yourself to get up early.

C: 「恕我直言，这个宇宙里还有比克里珀更开明的董事长吗？祂默许我们的一切经营决策，从不质疑，从不过问——这是偌大的荣幸，偌大的信任！」 ——奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德，星际和平公司•市场开拓部主管，P47级 就对外宣传而言，公司是一家倡导自由贸易的巨型企业财团；从运作方式上来看，公司是发行货币并垄断资源的商界独裁；择创业初心而论，公司则是为「存护」的星神奉献一切的无私后援。 大多数星际公民谈到公司时，总会言及无所不在的商品与醒目标识：仿佛「只要存在交易之处，就存在星际和平公司」。事实上，银河中几乎所有的商业行为确是建立在公司的「信用点」体系之上。若将星际贸易比作运动比赛，那么公司既是顶尖的运动员，又是各种运动项目，既是比赛场地，同时还是规则本身。 对财富绝对的统治力，以及从未停止过的扩张行为，让星际和平公司产生了一种阴谋独裁者的大众印象。但是公司对于「只手遮天」之流的低等愿景毫不在意，因为企业精神自诞生之初就未曾变动： 将一切奉献给「琥珀王」——克里珀。
E: "With all due respect, is there anyone in the universe more enlightened than our chairman, Qlipoth? Qlipoth acquiesces in all our business decisions, never asking or questioning why. How great a privilege! How great a trust!" — Oswaldo Schneider, Head of Interastral Peace Corporation Marketing Development Department, Level P47 To outsiders, the IPC is an enormous consortium advocating free trade. From a business perspective, the IPC is a business that issues money and monopolizes resources. From a startup perspective, the IPC is a selfless support group dedicated to the Aeon of Preservation. When many astral citizens talk about the IPC, they talk about its ubiquitous merchandise and logo. It's as if "The IPC exists whenever there is a transaction." In fact, almost all business transactions in the cosmos are based on the credit system created by the IPC. If one were to compare interastral trade to a sports competition, the IPC would be the top athletes as well as the sports, the venue, and the rules themselves. Its absolute dominance over wealth and relentless expansion has given the IPC the image of a conspiratorial business dictatorship. But the IPC pays little attention to lowly ambitions such as dictatorship, because its spirit hasn't wavered since its creation: Give everything to the Amber Lord, Qlipoth.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality — that it, in fact, preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 「百货川流，奇珍织云」的运输港埠。流云渡终日吞吐着来自不同世界的巨量货物。
E: A cargo port where countless items from all corners of the cosmos pass through. Every day, Cloudford unceasingly handles huge amounts of port traffic from various worlds.

C: 丹鼎司中收藏卷宗医典的楼阁，望海而立，据传不允许任何机巧之物靠近。
E: A building where the Alchemy Commission's medicinal texts are kept. Looking out over the sea, rumor has it that all robots are forbidden to approach this building.

C: 竞锋舰停泊星槎的区域，也是观看演武仪典的客人踏足竞锋舰的落地之处。
E: The area where the starskiffs dock at the Skysplitter. This is also where guests arriving to watch the Wardance ceremony first set foot on the Skysplitter.

C: 汇集所有知识的藏书地，浪漫的化身将心脏悬置，奉献于根系间，提醒到此的求学者勿忘友亲之爱。
E: A repository of all knowledge, where the embodiment of romance suspends its heart, offering it among the roots as a reminder to scholars who arrive here to never forget the love of friends and family.

C: 埋葬历史的低洼残垣，欢宴的主人在此处立起石碑、拱以白烛，纪念为了这个世界献出生命与信仰的人们。
E: Among the sunken ruins that buried history, the master of the feast erected a stone monument, surrounded by white candles, to commemorate those who sacrificed their lives and faith for this world.

C: 与砾石漫天的归墟入口不同，诡计的力量将此地改造为一片花园，为那囚徒的噩梦增添一丝宁静。
E: In contrast to the rubble-strewn entrance of the Ruins of Time, the power of Trickery has reshaped this place into a garden, adding a touch of tranquility to the prisoner's nightmare.

C: 分布在世界各个角落的战利品，开启后可获取奖励。
E: Treasures scattered throughout the world. Open them to obtain rewards.

C: 贝洛伯格上层区的自动售货机，只收现金冬城盾，不接受信用点交易。出售的商品只能用「神秘」二字形容。
E: A vending machine in the Belobog Overworld that only transacts in shield, not credits. The merchandise that was sold can only be described as mysterious.

C: 于数百年前狐人巧匠打造的园林洞天，以供游客们休憩闲游、赋诗宴饮——如今「绥园闹鬼」谣言不胫而走。
E: A garden delve created centuries ago by foxian crafters. This place offers visitors a place to enjoy a leisurely stroll or compose lyrical poetry during a festive banquet. At present, rumors that Fyxestroll Garden has been "haunted" are spreading like wildfire.

C: 降魔机巧鸟停驻的栖木，用以收集逸散岁阳。
E: Roost used by exorcist cycranes to collect dispersed heliobi.

C: 您着装，棉帛、金属、皮革；您打扮，饰品、妆容、香薰…您的躯体光彩夺目，而灵魂常怀渴慕。\n敬请光临本店——无论您想为灵魂的面具增添怎样的花色与纹路，我们总能提供优质服务。
E: You are dressed. Fine clothes, metals, leather. You are decorated. Accessories, make-up, fragrances... Your body is radiant, and your soul harbors desires.\nWelcome to our shop — No matter what kind of colors and patterns you wish to add to the mask of your soul, we will always be able to provide top-tier service.

C: 梦境里有些特殊的人，是猎犬的重点观察对象。眼下伍尔西为你指出了其中一个，不妨过去瞧瞧吧？
E: In the Dreamscape, certain individuals have drawn the attention of the Bloodhounds. Woolsey has identified one of them for your investigation, so why not proceed and explore further?

C: 寒潮降临后逡巡在裂界中的虚影。它扭曲地模仿着银鬃铁卫的身形。其甲胄着装与贝洛伯格的战士们同样严整，头颅却被没有五官的燃烬所取代。
E: Shades that wander in the Fragmentum after the arrival of the Eternal Freeze. It mimics the form of the Silvermane Guards in a twisted manner. Fitted with the same uniformed armors of the Belobog warriors, its head, however, is replaced by burned ashes.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，蕴藏掠夺而来的「理性」。被制造出来的意义并非是研究普遍的知识，而是钻研杀戮的兵法与弱肉强食的残酷理论，散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They contain plundered "rationality" within their vessels. The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

C: 所有铁卫敌人在发现我方后进入警觉状态，在警觉状态下进入战斗后敌方全体立即行动。当我方没有触发敌人警觉状态的情况下进入战斗，敌方全体会受到大量物理伤害
E: Upon discovering targets, all Silvermane Guard enemies become Alert. Entering battle while Alerted will make all enemies take action immediately. If battle is triggered without the Silvermane Guards becoming Alert, all enemies will suffer massive Physical DMG.

C: 通过解析<color=#f29e38ff>「骇入声明」</color>涂鸦模拟银狼的攻击算法，每回合对敌方目标造成量子属性伤害。该伤害无视弱点属性削减敌方全体的韧性，当该伤害击破敌方目标弱点时，触发量子属性的弱点击破效果。强度等级2。
E: By analyzing <color=#f29e38ff>hacking callcard</color> graffiti and simulating Silver Wolf's attack algorithms, deal Quantum DMG to the enemies every turn. This DMG reduces all enemies' Toughness regardless of their Weakness Type. When this DMG inflicts Weakness Break to an enemy, it will trigger the Quantum Weakness Break effect. Power Level 2.

C: 弱点击破效率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 消耗战技点时，大概率恢复<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>个战技点。
E: When consuming Skill Points, there is a high chance of regenerating <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s).

C: 将造成持续伤害的【雷电荆棘】施加于一名敌方目标，敌方目标每回合开始时受到等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的雷属性持续伤害，并弹射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>次，弹射伤害为原伤害的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>。【雷电荆棘】在敌方目标被消灭时转移给另一个敌方目标。
E: Applies DoT-dealing Thunderbolt Thorns to an enemy target. At the start of each turn, this enemy target receives Lightning DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG, and the DMG bounces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color> time(s), dealing DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG. Thunderbolt Thorns will be transferred to another enemy target when the original target is defeated.

C: 召唤速度为<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]</unbreak>)}</color>的【寒霜灭火器】，行动时对敌方全体造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的冰属性伤害，并有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>的基础概率使敌方目标陷入冻结状态，冻结状态下，敌方目标无法行动，且每回合开始时受到等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C4#(+<unbreak>#16[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的冰属性附加伤害，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: Summon "Icy Fire Extinguisher" that has <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]</unbreak>)}</color> SPD. When it takes action, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to all enemies, with a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> base chance of inflicting Freeze on the enemy targets. While Frozen, enemy targets cannot take action and take Ice Additional DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C4# (+<unbreak>#16[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG at the start of every turn, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 我方目标及武器造成的冰、火属性伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: Ice and Fire DMG dealt by ally targets and weapons increase by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 敌方全体受到伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color></color>，非首领敌人首次进入战斗后自身生命值降低至<color=#f29e38ff>生命上限的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color></color>。
E: Increases all enemies' DMG received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>. When non-boss enemies first enter battle, their HP will be lowered by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> of their <color=#f29e38ff>Max HP</color>.

C: 敌方全体受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color></color>。\n进入「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」时，将所有非首领敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>变为扑满</color>，消灭扑满时为敌方全体附加<color=#f29e38ff>1层【<u>疲惫</u>】</color>，每层【<u>疲惫</u>】使得敌方目标受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak></color>层</color>，持续至本阶段结束。
E: Increases DMG received by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nAfter entering "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," all non-boss enemies are <color=#f29e38ff>turned into Trotters</color> and defeating the Trotters will inflict <color=#f29e38ff>1 stack of <u>Fatigue</u></color> on all enemies. Each stack of <u>Fatigue</u> increases enemy targets' DMG received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) and lasting till the current phase ends.

C: 拥有<color=#f29e38ff>【坚防守备】</color>的敌方单位被<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破</color>时，使我方全体角色恢复战技点并激活终结技。\n敌方全体受到的弱点击破伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，追加攻击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: When an enemy unit with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> is <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, recovers Skill Points for all ally characters and activates their Ultimates.\nIncreases the Weakness Break DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and increases Follow-Up ATK DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方全体造成的战技和终结技伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases all allies' Skill DMG and Ultimate DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方目标施放战技后，【晦月环刃】发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>次量子刃，对随机敌方目标造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害，并对其相邻敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>伤害。
E: After an ally target uses a Skill, "Waning Selenic Chakram" fires <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color> Quantum blade(s), dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to a random enemy target and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> DMG to adjacent enemy targets.

C: 召唤速度为<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]</unbreak>)}</color>的【幸运轮盘】，行动时对随机敌方目标发射【虚数筹码】，共发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#16[i]</unbreak>)}</color>次。筹码提供1~6点计数，对敌方首领目标触发暴击时额外使计数提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>点，对其他敌方目标触发暴击时将其标记为钻石，钻石会直接将其消灭并提供额外经验，对精英敌方目标标记概率降低。计数结束后，每点计数对敌方目标造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#13[i]</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的虚数属性伤害。
E: Summons "Lucky Roulette" that has <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]</unbreak>)}</color> SPD. When taking action, fires "Imaginary Chip" at a random enemy target for a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#16[i]</unbreak>)}</color> time(s). The chip adds a tally number from 1 to 6, and is further increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> when dealing a CRIT Hit to an enemy boss. When dealing a CRIT Hit to other enemy targets, it will leave a diamond mark. The diamond mark immediately eliminates the marked target while providing additional Experience and reducing the probability of marking an Elite Enemy. When the tally finishes, every point of the tally deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#13[i]</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to the target enemy.

C: 所有敌方目标入场时损失等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的生命值
E: All enemy targets lose HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP when they enter the field

C: 首领幻影会在战斗中切换自身<color=#f29e38ff><u>战斗姿态</u></color>，召唤不同雕塑进行战斗；我方消灭处于【灵魂释放】状态的雕塑时，会使本次战斗中我方全体造成的伤害提高。
E: Boss Mirage can switch its own <color=#f29e38ff><u>Combat Stance</u></color> in battle and summon different statues to fight. When characters defeat statues in the "Soulfreed" state, DMG dealt by the team in this battle will be increased.

E: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness-Type</color> they have increases DMG received.

C: 在一阶段，首领幻影在切换形态时会回复召唤物<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命值。
E: In Phase I, when Boss Mirage changes form, the summons will restore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> HP.

E: Steelbone Summit

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为银鬃铁卫的戍卫长。\n杰帕德（完整）会指挥麾下士兵集中攻击，并且能为士兵提供抵挡攻击伤害的护盾。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is the leader of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard (Complete) can command his soldiers to focus their attacks and offer soldiers a shield to block attacks.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，少见的人形机械，其右臂部分统一装置着链锯，似乎曾用于采集或建造作业。\n战斗中，自动机兵「齿狼」的链锯会造成裂伤，令对手持续损失生命值。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an automaton pieced together with Old World technology. This rare type of humanoid automaton is equipped with a chainsaw on its right arm, presumably used for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Direwolf will use its chainsaw to Bleed enemies, dealing DoT.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为刻录着《十王武经》，听命于十王司的执法金人。\n血肉易受五阴之苦所执，唯有金铁不动其心，奉行十王敕令不渝。\n这些金人执法者以力降伏脱离生命秩序的邪物，将之带入幽府，接受判罚，其权限有时甚于判官。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a law-enforcing aurumaton engraved with the Ten-Lords Martial Scriptures and taking orders from the Ten-Lords Commission.\nLiving beings are susceptible to the corporeal and mental existence of the self, but gold and metal will never be swayed and will unwaveringly follow the Ten-Lords' edicts.\nThese aurumaton law enforcers use their strength to subdue evils that have strayed from the natural order of life, and bring them to the Netherworld to meet their sentence. Its authority is sometimes even greater than that of a judge.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为由「建木」化生，拱卫其根系的灵瑞之兽，履迹所之，和泽滋生，枝杪郁敷。\n自毁于太古时代的战争后，「建木」终于在星核的修补下再度生长。彼时仙人们所造的珍禽奇兽纷至沓来，宛如旧梦重临。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an auspicious spiritual beast wrought into being by the Ambrosial Arbor to protects its roots. Its arrival brings along exuberant vegetation and promises good fortune.\nOnce destroyed during ancient wars, the Ambrosial Arbor is mended by the Stellaron and finally revives. Rare creatures and legendary beasts made by celestials of the past all return to this world, like an old dream coming alive again.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为原本是搭载了财富学院教材的「幸运贩售」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。市场中蕉黠的头脑便是最强的武器，腹中满是福祸难测的蕉易，令猴蕉绿不已。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referenced entity is a Fortune Seller loaded with the Fortune Academy syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. A brain as cunning as bananas is the best weapon in the market, and the banaxchanges full of unpredictable outcomes are banastressing out the monkeys.

C: 它的矛尖划定了疆界，无边无际。\n疆界之中的军与民，皆是被征服或将被征服的。\n畏怖者的血成为滋养神躯的蜜酿，抗争者的魂灵踏入冥河下的荣耀殿堂。
E: The tip of its spear has drawn a boundless border.\nThe people and soldiers within the border are marked as conquered, or ones to be conquered.\nThe blood of the fearful will become honey brew for the divine body, and the souls of the defiant will walk into the palace of glory under the River of Souls.

C: 「扰乱世间者不得存留，贪婪者无应苟活；狡诈多变之混沌，是之为宇宙秽尘废埃也。」 (♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭6 1· - - | - - - - ‖♬ " Secréiat Ineional es mpers"。1894-193 ——VGhlIFZvaWNlIGZyb20gdGhlIE91dGVyIFdvcmxk 「天外合唱班」自认世界的本源诞自「秩序」太一之纶音。当祂开口宣言，事物便诞生；蒙受各自唯一的记号，万物得以维持「存在」不受侵蚀。其后，离散的音节首尾相连，重重段落结成韵律，谱写兴起后又湮灭的帝国、城邦、文明，最终织作时间的交响。 在星神尚未陨落的时代，常有清灵祥兆自深空响起——那是宏伟奇观于远方落成时，彼处信众欢呼颂唱之佳音。他处信众则闻声交互感应，捕获乐理，反哺文明，秉受擢升，献唱新的赞歌。渺渺回响于是激荡寰宇，太一庇护遍及宇宙，星间灾祸皆被钳制，万事万物归于一统，共存共荣，永在「秩序」之中。 而「天外合唱班」之欢颂，即是祂自己的声音。而今祂已陨落，其音律融入同一阙谐乐之中，终于无迹可寻…… …但事实并非如此。已有迹象表明，昔日的回声已然成为「不协和音」，意图从和谐一致的共唱中分离，重新奏响「秩序」的颂歌。
E: "The troublemakers shall not remain, and the greedy shall not be spared. The treacherous and fickle chaos is what contaminates the universe." (♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭6 1· - - | - - - - ‖♬ " Secréiat Ineional es mpers." 1894-193) ——VGhlIFZvaWNlIGZyb20gdGhlIE91dGVyIFdvcmxk The Beyond the Sky Choir believes that the world's origin emanated from the resounding harmony of Ena the Order. Through THEIR utterance, creations materialized, each bearing its unique symbol, preserving their existence against corrosion. Subsequently, these discrete syllables intertwined, forming a rhythmic tapestry of passages that chronicled the rise and fall of cities, empires, and civilizations. Ultimately, they converged into a grand symphony of time. In the era preceding Ena's fall, celestial signs often graced the vast expanse. It was a jubilant chorus that resounded whenever a grand spectacle was established in a distant realm. Believers from all realms would perceive the sound, drawing inspiration from the spectacle and composing new hymns. As a result, the reverberations of Ena's harmonious melodies spread throughout the universe, quelling calamities and fostering unity and prosperity in the name of the Order. The chant of the Beyond the Sky Choir is believed to represent Ena's voice. However, with THEIR demise, THEIR voice merges into the harmonious music, vanishing without a trace... ...Nevertheless, this interpretation is not entirely accurate. There are indications that the echoes of the past have become discordant notes, attempting to break free from the unified harmony and resuming the chant of the Order.

C: 源究森林 - 智识
E: AtaviSearch Forest — Erudition

C: 「权杖」系统（科技）
E: Scepter System (Technology)

C: 浇奠
E: Libation

C:
uid:#1
您的账号已被封禁至
#2
详情请咨询客服
E:
UID: #1
Your account has been suspended until
#2
Please contact Customer Service for details

C: 总决赛第二轮
E: Grand Finale, Round 2

C: 别忘了二百零三层的宴会厅，每天都要举办三场集体葬礼。
E: And let's not forget the grand hall on the two-hundred-and-third floor, where three mass funerals are conducted daily.

C: 在奥帝商业中心进行「阅读」相关的消费
E: Make a "reading-related" expenditure at the Oti Mall

C: 发现梦境中温馨的玩具房
E: Discover the comforting toy room in the Dreamscape

C: 找到梦境酒店内僻静的书房
E: Find the quiet study in the hotel in the Dreamscape

C: 通过弹珠机到达哈努兄弟主题区的隐藏区域，发现被困的游客
E: Use the Pinball Machine to reach the hidden area in the Brother Hanu section and find the trapped tourists

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 在巨型梦境迷钟关卡的终点拾取
E: Obtained at the end of the giant Dream Ticker stage

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 你与遐蝶、缇安在启蒙王座发现伤重倒地的那刻夏，以及散发出极度危险气息的黑袍剑士。剑士声称，要消灭你们，三斩足矣。
E: You, Castorice, and Trianne found Anaxa severely injured at the Luminary Throne, beside a black-robed swordmaster radiating intense danger. The swordmaster declared that three slashes would suffice to destroy your entire group.

C: 遐蝶以贤者之石启动炼金法阵。冥河之水如浪潮翻涌，崭新血肉自死龙枯骨上复生。
E: Castorice activated the alchemical matrix with the Philosopher's Stone. The waters of the River of Souls surged like tides while new flesh grew on the Netherwing's dried bones.

C: 在先祖赐福的助力下，风堇于黎明云崖架设起通往天空的彩虹桥。「各位，请同我一起飞翔吧。」
E: With the help of the Ancestors' Benediction, Hyacine raised a rainbow bridge to the skies above Dawncloud. "Friends, let us soar together!"

C: 德谬歌突破牢笼，化作迷迷模样，在列车车厢与你相遇。
E: Demiurge broke free from its cage, transformed into a Mem, and met you in the Express Car.

C: 你与三月七、丹恒发现一处关闭的大门，开关就在不远处，但是必须先解决掉附近游荡的怪物。
E: Inside the Fragmentum, March 7th, Dan Heng, and you found a sealed gate. The control switch wasn't far, but monsters nearby needed to be cleared first.

C: 在光怪陆离的梦境中，黄泉以五个问题来「感受」你的存在。黄泉请你相信，黑白的世界中会有一点<color=#ff3a3e>红色</color>示现，伴你做出抉择。
E: In the weird Dreamscape, Acheron "felt" your existence with five questions. Acheron asked you to trust that a world of black and white would also have a bit of <color=#ff3a3e>red</color> in it, and it would accompany you when you make your choices.

C: 「未来的自己」揭露砂金的计划。装在礼金袋中、被星期日发现并没收的完整基石并非「砂金」，而是<color=#f29e38ff>「翡翠」</color>。真正的「砂金石」在出发前就被砸碎，混杂在廉价的珠宝中。砂金必须铤而走险、骗过家族，以在梦境中取回力量。
E: "His future self" revealed Aventurine's plan. The intact Cornerstone found in the bag of gifts and discovered and confiscated by Sunday was not "Aventurine," but <color=#f29e38ff>"Jade"</color>. The real "Aventurine" had already been shattered before he left for Penacony, scattered among cheap stones. Aventurine had to take a risky gamble and deceive The Family to reclaim his power within the Dreamscape.

C: 停云在黑塔空间站苏醒，阮•梅唤她走出混沌，引导她面对毁灭后的伤痕。
E: Tingyun woke up at the Herta Space Station. Ruan Mei called for her to walk out of the chaos and guided her to face her scars after her destruction.

C: 一只狼卒在战斗中逃离，向同伴回报示警。飞霄称是自己允许狼卒逃走，其会带领云骑找到呼雷的下落。
E: A Wolftrooper escaped during battle to warn his companions. Feixiao explained she deliberately allowed it, knowing the Wolftrooper would unknowingly lead the Cloud Knights straight to Hoolay's hideout.

C: 你尝试发送短信，发现超距通信受到干扰。瓦尔特猜想是星核猎手银狼动了手脚，使你们无法联系同伴。
E: You attempted to send a message, only to find that the long-range communication was being disrupted. Welt speculated that the Stellaron Hunter Silver Wolf had tampered with the system, preventing you from contacting your companions.

C: 你们看到一尊把守阵法的金人。三月七担心金人失控暴起，果然不幸言中。
E: You saw an aurumaton watching over the matrix. March 7th became worried that the aurumaton may go out of control and fight against you. Unfortunately, she was right.

C: 公输师傅向你们介绍「换境画屏」，可以在两个空间坐标间传送物体。除此之外，工造司还有一项神秘武器。
E: Master Gongshu introduced the shifting screen, capable of teleporting objects between places. He hinted at another classified weapon within the Artisanship Commission.

C: 关闭所有小丹炉后，烟雾不再产生。符玄得知你们已经成功，率军前来汇合。
E: With all elixir crucibles shut down, the smoke dissipated. Fu Xuan, informed of your success, rallied her troops to regroup with you.

C: 驭空介绍，「慰灵奠仪」是狐人所重视的葬礼。逝者们的遗物将被放上星槎，送出仙舟，航入恒星，与之同辉。
E: Yukong introduced the soul-soothing ceremony, a significant funeral rite for the foxians. The items of the dead would be placed in a starskiff and sent out of Xianzhou, where they could shine brilliantly among the stars.

C: 流萤询问你玩得是否开心，她再次感谢你出手相助，由此才有机会与你分享这座乐园。流萤希望你靠近些，她有一个问题想要问你。
E: Firefly asked if you're having fun, and thanked you again for stepping in on her behalf. It's because of this that she had a chance to share in this paradise with you. Firefly asked you to come closer, because she had a question for you.

C: 你们最终以一场纯美骑士道对决赢得银枝认可，并取得了冠军资格。
E: Through a duel of the Beauty's Code of Chivalry, you ultimately earned Argenti's respect and secured the final qualification for the championship.

C: 放任追捕虽合规，却令逐梦客在梦中挣扎至绝望死去。
E: Allowing the pursuit was legal, but the Dreamchaser struggled within the dream and perished in despair.

C: 黑天鹅报告找到<unbreak>131</unbreak>个娃娃，均为虚假炸弹，你们只得继续排查。
E: Black Swan reported finding <unbreak>131</unbreak> dolls, all of which were fake bombs. You had to keep looking.

C: 「叆叇馆主」询问，对乱破使用模因病毒是否会对实验有帮助。「苦茶大师」称这能够提升精神抗性，让乱破顺利完成后续实验。
E: Umbra Headmistress asked if using the memetic virus on Rappa would help with the experiment. Master Kucha stated that it would enhance mental resistance, allowing Rappa to complete the subsequent experiments smoothly.

C: 波提欧遇到一群焦急的居民，他们向波提欧请求帮助。波提欧反而给他们指出通往舞池的道路，称只要跳一曲，事情就能解决。
E: Boothill encountered a group of anxious residents who begged him for help. Instead, Boothill pointed them towards the dance floor, claiming that one dance would solve everything.

C: 缇安为你们打开「百界门」，创造出去往悬锋城的途径。临出发时，丹恒将三月七的相机交给你，嘱咐你保护好自己，等你回来。
E: Trianne opened the Century Gate, making a path to Castrum Kremnos. Before you left, Dan Heng handed you March 7th's camera and told you to take care of yourself and return safely.

C: 你们调查书架，发现满是城邦地理志和关于泰坦信仰的文献。缇宁称为将神谕传遍大地，缇里西庇俄丝想要提前了解各地的风土人情。
E: You investigated the bookshelves and found them filled with city-state geographies and literature about Titan beliefs. Trinnon said to spread the prophecy across the Earth, Tribios wanted to learn about the local customs and cultures in advance.

C: 阿格莱雅人性将尽，在议会辩论中不慎将自己置于民众的对立面。她需要白厄加入辩场，为逐火之旅与黄金裔争取多数民众的支持。
E: With Aglaea's humanity dwindling, she carelessly made herself a target of the citizens' opposition. She asked Phainon to step up and enter the debate to win the people's support for the Flame-Chase Journey and the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 凯妮斯计划以拒绝试炼来消除「死亡」，遐蝶会在那刻夏的指引下寻找塞纳托斯。来古士宣布公民大会的议题变更为「暂停逐火之旅」。
E: Caenis planned to reject the trial of "Death" to remove "Death" from the world, and to have Anaxa lead Castorice to seek Thanatos. Lygus decreed that the issue up for discussion at the citizens' assembly would be modified to the "Suspension of the Flame-Chase Journey."

C: 你与遐蝶抵达斯缇科西亚，意外发现迷迷也在。遐蝶认为那刻夏所炼制的贤者之石或许能吸引「死亡」泰坦，你们于是向城内探索。
E: You and Castorice reached Styxia together with Mem, who had tagged along. Castorice believed that Anaxa's Philosopher's Stone could summon the Death Titan, and so the two of you began your exploration of the city.

C: 原先未能完成的画，如今缇安终于能将其交给遐蝶。童真的笔触绘出「逐火之旅」的伙伴们，激起遐蝶对自身所行逐火旅途的回忆。
E: It was a drawing, the same one that Trianne didn't manage to finish before. Childlike, innocent strokes of colored pencil illustrated the likenesses of each of her companions in the Flame-Chase Journey. The drawing reminded Castorice of her own memories of the Journey.

C: 赛飞儿要求你先陪她打捞宝藏，之后会将你送去与白厄会合。命运的箴言为赛飞儿揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文。」</color>
E: Cipher sought your help in salvaging treasures, after which she would send you to meet Phainon. Such was the prophecy that had been revealed to her: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change."</color>

C: 老奥帝以打造新娱乐盛典为目的策划「圣杯战争」，斯科特以晋升P<unbreak>45</unbreak>职级为愿参战。芮克先生与葛瑞迪灵基融合，以记录参战经历。
E: Old Oti produced the Holy Grail War to craft a new entertainment marvel, while Skott joined with a wish of being promoted to P<unbreak>45</unbreak>. Mr. Reca fused with Grady's Spirit Origin to record the experience of participating in the War.

C: 你来到热砂时刻，即将踏入召唤阵，念动咒语，召唤英灵。
E: You arrived at the Moment of Scorchsand, ready to step into the summoning circle, chant the incantation, and summon a Heroic Spirit.

C: 被你击败后，由本体分裂出的众多斯科特相互指责，甚至还埋怨起葛瑞迪。葛瑞迪对斯科特的表现感到失望，将你们传送去下一场电影。
E: After you defeated Skott, the many versions of him that had split from the original started blaming each other, and even threw shade at Grady. Disappointed at Skott's performance, Grady warped you all into the next movie.

C: 残像中，又一次，史诗迎来了尾声。昔涟留下「记忆」，随后在格式化中消散，将「明天」托付给下一位「昔涟」继续守候。
E: In the afterimage, the epic came to an end once again. Cyrene left the "memories" behind and dissipated during formatting, entrusting "tomorrow" to the next "Cyrene" to watch over.

C: 在德谬歌监牢，在格式化进程完成前，每个轮回的昔涟都会向权杖讲述逐火之旅的故事。于是，「记忆的种子」诞生。
E: In Demiurge's prison, before the formatting process was completed, Cyrene of each cycle told the Scepter stories of the Flame-Chase Journey. Thus, the Seed of Memory was born.

C: 万敌推崇武力，刻律德菈则强调制度，二者在政治观点上针锋相对。阿格莱雅向你保证，她会看好这两位黄金裔。
E: While Mydei advocated for military might, Cerydra emphasized order. Their political views were at odds. Aglaea assured you she would keep an eye on these two Chrysos Heirs.

C: 在命运重渊，迷迷听到列车车厢坠毁的巨大声响。迷迷有些害怕，但它还是决定去看看情况。
E: In the Abyss of Fate, Mem heard the deafening sound of the Express crashing. Despite feeling scared, Mem decided to check out what happened.

C: 伦纳德介绍，朋克洛德的骇客喜欢在入侵时故意留下线索，以此作为待发现的挑战书，正如银狼的涂鸦。这被称为是「朋克洛德精神」。
E: Leonard explained that Punklorde's hackers often left clues during intrusions as a kind of open challenge, just like Silver Wolf's graffiti. This was known as the "Punklorde mentality."

C: 你来到收容舱段，发现科员们高呼「芝士流心」之名。科员向你介绍，只要把「爱心」贴满阮•梅曾路过的地方，芝士流心就会现身。
E: You arrived at the storage zone and found researchers chanting the name of "Molten Cheese Tart." They told you that placing "heart" stickers on every spot Ruan Mei had visited would make the Molten Cheese Tart appear.

C: 费斯曼感谢你出手相助，认出你是娜塔莎提到过的外来者。费斯曼想要寻找被偷走的「矿脉探测器」，你与虎克强行带他回诊所治疗。
E: Fersman thanked you for your help, recognizing you as the outsider Natasha mentioned. Fersman wanted to find the stolen "vein detector," but you and Hook forcibly took him back to the clinic for treatment.

C: 在「小飞」的追踪下， 你们找到偷走「大奔」的窃贼。窃贼拒绝物归原主，希儿和卢卡决定让其尝尝苦头。
E: With Little Fay's navigation, you found the thief who had taken Big Ben. The thief refused to return it, so Seele and Luka decided to teach them a lesson.

C: 你们周围出现了隐形的刺客。
E: Invisible assassins appeared around you.

C: 黑天鹅和桑博见到了警长和副警长。这次，名叫<color=#f29e38ff>花火</color>的银河富商在试衣间<color=#f29e38ff>被勒死</color>了，三位嫌疑人的名字依然是<color=#f29e38ff>阿佑、钟珊和佐罗</color>。
E: Black Swan and Sampo met the Sheriff and Deputy Sheriff. In this new case, a galactic business magnate named <color=#f29e38ff>Sparkle</color> had been <color=#f29e38ff>strangled to death</color> in a fitting room, with the same three suspects: <color=#f29e38ff>Wright, Zhongshan, and Lefton</color>.

C: 彦卿引各位眺望天空，远处那艘飞舰，就是本次演武仪典的赛场——「竞锋舰」。
E: Yanqing guided everyone to gaze at the sky, where in the distance, that airship was the Skysplitter, the venue for this Wardance ceremony.

C: 三月七与彦卿、云璃来到一个箱子旁，钻了进去。箱底的悬浮机关被启动，载着三位剑客想着前方缓缓飘行。
E: March 7th, Yanqing, and Yunli approached a crate and climbed inside. The floating mechanism at the bottom activated, carrying the three of them slowly forward.

C: 雪衣介绍呼雷罪责，强调其极度危险，并重申探视禁忌事宜。服下能抵御「狼毒」信息素的丹药后，椒丘与貊泽前往底层探视。
E: Xueyi explained Hoolay's crimes, emphasizing his extreme danger, and reiterated the visitation instructions. After taking pellets that resist the Lupitoxin pheromones, Jiaoqiu and Moze headed to the crypts for the visit.

C: 至此，「猎狼计划」顺利收场。你与貊泽找到了奄奄一息的椒丘，而「呼雷越狱」一事，仍有最后一笔账等待清算。
E: With this, the "Wolfhunt Showdown" concluded. You and Moze found the dying Jiaoqiu. And there's one more business that must be settled with the affair around Hoolay's jailbreak.

C: 晴霓找你们聊天，她认为驭空在飞行这件事上对她的管教太严。瓦尔特以亲身体验劝解晴霓，而晴霓则决定带你们尝尝罗浮本地小吃。
E: Qingni came to chat with you, complaining that Yukong was being too strict about her dreams of flying. Welt spoke from experience to comfort her, and Qingni invited you all to try some local Luofu snacks.

C: 功夫不负有心人……
E: Hard work pays off...

C: 旅途定格为瞬间，瞬间连缀成回忆，回忆讲述为故事…「开拓」之旅仍在继续，故事也不会就此停止。
E: The journey freezes into moments, moments weave into memories, and memories tell a story... The Trailblaze expedition continues, and the story will not end here.

C: 差分宇宙
E: Divergent Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: <color=#f29e38ff>会场增益</color>发生变化了，选择合适的助理
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>venue buffs</color> have changed. Choose the right assistant.

C: 无视警告，启用实验级武器。
E: Ignore the warnings and activate the experimental weapon.

C: 帮他批阅「公文」！
E: Help him process these "documents"!

C: 原来是刺绣啊…
E: Ah, it's just embroidery...

C: 可别变成自灭者了。
E: Don't turn into a Self-Annihilator, now.

C: 嘴越是硬，心越是软。
E: The tougher one's words, the softer their heart.

C: （重启成功）「救救鼠鼠。」
E: (Restart successful) "Help the mouse."

C: 该死的好奇心折磨着你。
E: Curiosity is eating you alive.

C: 某种程度上也算是「幻想杀手」了。
E: You could call it a "Fantasy Killer" of sorts.

C: 瓦尔特
E: Welt

C: 黑塔画像
E: Herta's Portrait

C: 特别来宾
E: Special Guest

C: 一步登天
E: Instant Success

C: 麻将桌
E: Mahjong Table

C: 造化洪炉
E: Creation Furnace

C: 书架
E: Bookshelf

C: 沙盘模型
E: Sandpit Model

C: 启动「银河球棒侠传说」
E: Start "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer"

C: 站牌
E: Signpost

C: 救生球

C:
漫长旅途的滋味并不好受，而形单影只的奥克莱早已习惯。奥克莱总是蹬上马靴，去往那些无人问津的边陲世界，领取微不足道的赏金。

因为她有一种直觉：那个神秘枪手也不是个合群的人，他们的相遇必然不是个热闹的地方。

得到口琴之后，断断续续的练习曲消磨掉了她大部分孤独的时间，路过的听众也不过狼蛛、沙尘以及风滚草而已。奥克莱独自消遣的技巧在旅程之中愈发熟练，曾有风儿为之驻足，曲终方散。公司向赏金客们提供了星际旅行的可能，孤独的枪手从不挑剔去往何方。

神秘的枪手销声匿迹已久，说不定自己只是在追逐着幻影。但是她只是一次又一次地出发而已。

奥克莱笃信着，只要「野穗」的名声足够响亮，神秘枪手就会找上自己，就像当时他闯入牧场找上父亲一样。
E:
The journey was long and arduous, but Oakley was long used to such loneliness. She was always wearing her riding boots to march to the farthest reaches of the world, regardless of how meager a pay she would get.

She had a hunch — that mysterious gunslinger must also be a man of seclusion. Their encounter would inevitably occur at a place frequented by few.

After coming by a harmonica, Oakley spent most of her alone time on intermittent practicing of songs. Her audience? No one but tarantulas, sandstorms, and tumbleweeds. Through her journey, Oakley was becoming better at coming up with techniques to kill time. It was said that wind had once stood and listened to Oakley's play on the harmonica, only leaving when the whole song came to an end. The IPC offered bounty hunters plenty of opportunities for interstellar traveling, and the destination was never a concern for this particular lone musketeer.

Sometimes Oakley did wonder if she was just chasing a phantom all this time, since that mysterious gunslinger was long gone without a trace. Sometimes it seemed that all Oakley ever did was to set out for one mission after another.

Oakley insisted, however, that as long as her fame as the Wild Wheat was far-reaching enough, the mysterious gunslinger would eventually show up at her door, just like how he once did at the ranch to duel her father.

C:
净庭教会已经崩塌，萨菲娜卸下骑士的铁靴，和圣女瓦妮拉踏上前往恶魔之乡的远行。

在圣女的恳求下，萨菲娜没有让任何教宗骑士将疯病带离教廷，秘密被永远留在她们心中。

不知何时，人们听说了一个传言：被教会驱逐的恶魔后裔附身在圣洁的肃静骑士身上，邪恶的魔女驱使着骑士破坏了教宗的秩序…传言化为了「真相」，虔诚的信徒将绝望和疯狂倾泻在肃静骑士的身上，将她看作是一切的罪魁祸首。

失去了容身之所之后，圣女提出了归乡远行的建议。

「从此，我成为了魔女，你变回了恶魔。」面对瓦妮拉的说法，萨菲娜无法否认。
E:
After the collapse of the Church of Purity Palace, Safina took off the knight's iron boots and embarked with Maiden Vanira on a long journey to the land of devils.

At the request of the Maiden, Safina did not let any Knights of the Church carry the madness out of the Church. This secret was forever buried deep down in their hearts.

No one knew when this rumor started — a devil-spawn once banished by the Church had possessed the holy Solemn Knight, and an evil witch drove the Knight to break down the order of the pontiff... As time passed, rumors became truths. The devout followers of the Church blamed it all on the Solemn Knight, dumping all their desperation and madness onto her, deeming her as the source of all disasters.

After losing their place of refuge, the Maiden suggested that they should set forth for their homeland.

"Henceforth, I will become a witch, and you will return to being a devil." Safina could not deny the validity of Vanira's statement.

C:
银鳞岩在锻炉中嘶鸣。年长的山之民为铸好的护手注入祝愿后，将其赠予身旁的女武神。

「柔软，受伤。骑士，坚硬。比云母柔韧，愿你的骨骼。」

她接过精致的手铠，轻轻擦拭那银鳞冰甲…她开始遥想自己手握着雷电劈斫而成的长枪、烈焰绽放而成的圆盾，她将冲向天空的战场，拯救所有人——强大只是拯救的必要条件。山之民仔细将真理的箴言烙印在指节上，并叮嘱女武神要始终记得铁手套的柔软之处。

「焐热河床卵石，要用掌心。勿将冰川，雕琢成利剑。」

可后来，她那近乎极端的使命感和正义感，只将那工匠的祝福灼烧成永不愈合的焦痕。
E:
The silverscale rock hisses in the forge. The old Mountain Dweller poured their wishes into these casted gauntlets before giving them to the warrior goddess beside them as a gift.

"Soft, wounded. Knights are hardy. Softer than marble. May your bones be."

She took the delicately crafted gauntlets and gently wiped down the silverscale frost armor... Her thoughts drifted to the lance, forged from cleaving thunder, and the shield, born from blooming flames. She would charge toward the battlefield in the sky, to save everyone, because strength was merely a prerequisite for salvation. The Mountain Dweller carefully engraved the maxims of truth onto each knuckle, reminding the warrior goddess to always remember the softness within the gauntlets.

"Use the palm to soothe the river of stars. Use the sword to cleave the frost."

Yet, the almost obsessive sense of duty and justice she had ended up burning the craftsman's blessing into a never-healing scar.

C: 产自「盛会之星」匹诺康尼的美梦罐头，装满了高度浓缩的气态忆质，使用者会在打开罐头的五分钟内沉入梦乡。入梦罐本是银河中产阶级家庭卧室的玩物，却在一些深陷战争苦难的星球成了人们入眠的唯一方式。在幽寂压抑的矿洞里，幸存者们颤抖着入睡，去往梦里找寻现实求不得的自由，一如梦想之地的昨天。
E: A sweet dream food can from Penacony, Planet of Festivities. It is full of highly compact gaseous memoria. The user will fall into dreams within five minutes after opening the can. The Dreamdive Can was originally a toy in the Cosmos's middle-class family bedroom, but became the only way for people to sleep on some planets deep in the mires of war. In the gloomy and depressing mining caves, the survivors fall shiveringly asleep and head into dreams to find the freedom they could not find in reality, just like how it was like in yesteryear in the Land of the Dreams.

C: 理性存在载体，知识的传播也需要土壤。树庭的学者们能够将知识编织进圣树，也能经由瑟希斯的应允，摘下凝聚智慧的果实。这些带有泰坦赐福的种子，每颗都承载着比一座图书馆更厚重的信息，它们被携带往需要播种的地方，在翁法罗斯的各个城邦开花结果。但千万不要把它吞进肚子，否则，直到变成一棵树以前，你都会一刻不停地听到知识在脑中的低语。
E: Knowledge requires a proper vessel to thrive, much like plants need fertile soil. The Grove Scholars have mastered the art of infusing sacred trees with knowledge and, with Cerces's blessing, they harvest fruits laden with wisdom. These Titan-blessed seeds carry more information than entire libraries and are sent to places in need, where they take root and flourish across the city-states of Amphoreus. However, be warned: Consuming these fruits will flood your mind with incessant whispers of knowledge, transforming you into a tree before you can resist.

C: 曾经有一名树庭学者满脑子奇思妙想，但苦于写笔记的速度太慢而错过了很多灵感迸发的时刻，于是他找来瑟希斯的一小截树枝，加上数枚珍贵宝石制作了一支笔。这支笔有着比普通笔快数倍的记录速度，只可惜研发周期太长，问世没多久学者便去世了。不过该发明最终还是大放异彩，由于贤者们喜欢以抄几百遍论文的形式惩戒犯错的学徒，所以学徒们人手拥有一支这种笔。
E: A Grove scholar once had so many ideas that the slow speed of writing with human hands made him lose out on many inspired moments. He therefore made a pen from a small branch of Cerces and various valuable gemstones. That pen can write many times faster than an ordinary pen, but it took so long to develop that its maker died soon after its completion. Nonetheless, that invention still found glory in the annals of history — Since the sages love to punish apprentices by making them copy an essay a few hundred times, all Grove apprentices ended up having one copy of this pen each.

C: 「人会在何时变成机械？机械又会在何时变成人？」这一天机械时午后三点，侵入性「无效念头」准点步入机械城某位有机体的脑内。起初，他对自己脑内不受控制的想法束手无策，紧接着，他发现写下记录可以有效对抗「无效念头」带来的焦虑和空虚。于是他开始提笔，如同呕吐一样，将那些杂乱无章、毫无意义却聒噪难耐的念头倾泻而出，转化为一行行乱码——他最终引起了谜语人的注意。
E: "When will the human race become machines? And when will machines become human?" Following the machine era calendar, on this day at three in the afternoon, the invasive "Cognito Invalidater" entered the mind of a certain organic individual in the Mechanical City. At the start, he was helpless against the uncontrolled thoughts in his own mind. Then, he realized writing notes could help him effectively counter the anxiety and meaninglessness the "Cognito Invalidater" inflicted on him. So he began to write, spewing forth words, expelling the chaotic and incoherent noises in his head that remained deafening loud despite being bereft of substance. He produced lines and lines of error code. This eventually drew the Riddlers' attention.

C: 智械君王
E: Intellitron Monarch

C: 第一次听到费尔维娜人的故事时，你感到振奋。这些液态生物居住在冰封世界的浅海，通过共振改变物质的形态，倘若能破解它们的秘密，移除诸多顽疾也将成为可能。但恒星的大开发融化了冰层，当人们找到文明的残骸时，最后的液滴也已干涸。\n\n你想要一种良性的各取所需，一方付出价值，一方给予生命。你阻止了公司对里德曼星的开发，替古老的骇鸟祭祀留下火星。你将流浪的冰晶蝉护送回母星，为最后的仿无机水母群打造栖居地。不存在无价值的生命，所有活着的生物，都等待着科学去赋予意义。
E: The first time you hear the story of the Fairweinean, you feel a surge of hope. These liquid beings thrive in the shallow seas of a frozen world, reshaping matter through resonance. If only their secrets could be revealed, countless persistent diseases could be eradicated. But the relentless exploitation of stars melted the ice, and by the time the remnants of their civilization were discovered, the last droplets had long since evaporated.\n\nYou seek a harmonious give-and-take, where one side offers value and the other grants life. You thwart the IPC's plan to exploit Reidmann, leaving sparks behind to honor the ancient Terrorbird ritual. You guide wandering ice crystal cicadas back to their home planet, creating a sanctuary for the last swarms of pseudoinorganic jellyfish. No life is without worth. Every living creature waits for science to bestow upon them meaning.

C:
可别笑老恩勒我无礼，实在是停不下手头的工作。
以天空与烈阳为基准，锻造出钢铁的飞鸟，
螺旋工坊尚未焚毁的年岁，萨库曾四季如春。
我们的造物足以媲美天空祭司的城邦，
推论的公式连绳结学派也远道来求访。
破灭终至，翁法罗斯亦如天空日渐黯淡。
但螺旋的子嗣仍行走在大地上，背负沉重的行囊，
穿行于苟延残喘的城邦，修复断裂的机械，
重现业已消逝的技术、知识和思想。
此世曾受我主照耀，而我等将为它带回，
曾遍及此世的理性与睿智之光。
E:
Gee, please forgive me for my lack of manners. I simply can't stop my work at hand.
With the sky and the blazing sun as our measure, we once forged steel birds to fly.
In the years before the Helix Workshop burned down, Saku basked in eternal spring.
Our creations could rival those made by the cities of the Sky Priest.
Even the Nodists came from afar to study the theories we derived.
But later the destruction came, and Amphoreus grew dimmer by the day.
Yet, the offspring of the Helix Workshop still walk the earth, burdened with heavy backpacks,
Traveling through the crumbling city-states to fix broken machines.
They are dedicated to reviving the lost technologies, knowledge, and ideals.
This world was once blessed by the light of our god.
So we shall bring back to them the light of reason and intelligence that once illuminated every corner of it.

C:
你定然见过那些爱的奴仆，创生者的眷属。
那是不畏险阻、穿行在纷争与末世下的，
收拢丝线的蝴蝶与甲虫，为瑟希斯寻觅四散破碎的神骸，
从人言与经卷里攫取智慧，自恋语和情歌中采撷浪漫，
爱的织者，欲图将神的灵智也重新纺织。
它们编织出，两位神明，与万物众生爱的诗篇，
曾由命运馈赠给蝴蝶的轻语，在丝线中示现，
从第一朵花到最后一座城邦，
若踏入其中，你将在绸缎上看见一个世界。
要我说，这些纺织旧忆的织者，
才是翁法罗斯最好的吟游诗人。
E:
You've surely met the servants of love, the minions of the Creators.
Undaunted by danger and obstacles, they were butterflies and beetles traversing across strife and the end times,
Searching for the shattered remains of the gods for Cerces.
They reclaimed wisdom from folklore and sacred texts and gathered romance from couples and love songs.
The weavers of love aimed to reweave the divine intellect.
They weaved the love hymns of two gods and all living things.
The words once whispered by fate to butterflies are now reproduced within the threads and fabrics.
From the first bloom to the last city,
Should you step into their tapestry, you will find a world upon the satin.
In my view, those weavers of the olden days,
Are the greatest bards of Amphoreus.

C:
我从那该死的黑潮中捡回半条命，也丢掉了半条，
我愿将经历与你分享，愿你此生不与那把朽弓遭遇。
它原本是骄傲的纷争眷属，金血已变得污浊，
手握携带诅咒的弓箭，射杀所有看见的活物。
朽烂的弓发出尖啸，飞出无法回避的箭矢，
同伴当场毙命，我也留下箭伤。
就在我侥幸逃过一劫之时，伤口冒出黑血，
这伤口永远无法愈合，吞没我的生命。
我不知道自己还能活多久，只能听天由命。
也许从那一箭射出时，结局就已注定。
E:
I reclaimed half my life from that wretched black tide, but lost another half of it.
Let my warning save yours: Beware the Decrepit Bow.
It was once a proud kin of Strife, but its golden blood has been corrupted.
With cursed arrows in hand, it slaughters every living being in sight.
The withering bow shrieks as it fires arrows that never miss.
Comrades died there and then, and I've been wounded too.
As I escaped from the abomination, black blood trickled from my wound.
This wound will never heal, and shall devour my life.
I know not how much longer I have to live, as I await heaven's will.
Perhaps that shot of arrow had already carved the ending in destiny.
