C:
新的一天开始了。

他揉了揉眼睛，发现自己已经许久没有睡得如此踏实了。他想着自己只是暂留，拒绝了特意为他准备的房间，只是在资料室里简单地打了个地铺，结果查阅了一整晚的智库，不知何时沉沉睡去。

他打开房门，列车长站在门外，语气严厉地斥责他不要熬夜，否则会错过热气腾腾的早餐，辜负自己的一番心意。他点点头，列车长心满意足地住了口，一摇一摆地领着他去了车厢。

红发女子——他现在知道她叫姬子，朝他笑了笑。另外一边的棕发男子——瓦尔特先生，虽然看上去有很多问题想问，但终究什么都没说。

不知不觉，他度过了很多这样的早晨。

重走航道的历程并不轻松，大多是由于星核的堵塞，有时也会碰见他此前击退的巨兽。他们甚至捕获了一块漂浮的巨型陨冰，陨冰里有个姑娘。

因此，当他察觉那个名叫{NICKNAME}的{M#少年}{F#少女}体内被封印着一颗星核时，并不算太惊讶。

列车的旅途还将继续，还有什么不会发生呢？
E:
A new dawn begins.

He rubs his eyes, realizing it had been too long since he had such a good night's sleep. He considers himself as only staying temporarily and refused the room specially prepared for him, making a simple bed on the floor of the Archives. However, he stayed up all night reading the data bank. At some point, he'd drifted off to sleep.

He opened the door to find the conductor standing there, reprimanding him for staying up late — Otherwise he'd miss out on a piping hot breakfast and would've wasted the care put into it. He nods and the conductor quietens down in satisfaction, wobbling as they lead him into the passenger car.

The redhead woman — who he now knows is named Himeko — flashes him a smile. The brunet man to the other side — Mr. Yang — remains silent despite appearing to have many questions on his mind.

Before he knew it, he'd spent many a morning just like this.

The process of re-visiting the route is not easy, mostly due to the numerous roadblocks caused by Stellaron. Sometimes, they would encounter the huge monsters he'd defeated before. They even found an enormous chunk of floating ice — encased in which was a living girl.

That's why he wasn't very surprised when he detected that the {M#boy}{F#girl} named {NICKNAME} has an actual Stellaron sealed inside {M#his}{F#her} body.

The Express' journey will continue on. Is there anything beyond the realm of possibility?

C: 如今的瓦尔特不会轻易出手，他是否还保存着鼎盛时期的实力并未可知。只是从他由「伊甸之星」改造的手杖而言，「操纵重力」仍旧是他惯用的作战手段。 将敌人以重力压制，甚至制造近似黑洞的存在——他习以为常的能力，却得到了列车上年轻人的声声惊叹。 「杨叔什么都会，好厉害！」 「如果有不懂的地方，{NICKNAME}你可以请教瓦尔特先生。」 「一个个来，你们让他歇一会儿……」 他惊觉，自己的信手拈来与云淡风轻，不过是经历了太多，满是岁月流过的痕迹。而列车上的年轻人仍像是一张白纸，正在书写他们自己的人生。 ——自己应当在其中承担怎样的责任呢？ 他不禁想起了自己的生命中，那些曾经帮助过他的名字。
E: These days, Welt rarely fights, and it remains unknown whether or not he retains the strength from his heyday. Gravity manipulation has remained his usual combat means, ever since his cane was transformed from the Star of Eden. He suppresses his enemies with gravity, even creating a kind of mini-black hole — what he considered his everyday powers are met with amazement by the youngsters on the Express. "Mr. Yang's incredible, amazing!" "If you need help with anything, {NICKNAME}, go ask Mr. Yang." "You need to take turns. Let him rest a little while..." He is shocked to realize that his carelessness and surety are the results of his countless experiences, marks of the relentless passage of time he had endured. However, the youths aboard the Express are like blank pieces of paper, writing out their own lives. What kind of responsibilities should he take on in their lives? He couldn't help but think of the names of people throughout his life who had helped him before.

C: 他抡起钢锤，一遍又一遍。 火花在眼前绽开，金属碰撞的声音盖过了肌肉和关节扭动时发出的闷响。少年的身高还不足以够到铁柜顶层的工具，但他挥动钢锤的力道已经可以媲美最娴熟的工匠。 脚下的这方店铺就是他生活的全部。父亲蹲坐在店门前，反复擦拭着锈迹斑斑的门牌。偶尔，他会躺在硬邦邦的床上，幻想自己的未来——但无论他的精神漫游至何处，父亲的背影总会在思绪的尽头出现。 一阵脚步声传来，他暂时放下了手中的活计。父亲站起身来，厚实、但有些佝偻的身形透出一丝恭维。又是「地火」的那伙人——自熔锤镇戒严以来，他们就经常光临这间工匠铺，各类武器的需求订单也增长了不少。 少年想着心事，眼神偶然与领头的那位老主顾相撞。他皮肤黝黑，身姿挺拔，原本犀利的目光在瞥到自己的瞬间柔和了下来。他向着少年微微点头。 「奥列格头儿，欢迎！今天有什么需要吗？」 「别着急，师傅。今天我只是想来找你聊聊，」他指向卢卡，「聊聊有关你儿子的事。」
E: He lifts the steel hammer over and over. Sparks erupt before his eyes, and the clang of metal against metal mutes the thuds of moving muscles and joints. The boy is not yet tall enough to reach the tools at the top of the steel cabinet, but the power with which he swings the steel hammer can already rival that of the most skilled craftsmen. This shop is his entire life, with his father squatting next to the door and repeatedly cleaning the rusted old shop sign. Sometimes he would lie on his hard bed and imagine his future — but no matter where his mind wandered, his father's figure would always appear in his thoughts at the end. He temporarily puts down his work as footsteps approach. His father stands up, and the older man's stout but bowed figure moves with a hint of groveling flattery. It's those people from Wildfire again. Ever since Moltammerville went under a curfew, they have been frequenting this shop and have increased the number of orders for various weapons. As the boy thinks about this, he happens to stare into the eyes of that regular old customer who acts as the leader of the group. That man's skin is tanned and he stands tall, his sharp gaze immediately softens when he locks eyes with the boy. Then, he nods imperceptibly at the boy. "Welcome, Chief Oleg! How can I help you today?" "Patience, my good sir. I'm just here for a chat today." The man points at Luka. "A chat about your son."

C: 「我说啊，你……」 「嗯？怎么了，德比斯基大叔？」 「…你应该知道办公室禁止携带宠物吧？」 「当然了！员工手册第八十六小节第一百四十四条——严禁携带任何形式的有机体宠物出入星际和平公司属下的办公场所。」 「…记得还真清楚啊？那你要不要解释解释——」 「——但我认为这条准则根本就是无稽之谈，完全没必要遵守。实话告诉您吧，大叔——有了这些可爱的小家伙在场，我的工作效率直接提高了百分之二十七！」 「…我倒是不会质疑从你嘴里说出来的数字，但是……」 「你看！这个小家伙——嘿呦——叫账账！可别把它当成普通的次元扑满哦，这小家伙对『金钱的味道』特别敏感！我现在不管去哪出差都得带着它，简直成了我的幸运星啦~」 「居然会在办公室里看到这种生物，还真是…咳，算了，我先假装没看到吧。只是下次总监视察的时——哎、哎哟！！怎么回事？！别、别咬我！快、快把这家伙拿走——」
E: "Say... You —" "Hmm? What's wrong, Uncle Dvorski?" "...You know pets are forbidden at the office, right?" "Of course! Row 144 from paragraph 86 of the employee pamphlet — It is strictly forbidden to bring any form of organic pets on-site to any of the Interastral Peace Corporation's offices." "...So you remember it very well. Then, can you explain yourself—" "— But I think this rule is useless and doesn't need to be obeyed at all. To be honest with you, sir — with these cute little critters around, my work efficiency went up by twenty-seven percent!" "...I won't question the numbers coming out of your mouth, but..." "See? This little one — up you get — it's called Numby! Don't treat it just as a normal Warp Trotter. It's really sensitive to the scent of money! Now I bring it with me wherever I go abroad for business. It's basically become my lucky star~" "I never thought I'd see such creatures at the office. Seriously... *cough* Anyways, I'll pretend I didn't see it. Just remember, the next time the director comes for a visit — Ah! Ahhh! What's going on!? D—Don't bite me! Q—Quickly! Get it away —"

C: 罗刹背上棺材，前往远方。  棺材没有发出声响，它并未抗议，也没有抗议的权利。  「你不说话时，便是自由的。」  大幕升起，他将罪恶抛向身后。  罪恶不过是另一种被操纵的武器，欺骗自己相信能得到一个正确的答案。  「而你有何不同？你的痛苦，为什么就会比其他人的更有价值、更能打动人么？」  「去仙舟吧。」那将棺材交给他的说道，「勿忘你的誓言。」  「永世不忘。」  说着，罗刹却在心里立下了另一个誓言。
E: Luocha carried the coffin on his back and headed into the distance. The coffin made no sound. It did not protest and had no right to protest. "When you keep silent, you are free." The curtains closed, and he left the guilt behind. Guilt is just another weapon to be controlled, a lie one tells themselves to believe they will one day obtain a correct answer. "What's so different about you? Is your pain more valuable and more moving than other people's?" "Go to the Xianzhou," the one who gave him the coffin said, "Don't forget your promise." "Never." Luocha promised, but silently made another vow.

C: 「我用了『醒觉-310』制剂，它能让人沉入极深的睡眠，重历过去的回忆。一些患者能以此重拾██████，但她不同。在她以前，从未有人能主动从沉睡中醒来。我观察了她的梦…那实在难以被称作幸福的记忆：阴沉的天空、破败的城市、废土残垣，还有连绵不绝的细雨。 那雨仿佛永远不会停下，在高涨的潮水中，人们在溺亡中微笑。而在沉沦的黑夜，我总能听见遥远的雷声在迫近，直到某一刻，雷光乍现，将黑夜撕裂。在破碎的天空下，我又看见了她——在褪色成无的世界里，她轻轻挥出一刀，将整片梦境带走。 我必须承认，在这条路上她走得远比我们更深。那无可捉摸的████引领她走向██，她却在无形中将其执握于手。也许在旅途之初，她就已准备好面对真正的敌人……」 ——某位药剂师的手记
E: "I used the 'Revitalization-310' tincture, which induces a profound slumber, enabling individuals to relive their past memories. While some patients found ████████████████████████████, she proved an exception. No one has ever awakened from their dream state, yet she defied the odds. I closely observed her dreams... and they can hardly be called happy moments: Gloomy skies, crumbling cities, ruined lands, and incessant rains. The rain never stopped. Amidst the swelling tide, individuals wore smiles even as they were drowned, and within the engulfing darkness, I heard the distant rumble of thunder, until, at a particular moment, lightning shattered the veil of night. Below the fractured sky, I saw her once more: Within a world fading into oblivion, she elegantly swung her blade, eradicating the entire realm of dreams. I must admit that she has ventured far beyond our progress on this path. The elusive ████████ beckons her toward █████████████████, yet she subtly holds its reins. Perhaps she was prepared to confront the true enemy from the very beginning of her journey..." — A Note from a Pharmacist

C: 「时隔一年之后，我们收到邀请，来到匹诺康尼再度接续上次的采访。 与上次见面相比，她更显疲惫，连声音都沙哑了许多。这次她穿着庄重的家族礼服，举止拘谨小心，但见到我们后仍如以前那般平易近人。此次，我们也见到了她的兄长，一位风度翩翩的领导者。 『这就是银河中唯一的美梦世界，也是家族的驻地。家族将荒芜的梦境改造为人间天堂……』 她的兄长向我们一一介绍匹诺康尼的历史，她帮我们消除入梦的不适，热情地请我们品尝梦境中的美食。 我们游览了梦中的种种奇景，只可惜在这样喧闹的环境下，无法开展深度采访。 最后，我们来到了宏伟的歌剧院。在即将到来的谐乐大典上，她将在这座华美的舞台歌唱，向全宇宙传播同谐的乐声。 就在我以为此次专访即将结束时，她看着辉煌的歌剧院，突然提起采访开始时的问题。 『主编，你还记得我当初问你的问题吗，鸟儿为何要飞向天空？回到匹诺康尼后，我想了很久很久。』 她看向梦境的天空，深沉的夜色下满是人造的光芒。 『也许鸟儿注定要如此，因为那是它的愿望、归宿，以及不可剥夺的权利……』 她微笑着看向某个地方，向我们发出邀请。 『未来，在这里将会有一场盛大的演出。我会在这里表演到目前为止最满意的一首歌，多么希望人们能在歌声中拉起彼此的双手啊——即使是梦中的世界，终究也会有光洒落其间。』 我不知道她看向的是什么地方，但那绝不是歌剧院的舞台。所以，她说的演出又会是什么呢？ 唯一确定的是，即便在如此纸醉金迷的地方，她依然没有放弃以强援弱的信念。这样的信念贯穿她人生的始终，从苦涩的前奏开始，进展到优美的主歌，而在暗流涌动的间奏过后，迎来或许是最为华美的绽放和落幕。」   ——摘自《鸟儿与天空：知更鸟独家专访》
E: "A year later, we received an invitation to Penacony to continue our previous interview. She seemed much more exhausted in our second meeting, even her voice had become far more hoarse. This time, she adorned solemn Family attire and seemed to behave with caution. However, she seemed as approachable as ever when we met. This time, we also met her older brother, an elegant leader. 'This is the only dream world in all of the cosmos, and the seat of The Family. The Family transformed a barren Dreamscape into heaven on earth...' Her brother took us through the detailed history of Penacony as she helped us acclimate to the world of dreams, kindly guiding us to try some Dreamscape cuisine. We visited various scenic spots in the dreamland. Unfortunately, we were unable to carry out a detailed interview in such loud and crowded environments. Finally, we came to the great theater. In the upcoming Charmony Festival, she will sing upon this marvelous stage and share her song of Harmony with the entire universe. Just when I thought this interview was about to come to an end, she looked at the magnificent theater and raised the question she had asked at the beginning of the interview. 'Do you remember the question that I asked you before? Why do birds fly toward the sky? After I returned to Penacony, I thought long and hard about it.' She looked up into the Dreamscape's sky as artificial light filled the deep, evening sky. 'Perhaps birds are fated to fly as it is their dream, their home, and their irrevocable right...' She smiled off into the distance, as she offered us an invitation. 'In the future, there will be a grand performance here. I will perform a song that fulfills me like none other before. I hope that people will join their hands and raise them up together through my song... Even inside the world of a dream, light will always find places to shine through.' I don't know where it was she was looking, but it certainly wasn't the theater stage. So, which performance could it be that she was talking about? The only thing we can be sure of, is that even in a place of luxury and indulgence, she has not given up on her conviction in 'the strong defending the weak.' This faith has been woven throughout her whole life. Her bitter intro led to an exquisite chorus, could it be that after the surging undercurrent of this interlude, what awaits us is the blooming of a glorious crescendo?" Excerpt from Birds and the Sky: Exclusive Interview with Robin

C: 神悟树庭，滋养知识的学府，诞育哲人的摇床。\n但渎神的阿那克萨戈拉斯，诘问「理性」火种的黄金裔，试问：你甘愿身负恶名，也要违逆预言，将怀疑的枝杈刺入智慧的圣树？\n——「可笑。这世界遍地虚假，唯有我才是真实。」
E: The Grove of Epiphany, where knowledge flourishes and philosophers are born.\nYet here stands Anaxagoras the blasphemer, the Chrysos Heir who challenges the Coreflame of Reason. He is questioned: Would you defy the prophecy even if you must bear infamy, and insist on driving the thorns of doubt into the Sacred Tree of wisdom?\n——"Ridiculous. In a world full of lies, I am the only truth."

C: 面对那从异乡漂泊而来的青年，织者与貌如孩童的先知偶尔会提及逐火与黄金裔的历史。 织者无光的双眼仿佛能看穿他内心的迷茫，而先知的天真烂漫又令他感受到家的温暖。 「也就是说，黄金裔，是天赐的命运……」 青年鼓起勇气说道。 织者摇了摇头。 「不如说，那是漫长的苦行。」 青年将氤氲麦香的过去珍藏心中，他加入圣城的军团日夜训练，直到高深的剑术变得如同呼吸一般简单。 在那场震惊世人的死斗中，悬锋的王储与他僵持十个日夜，那大开大合的挥斩之间，他仿佛早已把自己当成视死如归的剑。 当然，更多的时候，青年总以风趣轻松的态度示人。 「我只是希望让别人感到亲切和自在。」 关于这一点，他的友人虽然嗤之以鼻，但也知晓正因如此，白发青年在圣城平民与贵族中享有信赖和美名。 去往树庭求学的岁月，对逻辑本不感兴趣的青年，在翻烂书坊的典籍后，常在辩论场上以机智的演讲取胜。 虽然老师的锋芒令他避之不及，但他深知自己正缺那份坚持自我的勇气。 只是当青年从战场归来，医师为他包扎完伤口后，依旧思忖良久。 「白厄阁下…你是不是总在夜里惊醒，或者无法入睡？」 他并不在意。 要踏上那击落神明的路，他必须将自己雕刻成众人需要的模样。 ->->->->->->->->->->->->-> >>>第49次运算 …… >>>载入场景[奥赫玛] >>>载入场景[神悟树庭] …… >>>载入计算因子 「HapLotes405」 「SkeMma720」 「EpieiKeia216」 「PoleMos600」 「EleOs252」 …… >>>开启运算 …… >>>对象「NeiKos496」自我迭代进程0.43%
E: Facing the young drifter from afar, the weaver and the childlike seer would sometimes speak of the Flame-Chase and Chrysos Heirs. The weaver's sightless eyes seemed to see through his inner turmoil, while the seer's bright innocence gave him a warm sense of home. "So... the Chrysos Heirs were destined by the heavens?" The young man asked, gathering his courage. The weaver shook her head. "No. It's more like a long, grueling pilgrimage." The young man tucked away the wheat-scented memories of his past and joined the holy city's legion, training day and night until difficult swordplay became as natural as breathing. In a death match that stunned the world, he battled the crown prince of Kremnos for ten days and nights. In each sweeping strike, he wielded his blade as if he'd already offered up his life without hesitation. Of course, more often than not, the young man greeted the world with humor and ease. "I just want people to feel comfortable around me," he would say. Though his friends often scoffed at that, they knew it was that very spirit that earned the silver-haired youth the trust and respect of commoners and nobles alike in the holy city. During his years of study at the Grove, even though he had little interest in logic, the young man often triumphed in debates with his sharp wit after poring over books until the pages wore thin. Though he could not outcompete his teacher's wisdom, deep down he knew — it was the courage to stay true to himself that he still lacked. Yet when the young man returned from the battlefield and after the physician had bandaged his wounds, there was still a long silence. "Lord Phainon... do you often wake in the night, or find yourself unable to sleep?" He didn't mind. To walk the path that would strike down the gods themselves, he had to carve himself into the shape the world needed him to be. ->->->->->->->->->->->->-> >>> 49th Computation ... >>> Loading Scene [Okhema] >>> Loading Scene [Grove of Epiphany] ... >>> Load Computational Factors "HapLotes405" "SkeMma720" "EpieiKeia216" "PoleMos600" "EleOs252" ... >>> Initiating Computation ... >>> Object "NeiKos496" self-iteration progress: 0.43%

C: 彦卿受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Yanqing takes less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken.

C: 布洛妮娅及杰帕德在每次行动后强化自身。其中一人受到致命伤害无法战斗后，另一人将会大幅度强化。
E: Bronya and Gepard become enhanced after each action. When either of them is knocked down, the other one will become greatly enhanced.

C: 你们发现一个瑟瑟发抖的男人把自己埋在雪堆里。如果他不是想在这冰天雪地里美美睡一觉，那他大概是在躲避着什么东西…但至少这个满脸堆笑的男人不是在躲着你们。\n在了解过各位的状况后，他主动提出要带领你们前往星球表面唯一的人类聚居地——「贝洛伯格」。想必你们会在那里找到星核的线索。
E: You discover a shivering man who buried himself in the snow drift. If he wasn't looking to take a good nap in the blistering cold then this smiling man is probably trying to hide from something... something other than the few of you.\nAfter knowing more about each of you, he offers to bring you to Belobog — the only human settlement on the surface of this planet. You will most definitely find clues regarding the Stellaron there.

C:
你们修好了报废矿车，并将它从道路上移走，打通了继续向下的道路。
此处已近矿洞底部，你注意到希儿神色警惕，眼神也变得如尖刀般锐利…
她的眼神本来就吓人，是什么能让她露出比以往更甚的表情？你不知道，但你十分清楚一件事——
危险正在迫近，你应当做好万全准备。
E:
You fix the out of order mine cart and move it out of the way, opening the path continuing downward.
This is near the bottom of the mines and you notice Seele's cautious expression and sharp gaze...
Her expression is normally scary enough already, so what is it that would make her show an even more serious look? You're not sure, but there is one thing that you are certain of...
Danger is closing in and you should make yourself prepared.

C: 矿区风波暂告一段落。「地火」首领奥列格为报答各位无名客的支援，他同意与你们合作，并为你们安排了合适的住处。\n不过，上一次在大人物安排下入住旅店、随后被人反手捅一刀仿佛就发生在昨天。\n不知道现在返回列车，向帕姆索要绊线地雷还来得来不及…
E: Peace has at long last returned to the mines. Oleg, chief of Wildfire, has agreed to work with you to show his gratitude towards you, the Nameless, for your support. He has arranged your accommodation.\nSpeaking of accommodation, the last time you got invited to stay by someone important and then got backstabbed does not seem too long ago.\nMaybe it's not too late to go back to Pom-Pom and ask for some tripwire mines...

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处卖了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n你已经取得了第二级认证，距离打开大门还差一级。加油！
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nYou've collected the Level-2 Certification, just one more level until the gate opens. Keep it up!

C: 在这地下的巨大空间中待的时间越长，就越难区分冷峭的岩层与天空的区别。\n现在是时候重返地面了…但仅凭你们一己之力是无法实现这一宏愿的——否则你们早就爬上去了，不是吗？\n「哪里有困难，哪里需要帮助，哪里就有『地火』」，这是娜塔莎曾说过的。再去拜托他们最后一次吧。
E: The longer you stay in this giant space underground, the harder it is to differentiate between the cold rock ceiling and the sky.\nIt's time to return to the surface... But you wouldn't be able to without any help — because if you could, you would've already done so, isn't that right?\n"Wherever there is hardship and a cry for help, there is Wildfire." That is what Natasha once said. Go and ask them for a favor for the last time.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n你将胜利的消息传达给了下层区居民，缓解了他们的紧张情绪。\n回去向娜塔莎回报你的成果吧…记住，暂时不要把瓦尔特发来的信息内容透露给任何人。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nYou passed the news of the victory to the Underworlders and soothed their anxiety.\nReturn to Natasha and report your results... Just remember not to tell anyone about what Welt had sent you, at least for now.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n你在下层的最后一个任务就是将胜利的消息传达给克拉拉和史瓦罗。\n跟随已经被修好的机器人帕金斯，前往克拉拉和史瓦罗的住处。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nYour final task in the Underworld is to let Clara and Svarog know about your victory.\nFollow a restored Perkins to where Clara and Svarog are.

C: 没想到这空无一人的洞天里竟然还有一位老师傅坚守不去，当真是可歌可泣。\n不打不相识，你们得知这位名唤公输师傅的工匠忧心洪炉的安危，可惜势单力孤，面对疯长的根须束手无策。这岂能难倒急公好义的开拓者们？
E: No one expected an old master to remain at his post in this abandoned delve. His spirits are applaudable.\nYou learn that this man, Master Gongshu, is concerned about the furnace's safety. However, he alone could do little against the rampaging roots. As virtuous and just trailblazers, such a task would be a piece of cake for you!

C: 猎犬家系的治安官为你们解了围，你这才了解到自己救下的少女是鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」。\n为了报答你的恩情，她决定担任你的一日导游，还决定请你品尝美梦美食——仔细挑选一下吧，吃白饭的机会可是千载难逢。
E: As the Security Officer of the Bloodhound Family comes to your aid, you realize that the person you saved is Firefly, an artist from the Iris Family.\nTo repay your kindness, she offers to be your guide for the day and treats you to delicious food. Take your time to consider your options, as it is not often that you get a free lunch.

C: 你已经取得了足够多的「信任的证明」——是时候向莎塔娜证明你的实力了。
E: You have collected sufficient Proofs of Trust — It is time to prove your strength to Shatana.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。\n你击败了拉拉撕圾，周围的观桶向你报以热烈的问候。身为英雄，你理应回应他们。
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.\nYou have defeated Garboski, and the Audience Cans all around you are showering you with warm cheers. As their hero, it is only right that you address them.

C: 你就不好奇，在你等待列车组期间，匹诺康尼的另一边发生了什么吗？现在你有机会看到了——虽然不是很科学——但好好欣赏吧。
E: Aren't you curious about what took place on the other side of Penacony while you were waiting for the Crew? Now you have a chance to see it — This can't be explained by science, so just enjoy it.

C: 视角又来到了另一边。有时候，你总觉得自己好像活在电影里——否则视角怎么会跳变得这样厉害呢？
E: Once again, the focus shifts. Sometimes, you feel as though you're living in a movie — nothing else can explain the constant switch of the point-of-view.

C: 你本以为只要与列车组会合，可如今你们结成的队伍简直堪称浩大——加拉赫、米凯、米沙、流萤、知更鸟、星期日…而促成这一热闹场面的似乎正是那位向来漫不经心的大叔，加拉赫。\n他向列车组揭示了盛会之星的本质：一场人为蓄意控制的星核之灾。可至于如今那枚星核位于何处，他本人也无从说起——现在，你们只能祈祷貌似反派的家族领导者星期日配合你们的工作了。
E: You originally thought you would just be meeting with the Express Crew, but the group you have now amassed is massive... Gallagher, Micah, Misha, Firefly, Robin, Sunday... And, it seems that the person that led to the creation of this lively scene was precisely the seemingly indifferent Gallagher himself.\nHe shares the true nature of the Planet of Festivities with the Express Crew: It is a deliberate and controlled Stellaron disaster. However, as for the current location of the Stellaron, he cannot be sure... Now, all you can do is hope that the seemingly rebellious Family leader, Sunday, will cooperate with your work.

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C:
……

管家：「欢迎来到这幢伟大的宅邸，外来的客人们。」
管家：「但很遗憾，我们的主人暂时不在。现在能招待三位的，只有我们几位仆人了。」

会计：「主人离开已久，这宅邸究竟该由何人掌管？」
参谋：「自然应属那至忠诚、至卑微，却至尊贵的仆人。」

……
E:
...

Butler: "Welcome to this great mansion, guests from afar."
Butler: "However, I regret to inform you that our master is not here at present. We three servants are the only people who can receive you currently."

Accountant: "The master has been gone for quite some time. Who is to take control of this great mansion?"
Advisor: "Naturally that must be the master's most loyal and humble, yet noble servant."

...

C:
整个阿斯德纳都在下雪
掩埋了古老的新绿
掩埋了绵延大河的滔天回响
掩埋了狱中的书简
掩埋了濒死众神的洪亮低语

整个阿斯德纳都在下雪
天空摇摇欲坠 大地积重难返
银色的宇宙尽头
朝阳冒出了初生的芽

新芽呼唤着新的纪元到来 风用其枝叶独白
主人不再来
主人不再来
E:
Snow falls across all of Asdana
It has buried the budding growth of ancient times
It has buried the echoing roar of the great river
It has buried the letters in the cells
It has buried the sonorous whispers of the dying gods

Snow falls across all of Asdana
The sky is on the brink of collapse, the earth is burdened beyond salvation
At the end of the silver universe
The rising sun sprouts new buds

The buds summon the arrival of a new era, as the wind whispers its monologue through the branches and leaves
The master shall never return
The master shall never return

C: 轻松的课间时光转瞬即逝，接下来是上课时间。请不要迟到，不要交头接耳，认真听讲…但你可能做不到，毕竟规则就是用来打破的。\n去看看你的第一堂课吧，希望筑梦学院不是真的让学生直接开始涂墙打灰。
E: Leisurely break time is almost over, and it is crucial to be on time for your first lesson. Please do not be late, refrain from chatting in class, and focus on the lecture... although you might be tempted not to. Rules are made to be broken, after all.\nHead to your first class and hope that the Dreamweaver Academy is not actually getting students to start with manual labor.

C: 他放弃的，放弃上放弃了。放弃，好好放弃一放弃场梦放弃有什放弃样，能放弃自愿变放弃子。\n放弃，放弃，放弃。
E: That clock-stuck really gives up. He's giving up or something. Fine, let's give up and see what's got me giving up.\nGive up. Give up. Give up.

C: 三月七的缺席为这次的开拓之旅又添了一分不确定性。为了旅程能够尽可能顺利，姬子小姐决定启动「后备方案」。
E: The absence of March 7th has introduced a new layer of uncertainty to this trailblazing expedition. To keep the expedition on course, Miss Himeko decides to activate the Backup Plan.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……
E: {NICKNAME} and I became separated in this illusion. {NICKNAME} told me that {F#she}{M#he} travelled with Mydei and had seen the man's deepest fear, which was the blood-soaked glory of the Kremnos...

C: 为了医救城外的无名伤者，风堇暂时驻留奥赫玛，缇安、遐蝶与{NICKNAME}三人先行前往树庭——信仰{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的学术圣地。
E: With Hyacine remaining in Okhema to treat the unnamed wounded person, Trianne, Castorice, and {NICKNAME} head to the Grove — the academic sanctuary dedicated to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 缇安的葬礼上，白厄向缇宝提出请求，希望见证她迈上逐火之路的最初景象。
E: At Trianne's funeral, Phainon made a request to Tribbie, hoping to witness the first vision of her Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 你主动抛出橄榄枝寻求庇护，成功取得凯妮斯信任，并与元老院结盟。\n「寻求庇护」多么完美的理由，足以让你、元老院、黄金裔都相信它的正当性，可惜…你费劲来到达这里是另有所寻——\n这需要「神礼观众」来古士的帮助。
E: You reached out for protection and successfully gained Caenis's trust, forming an alliance with the Council of Elders.\n"Seeking protection" — what a perfect excuse, enough to convince you, the Council, and the Chrysos Heir of its legitimacy. Unfortunately... the real reason you came here was something else entirely—\nThis requires the help of "Theoros" Lygus.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n阿那克萨戈拉斯提供的「贤者之石」与炼金术能将冥河中的泰坦召唤出来，而那炼金所需的材料应当就在城中。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe Philosopher's Stone provided by Anaxagoras and the art of alchemy can summon the Titan lurking with the River of Souls, and the alchemical materials should be found in the city as well.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生提供的信息让我们感到些许不安——此时此刻，三月七似乎也被卷入了翁法罗斯。
E: Mr. Screwllum's information has left us feeling rather unsettled. It seems March 7th has now also become entangled in the events of Amphoreus.

C: 哎，如果不是在这种场合相遇，有点音乐的点缀也未尝不可。
E: *sigh* Shame we had to meet in a place like this. Otherwise, a little music wouldn't hurt.

C: 《外太空计划六号》\n简介：在为匹诺康尼开拓银轨的途中，灯蛾家系偶然接收到一条求救讯息，并发现了一座废弃的空间站。进入其中调查的他们并未意识到，自己已打开了一扇通往地狱的大门。潜藏在其中的怪物神出鬼没，不断制造惨绝人寰的血案。而直面恐惧的灯蛾战士，也将用枪炮和血浆回应它们的嚎叫。
E: Plan 6 from Outer Space\nSynopsis: While trailblazing the silver rail in Penacony, the Lampmoth Family intercepted a distress signal and stumbled upon an abandoned space station. But the moment they stepped inside to investigate, they unknowingly unsealed hell's gates. Lurking monsters moved like phantoms, striking without warning — leaving behind only grisly slaughter, over and over. And yet the Lampmoth warriors, who dare face this terror, answer their howls with gore and gunfire.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C: 翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。只有我能回去，我必须回去。\n找到{NICKNAME}和三月。我们会在那里团聚。
E: Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders. Only I can go back, and I must go back.\nFind {NICKNAME} and March. We will reunite there.

C: 翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。只有我能回去，我必须回去。\n找到{NICKNAME}和三月。我们会在那里团聚。
E: Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders. Only I can go back, and I must go back.\nFind {NICKNAME} and March. We will reunite there.

C: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」 「我会在过去等你。」
E: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want." "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie." "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory." "So, please remember me with 'love,' like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas." "Now, open this book." "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C:
翁法罗斯！我并非陡然地呼唤你的名字。
我来此，是为了讲述历史——
末日的黑潮降临大地，神明堕入疯狂，凡人举戈相向。
但仍有逐火的英雄，在创世的伟业中先行。

此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。
来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？

以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
E:
Amphoreus! I do not beckon your name in haste.
I come here to tell a tale of history.
When the black tide of doom descended upon Earth, gods fell into madness, and mortals turned against each other.
Yet there were Flame-Chasing heroes, pioneering the great enterprise of creating a world.

In this world, they shall meld burning golden blood into their bodies.
Will the destiny of days to come remember their names?

In the name of Worldbearing, I promise you: Kephale will never forget.

C: 螺丝咕姆的宝贝看起来不错，希望它在探索矩阵上同样有效。
E: Screwllum's treasure looks promising. Let's hope it works just as well on the Matrix.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
E: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

C: 零件已经到手，修复中继器不在话下。仔细查阅过往那些互通心意的通讯记录，却未料到意外藏于阴影之下……
E: Now that you have the parts, it is only a matter of time before the repeater is fixed. You carefully read through the heartfelt communication records only to unexpectedly find an accident hidden in the shadows...

C: 利用相机扫描怪物，击败藏有右侧房间密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key to the room on the right

C: 根据三月七的指引，阿兰应该正在独自调查可疑晶体。\n深入探索可疑晶体，寻找阿兰吧。
E: Based on what March 7th said, Arlan should be investigating some suspicious crystals alone.\nGo deeper amongst the suspicious crystals, and look for Arlan.

C: 阮•梅，经历这一番奇遇，你却感觉到自己愈发读不懂她了。她待你亲近，却喂你吃下「反吐真剂」，一直隐瞒自己真正的实验目的；她明明性情寡淡，野心却深不可测…她究竟是个什么样的人？
E: After this perplexing experience, you feel like you understand Ruan Mei less and less. She treats you with closeness but feeds you the "Anti-Truth Serum," concealing her true research purpose all along. She seems reserved, yet her ambitions are immeasurable... What kind of person is she really?

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n下矿区救人。\n帕姆注：{NICKNAME}乘客的日报，也太敷衍了帕！给我认真点写帕！
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHeading down in the mines to save people.\nPom-Pom's Notes: {NICKNAME} is not putting their heart into the report at all! Write it properly!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n很多矿民，魂不守舍的。上去打听打听。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nLots of miners look dazed. Need to chat with them.

C: 按照藏宝图的指引，你挖到了「宝藏」，你想起桑博信誓旦旦向你承诺的样子，这不禁令你大为恼火。说好的交情与诚信在此刻不翼而飞，看来在地底，拳头才是最值得信赖的东西。总之，该会去找桑博算账了……
E: Using the treasure map, you find the treasure. Thinking of Sampo's promise, you get really annoyed. As a dishonest man, he is not a friend of yours. Perhaps the most trustworthy entity in the underground is the fist. Anyway, it's time to settle this matter with Sampo...

C: 合同上写着合同人的名字…这位就是被机器人抢走合同的可怜虫吗？还是赶紧去找到他吧。\n帮他找到丢失的合同，他就会去参加「菌菌」的竞价吗？这种想法可太功利了，但也不是不行，对吧？
E: You find a name on the contract... Is he the poor soul whose contract was stolen by this robot? You'd better find him.\nIf you return this contract to him, maybe he'll participate in the auction for "Junjun." This sounds scheming, but maybe it will work!

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n娜塔莎希望你能与她同去，因为距离她上一次踏足行政区已经时隔十余年之久。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nNatasha wants you to come with her, because it has been more than ten years since the last time she stepped in the Administrative District.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n挑选好了准备送给娜塔莎养父母的花束之后，你们准备好前往约定的会合地点。\n尽管娜塔莎面色沉静，但你无法想象她的内心此时正在经历何种情绪翻涌。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nAfter getting a bunch of flowers for Natasha's adoptive parents, you head to the meeting place.\nNatasha looks calm, but you can't even imagine what she is going through inside.

C: 机械屋总给人以家的温暖感。而当你准备收拾行李、头也不回地离开这里时，这种温暖的感觉更是尤甚。\n不过这只是你的个人揣测…希露瓦是怎么想的？恐怕只有她自己清楚。\n但这毕竟与你无关，眼下还是先陪她一起收拾行李吧。
E: The workshop always felt as comforting as a home. As you prepare to pack up and leave here forever, this homely feeling is intensified.\nBut this is only your personal guess... What does Serval think? She is probably the only one who knows that.\nBut this has nothing to do with you. Just help her pack for now.

C: 为提振士气、提升整体作战能力，杰帕德将带领你与希露瓦亲临前线，向战场纵深处推进，同时搜救沿途的难民。\n越向前推进，战场的气氛便越发令人战栗——是的，这不是某种夸张的说法，而是你与同伴确实感受到了温度在下降。状况着实异常，请小心前进。
E: Gepard will lead you and Serval to the front lines himself to raise morale and improve overall combat capacity. You will push deeper into the battlefield while helping the refugees along the way.\nThe deeper you go, the more terrifying the atmosphere of the battlefield becomes — This is not mere exaggeration, but you actually feel the temperature in the air dropping. The situation is definitely odd. Please proceed with caution.

C: 希露瓦向二位郑重宣布——她决定暂时不登上列车了。\n老实说，你几乎已经猜到她肯定会说这么一句话…但她似乎还在永冬岭留了些悬念——前往星核拘束装置前，看看她到底在卖什么关子吧。
E: Serval solemnly announced that she decided not to board the Express for now.\nTo be honest, you guessed she was going to say this... but she seems to have left a puzzle or two at Everwinter Hill. Go to the Stellaron Imprisonment Device and see what she is up to.

C: 不问自取视为偷，既然是求取医书，自然要征得丹鼎司现任丹士长的许可…也不知道新上任的丹士长玉络是否同意，算了，还是去问问看吧。
E: To take without permission is considered stealing. Since it's about obtaining a medical book, it is necessary to obtain permission from the current chief alchemist of the Alchemy Commission. I don't know if the newly appointed chief alchemist, Yuluo, will be agreeable to this request. Ah well, let's just go and ask.

C: 快乐的时光总是短暂，陶德与你在海边，迎着波月古海的海浪，他向你诉说着他的故事。又或者，这并非他的故事，而是你与他，以及其他人的故事……
E: Good times are always fleeting. Todd is with you at the coast, facing the waves of the Lunarescent Depths. He tells you his story. Or rather, it isn't his story, but instead the story of you and him, and of others...

C: 为了不跟丢物流机巧鸟，青雀已经抢先一步赶往流云渡了。赶紧追上青雀，别让她等待太久。
E: In order not to lose the courier cycrane, Qingque has already rushed to Cloudford. Hurry up and catch up with Qingque, don't make her wait too long.

C: 十王司判官请求你们将她护送至星槎渡口。横生的建木枝蔓，失控的魔阴身与孽物…想必这一路定然不可能一帆风顺。
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission requested you to escort her to the Starskiff Jetty, with overgrown Ambrosial Arbor Vines and uncontrolled mara-struck individuals and abominations along the way... It is nearly impossible for the journey there to be smooth sailing.

C: 启动大衍穷观阵阵基
E: Activate the Matrix of Prescience Ultima base terminal

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 你见到了桂乃芬，她本人和网络上一样好看…等等，扯远了。女孩努力想让你相信她刚刚经历了一场怪力乱神的遭遇，甚至把当时的视频拍在了你的脸上。\n虽说这年头连视频都不能相信了，但她慌张的语气和缺乏管理的表情确实暗示那个名为绥园的地方发生了某种恐怖的事情…呵，就让无名客揭开这背后隐藏的秘密吧！出发，去绥园探灵！\n此时此刻的你不会懂的，好奇心是所有恐怖片的开始——
E: You see Guinaifen, and she's as beautiful in person as she is online... Ahem, we've digressed. The girl is trying very hard to convince you that she just experienced a spooky encounter, even shoving a video of it in your face.\nEven video content can't be trusted these days, but her flustered tone and unbridled expressions do hint at some kind of terror surrounding that Fyxestroll Garden place... Heh, the Nameless shall uncover the secret behind all this! Let's go ghostbusting at Fyxestroll Garden!\nRight now, you won't get it — but curiosity forms the basis for the start of all good horror movies...

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 莱斯利•迪恩的粉丝告诉你，那位大明星正在被帮派成员追赶——快赶过去看看情况如何。
E: Lesley Dean's fans inform you that the superstar is being pursued by gang members. Find him and figure out what happened.

C: 柯柯娜依然在往一个地方跑去，像上次那样，你也需要经历她的记忆才能追上她的脚步。
E: Cocona is still running towards a particular location. Once again, you must experience the events in her memories to catch up with her.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 罗莎请你与她一起返回船长室，似乎有些事项在等着你处理。
E: Rosa invites you to return to the captain's cabin together. Some affairs seem to require your attention.

C: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以强硬作答，一百个善举也不能为一桩恶行开脱。
E: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with toughness. Even a hundred kind actions do not excuse a bad deed.

C: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n从这个本应疯狂的战士口中，你听到了两个未曾听闻的名字。这些事情的真相与你寻找金丝的目的并无干系，但探索未知也确实是无名客的工作——至少比一拳打死她有趣，你接这活儿总不会真的是为了战斗吧？
E: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nYou hear two unfamiliar names from the mouth of this supposedly crazed warrior. Though finding the truth behind these names has nothing to do with your objective of finding the golden thread, it is also the duty of a Nameless to explore the unknown... At least it would be more interesting than finishing her off with a single blow. You didn't just take this job to get into fights after all, right?

C: 播散文明种子的第一站，雅利洛-Ⅵ！\n希儿说有事要我帮忙，到底什么事这么神秘？
E: First stop for spreading the seeds of civilization: Jarilo-VI!\nSeele says she needs my help. What could be so mysterious?

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n你帮华劳斯拍了一张照片——真不错。拿去给他看看吧。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nYou helped Wallace take a photo — It looks good. Show it to him.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n严厉的银鬃铁卫似乎将你误认为小偷……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe stern Silvermane Guard mistook you for a thief...

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 请与应物科室长温明德沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the head of Department of Implement Arts, Wen Mingde, and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 收到奥列格的邀请，你前往残响回廊参与清理裂界怪物的作战行动。\n和奥列格谈一谈，了解一下战场的现况。
E: You receive Oleg's invitation to an operation to clear the Corridor of Fading Echoes of Fragmentum monsters.\nTalk to Oleg to get a sense of the current situation of the battleground.

C: 清理残响回廊，击败在此处出没的所有裂界怪物。
E: Clear out the Corridor of Fading Echoes and defeat all of the Fragmentum monsters roaming in the area.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 机巧鸟栖木似乎遭人蓄意破坏，正不断用高频音波吸引附近的丰饶孽物。\n修理好这个栖木，让它可以正常运转吧。
E: The cycrane roost seems to have been deliberately altered, and is currently emitting high-frequency sound waves that attracts Abominations of Abundance.\nFix this roost so it can function normally again.

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在行医市集了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost in Healer's Market. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 验证结束，「最强之矛」与「最强之盾」都被证明是假货，现在该去找那两个小贩对质了。
E: The results are in: The Strongest Lance and the Strongest Shield have both been proven to be fakes. Now, it's time to question the two merchants.

C: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
E: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•蜘蛛」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Spider combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 西衍先生似乎根据你的冒险传奇，写出了一些新故事。去星槎海找他聊聊吧。
E: Mr. Xiyan seems to have written some new stories based on your adventures. Go chat with him in Starskiff Haven.

C: 白露打算带你去长乐天金人巷到处吃喝，她自愿成为免费导游，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！\n既然白露都这样说了，你就勉为其难地跟在她身后好好逛一逛金人巷吧……
E: Bailu has plans to show you around the food establishments at Aurum Alley over in Exalting Sanctum. It's a rare and fine thing to have someone willing to serve as a free guide!\nSince Bailu already made up her mind, you should make an effort to follow her and browse the stores in Aurum Alley...

C: 不出意外地出意外了。码头似乎发生了一些争吵，赶紧过去看看发生什么事了。\n听上去好像是一位见义勇为的好姑娘正在仗义执言。
E: As expected, you run into something unexpected. There seems to be some kind of dispute happening on the docks. Head over and see what's going on.\nFrom the sound of things, it seems like a courageous girl is taking a principled stance for something.

C: 在你们忙于拍摄宣传材料的时候，靠谱的小秘书已经在和燕翠师傅商量正式合作的事了，现在去找找小秘书吧。\n不知道她会怎么用这些照片呢？还是说，她会重新找人拍摄吗？说不定很有可能……
E: While you were all busy shooting promotional material, the ever-reliable secretary Mingxi already found and broached the topic of a formal partnership with chef Yancui. You should go find Miss Secretary and see how she's doing.\nHow will she use these photos? Or might she look for another photographer? It's definitely a possibility...

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 据说最近鉴定古代遗物的「矿灯」巴列维突然重出江湖，去磐岩镇找他一探究竟吧。
E: It is said that the relic appraiser Miner's Lamp Balaway suddenly reappeared recently. Go to Boulder Town to find out what happened to him.

C: 乔瓦尼先生说，取得徽章的玩家会得到进入决胜乐园新区域的资格，强大的「霸主」以太灵在那里等待着你……
E: Mr. Giovanni says players with the Marks will be qualified to enter the new area in the Victory Zone, and the powerful Overlord Aether Spirit awaits you there...

C: 「霸主」以太灵已经出现了，去战胜它吧，将它的强大占为己有！
E: The Overlord Aether Spirit appears. Go defeat it and claim its power as your own!

C: 流云渡，七扭八弯的流云渡...这要是没个向导，真不知跑到什么时候才能见着冠军候补。
E: Cloudford, the twist-and-turn map of Cloudford... You have no idea how much time you'd end up wasting if you didn't have a guide to the championship contender.

C: 跟青雀在约定好的见面地点汇合，向她打听一下太卜司到底发生了什么事…你们又能够做些什么。
E: Meet Qingque at the agreed location and ask her about the situation in the Divination Commission... and about what you can do to help.

C: 至此，「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」已经完成了它的使命。去问问寒鸦大人，看看她如何决定捉鬼小队的去留吧。
E: As of now, the "Heliobi Escape Incident Special Task Force Under the Ten-Lords Commission's Jurisdiction" has finished its duty. Go and ask Madam Hanya for her decision on the future of the ghost-hunting squad.

C: 你们追入屋内，才察觉自己坠入岁阳的迷障中。一如绥园当时的迷离变化，此处成了毫无空间感可言的「鬼打墙」迷宫。你们只能硬着头皮一路追逐。\n一番毫无收获的奔逐后，你们终于想到一个守株待兔的好办法。
E: You only realize that you have fallen into the heliobus' illusions when you chased it into the residence. Now, just like how Fyxestroll Garden became a shifting haze, this place has also been transformed in a never-ending labyrinth with no sense of ordinary three-dimensional space. You have no choice but to press forward.\nAfter some fruitless exertion, you finally come up with the good idea of waiting for your enemy to run into you.

C: 种种线索都指向了天舶司的司舵、晴霓的母亲——驭空大人。\n根据捉鬼小队的经验，驭空大人很有可能已被岁阳附身。\n探寻幽灵星槎之秘的线索，也许就在司辰宫里。
E: All clues point to Madam Yukong, Helm Master of the Sky-Faring Commission and Qingni's mother.\nThe ghost-hunting squad's experience suggests that Madam Yukong is very likely to be possessed by a heliobus.\nThe clues regarding the secret behind the phantom starskiff might lie within the Palace of Astrum.

C: 那是晴霓？那是幽灵？那是晴霓被岁阳附身了？不好，你们应该立刻追赶上去。
E: Is that Qingni? Or a specter? Or was Qingni possessed by a heliobus? Oh no. You need to immediately go after her.

C: 来到太卜司见到了本次发帖求助者，太卜大人。她忧心忡忡地谈起青雀的变化——早到晚归，勤勤恳恳，并且精心谋划着一项（据说）了不得的创业计划。
E: You arrive at the Divination Commission and meet the one who made the post asking for help, and it is none other than master diviner. She expresses her concerns about the changes occurring in Qingque. Apparently, she has been working diligently, clocking in right on time and leaving not a minute early, and meticulously planning for an (apparently) amazing business plan.

C: 完成了一日冒险，你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般…本来应该是这样的，但是藿藿不见了！\n桂乃芬正在发帖寻人，去和她谈谈，看看有没有什么线索吧。
E: Having completed your adventure, you and your fellow ghost hunters are expected to reunite at Fyxestroll Garden as always, just like checking into work... However, Huohuo is missing this time!\nGuinaifen has posted a message seeking information about Huohuo's whereabouts. Talk to her and see if she has discovered anything.

C: 天才的到访在空间站留下了神秘的「阮•梅」造物，艾丝妲委托你前去培育这些古怪的小生命。她与螺丝咕姆甚至为你准备了「生命烘焙箱」与「保姆机器人」。\n到底要怎么培育呢？还是先咨询一下保姆机器人吧。
E: The genius' visit left behind mysterious creations from Ruan Mei on the space station. Asta has tasked you with nurturing these weird little lifeforms, and she's even prepared a Lifeform Oven and Helper Robot for you with Screwllum.\nHow exactly do you nurture creations? Let's ask the Helper Robot first.

C: 藤萝饼还有别的事想麻烦你，源源不断的需求，令你想起了长相和它神似的黑塔，算了，看在造物们可怜巴巴的份上……\n这家伙该不会想制作微型模拟宇宙吧？
E: Wisteria Cake still has other things that it wants to bother you with, a constant stream of never-ending demands that reminds you of its lookalike, Herta. Whatever, for the sake of these poor creations....\nDon't tell me this little one is going to try and build its own mini Simulated Universe.

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 许多区划的囚犯从未喝过苏乐达。哈努兄弟决定用苏乐达支援这些囚犯，将它们变成伙伴。
E: Inmates from many areas have never tasted SoulGlad. Brother Hanu decides to use SoulGlad to assist these inmates, turning them into companions.

C: 拍动画貌似也挺好玩的，要不试试看再说？
E: Shooting a cartoon seems pretty fun too. How about trying it out first?

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n快去排练室，和你的乐队成员们打个招呼吧！

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。

C: 大家都在忙着为宴会做准备，你和昔涟当然也不能闲着，去看看有什么能帮忙的。\n妖精们搬不动那些巨大果实，帮它们布置好中央的木盆吧！
E: Everyone's busy preparing for the feast, so you and Cyrene certainly can't just sit around. Go see what you can help out with.\nThe fairies can't move those huge fruits, so help them arrange the wooden basins in the center!

C: 原来喝下「特调配方」是这种感觉…你对此前的客人们顿生感激之情。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人吧，又或者，你也许还有兴趣让花火替你再调制一杯？
E: So this is how it feels to drink the "Special Mix Recipe"... You suddenly feel grateful for all your previous guests.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the temporary bar to serve the next customer. Or, perhaps, you'd like Sparkle to mix you another glass of it?

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 各位听说过「罗浮」吗？

E: When the Cancer of All Worlds broke out, the IPC lost control of Penacony, and the planet sought refuge under Xipe the Harmony. Now it's a member of "The Family."

C: …结果，唉，得调头先去仙舟了。
E: ...But alas, for now we're changing our bearings and heading for the Xianzhou.

C: （你从帕姆耳朵的弧度上读出了一丝伤感。）
E: (You can tell Pom-Pom's a little sad by looking at their ears.)

E: As for the coaches, Pom-Pom's checked every nook and cranny and made sure everything is in good order!

C: 不断讲述遥远笑话的海螺，只需要将耳朵放置于螺口即可听见。

C: 对了，三月和丹恒现在应该待在自己的房间里。

C: 这么快就来了？我就是客气客气帕…有什么事嘛？
E: Here already? I was just engaging in pleasantries. How can I help?
