E: I have another question...

C: 唷，你可算来了。
E: Hey, there you are.

C: 嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……
E: Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」奖励…
E: About Simulated Universe rewards...

C: 欢迎，从寒潮之外…不，从天外而来的访客，对么？
E: Welcome, visitors from beyond the Eternal Freeze. Or perhaps I should say: From beyond the sky... no?

C: 星核在每个星球上制造的灾祸都不一样，但每个被种下星核的世界都会诞生裂界。
E: Stellarons bring about different disasters on different worlds. But every world seeded with a Stellaron will give birth to Fragmentums.

C: 没问题，你们是贝洛伯格的贵客，拥有最高的权限。
E: But of course. You are Belobog's honored guests, and have the highest privileges afforded to you.

C: 我建议你们先去参观永冬铭碑，它是贝洛伯格最具象征意义的地标。
E: I recommend you visit Everwinter Monument first — it's Belobog's most symbolic landmark.

C: 我是布洛妮娅•兰德，代行银鬃铁卫统领。以尊贵无上的{RUBY_B#克里珀}琥珀王{RUBY_E#}之名，奉大守护者可可利亚•兰德之命，前来捉拿意图掀起叛乱的渗透者。
E: I am Bronya Rand, acting commander of the Silvermane Guards. In the name of the {RUBY_B#Qlipoth}Amber Lord{RUBY_E#} in the highest, and under order of Supreme Guardian Cocolia Rand, I hereby arrest the suspected infiltrators under the charge of plotting to incite rebellion.

C: 如果说是来迎接我们的，那气氛也过分凝重了。
E: If this is our escort, it's less friendly than I was expecting.

C: …我还是筑城者的一员、在科研部工作的时候，研究的就是「星核」。
E: ...When I was still one of the Architects working in the Scientific Research Division, I was researching the Stellaron.

C: 另外…我还想借此机会，向贝洛伯格的几位客人表示感谢。
E: ...And on that note, I'd like to extend my heartfelt gratitude to a few guests of the city.

C: 好，拜啦。替我向酒馆的兄弟姐妹们问好，别忘了告诉他们——就说敬请期待我老桑博的下一场戏！现在我要谢幕啦。
E: Well, bye for now. Send my regards to the guys and girls in the tavern. Oh, and don't forget to say that Sampo Koski will catch them for the next one. Time to make my curtain call.

C: 没事没事，只要营养跟上了，克拉拉也一定能长到和丹恒一样高的！
E: Don't worry! If you eat like Dan Heng, you'll be as tall as him one day! *stifled laughter*

C: 潮水般的倦意向你袭来……
E: You're overwhelmed by a sea of weariness...

C: 而且大家也都表现出了支持。看来布洛妮娅给他们留下的印象还不错。
E: Everyone seemed supportive, too. Seems like Bronya made a pretty good impression on them.

C: 不过……
E: But...

C: 呃…听布洛妮娅的就对了。
E: Uhh... Just listen to Bronya.

C: 不用这么郑重…这不像你。
E: Not like you to be so serious...

C: 比起道歉，我更喜欢行动…
E: Action speaks louder than words...

C: 这次无端提出请求，没有将你自己的意愿纳入考量，的确是我的失误。
E: It was my mistake to make an unwarranted request without considering your own wishes.

C: …抱歉，我不是想故意揭你的伤疤——
E: ...Sorry, I don't mean to open up old wounds...

C: 还在士官学校上学的时候，我和可可利亚可是出了名的爱折腾。我俩总会整些莫名其妙的发明…美其名曰「探索新技术的无限可能性」。
E: When we were in cadet school, Cocolia and I were notoriously disruptive — we were always coming up with the next crazy invention... We called it "exploring the infinite possibilities of new technologies."

C: 谢谢。对了，还有{NICKNAME}——如果时间允许的话，能否也请你随铁卫同去？
E: Thanks, sis. {NICKNAME}, if you have the time, could you accompany the Garrison?

C: 不好意思，让你们久等了。
E: Sorry to keep you waiting.

C: 书随便挑，《水晶日报》不带一份走么？
E: Pick any book. Why not take a copy of the Crystal Daily?

C: 你看见《水晶日报》，它是筑城者的官方刊物。
E: You spot the Crystal Daily, which is the official publication for the Architects.

C: 看到这个星球仪，你才想起来这里是一颗星球。
E: After seeing this armillary sphere, you realize that you are actually on a planet right now.

C: 齿轮们以违背构造学的方式转动着。
E: The gears are turning in a way that's violating the rules of tectonophysics.

C: 银鬃铁卫冷冷地注视着你，发出了无声的驱赶令。
E: The Silvermane Guard stares at you coldly, conveying a silent order to go away.

C: 不过我告诉桑博的版本就稍微夸张了点，他可欠我不少呢！这回总该给我弄点药品回来啦。
E: I... might've exaggerated your condition for Sampo's ears... but that guy owes me. He better bring me back some medicine.

C: 这帮流浪者还真够嚣张的，竟然敢在「地火」的地盘上动武——
E: These vagrants have got some nerve looking for trouble in Wildfire terri—

C: 你们把我绑架到地底，到底有什么企图？
E: You kidnapped me and brought me to the underground. What is the meaning of this?

C: 地火在矿区做什么？
E: What is Wildfire doing in the mine?

C: 地火遇到了什么麻烦？
E: What trouble has Wildfire gotten into?

C: 想会会史瓦罗跟他的喽啰。
E: I want to meet Svarog and his minions.

C: 史瓦罗先生，你看——好大的矿脉呀。克拉拉从来没见过这么多地髓……
E: Mr. Svarog, it's such a massive vein. I've never seen so much Geomarrow before...

C: 我已经阻止了双方阵营的争端，暂时控制了开采区域。评估结果——三十日内，无突发变量，不会发生大规模械斗冲突。
E: I have already prevented the dispute and taken temporary control of the excavation zone. Evaluation result: In the event of no further variables, there will be no large-scale armed conflict within the next <unbreak>30</unbreak> days.

C: 我们走，克拉拉。出现外来变量，计算重启，炉心枢纽需要有人守卫。
E: We must leave, Clara. External variables have triggered a calculation reset. The Furnace Core hub requires protection.

C: 你们在说什么悄悄话呀？
E: Is this more secret talk?

C: 好、好主意！
E: Oh, g—good idea!

C: 希儿是「地火」的干部，是奥列格头儿信任的骨干。大概在她看来，我就是「地火」差使的一条狗吧。
E: Seele works for them — Oleg's most trusted lieutenant. *sigh* To her I'm probably just, uh, Wildfire's lapdog.

C: 到底发生了什么？大守护者没有告诉我详情，杰帕德也赶赴前线，我不明白……
E: What happened? The supreme guardian didn't tell me the details and Gepard had to rush back to the front line... I don't understand...

C: 为了让你相信我，我会尽量回答你的问题。
E: If it helps you to trust me, I'm willing to answer your questions to the best of my ability.

C: 「新世界」……
E: A new world...

C: 单枪匹马阻止不了末日降临。
E: You can't save the world alone.

C: 重要的是，我们仍然没有掌握「星核」的具体方位和坐标，也没有弄清楚可可利亚态度变化的原因。
E: What's important is that we still don't have the exact location and coordinates of the Stellaron. Nor have we figured out the reason behind Cocolia's sudden change in attitude.

C: 我的意思是，希儿——我有些羡慕你。
E: Right... Uh, what I meant was... I kind of envy you, Seele.

C: 「我这就代表筑城者的意志，把枪戳进你的鼻孔」！
E: In the name of the Architects, I shall stick this spear into your nostril!

C: 到了我们这一代，虽然成长的环境有些不同…但说到生活中的喜怒哀乐、还有人与人之间的牵绊，这些珍贵的情感一定还是相通的。
E: Even though times are different now, things like the joys and sorrows of life, the ties between people... These precious things must certainly still connect us all.

C: 话、话说回来，下一步你打算怎么办？从史瓦罗那儿听到的事，对你肯定影响不小吧？
E: Speaking of which, what are you going to do next? What Svarog revealed must've made quite an impact, huh...

C: 这个濒死的世界…该让你听听她的声音了。
E: It is time you heard it... the voice of this dying world.

C: ——求求你了，娜塔莎姐姐！请你帮虎克修好「菌菌」吧，虎克愿意帮你打扫一个月的诊所！
E: Natasha, please! Please help me fix Junjun. I'll clean the clinic for you for a whole month!

C: 就算是演的，也很辛苦吧？
E: That must have been some difficult pretending...

C: 你哪位？找我有什么事吗？
E: Who are you? What do you want?

C: 总之，你不能再碰这套盔甲了，搏击活动也必须先停下。好好休息，把伤养好了再来我这儿复查一次。
E: In short, you can no longer touch this armor, and you must cease all fighting activities for the time being. Get some good rest, recover from your injuries, and come back to me for follow up.

C: 没问题，当然没问题！既然是您的要求，那必须给安排上！
E: No problem, of course, no problem! Since it is your request, it must be arranged!

C: 所以甭担心——赛程安排那都是小意思，我们拳馆的业务既全面又灵活，绝对没有疏漏。
E: So don't you worry, schedule arrangements are trivial matters. Our services are comprehensive and flexible. You will definitely be well taken care of.

C: 为你，千千万万遍。
E: For you, anything.

C: 我们所做的一切皆是为了重建信任——重建团结、稳定的贝洛伯格城邦。
E: I hope you can see that everything we do, we do to rebuild trust and make Belobog work for all.

C: 那、那怎么好意思呢！要是爸妈还在，他们肯定也会想办法报答各位的……
E: Th—That's very kind of you... If Mom and Dad were still here, they'd want us to return the favor...

C: （将东西都交给尤利安）
E: (Hand over Julian's things to him)

C: 故事里的主人公们虽然都是小朋友，常常做到大人们无法达成的成就。另外，看《冒险鼹鼠队》的时候，我感觉自己也在冒险。
E: All the protagonists in the story are children, but they often achieve things that adults cannot do. And when I read The Adventurous Moles, I feel like I'm on an adventure, too.

C: 哼，我本来也没有打算告诉你。
E: Hmph, you big grownup dum-dum. It's not like I wanted to tell you in the first place.

C: …我做得到吗？
E: ... Can I even manage to do that, I wonder?

C: 哈哈哈哈，也有很多读者像你一样，都以为这些描述是真的。
E: Hahaha, there are so many readers who are just like you, believing these writings to be real-life events.

C: 某不愿透露姓名的巡海游侠声称，琥珀<unbreak>2157</unbreak>纪初期的「荷尔斯泰因大静默」实由「焚化工」所为。
E: A member of the Galaxy Rangers who wishes to remain anonymous claims that The Cremators are behind the Holstein Aphasia that occurred in early <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE.

C: 觐见六司，总得有些准备。停云小姐放心，我们不去他处。劳烦你先通报一声，我们稍后在司辰宫门口等候。
E: We need to make a few preparations before paying a visit to any of the six commissions. Rest assured, Miss Tingyun, we won't go anywhere. If you could inform Madam Yukong of our arrival first, we'll meet you at the palace entrance later.

C: 算啦杨叔，联盟自己能搞定，咱们还费那个心干嘛。我们走就是了。
E: Never mind, Mr. Yang. If the Xianzhou Alliance say they can handle it, then we're wasting our breath. Let's go.

C: 太卜大人，我与他们的谈话你都听见了，有何看法？
E: Master Diviner, you heard our discussion. What do you make of it?

C: 冷静，别有这么强的应激反应。
E: Easy, I know this probably brings back bad memories.

C: 您瞧：「长乐天」——一看就知是个安全地界。剩下的路，咱们就多走几步嘛。
E: Look — "Exalting Sanctum" — this is a safe place. Let's just walk the rest of the way from here.

C: 你数数还用手指？
E: You count on your fingers?

C: 知道啦，我相信你啦！
E: O—Okay, we trust you~!

C: 你也不想让太卜知道你去玩牌吧？
E: You don't want the master diviner to know you've been slacking off, do you?

C: 我心说，要是在那样喧嚣的地方和诸位碰头，岂不是…到我了？杠！！
E: ...So I thought to myself, wouldn't it be better to meet somewhere quieter? FOUR OF A KIND!

C: 阁下看不见眼前的景色吗？
E: ...You mean you can't see it yourself?

C: 哼，这里可是仙舟！外头来的短生种{F#小妹妹}{M#小老弟}，可别以貌取人啊！咱们持明族轮回自足，不需要什么爸爸妈妈！
E: Hmph, welcome to the Xianzhou my short-lived outsider friends — appearances can be deceiving here! The Vidyadhara race is self-reincarnating — no mum or dad required!

C: 这孩子哪来的？你爸爸呢？
E: Where did you come from little one? Is your Dad around?

C: 两位认得路吗？
E: Do you two know the way?

C: 嗯？说吧，本姑娘知无不言～
E: Hmm? Go ahead. I'll tell you everything I know~

C: 「好看」这个形容词放在狐族身上有些宽泛。莫说女子，便是肤白貌美的狐人男子也一抓一大把……
E: "Pretty?" That's too generic for a foxian. Even if you don't count the ladies, there are plenty of gents that fit that description like a glove...

C: 在迴星港中如果发现了卡芙卡的踪迹，就开启这个小东西，别让她跑了。
E: If you pick up traces of Kafka in Stargazer Navalia, just switch him on. Don't let her escape.

C: 哎哟～恩公也不必拿驭空大人来压人家吧？
E: *sigh* Playing the Madam Yukong card, are we? That's not very heroic now, is it.

C: 情、情诗？还、还是放回去吧！
E: L—Love poem? Quick, put it back!

C: 又是宝箱上的手印，这个女人真的好闲。
E: Another chest, another hand print. Has this woman got nothing better to do?

C: 数百年前，某「丰饶」的令使为了劫夺「建木」，率军压境罗浮，几乎摧毁半数洞天，杀得云骑军十不存一。
E: Centuries ago, an Emanator of Abundance besieged the Luofu with the aim of taking the Ambrosial Arbor. They destroyed half our delves and killed most of the Cloud Knights.

C: 这样的过去，对长生种来说甚至不算历史，称「昨天」也不为过。与之相比，眼前这不过是小打小闹罢了。
E: For long-life species, such events are more like yesterday's memories than ancient history. This awful spectacle is child's play in comparison.

C: 那…那倒也没什么！演算之事，须卜者亲炙，获得一手情报方能趋近正确结果……
E: Hardly! A diviner must acquire first-hand knowledge in order to calculate the future. Collecting intelligence in this way assists me in achieving the right answer...

C: 言下之意是，那位天舶司的姑娘早已遭其蛊惑，成了军团的走卒？
E: ...Meaning that Tingyun had long since fallen under the Lord Ravager's influence?

C: 是魔阴身…
E: They became mara-struck...

C: 你见识过和我们一起战斗的那些异兽了，对吧？这只是「建木」小小的恩赐……
E: You've seen the fantastic creatures that fought with us? They are only minor gifts of the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 你们帮了仙舟一个小忙，我很感谢。带这人走吧，这一次，我可以当做没看见。
E: Thank you for assisting the Xianzhou in this small matter. Take this person away — I will pretend I didn't see anything this time.

C: 待您成为龙尊时，我多半已蜕生成了小娃娃，望您好生照拂。
E: By the time you are the high elder, my hatching rebirth will be complete and I will be a child once again. Please take care of me.

C: 感应此地的力量…
E: Try to feel the great power here...

C: 怎么样？
E: Go on...

C: 咱们已经到走到尽头了，这里便是「建木玄根」，丰饶神迹的所在之处。
E: We've reached the end. These are the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor, where the vestiges of Abundance lie.

C: 这是蜕生前的旧梦，还是未出世的宏愿？你不清楚。也许很快，这个梦将随逝水流去。
E: Is this an old dream from before its rebirth, or an as-yet unfulfilled aspiration? You are unsure. Perhaps soon, this dream will fade away with the flowing water.

C: 「建木」的根须在不断滋长…
E: The roots of the Arbor are still growing...

C: 很好，很好，就是这样！饮月，你恐怕再也见不着你的朋友了…
E: Hahaha, better, but I'm afraid you won't be seeing your friends.

C: 那你只有死路一条了！
E: Then you deserve no mercy!

C: 不是吧你？刚感谢完，不会就要给我们派任务了吧……
E: ...Seriously? Thanking us like that, and then immediately sending us on another mission?

C: 停云姐姐在喝茶时听了我的难处，便拍胸脯保证，说她作为行商游历各个世界，一定能找到仙舟人也未必品尝过的全新茶种。
E: Miss Tingyun came to the teahouse one day and heard about my troubles — she said she could find me a brand-new strain during her travels — one that nobody on the Xianzhou had ever tasted.

C: 呃…那道菜已被你吃完了，我可怎么再给你变一盘出来啊？
E: Uh, you already ate that, remember? I can't just get you another one now, can I?

C: 这是纪念品吗？
E: Is this a souvenir?

C: 我想也是该先返回列车，向姬子小姐道个平安了。
E: She must have been worried. I'll return to the train and put her mind at rest.

C: 姬子姐一定也等不及听咱们讲讲这次旅途上发生的事情吧？
E: Himeko must be eager to hear about what we've been up to on this mission too, right?

C: 你是…对不住对不住，这阵子认识的人太多了，你瞧着有些眼生？看打扮，是化外民？
E: Are you... Sorry, I've met so many people recently, you seem unfamiliar... Judging by your clothes, you must be an outworlder?

C: 唉，你们要走，老夫不唱曲儿了…心里闷得慌。
E: *sigh* But farewell it is. I shall not sing for you on your way out... I fear the sound would break my heartstrings...

C: 它似乎在暗示着什么。
E: It looks like he has something to show you.

C: …她犯下重罪，被就地正法。
E: She committed a serious crime... and was executed on the spot.

C: 那你们报警吧。
E: Have us arrested then.

C: 不会。冒险游历固然令人心潮澎湃，但适时放松也是非常重要的。
E: Of course not! Adventures are exhilarating, but rest and recuperation is equally important.

C: 别在意，梦和现实都是相反的。在你睡着时，列车已经抵达匹诺康尼了……
E: Don't fret, dreams are often the reverse of reality. While you were sleeping, the Express arrived at Penacony...

C: 你凭什么觉得自己能赢，该死的赌徒？
E: Ah, the charming audacity! To think that you, of all people, might emerge victorious, dear gambler.

C: 三枚「筹码」足矣。所有，或者一无所有。
E: Three chips are enough. All or nothing.

C: 怎么回事…
E: What's going on...

C: 如果这意味着他们离去，我会。
E: If it means losing them, I would.

C: 你真的该走了。
E: You should really be going.

C: 要我说，那封邀请函就是个自导自演的幌子，或许是他们想在谐乐大典上做点什么出格的事……
E: If you ask me, that invite is nothing but a self-planted diversion, a red herring. Or maybe they're thinking of pulling off something big during the Charmony Festival...

C: 嗨，朋友，还好吧？刚才开了个玩笑，希望你不要介意。
E: Hello, friend. How have you been? I sincerely hope you don't mind.

C: 也许，是时候入梦了。
E: Perhaps, it's time to enter the dream.

C: 你刚才是在对我洗脑吗…
E: Did you just brainwash me...

C: 别担心。她只是利用「同谐」的共鸣对你进行了调律，以便你能更自如地在梦境中掌控自己的身体。
E: Relax. She just did some tuning on you with the resonance of the Harmony to allow you to control your limbs freely in the Dreamscape.

C: …星穹列车的开拓客，你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Trailblazer from the Astral Express, do you plead guilty?

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: （好的！正在为您复现……）
E: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: 好抽象一钟表。
E: His character design is a little... surrealist.

C: 几个人？
E: How many of you?

C: 碰一下！！
E: Touch it!!

C: 好吧，那我该做些什么？
E: Fine. What do I need to do?

C: 嗯，就用我的吧。昨晚那个就合适。
E: A superb idea, sir — let's do it. The one from last night would be perfect.

C: {M#他}{F#她}是尊贵的客人——前不久我们成为了朋友。我跟你提起过，记得吗？
E: {M#He}{F#She}'s an esteemed guest whom I've befriended recently. I told you about {M#him}{F#her} before. Does it ring a bell?

C: 所以，我该如何拒绝呢…你能想象吗？在这场梦里，我竟然可以…可以不用待在冰冷的「医疗舱」里……
E: So, how could I possibly resist it... I mean can you imagine? I can actually free myself from this icy medical cabin in this dream...

C: 请您…通融一下吧？我们不会给大家添麻烦的。
E: Could you... please make an exception? We're not going to cause any trouble.

C: 噢，很抱歉挡了你们的路。
E: Oh, I'm sorry for blocking your way.

C: 真不愧是你！
E: That's impressive!

C: 我好像能感受到其中蕴含的…情绪。迷茫…畏惧…悲伤…以及微弱到几乎无法感知的……
E: It's like I can feel... emotions contained within them. Confusion... fear... sadness... and others so faint I can barely feel them...

C: 不过，这里居然有这么多扇门…我们应该能从其中一扇离开这里吧……
E: But, since there are so many doors here... we should be able to leave through one of them...

C: （这是个惊喜，我们稍后再揭晓。但你要明白——在梦中，一切皆有可能。）
E: (This is a surprise that will be revealed later. You have to remember — in a dream, anything is possible.)

C: 那么，契约便成立了。
E: Well, that seals the deal.

C: 是谁打扰了我的沉眠？！
E: Who dares disrupt my slumber!?

C: 等你向塔塔洛夫掀起反旗的那天，我和其他受压迫的桶必跟随你的左右。
E: When you raise the banners of rebellion against Tatalov, I, and all other oppressed cans will be at your side.

C: 哦，他让我转告各位：<color=#dbc291ff>无法抵达的梦中，剧目即将开演——</color>加油吧，各方势力都动起来了。无名客，别落后太远哦！
E: Oh, he had me relay a message to you: <color=#dbc291ff>The curtains have just risen over the dream that can't be reached</color>. The various factions have started to move. I wish you luck! Don't fall behind, Nameless!

C: 放心，我没事。
E: Don't worry. I'm fine.

C: 所以我没有第一时间提出，但现在看来，星穹列车有入场的理由。
E: Which is why I didn't suggest it initially. But the way things are now, the Astral Express has a reason to join the fray.

C: 不，我不是那个意思，这只是一种…修辞。
E: That's not what I meant. It's just a... figure of speech.

C: 这间房间…怎么上下颠倒过来了？
E: This room... Why is it upside down?

C: …不好。各位，我们得加速了。
E: ...This is not good. Everyone, we must hurry.

C: 最后的轻叹不知是谁发出的。
E: The final sigh escapes, its origin unknown.

C: …小心！附近有危险的气息。
E: ...Watch out! A dangerous presence lurks nearby.

C: 接下来，我会以模因形式陪伴在你身边，以备不时之需。出发吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Later, I'll stay by your side as a memetic entity, just in case. Time to set off, {NICKNAME}.

C: 特别鸣谢\n知更鸟\n星期日
E: Special Thanks\nRobin\nSunday

C: （家族代表…姬子那边没事吧……）
E: (A Family rep... Is Himeko okay...)

C: 没事，以大局为重。
E: It's fine. Let's focus on the big picture for now.

C: 「惨死」…那位大公以将死之躯化为烈火，舍身殉道。他是坚定、壮烈的命途行者，即便是恶徒，也不应受到如此诋毁。
E: "Tragic fate"... That duke turned his dying body to flames and sacrificed his life as a martyr. He was a determined and heroic Pathstrider. Not even a villain should be disparaged like this.

C: 「…做得好██杜布拉██无论他们逃往何处██泯灭终将造访…」
E: "...Well done ██ Dubra ██ wherever they go, ██ shall be met by annihilation..."

C: 「想要『她』的秘密？我可以给你，然后…替我享受那场盛会吧。」
E: "Want 'her' secret? I can give it to you, and then... you can enjoy the banquet for me."

C: …天，我变小了？我这是在做梦吗？
E: ...Good heavens. Did I shrink? Am I still in a dream?

C: 很简洁的回答。你也明白言多必失的道理。
E: What a simple answer. You, too, understand that idle chatter leads only to poverty.

C: 还真是这样。这些模型连内部构造都和真实建筑一模一样，区别只是没人居住。
E: So I was right. These models have interiors that look exactly like the real buildings. The only difference is that no one lives in them.

C: 我没认错！上次就是你，一边喊着友情努力钟表把戏，一边和那个银发小姑娘一起把我胖揍了一顿！
E: Not possible! It was you the last time, yelling about some clockwork friendship while beating me up with that silver-haired girl!

C: 可不能做坏事啊。
E: But I can't abuse it for evildoings.

C: 治安官的命令就是死命令，我告诉你，前面这块地，风不能进，雨不能进，梦主来了也不能进！
E: The Security Officer's word is absolute law. I've told you: That place up ahead is off-limits, to wind, to rain. Even if the Dreammaster was here, they aren't getting in!

C: …你花了多少？
E: ...How much did you spend?

C: 哈哈，想跟我赌？可以，你有种！
E: Hahaha, are you trying to strike a bet with me? Well, you've got some guts!

C: 不过嘛，这在我看来倒不失为好事一桩，因为……
E: But it's a good thing, if you ask me, because...

C: 艾米绮将噼咔白葡萄汽水注满你们的高脚杯。杯沿轻轻相碰，一声脆响传来。
E: Amiky poured Pika White Grape Soda into your tall glasses. The rims gently clinked, emitting a crisp, resonant sound.

C: ——敬苦涩的童年。
E: ...To a bitter childhood.

C: 咦，什么动静？
E: Huh, what's all the commotion about?

C: 真是双漂亮的眼睛。告诉我，它们会在夜里发光吗？
E: What pretty eyes. Tell me, do they shine in the dark?

C: 「卡卡瓦夏」…我是你的未来。
E: Kakavasha... I am your future.

C: 你就是把这捆铁链缠在拳头上，那是你能找到的唯一一件{RUBY_B#武器}工具{RUBY_E#}。然后，在那座迷宫里，你……
E: You wrapped that iron chain around your fist, for that is the only {RUBY_B#weapon}tool{RUBY_E#} you could find. Then, in that maze, you...

C: 那我们来「对掌」吧。如果有母神保佑，你就可以轻松点了。
E: Let's put our palms together. If you receive Gaiathra's blessing, you'll feel more relaxed.

C: 卡卡瓦夏？
E: Kakavasha?

C: 你…真的想要亲手毁灭这个世界吗？
E: You... do you truly want to destroy the world with your own hands?

C: 先生…是你吗？我听到了皮鞋的声音。
E: Mister... Is that you? I hear the sound of leather shoes.

C: 不，有关，当然有关。不然我为什么要努力取得你们的信任，再把各位邀请到这里？
E: Oh no, they do, of course they do. Otherwise, why would I work so hard to gain your trust and then invite you all here?

C: 我不能确定，但我愿意赌那个可能性。
E: Let's just say I'd put money on the possibility.

C: 而这之后，能否从深渊中归来…就是你的另一场豪赌了。
E: And after this, whether you can return from the abyss... is another gamble of yours.

C: 更何况这位自灭者还要带着周遭的一切入灭。你的力量分明是沉眠无相者的馈赠，深不见底，就像是深渊中淌出的一条支流，为众生带去死亡与罪恶。
E: And even more so, when this Self-Annihilator heralds the destruction of everything. Your strength is obviously a gift of the sleeping and shapeless, immeasurable and fathomless, like a tributary spawned from the abyss that brings death and sin to all.

C: 身为巡海游侠，我们只看底线，每当有人要践踏它时，「巡猎」的复仇就会找上门去。
E: As Galaxy Rangers, we strictly adhere to the bottom line — when someone crosses them, The Hunt's vengeance will surely come knockin'.

C: 没想到能遇见真人…您、您这时候不是应该在为谐乐大典的召开做准备吗？
E: I can't believe I'm actually meeting the real Robin... Sh—Shouldn't you be preparing for the Charmony Festival?

C: 嗯，不…没什么。
E: Mhmm, no... it's nothing.

C: 但从居民们的只言片语中，我得到了一个熟悉的名字…「加拉赫」。
E: But from the whispers of the residents, I've heard a familiar name... Gallagher.

C: 它是我生命的摇篮，是我诞生于世的意义，以及在很长一段时间里，它是世界眼中…我应当呈现的样子。
E: It is the cradle of my vitality, and the meaning of my birth. And for the longest time, it was... how I should have looked to the rest of the world.

C: 你、你还和看不见的东西聊得有来有回，我不是死了是什么？呜，呜呜…我就不该作死挑战禁忌，尝试在梦里入睡…好奇心害死皮皮西啊！
E: You... You're talking to someone invisible. If I'm not dead, what am I? *sob*... I shouldn't have pushed my luck and tried sleeping in my dream... Curiosity kills the Pepeshi!

C: 诶？！知更鸟小姐？她不是——对哦，如果流萤姑娘平安无事，知更鸟小姐一定也经历了同样的遭遇。
E: Huh!? Robin? But I thought she... Oh, right! If Firefly is here safe and sound, then it means Robin must be okay, too.

C: ——我愿意放弃，不再登上「谐乐大典」的舞台。
E: — I've decided to forego my role, and never step foot on the Charmony Festival's stage again.

C: 最近生面孔是越来越多了，美梦中肯定发生了不少事吧。唉，阿斯德纳仅剩的几片自由之地，也要不得安宁了啊……
E: There have been a lot of new faces lately. Things must be tough in the beautiful dream. The few remaining havens of freedom in Asdana will soon face trouble...

C: 哎呀，这么有仪式感的场合，就不要开玩笑啦！
E: Come on. Don't crack jokes at such a serious moment.

C: 当然没必要跟他们耗着。我给那忆者留了个「备用计划」，如果真的没办法进入梦境，她会在现实酒店的贵宾室给我留一瓶酒。
E: Of course, we don't need to walk into their trap. I gave a backup plan to the Memokeeper. If it turns out we won't be allowed to enter the Dreamscape, she'll order a drink for me in the VIP Lounge at the hotel in reality.

C: 是的。我认为旅途的意义，并不是为了走上一条「绝对正确」的道路……
E: Exactly. I believe the purpose of the journey isn't just about following a path that's always considered "absolutely right"...

C: 看来你口中的神并不存在。
E: Looks like the God you mentioned doesn't exist after all.

C: 有人问过我的意见吗？
E: Hold up, has any of you even bothered to ask me for my consent to this?

C: 但问题在于，正值谐乐大典召开前夕，我们要如何才能接近大剧院？家族势必会设下重重防守，强行突围…就算能做到，风险也太高了。
E: But the problem is: On the eve of the Charmony Festival opening, how exactly are we going to get close to the theater? Family security will be airtight, and if we brute force it... Even if we succeed, it's too risky.

C: 实不相瞒，我一直在筹备参加这场选秀呢。但现在看来，就算能脱颖而出，大概也没机会和知更鸟小姐握手了……
E: To tell you the truth, I'd been preparing to join the auditions all along. But now it looks like even if I scrape through, I probably still won't have the chance to shake Miss Robin's hand...

C: 已经走了这么远的路，就让我和你们一起走完匹诺康尼的旅途吧。很高兴最后我们能并肩而立，这确实是最好的结局了。
E: We've already come this far together. I'd like to join you for the rest of your journey on Penacony. I'm pleased that we can finally fight shoulder-to-shoulder — I couldn't ask for a better ending.

C: 书接上回，一场大雨拯救了倒在沙漠中的你们。这场雨浇灭了你心中的愤怒，你看着身边已经毫无斗志的同伴，想要安慰她……
E: Picking up from where we left off, a heavy downpour saves you both stranded in the desert. This rain quenches the anger in your heart. You look to your companion, now completely devoid of fighting spirit, wanting to comfort her...

C: 哦，又是一组投机取巧的挑战者。很抱歉，虽然我是个失败的钟表，但我也是有底线的。
E: Oh, another group of opportunistic challengers. Sorry, though I may be a failure of a clock, I still have my principles.

C: 如果是「秩序」驱使你囚禁瓦尔特和知更鸟，还要借此胁迫我们乖乖就范，那我想，我们根本没有坐下谈判的必要。
E: If it is the Order that drove you to imprison Welt and Robin, and you're using them to coerce our compliance, then there'll be no point in entertaining any type of discussion.

C: 就算要放回天空，也得它能够展翅翱翔才行。如果把它留在原地…恐怕它再也不会拥有飞上天空的机会了。
E: Even if I was gonna release it back into the sky, it'd have to be strong enough to fly first. If I left it where I found it... I fear it'd never get the chance to fly ever again.

C: 对于这一抉择，我再次深表遗憾。接下来就是第三次，也是最后一次抉择了——
E: As to your choice, I once again offer my heartfelt apologies. Next comes the third and final decision—

C: 够了！我已明白各位的真意…我服输！
E: That's enough! I have come to grasp the sincerity of your cause... I yield!

C: 没错，你和流萤小姐就是在这里遭遇了「死亡」——现在该叫它「沉眠」了。考虑到它和流梦礁的关联，出现在这倒是不难理解。
E: Exactly, this is where you and Firefly encountered "Death," which we now know as "Dormancy." Considering its connection to Dreamflux Reef, it's not surprising it appeared here.

C: 奇怪，这里明明不是酒店，差别也很大，但我总觉得自己来过，而且…住过一段时间。
E: Weird, this place is quite different from the hotel, but I just... I feel like I've been here before and... even lived here for a while.

C: 答案就是如此，三月七小姐。这枚梦泡是我诞生的摇篮，我…是一位和忆域迷因无异的梦中人。
E: That's the answer, March 7th. This dream bubble is the place where I was born, and I... I'm a dweller in this dream just like a Memory Zone Meme.

C: 每个人都会有迷路的时候，犹豫不决，不知道该去往哪个方向。它存在于这片梦境中，也存在于梦境之外的任何地方。
E: Well, everyone gets lost at times. They may hesitate and doubt which way to go. That happens in this Dreamscape and beyond.

C: 既然这样，就是全票通过了。
E: In that case, it's unanimous.

C: 哇，形状好像对得上，原来这块碎片也和小米沙有关？
E: Hey, the shape seems to match. So, this shard is also connected to Misha?

C: 钟表小子，原来你在这。对啊，我们第一次见面，好像也是在这个房间……
E: Clockie, you're here! Yeah, this is the room where we first met each other...

C: 不过，咱最后到底是狠狠出了口恶气。这下舒服了。还记得那帮混蛋当年是怎么咒咱们的吗，嗯？他们说：「下地狱去吧，该死的叛徒」……
E: But in the end, we managed to do it, and now we can find solace. Remember how those idiots cursed us? They said, "Go to hell, you worthless traitors!" Heh...

C: 呵…节哀。
E: Well... my condolences.

C: 也许…等亡者的怨念悉数平息，天就放晴了吧。
E: Perhaps... when the sorrows of the departed have finally quieted down, the sky will clear up.

C: 半个琥珀纪前，家族在那里举办了一场空前绝后的庆典，而宴会过后…星球上的每个人都成了「家族」的一员。
E: Half an Amber Era ago, The Family held an unprecedented festival there, and after that... everyone on the planet became part of The Family.

C: 我了个呜呜伯，这么复杂啊。那你要求我们立刻离开阿斯德纳的意思是？不会是没辙了吧？
E: Holy Wubbaboo! This is getting way too complicated. Is this why you want us to leave Asdana right away? Are you giving up?

C: 你相信报应吗？
E: Do you believe in karma?

C: 「而我——我将成为诸位新的家人，并将你们从死去的幻影中解放。」
E: "As for me... I shall forge new bonds of Kinship and liberate you from the clutches of death."

C: 你怎么什么都说啊丹恒…
E: Dan Heng, why do you have to blab about everything...?

C: 我们在追缉某人的过程中偶然相识，正巧发现那位星期日先生在酝酿一桩惊天阴谋……
E: During our pursuit of a certain person, we crossed paths and just so happened to uncover a shocking plot being concocted by Mr. Sunday...

C: 说得我都有点脸红了…
E: You're making me blush...

C: 琥珀历<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪，纪元的第一年，宇宙再次回到它应行的轨道上。阴谋的火种在「梦想之地」匹诺康尼闷烧，尚未成燎原之势，便成为克里珀铁砧上的一簇火花，转瞬即逝。
E: In the year <unbreak>2158</unbreak> of the Amber Era, the first year of the new epoch, the universe resumed its intended trajectory. The kindling of conspiracy smoldered in Penacony, the Land of the Dreams. Failing to erupt into a blaze, it instead flickered briefly on Qlipoth's anvil, before vanishing in the blink of an eye.

C: 「玛瑙世界」三票，江户星两票……
E: Three votes for the Agate World, two for Edo Star...

C: <size=40>拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉</size>
E: <size=40>Razalina Jane Estella</size>

C: 与此同时，匹诺康尼依旧光辉灿烂，稚子的梦将永远延续。
E: Meanwhile, Penacony remains resplendent in its glory, and the child's dream will continue in perpetuity.

C: 既然鸟儿生来就属于天空，我们应该让它回到那里去。对吧？
E: Birds belong to the sky, so we should help them return there, right?

C: 但寥寥数十人，在如此庞大的梦境面前无异于沧海一粟。我们必须寻找其他办法，在短时间内唤醒以十万、百万为单位的自由意志。
E: However, awakening a mere handful of individuals is insignificant compared to the vast number of people immersed in the dream. We must find other ways to awaken the free will of millions of people within a short period of time.

C: …是啊。
E: ...I know.

C: 原来是这样啊。
E: So, this is how it is.

C: 无论如何，我都不愿活在梦中。
E: I would never ever want to live in a dream.

C: 此人心无旁骛，潜心梦中，对你的到来没有半点反应。
E: Single-minded, this person dives into the dreamscape, having not the slightest reaction to your arrival.

C: 因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
E: Let's bid our final farewells here.

C: 话毕，姬子对你微微颔首示意。你深吸一口气，定了定神，望向「钟表匠」……
E: As the words cease, Himeko nods ever so slightly in your direction. You take a deep breath, steady your mind, and turn your gaze towards the Watchmaker...

C: 鸢尾花家系还派人送来了好多纪念品和果篮，还有一个精致的按钮模型，等你好利索了，慢慢享受个够…这下我们也算是盛会之星的大人物啦。
E: The Iris Family sent us a bunch of souvenirs, fruit baskets, plus this fancy button model. After you're back on your feet, you can enjoy them all... We're pretty much celebrities on the Planet of Festivities now, aren't we?

C: 不过，不能自由行动还是挺不方便的。银狼，能帮帮我么？
E: Still, it'd be quite inconvenient if I can't move freely. Could you help me out, Silver Wolf?

C: …又是人才激励部？内务审查？到底有完没完？
E: ...The Talent Motivation Department again? Internal review? Will it ever end?

C: 不错的选择，开始调饮吧。
E: Not a bad choice. Let's start mixing.

C: 就像我之前说的，来日方长，等收拾妥当，就前往我们的下一站吧。
E: Like I said, we'll go and see. Once we've packed everything, we should head to our next destination.

C: ——干杯。
E: ...Cheers.

C: 在那古老的岁月，「秩序」与「存护」那么接近。公司身为琥珀王的信徒，为何不站在「秩序」一方，却要寻求和家族合作？
E: The Order and the Preservation used to be close in ancient times. So why does the IPC, as a follower of the Amber Lord, seek collaboration with The Family instead of aligning with the Order?

C: 萨缪尔小姐，请回吧。我想，你对「典押」的定义还不够了解。
E: Miss Samuel, I think you'd best turn around. It seems you're not quite familiar with the term "pawn."

C: （与其说是典押行的老板娘，那位「慈玉女士」的气质…更像是一位放贷人呢。）
E: (That Lady Bonajade feels more like a... moneylender rather than the owner of a pawnshop.)

C: 这…这不可能！你之前明明都连着输给我十把了…我怎么可能在这种关键时刻失手？！
E: Th—This... this can't be! You lost to me ten times in a row... How could I possibly lose to you at such a crucial moment!?

C: 是真的…那位慈玉女士是货真价实的……
E: It's true... Lady Bonajade has truly blessed me...

C: 别着急，这一步只是为了让你相信「慈玉典押」货真价实。接下来，我自然会告诉你他们付出的代价。
E: Not so fast. This step was just to show you that the Bonajade Exchange is genuine, that I had the power to grant their wishes. And now, I'll tell you the price they paid.

C: 你想要的，是我为了能够活下去，亲手给自己的伙伴们戴上镣铐。
E: So, you're going to ask me to personally restrain my partners to ensure my own survival.

C: 你们说什么悄悄话呢？
E: What are you guys whispering about?

C: 听起来很简单。
E: Sounds easy enough.

C: 博识学会派我来给公司的使节监考。哼，教务办公室的任务罢了。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild assigned me to be an invigilator for the IPC's ambassadors. Hmph, nothing more than an errand from the Office of Academic Affairs.

C: 总算等到您了，小灰毛大人！我是此地的捕头，现在正在扮演炸弹！
E: You've finally arrived, O great gray-haired little one! I am the constable around these parts, and right now I'm posing as a bomb!

C: 请听题！什么生物早上四条腿、中午两条腿、晚上三条腿？
E: Listen up! What creature has four legs in the morning, two legs at noon, and three legs in the evening?

C: 很困难。时间有限，她又会易容，而且就算抓到了，她也一定不会乖乖就范……
E: It's difficult. Time is running out, and she's a master of disguise. And even if we catch her, she won't come quietly...

C: 你是指「钟表匠」的贵宾们吗？可惜…以我的经验，在场的人里应该没人能改变现状。
E: You mean the Watchmaker's guests? That's a pity... Based on my experience, I don't think any of them can turn the tide on this situation.

C: 我们曾在哪里见过吗？
E: Have we ever met before?

C: 这样啊…你也有类似的经历吗？那你应当知道，我和你记忆中的她并非同一人。
E: I see... You've also had a similar experience? Then you should know that this me and your memory of me are not the same person.

C: …哈哈。
E: ...Haha.

C: 你这么一说，好像场面真就没那么凄凉啦？
E: When you put it like that, it doesn't actually sound too bad.

C: 看来我的时候到了？
E: Looks like my time's up?

C: 也就五分钟而已。
E: It's only been five minutes.

C: 呃，你的关注点好现实哦……
E: That's a really practical way of looking at it...

C: 因此，听说校园风气也非常「匹诺康尼」，真让人好奇。
E: Because of this, I hear that the culture on campus has a truly Penaconian flavor. How intriguing.

C: 怎么，你有意见啊？
E: Got a problem with that?

C: 芮克先生，请你注意用语。这里是教室，不是片场。
E: Mr. Reca, please mind your verbiage. You're not on set. This is a classroom.

C: 倒是我开眼了，你们这的气氛怪稀奇啊，还有给猴子立雕像的。
E: But I gotta say, I've seen it all now. The atmosphere here is real strange. I mean, statues of monkeys?

C: 哼，我长得就那么像杀人狂？答案是二者皆有，更多的就别问了。
E: Huh, do I look like some kind of madman to you? The answer is both. Any more than that is none of your business.

C: 哥们，你运气不错。这要是我自己的事儿，肯定就换个法子开道了。可惜这是给别人搭把手，闹不得太大动静。
E: Pardner, you're in luck. If this were my own business, I'd be makin' my way through by other means. But since I'm just lending a hand, I can't go raisin' too much ruckus.

C: 很遗憾，完全没有。任何人想要进入睡蕉社，都必须通过繁复的入社流程。
E: They didn't, unfortunately. Anyone who wishes to become part of the Slumbernana Association must undergo onerous entrance procedures before they can become one of them.

C: 宝贝「御猿•邪忍」…这景象我见过太多次了，但愿别真是乱破猜的那样。
E: Evil Ninja Osaru, that doggoned muddle-fudger... This is way too familiar a sight for comfort. Things'd better not turn out the way Rappa feared they would.

C: 哦，你别把我当什么善茬，小可爱。
E: Don't mistake me for a fudgin' saint now, you son of a nice lady.

C: 可别说你高高在上惯了，用不来眼前这玩意儿。
E: Don't tell me that you've been so used to your classy posh instruments that this thing is beneath you.

C: 这到底怎么回事…没变成猴子的人还更疯了？
E: What's going on...? Are fellow humans more dangerous than those monkeys now?

C: 反正不是你的错。那帮家伙真是坏极了，说什么一无所有更好，实际上要是不把人变成那样，他们才没本事控制每一个人呢。
E: Anyway, it's not your fault. Those bananas are incorrigible! Preaching about how having nothing is best... More like they wouldn't be able to control a single human if none of us thought that way.

C: 医生跟我说，那你就把重要的事先记在纸上吧，我过几天就帮你修好，顺便找找原因。
E: The doctor told me to note things down if they were important, and she'd look up some possible causes before coming to fix me up a few days later.

C: 仔细观察
E: Watch closely

C: 也行，反正早晚要去上课的。筑梦设计课的地点在舞台广场，咱们去看看吧。
E: Sure, we have to attend classes sooner or later anyway. Dreamweaving class is at the Stage Plaza. Let's go take a look.

C: 你想起了在列车上看到的茫茫宇宙，万千繁星点缀在真空的漆黑幕布上，而你的画作只会比这星空更迷人，更绚丽……
E: You remember the vast universe you saw from the train, with countless stars dotting the dark vacuum. Yet, your painting will be even more enchanting and vibrant than that starry sky...

C: 住口吧，异乡的猿猴，你怎能轻易断绝我们命定的枷锁！
E: Shut it, monkey from another land! You can't just break our destined chain so easily!

C: 乱破被学生包围住了，不方便打扰。
E: Rappa has been surrounded by students. Not a good time to disturb her.

C: 当然没问题！不过入社有相对严格的考核，一次人数也不能太多，如果推荐了三月同学，剩下二位就……
E: Count on me! It's just that the club has a rigorous screening procedure and we only take in a few members each time. If I refer March in, then the two of you...

C: 那就让三月同学独享宝贵的名额咯~正巧下午就有场「校外活动」，听说会去个特别神秘的地方，我都等不及啦。
E: Okie-dokie! This coveted spot will go to March then! Ooh, there's an off-campus event happening later today at a supposedly mysterious location. I can't wait!

C: 你一个人没问题吧？
E: Will you be alright on your own?

C: 我只是想帮助这些可怜娃摆脱痛苦，换一种身份来享受幸福——顺便在这过程中赚点小钱——这在匹诺康尼也不是什么稀罕事。
E: I was only trying to help relieve those pitiful kids of their suffering, letting them enjoy the rest of their happy life from a different perspective... And maybe make some extra cash while I'm at it, but this isn't anything new in Penacony.

C: 说出狂放的忍•真言
E: Speak the ninja mantra with a wild twist

C: （又到我的台词了，这次要说出「挑衅小猴的话」……）
E: (It's my turn again. This time I'll say something to taunt Brave Monkey...)

C: 不，现在正是最精彩的桥段！只不过演员发生了一些小小的变化——谐乐蕉师，现在由你来饰演反派。
E: No, but we've come to the climax of the film! Just a small swap among the roles... Charmony BananAdvisor, you're up for the villain this time.

C: 既然知道，开口前就先过过脑子，别引火烧身，香蕉。
E: Since you know, think before you speak, don't go askin' for trouble, ya banana.

C: 地上如垃圾袋般横竖零落的并非塑料垃圾，而是御猿屋的爪牙。在缭乱•忍者面前投下影子的亦非亡命冤魂，而是一位散发着劲霸忍•力的陌生来客——
E: What's scattered on the ground like garbage bags are not plastic garbage. Instead, they are the lackeys of the Osaru. The one casting their shadow in front of the Dazzling Ninja is not a dead spirit, but rather an unknown visitor who exudes a powerful and suppressive power...

C: 不不，我比那类群众演员要正式得多。
E: No, not those. I have a much bigger role than those extras.

C: 行吧，但千万别带上个人感情。你让三号到处乱跑，研究猿已经有意见了。
E: Fine, but make sure not to bring your personal feelings into this. The Research Apes aren't exactly happy about how you are allowing No. 3 to run around at will.

C: 隔离认知是治愈模因病毒的第一步。你本该等同天才的智慧就是被这些垃圾扼杀的。
E: Cognition isolation is the first step to curing one of a memetic virus. You were supposed to have the intelligence of a genius, but such garbage ruined it.

C: 嘶…这肌肉组织还真是坚硬，像扇在石头上一样。
E: Agh... Your muscle fibers sure are densely packed. It's like slapping a rock.

C: 你、你怎么能质疑博士的理论，研究猿们肯定有自己的考量！
E: Y—You... how dare you question the Doctor's theory? The Research Apes must have their own considerations!

C: 乱破，你知晓自己的*忍道*了吗？
E: Rappa, have you found your own way of the ninja?

C: *蕉学*失败……
E: Banacademics failed...

C: 留神。空气中的铁锈味极其浓烈。
E: Be on alert. The smell of rust is thick in the air.

C: 在最后的「圣城」奥赫玛，二人历经波折，取得了黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅的信任。面对来自迷雾之外的威胁，众人决定合力讨伐「纷争」泰坦尼卡多利。
E: In Okhema, the final holy city, the two members of the squad undergo great trials and gain the trust of Aglaea, leader of the Chrysos Heirs. Facing a threat from beyond the fog, everyone decides to band together to defeat the Strife Titan Nikador.

C: 做好准备，我们也上灵水盆前吧。
E: Let's also make our way to the front of the spirit basin when you're ready.

C: 恐怕，这试炼不属于某一个人…而是一片供所有挑战者与妄念厮杀的疆场。
E: This might not be a single person's trial... but an arena for every challenger to engage their own delusions in a bloody battle.

C: 怎么了，两位？
E: What's wrong with you two?

C: 虽然未曾打过照面，但我也感受到了。毫无疑问，那是只属于「纷争」的杀意……
E: I'm seeing him for the first time, but there's no doubt about it. What I'm sensing can only be Strife's bloodlust...

C: 不、不必啦。缇安她只是…她明天就会想明白了，先不打扰你做生意。
E: No, no, it's alright. Trianne is just... She'll come to her senses tomorrow. We'll be off first.

C: 况且，身为天外来客，又为奥赫玛付出了这么多心血，你们已经是大家心目中的大英雄了——阿格莱雅女士绝不会把大家晾在{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}眼皮底下烤的！
E: Not only are you guests from beyond the sky, but you've also done so much for Okhema. You're practically heroes to us all! Lady Aglaea would never subject you to {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} judgment.

C: 能和{NICKNAME}阁下再度同行，真是太好了。
E: I'm glad to be in your company again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 变成美少女！给我变！
E: Transform into a cute girl! Now!

C: 嗯！这还差不多…<size=-4>不过，虽然刚才随口说了个名字，但人家到底是什么物种？</size>
E: That's much better... <size=-4>Still, I'd like to know what exactly I am. That was just a name I came up with on a whim...</size>

C: 「向大树」……
E: "Toward the Great Tree"...

C: 啊？这种人还在这里搞研究…你们刚才不是说，树庭是围绕泰坦建立的学院嘛？
E: Huh? And he's still able to conduct research here? Didn't you just say that the Grove is an academy that was established around a Titan?

C: …你是谁？保持距离，表明身份，否则后果自负。
E: ...Who are you? Keep your distance and identify yourself. Otherwise, you'll face the consequences.

C: 答案是「水」——没有水，水车便无法旋转。
E: The answer is "water" — without it, the waterwheel cannot turn.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因着黑潮，泰坦在此地布下天罗地网。若想逃出生天，还需汝等为吾夺回正身才行。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Titans have cast a net over this place because of the black tide. If we want to escape, I'll require your help to reclaim my true form.</color>

C: 「献身拱心」……
E: The Dome of Devotion...

C: …我也来试试看。
E: ...Let me give it a try.

C: 没关系，阁下，就照她说的做吧。
E: It'll be fine. Let's just do as she says.

C: *泰坦悲伤的低鸣*
E: *Titan's sad cries*

C: 呀，门能打开了！原来那道讯息还是个门锁呀。
E: Hey, the door can finally be opened! It seems like that message also served as a lock.

C: 只要令水车转动，便能随之拾级而上……
E: As long as we can get the water wheel turning, we'll be able to use it to ascend...

C: 好了，去乘坐水车吧？吾在上边恭候各位。
E: Alright, go ride the water wheel. I'll wait for you up there.

C: 好强…{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}说的是真的……
E: So powerful... {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was right...

C: …晚些再见吧，我会回来的。
E: ...We'll talk again later. I'll be back.

C: …嗯，感谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 爸爸妈妈说，悬锋的孩子打出生起就手持利剑，注定要奔向战场。
E: Mom and Dad told me that the children of Kremnos are born to wield swords and fight on the battlefield.

C: 假如让他们知道，备受族人尊崇的王储萌生了放弃的念头…迈德漠斯，你该如何向你逝去的母亲交代？
E: If they ever learn that the crown prince they look up to so much is actually toying with the notion of stepping down... think of the disgrace it would bring upon your departed mother, Mydeimos.

C: 荒谬！他的手就连枪头都举不起来，你觉得他能威胁到悬锋城？
E: Don't be absurd! Those tiny hands lack the strength to even lift a spear! Do you truly believe him a threat to Castrum Kremnos!?

C: 小心…悬锋人……
E: Watch out... for the Kremnoan...

C: 你还活着啊，「救世主」？
E: I see you're still alive and kicking, Deliverer.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 虽然刚经历一场闹剧，但云石天宫难得这么清净，不如继续先前的行程吧。小风堇，你也一起来吗？
E: Though we just had quite the commotion, it's not every day that we find the Marmoreal Palace this serene. Shall we continue with our previous plans? Hyacine, would you care to join us?

C: …老师，我直说了：阿格莱雅大人给我们的任务是，寻找幸存者、弄清树庭之灾的原委，以及…回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: ...Professor, let me be frank: The mission Lady Aglaea entrusted us is to search for survivors, uncover the truth about the disaster at the Grove, and... retrieve the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 因为阿格莱雅大人…恐怕不会允许。
E: Because Lady Aglaea... will probably be against it.

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女能聆听门神的指引，也许你梦见的，就是翁法罗斯某处仙境的景象哦。
E: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' Holy Maidens can receive guidance from the god of passages. Perhaps what you saw in your dream is a divine land somewhere in Amphoreus.

C: 我的好女孩，别闹别扭了。我们把{RUBY_B#玩偶娃娃}你的伙伴{RUBY_E#}也一起叫来——
E: Now be a good girl and call {RUBY_B#doll}your friends{RUBY_E#} over too...

C: 当然啦。大海不是陆地，一不小心就会迷失方向。所以，学会辨认{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的神迹可是很重要的。
E: Oh, sweetie. The ocean isn't like the land. It's easy to get lost. That's why it's important to learn to recognize the miracle of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

C: 惟█有一人█ █ 能走到█ ██ 最后███  █ █
E: Only █ one █ █ person █ ██ can.███ █ █

C: 这…是一封信吗？倒是提到了「番红蕊」，但还有…「缇里西庇俄丝」？
E: Wait, this is... a letter? It mentions something about "saffron" and... "Tribios"?

C: 关键在于{M#他}{F#她}。
E: {M#He}{F#She} is the key.

C: 不错，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}已经陨落，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神力也为奥赫玛所有。只要能夺回火种，那剑士便毫无逃离的手段。
E: Impressive. {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has fallen, and {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' divine power already belongs to Okhema. Once we take back the Coreflame, the swordmaster will have no means of escape.

C: 真的？那我可要许愿了——
E: Really? Then I'm gonna make a wish!

C: 坦率地说，我们无法保证这个计划的安全性……
E: I'll be honest — we can't.

C: 你是对的。愿强有力的命运恭候你，也愿我们在承诺中的新世界再会……
E: You speak the truth. May you be destined for a powerful fate, and may we reunite in the promised new world...

C: 我无需读心的能力，也能戳穿你的把戏。
E: I can see through your deception even without the power of mind-reading.

C: 好久不见，「守护者」。
E: It's been a while, "Guardian."

C: 缇宝老师，从刚才开始，你也一副沉思的样子，是缇宁捎来了什么消息么？
E: You've been lost in thought for a while now too, Tribbie. Did Trinnon bring news?

C: 哎，那家伙…要是他还在，许多问题根本不必弯弯绕绕。
E: Mydei... If he were still here, we'd probably take a lot fewer detours to solve our issues.

C: 呀，圣女大人！许久不见，今天怎么有兴致跑出来玩？是不是你那些小玩意又长翅膀飞了？
E: Hey, Lady Maiden! It's been a while! What's got you out and about today? Did your little inventions fly off on their own again?

C: 这两个孩子…看打扮是在圣殿外生活的平民。听妈妈说，她还是圣女的时候，曾经有个女孩闯进神殿，想要偷贡品，被她看见了。
E: By the way they are dressed, the siblings look like civilians living outside the temple. Mother mentioned that when she was a Holy Maiden, she caught a girl sneaking into the temple to steal the tributes.

C: 各位，我们应当立即动身，兵分两路：一队留守重渊，和阿格莱雅的援兵会合，搜寻缇安老师的下落。
E: Everyone, we must take action now. We should split into two groups: One group will stay in the Abyss and meet up with Aglaea's reinforcements, then search for Trianne's whereabouts.

C: 助理们不由分说涌了上来，将两位异乡游客给「请」得远远的。
E: The assistants surged forward without warning, "escorting" the two foreign visitors far from the scene.

C: 所以，您认为这个「万能的许愿机」确有其事。
E: So, you believe this "omnipotent wish-granting chalice" might actually be real.

C: 我明白，米凯先生可以说是在变相向您求助。
E: I see... So Mr. Micah's asking for your help, in his own way.

C: 汝之身躯托吾麾下；吾之命运附汝剑上。
E: Heed my words. My will creates your body, and your sword creates my destiny.

C: 这根本不是我们能对付的！记得帮我报加班费！
E: This is way out of our league! Don't forget to file my overtime pay!

C: 我倒还挺喜欢你那位从者的，这种讲原则、守边界的合作伙伴，作为结盟对象，至少比你们这些一肚子坏水的值得信赖。
E: Still, I have to say, I kinda like your Servant. A partner who plays by the rules and knows his boundaries? I'd take that over you schemers any day. At least he's trustworthy.

C: 这一次，我们的肉身甚至都不是经由魔力构成的。
E: And this time, our physical bodies weren't even constructed from magical energy.

C: 简直像把「幕后黑手」贴在了自己的脑门儿上。好消息，这次的御主不像是个会滥用令咒的坏东西呢……
E: Might as well slap "Mastermind" on their forehead. Well, at least my Master this time doesn't seem like the kind of idiot who'd abuse their Command Spells...

C: 如果实在没办法，我就只能在这儿做服务员来抵账了。
E: If it really comes to that, I'll just have to work as a server to pay it off.

C: 我把匹诺康尼从永眠中唤醒！
E: I woke Penacony from its eternal slumber!

C: 好得不得了。
E: Great. Couldn't be better.

C: 我打赌那些被你剥夺「英雄」妆容的御主与从者，绝不会被你的宝具困住——我对他们有信心！
E: I bet that those Masters and Servants will not yield to your Noble Phantasm, even though you've stripped their identity as heroes — I trust them.

C: 巧了不是？我有时也觉得，自己不该是个空间站保安。
E: Funny, isn't it? Sometimes I think I shouldn't be working as a space station security guard either.

C: 「保持现状就好」、「反正会有更适合的人」、「我只是微不足道的凡人」。
E: "Staying where I am is fine." "Someone better will come along." "I'm just an ordinary person."

C: 就像你那样吗？
E: Like you did?

C: 难喝一百倍帕！
E: A hundred times worse!

C: 嗯嗯。
E: Mm-hmm.

C: 无名客们来来去去，有些人找到了他们的归宿，而有些人继续前行，就像银轨永远向前…这就是星穹列车。我相信，列车长的未来是不会寂寞的。
E: The Nameless come and go. Some find a place they want to stay while others keep moving forward, just like the silver rails that never stop... That's the Astral Express. I'm sure the conductor's future will never be lonely.

C: 我就知道，{F#姐们}{M#兄弟}你还惦记着咱老桑博，不瞒你说，观众也都期待着呢。
E: I knew it, {M#bro}{F#sis}! You're still thinking about old Sampo. And, I won't lie, the audience is waiting for it too.

C: …还有希米亚影业。
E: ...And Himemia Films.

C: 作为留名历史的存在，英灵的传说中往往潜藏着他们的弱点：像是某位战士沐浴冥河水刀枪不入，但偏偏伤害他的脚踵却会一击致命。
E: As Heroic Spirits who left a mark in history, our legends usually hint at our greatest weaknesses — like that one warrior who bathed in the river of the underworld and became invincible except for his heel.

C: 我以令咒——
E: By my Command Spell —

C: 用双刀战斗的你，可没资格做出评价。
E: An Archer dual-wielding swords isn't qualified to talk about this.

C: 一些私人恩怨…
E: Just some private disagreements...

C: 《钟表惊魂夜》
E: A Haunting of Clocks

C: 答案只有一个。
E: There's only one answer to that.

C: 怎么可能？我明明用钟表把戏把所有人的情绪改成了绝望。
E: Impossible! I used Clockwork to turn everyone's emotions to pure despair!

C: 匹诺康尼的电影之父？倚老卖老的古董罢了，只会蹭热度的烂片之王。
E: The "Father of Penaconian Cinema"? More like a washed-up antique, a flop king who only knows to leech off trends.

C: 行啊。那麻烦你看好入口，咱俩进去瞧瞧吧。
E: Yeah, that works. Can you keep watch over the entrance? We'll go in and have a look for ourselves.

C: 违反了会怎么样？
E: What happens if I break the rule?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>「垃圾桶里禁止丢垃圾。」</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Do not discard trash in trashcans."</color>

C: 随便试试。
E: Anything will do.

C: 如果这些还不够，就得劳烦你出手了。
E: I'm afraid you're going to have to handle this if it isn't enough.

C: 星穹列车应该早就启程了，他为什么还在匹诺康尼？
E: The Astral Express should've departed a long time ago. Why is he still in Penacony...?

C: 要得到你的信任，想来我也只有一种选择。
E: It looks like there's only one way to gain your trust.

C: 万维克，为我揭下面具吧。
E: Help me remove my disguise, Wonweek.

C: 如此说来，瓦尔特先生曾提起过，列车此行是送一位旅客重返故土，这位女士的故乡可是仙舟联盟？
E: Mr. Yang mentioned the Express' next voyage is to send a passenger back home. Could this lady be from the Xianzhou Alliance?

C: 呃，不过我得试试，还能不能认出来。
E: But... It may take me a while to identify her.

C: 我倒还是想不明白……
E: I still don't understand...

C: 呃…你能想象她开车的样子吗？
E: Um, can you picture her driving?

C: 届时，列位恩公便是停云心间的勇气呢。
E: And you, my dear benefactors, will be my source of courage.

C: 嗯，遇上点事，耽搁了一会儿。具体…还是等杨叔回来解释吧。
E: Yeah, we got delayed on the way. Mr. Yang will explain in detail when he gets back.

C: …非得回罗浮么？
E: ...Do I really have to go back to the Luofu?

C: 时至今日，这份雀跃也依然在心中鼓动。
E: Even to this day, this thrill still courses through me.

C: 万维克女士，能请您帮个忙吗？这里有一幅画，在离开前，我想完成它。
E: Miss Wonweek, may I ask a favor? There's a jigsaw here I'd like to finish before I leave.

C: 筑梦拼图么？我尽力而为。
E: A Dream Jigsaw? I see. I'll do my best.

C: 应该没问题吧，都说洗白弱三分嘛。
E: I guess it shouldn't be a problem. After all, he did get nerfed after turning into a good guy.

C: （我也去检查下行李吧，或者再和大家聊聊？）
E: (I'd better start packing up, too. Or should I go chat some more with the others?)

C: 丹恒，你会紧张吗？
E: Are you nervous, Dan Heng?

C: 交给我吧。
E: Gladly.

C: 去吧去吧。别担心，下次见面，咱就变回那个活蹦乱跳的美少女了。记得多拍些照片啊，我会检查作业的！
E: Yeah, you guys go on ahead. Don't worry about me! I'll be back to being my hyperactive and adorable self by the next time you see me. Now don't forget about those photos, okay? I'll be checking the camera!

C: 这叫仪式感，你不是最看重这个了吗？
E: Yeah, creating dramatic value. Isn't that what you're most obsessed with?

C: …有多高？
E: ...How much? How much?

C: 别怕，镜子——你要记住，天才的宿命，就是要一刻不停地解开出现在眼前的难题。
E: Fear not, mirror. You have to remember that being a genius means you're destined to solve challenge after challenge. There's no time for rest.

C: 实验还有机会做第二次，人没了可就再没办法复活了。
E: Experiments can always be repeated, but humans cannot be brought back to life.

C: 先探探门背后是什么。
E: Let's find out what's behind that gate.

C: 心思也很缜密，对话过程中始终保持着距离。我尝试套取「翁法罗斯」的情报，他俩一唱一和都糊弄过去了。
E: He was also quite cautious, keeping his distance throughout the conversation. I tried probing for more information on Amphoreus, but they both casually glossed over it.

C: 但反过来说，这意味着他们没有轻易拿下你我的把握。极端情况下，武力仍是我们的底牌。
E: Conversely, I believe this indicates he doesn't believe he can easily subdue us. If things take a turn for the worse, our best bet is still going to be resolution by force.

C: 至于你…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就在云石天宫，阿格莱雅让我别再插手。尽管去吧…「救世主」。
E: As for you... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is in the Marmoreal Palace. Aglaea told me to stay out of it. So, go ahead... "Deliverer."

C: 不用你多说。
E: I don't need you to tell me that.

C: …失礼了。
E: ...Do excuse my impropriety.

C: 两位，等听烦了故事就来云石市集找我吧。无论如何，我欠你们一次款待。
E: You two can find me at Marmoreal Market after you've grown tired of listening to her tales. In any case, I owe you my hospitality.

C: {RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金线缠绕着你我，它能察觉到最细微的动摇，如此一来，我们便不能对彼此撒谎。
E: The golden threads of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} entwine us, capable of sensing even the slightest quiver. We are bound to speak the truth to each other this way.

C: 嘿嘿，你该不会把*我们*当成什么都不懂的原始人了吧？
E: Hah, did you think we were some backwater people who don't understand anything?

C: 你轻轻地从容器中拿起一块红土，大地兽用殷切的眼神观察着你的一举一动…可别搞砸了。
E: You gently pick up a piece of red clay from the container, while the dromas watches your every move intently... Don't mess it up.

C: 这不是重点。
E: That's beside the point.

C: 不知道他喝了什么，该有人来劝劝他了。
E: Wonder what he drank. Someone should come calm him down.

C: 安抚不起作用，必须换个策略谈判了。
E: Since appeasing him did not work, it's time for a change in strategy.

C: 这和三月七有半点关系吗…
E: Is this even remotely related to March 7th...

C: 怎么样，阁下，买下来吧？
E: What do you think? Are you interested?

C: 即便是「神」也要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
E: Even gods have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.

C: 我早就想问了…
E: I've been meaning to ask that for a while now...

C: 空间够大，装潢也很华丽。
E: This place is indeed spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.

C: 漂游、沉没……
E: Floating, sinking...

C: 达米亚诺斯的话还没说完就被守卫拽走了。
E: Damionis was dragged away by the guards before he could finish his sentence.

C: 市民们都回来了，还真迅速。
E: That's fast. The citizens are already back in the city.

C: 这不是玩笑，而是一场审讯。
E: This is no laughing matter. It's an interrogation.

C: 我想知道，我们究竟犯下了多大的罪行？
E: What I want to know is, exactly how grave a crime have we committed?

C: 四问过后，若她没有走到你们背后，便算两位通过了考验。反之，你们的旅途只能止步于此了。
E: If she isn't standing right behind you after all four questions have been asked and answered, the both of you will have passed this test. If she is... your journey will end here.

C: 用问题回答问题，强烈的怀疑、抗拒…记作一步。
E: Response to a question with another question indicates intense suspicion and resistance... A step will be recorded.

C: 能令阿格莱雅大人动摇的人很少，白厄阁下是之一。
E: Only a select few can sway Lady Aglaea, and Lord Phainon is one of them.

C: 也许，是因为「人」的部分正在离我而去。

C: 你真的，我哭死…
E: The way you cared... I'm literally in tears...

C: 难道翁法罗斯和天外之界的交集远比人们想象更多？但史料里完全没有这部分记载啊。

C: 放心吧，如果你出了什么事——「挚友，我一定会把你最后的话带给丹恒！」
E: Relax. If something should happen to you, "I'll be sure to pass on your last words to Dan Heng, my friend!"

C: 实在扫兴，连一丝泰坦的气息都没有。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是躲起来了？

C: 抱歉，谁叫有人没把路上的障碍清扫干净呢？
E: Apologies, but someone forgot to clear out the obstacles along the way.

C: …也许只是一头老狮子临终前的谵语，不必放在心上。我们继续赶路……

C: 没有别的选择了。
E: There aren't any other options.

C: 慢着！别在这里白费力气，还是用点巧劲吧。

C: 我期许的命运…就在这扇门后。

E: Stop hiding behind those pathetic doubles! We'll crush you!

C: 万敌与尼卡多利的战吼自颓垣之后传出…不要辜负了万敌的搏命鏖战，抓紧时间破解尼卡多利的秘密吧。
E: Mydei and Nikador's battle cries can be heard from beyond the crumbling walls... Don't let Mydei's desperate struggle be in vain. Hurry up and uncover Nikador's secrets as fast as you can.

C: 天谴之锋已经瞄准了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的心脏。如果不设法阻止疯狂的泰坦，整座圣城都可能灰飞烟灭。
E: The Blade of Fury has its aim trained on {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s heart. We need to stop the mad Titan, or the entirety of the holy city could be reduced to ash.

C: 缇宝老师！我们准备好了。

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}又开口了……

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 「考验…第二次。必须…阻止凡人进入。」
E: "Another... challenge. Must deter... the mortals."

C: …这次收获不错。虽和「剧本」略有偏差，但无伤大雅。
E: ...We've got a decent harvest this time. Although we deviated slightly from the "script," it's not a big deal.

C: 你是谁？！
E: Who are you!?

C: 我想离开这里了。
E: I want to leave this place.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 立正挨打！
E: Stand still so I can beat you!

C: 「噢，伟大的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…我明白，我们都明白啊。你那不屈的神性并未死去，你只是暂时被那汹涌的黑潮给缠住了啊。」
E: "O mighty {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the truth is clear to us all. Your steadfast divinity is not vanquished. You are shrouded momentarily by that encroaching black tide."

E: Peace, for my people. Mountain Dwellers, no longer servants or fighters for Kremnos. Ever.

C: 害怕？不…我只是不想看见她失落的样貌。
E: Scared? No, I just don't want to see her disappointed.

E: The pampered little girl has grown up to be a shrewd politician. Should I be pleased or concerned?

C: 不必了，吾师。依照此前的分工来吧，你要为「天谴之锋」做好准备。
E: It's fine, Tribbie. As we discussed earlier, you need to prepare for the Blade of Fury.

C: （你丢的是这个吗？）
E: (Is this what you're looking for?)

C: 你还记不住天父之名吗？是刻法——
E: How can you still mix up the sky father's name? It's Kepha—

C: 但他没有撒谎，那把兵器的确出自哈托努斯之手。从上面的铭刻，我大致能推断出所处的年代。
E: He didn't lie about the weapon being one of Chartonus' handiwork, though. Thanks to its inscription, I now have a fairly good guess of the time period we're in.

C: 请冷静些，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Please keep it together, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 啊！
E: Gah!

C: 谢谢你手下留情，格奈乌斯阁下。
E: Your mercy is appreciated, Lord Gnaeus.

C: 年迈又昏聩的王，在密谋着不可言说的计划…他们想要亵渎{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性、它的灵魂、还有它留给悬锋城的遗产啊。
E: The aging and feeble king is plotting something unspeakable... One that seeks to defile {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, their soul, and the legacy they left to Kremnos.

C: 这一个有什么不同吗？
E: Is this one taking more out of you?

C: 裂分…灵魂……
E: Split... soul...

C: …解决掉了吗？
E: ...Is it dealt with?

C: 我们…该怎么回到往世？
E: ...How can we go back to the past?

C: …缇宁？看来她已经在为保卫奥赫玛做准备了。
E: ...Trinnon? It seems she has begun to make arrangements for defending Okhema.

C: 道路断裂了，怎么解决？
E: The bridge ahead is broken. How do we get across?

C: 这样…应该就可以了吧？
E: That... should have done it, right?

C: 还好吗，白厄？
E: Are you alright, Phainon?

C: 我的远行还要继续，哪怕要走遍翁法罗斯的每个角落……
E: I will continue this arduous journey, even if I must travel to every corner of Amphoreus...

C: 肢体动作，还有…微表情。
E: From his body language and... microexpressions.

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

C: 那家伙，他始终都在被自己的过去折磨。
E: That guy... has always been tormented by his past.

C: 的确。我想起在树庭求学的时光，每逢考试，理应沉心复习的时候，平日无暇关照的杂务都会变得条理清晰起来。
E: I understand completely. During my time at the Grove, the closer exams drew, the more efficient I became at tackling everyday mundane tasks — anything but my actual studies.

C: 是那刻夏？
E: Is it Anaxa?

C: 事情总是扎堆而至…{NICKNAME}和迷迷还要应对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼。我也计划去一趟树庭，搜集「天外之界」的线索。
E: Things are piling up again... {NICKNAME} and Mem are tied up with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial, and while I'm preparing to visit the Grove to uncover clues about the world beyond the sky.

C: 数日后，创世涡心……
E: A few days later at the Vortex of Genesis...

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它的灵魂已经等待许久了。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... Their soul has been waiting for a long time.

C: …现在还说这个，真不愧是你。
E: ...For you to be able to say that even now... You're truly impressive.

C: 就听迷迷的吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's do that then, {NICKNAME}.

C: 几乎就在那眨眼瞬间，时间仿佛在那冰凉触感下停滞，而你恰好阖上了眼……
E: In the blink of an eye, time seems to have frozen beneath that cold sensation, and you just happened to close your eyes...

C: 联系断了。凭我的力量…还无法追溯。
E: The connection has been severed. With my strength... I'm not able to trace it.

C: 别傻笑了，走吧。元老院的使者差不多该到了。
E: Stop giggling. It's time for us to go. The messenger from the Council of Elders is almost here.

C: 告诉我，元老院对黑潮了解多少？
E: Tell me, how much does the Council of Elders know about the black tide?

C: 不仅如此，还有太多默不作声的人，正在观望我能掀起多大的风浪…而黄金裔们也从来不是铁板一块，你心里清楚。
E: What's more, there are many who remain silent, merely watching to see how much chaos I can unleash... Not to mention, you know full well that the Chrysos Heirs have never been a united front.

C: …不劳你费心。
E: ...Save your concern.

C: （卡厄斯？半神？）
E: (Khaos? Demigod?)

C: （晚安，迷迷。晚安，奥赫玛……）
E: (Goodnight, Mem. Goodnight, Okhema...)

C: 剥夺他人的生命，从来不是一件值得信仰的事……
E: Taking away someone's life is never worthy of religious worship.

C: 好嘞，一言为定。啊，对了……
E: Alright, I'll see you there! Oh, by the way...

C: 也许她会想到牺牲的缇安，想到无数惨死的黄金裔，想到半截身子入土的你——最后一刻还没到呢，她到底想做什么，我还真没法替你乐观。
E: She can always turn back before the end, you know? Maybe she'll remember Trianne's sacrifice. Maybe she'll remember the countless martyred Chrysos Heirs. Maybe she'll remember you, with your one foot in the grave — I ain't as optimistic as you about what she'll want to do.

C: 怎么说，很有诱惑力吧？
E: What do you think? Tempting, right?

C: 所以，赛飞儿阁下为何又回来了？
E: Then why have you come back, Lady Cipher?

C: 天，我叫出来了？实在是失态……
E: My goodness, did I really yell out loud? How rude of me...

C: 或许在这世间，死亡的权柄…本就不该存在。一如我…也不该存在。
E: Perhaps death's authority was never meant to exist in this world... just like how I shouldn't exist.

C: 听过？那就好说了。
E: You have? Then that's good.

C: 我好像…
E: I think I...

C: 迷迷，你在这里尽可能照看好阁下，等我回来。好吗？
E: Mem, stay here and keep a close watch until I return, alright?

C: 我们的人生如同手掌对映…可即便如此，仍旧殊途同归——
E: Our lives were a mirrored image of one another, like a pair of hands... Even so, we arrived at the same destination.

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 待到这场闹剧结束，汝之魂息也将置上生死的天平。准备好了么？
E: When this farce is over, your soul will be placed on the scales of life and death. Are you ready?

C: 直到我下定决心向他们挥剑，为他们带去体面的死亡，他们还在对我喃喃道——
E: They kept saying the same thing over and over... even up until the final moment I finally steeled my heart and granted them eternal peace with my sword:

C: 而当你抵达其尽头时，愿我们在真理前相会。
E: And when you reach the end of this journey, may we meet again with the truth before us.

C: 最后一票…
E: The last vote...

C: 搭档，别输给死亡的阴霾！
E: Partner, don't you dare lose to the shadows of death!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将超越至纯粹之终极，回归腐败苦黑。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall transcend the peaks of purity and return to corruption and hardship."</color>

C: 假设一下，来古士先生——如果我没有这么好的脾气，如果我非要瞧瞧你背后的秘密——
E: Let's assume for a second that I'm not so well-mannered and that I insist on uncovering the secrets hidden behind you, Mr. Lygus...

C: 不料，就在缇宝等人打算谒见「岁月」泰坦欧洛尼斯，修补记忆时，意外再次遭遇神秘剑士，缇安为保护同伴与泰坦一道陨落。为了夺回火种，众人制定了「封印」计划。
E: Unexpectedly, just as Tribbie and her sisters are about to meet the Time Titan Oronyx and repair their memories, they encounter the mysterious swordmaster yet again. Trianne sacrifices herself and falls with the Titan to protect her companions. In order to take back the Coreflame, everyone set up a plan to "seal" the swordmaster.

C: 听见了吗？走吧，与{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}登山同行，机会难得，汝当吟唱赞歌。
E: Hear that? It's not every day that you get to climb a mountain with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. You should sing me a hymn of praise.

C: …只是些旧事，不展开了。
E: ...Merely something from the past that I won't go in to.

C: 我可是「昏光庭院」的首席，你说这话，会不会太小瞧人家了？
E: Hehe, have you forgotten that you're talking to the chief physician of the Twilight Courtyard? Have more faith in me. I'll be just fine!

C: 这里是树庭的藏书处，友爱之馆。
E: This is the Library of Philia, a place where the Grove stores its collection of tomes.

C: 适应了奥赫玛的日光，都不习惯夜色了。
E: The night sky feels unusual... now that I've gotten used to the eternal light of Okhema.

C: 招子放亮些，看到那群假笑的鬣狗了么？凯妮斯手下干脏活的。
E: Be more vigilant. See those duplicitous dogs over there? They do the dirty work for Caenis.

C: （遐蝶…这是怎么回事？）
E: (Castorice... What's going on?)

C: 不错，别让未来的迷雾蒙蔽你的心灵。
E: That's right. Don't allow the fog of an uncertain future to cloud your mind.

C: 正是你为我播下了这片花海，它比天地尽头的应许之地更绚丽。
E: It was you who sowed the seeds for this sea of flowers, one that is more beautiful than the promised land at the end of the world.

C: 这…怎么可能？
E: But... how is that possible?

C: 塞涅俄丝带给凡人的寄语，由我们代为传达——
E: We are here to deliver the message Seliose left for mortals —

C: 你与他人…并无不同。
E: You are no different from the rest.

C: 你曾是一名烈阳之子…当你的族人以泰坦的偏袒为由，用尽手段欺压他族时…你可曾为弱者挺身而出？
E: You were once one of the Sunborn... Did you ever rise to defend the weak when your kin oppressed others under the guise of the Titan's favor?

C: 我理解你的感受，但现在……
E: I understand how you feel, but right now...

C: 匕首看着不错，让我瞅瞅……
E: This dagger's got a nice look to it. Let's see it...

C: 可惜呀可惜…来世记得好好做人，别再干这种危险行当了。
E: Such a pity... In your next life, remember to choose a safer path, and stay away from dangerous jobs like this.

C: 既然如此，那我就……
E: Oh well, I guess I'll just...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那这个可悲的世界，怕不是早就变成一片黑黢黢的废料场了吧！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>This place would've been nothing more than a lifeless wasteland by now.</color>

C: 现在——由我来验验你这盗火者的成色吧！
E: Now, let me see if you're worth your title, Flame Reaver!

C: 分身这玩意…要多少就有多少！
E: I can summon as many clones as I need!

C: 跟你玩得也够久了……
E: I've played with you long enough...

C: 谢谢您，缇宝大人！我…一定会努力做到的。
E: Thank you, Lady Tribbie! I... I'll do my best.

C: 这是…是那「盗火行者」的斗篷？！它怎么会在这里……
E: Could this be from... the Flame Reaver's cloak!? Why is it here?

C: 你们会愿意中止对逐火之旅的助力吗？
E: Would you consider ceasing your support for the Flame-Chase Journey?

C: …需要帮助的，是他们。
E: ...the ones who need help are them.

C: 这话锋转得，还真令人猝不及防。
E: That's quite the sudden shift in topic.

C: …不行，为了这个爱好，我本就不多的家底差不多都填进去了！
E: ...No way, I've invested almost all my savings into this hobby!

C: 人家是想准备个惊喜，悄悄学成，吓你们一跳！
E: I wanted to set up a surprise — master it in secret and give you all a shock!

C: 你的财宝，我收下了。但仅凭这些财宝，尚不足以买下「金织」最昂贵的衣装。
E: Your treasure — I'll accept it. But these alone aren't enough to purchase the Goldweaver's finest clothes.

C: …八二，就八二！你可真是太公平啦，赛飞儿大姐头！
E: ...<unbreak>80</unbreak>-<unbreak>20</unbreak> it is! How generous you are, Boss Lady Cipher!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「人人信以为实，谎言即可成真」</color>——多方便的能力啊！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"All believe it as true, and a lie becomes reality."</color> What a convenient ability!

C: 哈！既不中看也不中用的家伙，才两三下就被撂倒了，真没劲。
E: Ha! Such an ugly and useless creature, taken down with just a couple of hits. How boring!

C: …嘢？怎么突然停下来了？
E: ...Eh? Why did it suddenly stop?

C: …你又回来了，赛——
E: ...You're back again, Cif—

C: …不知{NICKNAME}现在在哪。如果我被他们盯上了，那{F#她}{M#他}肯定也逃不过这遭。希望一切安好……
E: ...I wonder where {NICKNAME} is now. If they're targeting me, {F#s}he definitely won't escape their notice either. I hope all is well...

C: 阿格莱雅？！这是——
E: Aglaea!? Is this —

C: 一切照常。我先给缇宝老师传信，让她尽力安抚公民。我们快马加鞭赶回奥赫玛，去确认城里的状况。假如中途再撞见拦路的敌人……
E: Stay on course. I'll contact Tribbie and ask her to keep the citizens calm. We'll hurry back to Okhema as fast as possible and assess the situation in the city. If we run into any enemies along the way...

C: 约定，当然…我牢记在心。
E: Of course... The pact, I haven't forgotten.

C: 「将我的神性凝聚起来，注入这件饰品…或许它还能在未来派上用场，帮助他们完成使命。」
E: "Condense my divinity into this ornament... It might still be useful in the future to help them complete their mission."

C: 他们没理由，也没那个胆子对阿格莱雅动武。难道……
E: They didn't have any reason, nor the courage, to attack Aglaea. Perhaps...

C: 去休息吧，风堇。你应该很长时间没合眼了吧？后面的事，交给我们就好。
E: You should rest, Hyacine. You've been awake for a long time, haven't you? We'll handle things from here.

C: 是啊，缇安老师。对于那个心里充满不安的孩子……
E: Yes, Lady Trianne. For that child filled with anxiety...

C: 但既然你主动抛出了话头…我猜，你一定已经想到了应对之法？
E: But since you're the one who brought it up, I'm guessing that you already have a solution in mind.

C: 小声点，人都回来了…
E: Hush, they're back...

C: 或许是因为出身吧。我的祖先，<color=#dbc291ff>「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，她高举长枪挑战天空，开创了延续至今的逐火时代</color>。
E: Perhaps I'm influenced by my background. My ancestor, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose the Daythunder Knight, raised her spear against the Sky and ushered in the Flame-Chasing era that continues to this day.</color>

C: 放心吧，有小伊卡跟在我身边——它会保护好我的，对吧？
E: Don't worry. I have Little Ica with me. You'll protect me, won't you?

C: 啊…没想到在这个陌生的时代，还能有人记得我的名字。
E: Ah... I never imagined someone in this era would still remember my name.

C: 感谢您的信任，克里斯普斯阁下。我们一定不会辜负期望……
E: Thank you for your trust, Lord Crispus. We won't let you down...

C: 一番交谈过后，她从特克菈将军处获得了第二道天空赐福。
E: After a discussion, she obtained the second sky blessing from General Ektra.

C: 嗯，非常顺利。你的灵水术帮了大忙啦，丹宝。
E: It went great. Your spirit water art was a huge help, Dannie.

C: 不过，今天的主角并不是我。一会儿，等风堇小姐到场的时候——请诸位也不要吝惜自己的鼓舞。
E: But I'm not the main attraction today. Please don't hesitate to cheer for Miss Hyacine when she arrives.

C: 无论如何，在黑暗中探索一定不是上策。如果能将画壁点亮…它或许能为我们提供前行必要的光源。
E: In any case, exploring in the dark is never a good option. If we could light up the mural... it might just provide us with the light needed to move forward.

C: 还有那边！
E: And over there!

C: 一步一步来。还记得那位雨之民的吟唱么，风堇？或许那就是开启天象画壁的密钥。
E: One step at a time. Do you remember the verse that Rainfolk sang, Hyacine? Perhaps that's the key to unlocking the celestial mural.

C: 那是…？
E: That's...?

C: 你已经…被痛苦折磨很久了吧？但你没有放弃，还是拼命维持着一点自我，不愿屈服。
E: You must have been tormented by pain for so long. But you didn't give up, and you've held on to what little is left of your will with such tenacity.

C: 不必了，灰宝。索拉比斯不是随随便便就能战胜的对手。何况…它一定也期待着一场全力以赴的对决。
E: No need, Grayie. Solabis isn't an opponent that can be defeated easily. Besides... it must be looking forward to an all-out battle.

C: 千年的时光飞逝，这里的一切仿佛没有任何变化——只是少了人言的嘈杂。
E: A thousand years have passed, and yet this place feels the same — Just that there is no more human clamor.

C: 即便如此，黄昏之女！即便如此，你也不该摧毁我们的信仰……
E: Even so, Daughter of Dusk! Even so, you should not shatter our faith...

C: 没想到…她是因为血统和黄金裔的身份被驱逐出了族群？
E: I never would have imagined that she... was cast out of her tribe for her lineage and her golden blood.

C: 塞涅俄丝大人…她弑杀泰坦的态度有多坚定，她在和族人告别时的语气就有多悲凉。
E: Lady Seliose's resolve to slay the Titan was as firm as her farewell to her people was dismal.

C: 但对穷途末路的你而言，最好的惩罚应该是亲眼看着黄金裔完成使命。
E: But to a cornered dog like you, the most deserving punishment is to personally witness the Chrysos Heirs fulfill their mission.

C: 「天空」…已经归位……
E: The Sky... has returned to its rightful place...

C: 恐怕这就是翁法罗斯的末世了，哈托努斯。只有一个办法能拯救家园……
E: I fear this is Amphoreus's end, Chartonus. There is only one way to save our home...

C: 你没猜错…赛法利娅已经逝去了。她所有的谎言，如今也都灰飞云散了啊。
E: You didn't guess wrong... Cifera has already passed, and all her lies have scattered to the winds like ash.

C: 风堇…她成功了吗？
E: Hyacine... Did she make it?

C: 人家又有些…不祥的预感！
E: I've got a bad feeling!

C: 有了。不妨从宇宙的起点开始吧，一场爆炸后，基本粒子诞生，演化出万事万物……
E: Got it. Let's start at the very beginning. The big bang, the birth of particles, the emergence of all things...

C: 可是很遗憾，最终「智识」抛弃了它们。此事人人皆知。
E: But regrettably, as everyone knows, the Erudition forsook them all.

C: 原来是你啊，好伙伴…不好意思，一不小心睡着了。
E: Ah, it's you... Whoops, fell asleep there.

C: 果然是你呀♪
E: I knew it was you ♪

C: 课堂上雕的木头人，原来是藏到了这里，这可真是连我也不知道的秘密呀。
E: So this is where the wooden figurine you carved during class ended up. And here I thought I knew all your hiding spots.

C: 我看这不像海，像湖。
E: Seems more like a lake to me than an ocean.

C: 翻开「医师」。
E: Reveal the "Healer."

C: 还是称呼我为「穿着华服的大地兽」吧——至少它足够精炼，能最强有力地概括我的本质。
E: "A dromas draped in finery" will suffice — it's succinct enough to best summarize my true nature.

C: 我想在西风尽头的花海，和率先辞别的缇安重逢。
E: I wish to see Trianne again — who was the first to depart — in the sea of flowers where the west wind ends.

C: 心愿嘛，这还不简单！咱只想吃吃喝喝，遛遛弯晒晒太阳，再过上一千年这样的小日子。不然攒了一大堆钱，却没能在死之前花出去，多可惜呀！
E: My wish? Ha! Just let me wine and dine and soak up the sun for another millennium or two. I mean, what's the point of dying rich if you never lived rich?

C: 记好了，我不喜欢「心愿」这样的字眼，那代表在诸神面前的软弱和趴伏乞怜。
E: Listen well. I detest the word "wish." It reeks of mortals crawling before their gods.

C: …但，命运怎么会如此揭示呢？
E: Still... why would fate choose to show us this path?

C: 那并非泰坦，更非你们步步为营便足以应付的威胁。
E: This is beyond any Titan, beyond any danger you could overcome with strategy alone.

C: …什么？
E: No... it can't be...

C: （他刚才说，昔涟在这里求学？这怎么可能？她不是早就……）
E: (Did he just say Cyrene's studying here? But how is that possible? Wasn't she...)

C: （这也是日后，万敌背负的宿命……）
E: (And the very destiny that Mydei himself will eventually shoulder...)

C: 「——而在那压落秤盘之物，夙愿本身。」
E: "...but rather in that which tips the scales, hope itself."

C: 可到头来，指引我们的神谕，吞没世界的黑潮……
E: But in the end... the prophecy that led us... this black tide swallowing everything...

C: 让我和你一起，二对一胜算更大。
E: Let me fight with you. Better odds with two.

C: …就交给你了。
E: ...I'll leave it to you then.

C: 还真不客气。丑话说在前面，我可从来不做赔本买卖……
E: Wow, someone's not shy. Just so you know, I'm not in the business of making losing deals...

C: 农田刚翻整过呢……
E: Someone's been working the field recently...

C: 小白，就请你代*我们*实现「再创世」吧！
E: Go on, Snowy. Make the Era Nova happen for all of us!

C: 不，我只是感到失望。我取回了三千万个前世的记忆，也清晰地记得每一次抉择前的交谈。
E: No. I'm just disappointed. I've retrieved memories from thirty million past lives. And I remember every conversation before every choice here.

C: 该结束了，我将用你的尸身——
E: This ends now! With your corpse...

C: 我会将一切如实相告，你们也一定能明白：为何世人必须放弃神谕，找到另一条「再创世」的道路……
E: I will tell you the truth, and you will understand why the world must forsake the prophecy and find another path to "Era Nova"...

C: 前提是：在即将到来的下一场战役，对「大地」的征伐中……
E: But the condition was this: In the upcoming battle, in our conquest of the "Earth"...

C: 双方未有一人牺牲。当我斩下巨神头颅，将火种高高举起，众人围绕那具被金血焚灭的神骸，欢声雷动——
E: Neither side suffered any losses. When I severed the Titan's head and raised the Coreflame high, the crowd gathered around the scorched remains of the god, roaring with joy...

C: 接下来…你会把「诡计」的火种从我胸口剜出来吗？
E: Will you carve the "Trickery" Coreflame from my chest now?

C: 如果你能胜出，去告诉来世的迈德漠斯：此人是可敬的对手，切记使出全力，不得怠慢。
E: If you win, tell the Mydeimos of the next life: This person is a worthy opponent, so always remember to give it your all and never slack off.

C: 在每个崭新的轮回里，总会有一个新的「我」降生。
E: In every new cycle, a new me is born.

C: 为翁法罗斯…带来玫瑰色的黎明。
E: May they bring Amphoreus... a rosy-fingered dawn.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我会阻止再创世，我会找到那个新生的「我」…让他延续三千万世的徒劳。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I will stop Era Nova. I will find the next me... and make him carry on this futile endeavor of thirty million lifetimes.</color>

C: 看清那黑暗中的火光…并非……
E: See that the firelight in the darkness... is not...

C: 接下来，要送你回到「岁月」的起点啦。但在分别前，还有一件事想告诉你，是非常非常重要的事……
E: Now, I'm going to send you back to the very start of "Time." But before we part, there's something I need to tell you. Something very, very important...

C: 不过，你不用替我担心啦。我在这里待了那么久，早就习惯和自己想象出来的朋友聊天啦。
E: But don't worry about me! After all this time here, I've grown quite used to chatting with my imaginary friends.

C: 这里静悄悄的，声音传不进来，也传不出去。
E: It's super quiet here. Sounds can't get in or out.

C: 还是不确定怎么面对你…
E: I still don't know how I should act around you...

C: 很美妙，不是吗？翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们总爱描摹星空的浪漫，却在言语间遗忘了另一种更为真实的宇宙。
E: Doesn't it look marvelous? Amphoreus is like a microcosm of the cosmos. People love to portray the romance of the starry skies, but their tales often forget a different and far more truthful type of universe.

C: 呵呵，我只希望阁下理解：我无意与您敌对。
E: Heh. I simply wish for you to understand that I have no intention of being your enemy.

C: 我从没想过追求什么独一。
E: I've never thought of becoming unparalleled.

C: 拉冬已经牺牲了无数将士…还要我将更多同胞交由这暴君役使吗？
E: Ladon has already sacrificed countless soldiers... And now you want me to send even more of my brothers and sisters to be used and discarded by a tyrant?

C: 小心一个叫来古士的人，凯撒。
E: Be wary of someone named Lygus, Imperator.

C: 现在，边疆叛军大有兴起的势头，没少受拉冬暗中扶持。他们大唱特唱「重返黄金世」的口号，不愿交出兵权，不过是为反叛蓄势罢了。
E: Right now, the rebel forces on the frontier are rising, and Ladon has been secretly supporting them. They loudly chant the slogan "Return to the Era Chrysea," unwilling to relinquish military power. They're just building momentum for the rebellion.

C: 但命运的片段就像针脚，在被编织成为华服前，谁也看不清它真正的美貌，不是么？
E: But destiny's fragments are like stitches. Before they're threaded into splendid garments, no one can see their true charm, can they?

C: 这座浴宫本来就是我的。
E: This bath chamber was originally mine.

C: 第二，来古士确实在这条时间线上，但他和那小皇冠有点关系，你们没办法找到他…呵，意料之中。
E: Second, Lygus is indeed in this timeline, but since he's somehow connected to that little empress, you have no way to find him... Hah, as expected.

C: 万一是博识尊的思考单元…
E: What if he's the thinking unit of Nous...

C: 连你们都得不出准确答案？
E: Even you can't come up with an accurate answer?

C: 或许，她的眼中只能容下棋子，还有王冠上映出的苍穹吧。
E: Perhaps the only thing she tolerates are chess pieces... and the sky reflected upon her crown.

C: 还请，细细品尝。
E: Please. Have a taste.

C: 或许「实验」是更贴切的词汇。
E: Calling it "experimentation" would be more appropriate.

C: 他一定会背叛你们——等到那时，我们所有人都会在「毁灭」中灰飞烟灭。
E: He will most certainly betray you. When that time comes, all of us will be ground to dust by the Destruction.

C: 所以，同袍们，此原理对你们也同样适用。
E: Which means... the same principle also applies to you, my dear peers.

C: （体内拥有星核的我，在空间站「黑塔」苏醒，得到了「毁灭」的力量……）
E: (With a Stellaron in my body, I woke up at the Herta Space Station and gained the power of the Destruction...)

C: 相信我吧——
E: Trust me—

C: 终于…循着记忆的声音…找到你了…「记忆」与「开拓」交汇的行者……
E: I finally... found you... following the sound of memories... A pathstrider walking both the Remembrance and the Trailblaze...

C: 那就慢慢讲呗。怎么，你就不想跟我多说点儿话？
E: Then take your time with the storytelling! Or do you not want to talk to me?

C: 可惜，生活永远不会一帆风顺。拉冬军队已经兵临城下，他们的领头人……
E: Unfortunately, life will never go smoothly. Ladon's army is already at our gates, and their commander...

C: 当然，海列屈拉，我们被你曼妙的乐音所牵引。
E: Of course, Helektra. Your beautiful melody drew us here.

C: 终于，满溢之杯重归完整，天谴之矛也踏出冥河，神明重拾起抵御黑潮的职责。
E: At last, the Chalice of Plenty is whole again. The Lance of Fury emerges from the River of Souls, and the gods reclaim their duty to hold back the black tide.

C: 我之所求，一如往昔。只是一场宴席。
E: What I desire is the same as before. A feast.

C: 无比炽热的渴望。
E: Ignited an unprecedented hunger.

C: 为了不让黑潮威胁海洋，女王奉献了全部心血。
E: To keep the black tide from threatening the ocean, the queen gave her all, body and soul.

C: 我备好了佳酿，快来一起品尝吧！
E: I've saved the finest brew! Come, taste it with me!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>现在，就让海妖「海列屈拉」为自己歌唱，让我踏入一场无休无止的幻梦吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Now... let the siren "Helektra" sing for herself. Let me step into an endless dream of my own making.</color>

C: 在墓志铭的末尾，一行尚未刻完的铭文——
E: At the end of the epitaph, a line left unfinished...

C: 翁法罗斯人早已给出回答。无论是做那被吞食的小鱼，又或成为巨鲸，迎来盛大的沉落……
E: The Amphoreans already answered long ago: be it as a tiny fish destined to be swallowed, or as a giant whale poised for a magnificent descent...

C: 只有刻律德菈。
E: Is Cerydra.

C: 你还不明白吗？我既不眷恋故国的深海，也不向往天外的汪洋。
E: Do you still not get it? I do not long for the oceanic depths of my homeland, nor do I crave the swelling seas beyond the sky.

C: 果然，是你篡改了人们的记忆…
E: I knew it... You overwrote everyone's memories.

C: 的确，我不是「她」。但我们的心灵紧密相邻。
E: You're right. I'm not "her," but our hearts are closely intertwined.

C: 所以，回到最初的话题……
E: Anyway. Back to our initial topic.

C: 「…别担心，帕姆。他们都是成熟的无名客，不会有事的。」
E: "...Don't worry, Pom-Pom. They're both experienced Nameless. They'll be just fine."

C: 但作为星穹列车的护卫，面对举止可疑的不速之客……
E: But as the guard of the Astral Express, I must ask...

C: 无名泰坦…？
E: The nameless Titan...?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>传输终点：回归#33550336——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Transmission destination: Recurrence #33550336—</color>

C: 什么动静，我碰到什么了？
E: What? Did I touch something I shouldn't have?

C: 不可思议，那一瞬间，我忘记了所有疼痛，就只是…出神地望着它。
E: It was incredible. I forgot all my pains at that moment and just... stared at it in a trance.

C: 现在，银河将要面临一场空前的浩劫，你的选择关乎无数星球的存亡。
E: Now, the cosmos will face an unprecedented catastrophe, and your choice will determine the fate of countless planets.

C: 没错！当我听见{NICKNAME}按下快门的声音，就算精神只留下一点点残余……
E: That's right! So when I hear {NICKNAME} press the shutter... even if there's just a teeny bit of my consciousness left...

C: 天秤两端的配重，相差太过悬殊。在「毁灭」的威胁面前，追求两全其美…只会两害得兼。
E: The weights on each side of the scale are far too unequal. When Destruction looms, trying to preserve everything... only means sacrificing everything.

C: 用你的话说，跟一位绝灭大君可能造成的威胁相比，区区几个无名客的命又算得上什么呢？
E: Because, according to your logic, the lives of a few Nameless are nothing compared to a Lord Ravager's potential threat.

C: 看来，我们在翁法罗斯的「开拓」，也要临近尾声了。
E: Looks like our Trailblaze in Amphoreus is coming to an end.

C: 咱明明都想好了那么多重逢的方式…本来准备趁你们不注意，在后面偷袭，一人肩膀拍一下，再各给一个脑瓜崩……
E: I had so many ideas for our reunion. I was gonna sneak up from behind you when you weren't looking, tap you both on the shoulder, then flick you each on the head...

C: 「记忆」的命途，绝不止于世人表面的理解。而在这场破碎的阴谋中……
E: The Path of Remembrance is far more than what people observe on its surface, and I...

C: 代我在黑暗中「开拓」，一如既往……
E: Then Trailblaze through the darkness in my stead... as always.

C: （奇怪，我有拨号吗？）
E: (Weird... did I even make a call?)

C: 「开拓」的旅行，会一直进行下去呀。
E: The "Trailblazing" journey never really ends, does it?

C: 绝灭大君■■■■未能如■■■■■的期望诞生。
E: The Lord Ravager ■■■■■■■■ did not emerge as ■■■■■■ had anticipated.

C: 「你…也在试着扰动『记忆』……」
E: "You... you're trying to tamper with the Remembrance too..."

C: 「两位还真是组成了神奇的同盟呀♭」
E: "My, what a fascinating partnership you two have formed ♭"

C: 呀，是不是该反过来说？
E: Wait... maybe I got that backwards?

C: 也罢。忆潮残秽仍在肆虐，有我陪同，你在这废墟中也能多一道助力。
