E: Alright. The filthy remnants of the memoria tide still run rampant. Let me accompany you through these ruins. You could use the help.

C: 不客气！*我们*还得去传递讯息，先走了——你要保重喔，丹恒！
E: No problem! We need to go deliver some messages, so we'll be off. Please take care, Dan Heng!

C: 你每句话都要上价值的旧疾还没痊愈吗？
E: I see you still speak as if every sentence must add something of profound value.

C: 没想到，你还活着。
E: I didn't think you were still alive.

C: 也比「大地」更坚不可摧。
E: Is even more unshakeable than the "Earth" itself.

C: 巴特鲁斯大爷的这番英雄事迹，就由你来见证吧，装酷小子！
E: Prepare to witness the Great Bartholos's heroic deeds, poser boy!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>█融合██ █为█一███ █ █</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>█Merge██ █as█one███ █ █</color>

C: 没想到神悟树庭的学问竟然包含了那么多「水分」……
E: I didn't think the Grove of Epiphany's knowledge would be so "diluted"...

C: 谢谢你，遐蝶。
E: Thank you, Castorice.

C: 白厄，他仍在和「毁灭」抗争。海瑟音与遐蝶，也在守望我们的来路。
E: Phainon is still fighting against the Destruction. Hysilens and Castorice remain on watch, guarding the path that led us here.

C: 空间中弥漫着浓郁的忆质，却又驳杂不堪，像是破碎的记忆被糅合在一起。
E: The air is thick with memoria, yet it's so chaotic, like broken memories all mixed together.

C: 发生了一件事，景元将军也百思不解。事态紧急，他希望我尽快转告两位天才——
E: Something has happened that even General Jing Yuan couldn't understand. He urgently wants me to inform the two geniuses.

C: 「识刻锚」传来了信号…各位，该动身了。
E: The Chronocognitive Anchor is sending a signal... Everyone, time to move out.

C: 一片废墟，够彻底的。
E: What a mess. Total devastation.

C: 没错，但不是在现实中。还记得么——「无名泰坦大墓」？
E: Yeah, but not in the real world. Remember the "Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan"?

C: 有那么像吗？
E: We do?

C: 眼熟不？是那救世小子身上的，它出现在这里，只证明一件事——
E: Look familiar? It's from that little Deliverer boy. If it's showing up here, it means only one thing...

C: 我敬请你，安眠于此……
E: I ask you to rest here...

C: 既然如此，我不会作出第二种选择。
E: In that case, I will choose the same.

C: 这何尝不是巨大的悲哀？
E: Is that not a tragedy in itself?

C: 启程前，再回头好好道个别吧？
E: One last farewell, before the journey moves on?

C: 小白厄的影子，跑到哪儿去了？
E: Where did little Phainon's shadow run off to?

C: 他不曾料到，宏伟的圣城，也远非守护的尽头。
E: He never expected that the majestic holy city would be far from the end of what needed to be protected.

C: 但，没有关系……
E: But don't worry...

C: 怎么回事▀▄命途▄█▄能量██▄异常▄▄█
E: How can this be▀▄Path▄█▄Energy██▄Anomaly▄▄█

C: 如今，我与这片「大地」相连，能感受到每一座山脉的呼吸……
E: I am now connected with this Earth, and I can feel the breath of every mountain range...

C: 「你一定能找到我的，对吧♪」
E: "You'll definitely find me in this fleeting eternity, right? ♪"

C: 让我一同铭记银河吧。
E: Let me remember the cosmos with you.

C: 那，你又是为何出发……
E: Then... why did you set out...

C: 以往昔的「记忆」，「开拓」来日的命运——
E: Using the Remembrance of the past, we will Trailblaze tomorrow's destiny—

C: 阁、阁下……
E: Y-You...

C: 果然是梦，走了。
E: So it's a dream after all. I'm out.

C: 我赋予这星穹列车至高的使命：尔等，务必要将翁法罗斯的伟业散播至银河各个角落。
E: I bestow upon the Astral Express this supreme mission: You must spread the great deeds of Amphoreus to every corner of the cosmos.

C: 说不定，我们也在各自的命途上留下了长长的足迹呢。
E: Perhaps we, too, have already left long trails on our respective paths.

C: 希望读到它的人，都能鼓起勇气面对燃烧的生命。
E: I hope those who read this will find the courage to face their burning lives.

C: 悬锋人的字典里……
E: Does the Kremnoan language even...

C: 呵！别的不谈，你这自吹自擂的本事的确傲视群雄。
E: Hah! If nothing else, you're certainly unmatched when it comes to singing your own praise.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「不论晴天还是雨天，进入梦乡以前，记得和自己说一声：『明天见』！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Whether it's a sunny day or rainy day, remember to tell yourself before you drift off to sleep: 'See you tomorrow!'"</color>

C: 我当你是在褒扬我了。
E: I'll take that as a compliment.

C: 我把关于它的一切都写在了这张小卡片上。读过以后，假如你愿意原谅我——
E: I wrote everything about it on this little card. If you can find it in your heart to forgive me after reading it...

C: 看来，要抓紧时间了呢。
E: Looks like time's running out.

C: 结束这场哑谜吧。你口中的「翁法罗斯之心」正是去向不明的德谬歌。
E: End this charade already. That "Amphoreus's Heart" you're talking about is just the missing Demiurge.

C: 「神谕应验了！」村民们说，「这孩子是泰坦的馈赠。」
E: "The prophecy's fulfilled!" The villagers say. "This child is a gift from the Titans."

C: 「电信号序列：PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>。路径：纷争。」
E: "Electrical Signal Sequence: PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>. Track: Strife."
>>> Saved.

C: 我会许愿，从那伤口中流出的，不是鲜血，而是一滴湿润的眼泪。
E: I hope that what flows out from that cut will not be blood, but a tear, warm and wet.

C: 要记得这个瞬间呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: Remember this moment, {NICKNAME}.

C: 诚然。有史以来，会议仅仅召开过三次。
E: Indeed. A meeting has only been held three times in the Society's history.

C: 这一次，又有多少人会回应？
E: How many will respond this time?

C: 没事，本来也不用他到场。跳过无聊的寒暄，直入主题吧。
E: That's fine. He doesn't need to be here anyway. Let's skip the boring introductions and cut to the chase.

C: 那就代表能成功，不是么？
E: Which means it COULD work, no?

C: 说起来，乱破小姐呢？
E: Speaking of which, where is Miss Rappa?

C: 我根本不相信「终末」。
E: I do not believe in the Finality.

C: 荒笛
E: Terravox

C: 反物质军团什么时候变得这么弱了？
E: When did the Antimatter Legion become so weak?

C: 难道不是吗？！如果只是一条普通的大裤衩，温队长为什么要托我来取？
E: Are they not!? If it's just an ordinary pair of boxers, why would Mr. Wen ask me to pick them up?

C: 但我没想到，这厮竟然如此大胆，竟然自行找上门来，妄想反客为主，将我取而代之。
E: But I never would have thought that this creature would be so bold, approaching us like this and trying to take my place.

C: 需要帮忙吗？
E: Do you need help with anything?

C: 何塞•拉萨罗离开之后，也就你这{F#丫头}{M#小子}，愿意跟我这么折腾。
E: {F#Lass}{M#Lad}, you're the only one who would talk to me ever since Hosea left.

C: 老年人是这样的。
E: Old people are like that.

C: 后面有空，我还得再找您商量商量。毕竟事关裂界，你们才是专家。
E: If there's time later, I want to talk to you both in more detail about this. You're the Fragmentum experts after all.

C: 她对你图谋不轨没安好心。
E: She's made a very Himeko-centric proposal.

C: 我…呃，好像确实有这么回事，可、可这不算乱花钱啊。
E: I... I might have done that, but this doesn't count as wasting money!

C: 哼，暮气沉沉，千篇一律……
E: Hum! Nothing special, so boring here...

C: 目前「无敌宇宙核弹头协会」虽处于初创时期，但人员扩招势头是大大的向好。
E: Right now, although the Invincible Space Warhead Association is still in its initial stage, we are having great momentum when it comes to expanding our numbers.

C: 不知道，不重要。总有一天，空间站会增设一门「黑塔•狂野爆炸科」，团结所有的爆炸头，穷尽有关爆炸头的学问。
E: Don't know, don't care. One day, there will be a Herta Department of Curlcademy in the space station, where all the hairstyle aficionados can gather and share knowledge about the art of hairstyling.

C: 你和我师父一样的看法？看来写诗对我这种大老粗还是太难了……
E: What? You share the same view as my master? Looks like writing poems is too hard for a rough fellow like me...

C: 来把多余的备份还给你。
E: I'm here to return the other backup to you.

C: 是「存护」在胸前！
E: On the chest is Preservation!

C: 奇物收容？
E: Curio Collection?

C: 噢，好的，乔安医生。如果你需要知道的话，我叫……
E: Oh, yes, Dr. Joanne. My name is...

C: 还是请你严格按照我说的做吧。
E: Please do as I say.

C: 我正在帮法政科的年轻向导治疗。你们两位闯进来，是有什么事吗？
E: I'm performing treatment on this young guide from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. Do you two have a good reason for breaking in here?

C: 咱们医疗科室的「睡美人」居然不再打瞌睡，修身养性开始努力尽到自己的医师本分了，哈哈，这说出去压根不会有人信好吗！
E: The Sleeping Beauty of our medical department finally stopped sleeping and began to act on her duty as a doctor. Haha, no one's gonna believe this!

C: （接下来该回去了，回去之前，还是跟工程师说一下吧，毕竟答应过他……）
E: (I should head back. But before I go, I better tell the engineer. After all, I promised him...)

C: 干掉了么？能量波动趋于平稳…这片区域「裂界化」加速的趋势也得到了有效遏止。
E: Did you take care of it? The energy fluctuations have leveled off... and the accelerated Fragmentum corrosion has effectively halted in this area.

C: 我们先前架设的设备也已损坏，此行的目的是收集信标数据，以便恢复远程连接。
E: The equipment we set up previously has been damaged. Therefore, this trip is to collect beacon data to restore the remote connection.

C: 「军团」入侵时破坏的监控系统还没完全恢复，可能是监控的盲区被利用了。
E: Parts of the surveillance system were destroyed when the Legion invaded — it still hasn't been fully repaired. Maybe he took advantage of a blind spot.

C: 那你快让它去找啊。
E: Then get Peppy to find Arlan.

C: 以开除为由，恐吓卡波特。
E: Threaten Capote with dismissal from the space station.

C: 就是就是，我们都没有和波少一对一交流的机会呢。
E: That's right! Even we don't get to receive personal instruction from Master Capote!

C: …你们怎么来了？
E: ...What are you doing here?

C: 我知道！修行嘛，肯定是磨炼心性的。大哥他肯定是找到了一处瀑布，然后请求三月七小姐替他把水流的温度降至冰点！
E: I think it must have something to do with the mind. He probably found a waterfall and asked Ms. March to lower the temperature to freezing point!

C: ——所以我让他去找三月七。如果连三月那家伙都遭得住，他也没什么可畏惧的了。
E: ...So I sent him to March. If he can manage her, then he has nothing to fear.

C: 上面的字迹果然就是你的吧，阿兰！
E: This is your handwriting, Arlan!

C: 小姐，我很喜欢佩佩，所以才……
E: Lady Asta, I like Peppy a lot, so I...

C: 你还真是单纯…
E: Did you really think it would help...?

C: 没错没错，你看我有什么意见都是直接说哒。
E: Yup! I always say what I'm thinking.

C: 如果真的要答谢我们，就让佩佩和我们一起也玩一玩电子飞盘吧～
E: You're welcome! Although if you really wanna thank me... let me play holodisc with Peppy — pleaaaase~?

C: 我思前想后，终于得出结论，这次情况特殊，与「黑塔」整体利益相悖，正义之士卢卡奇绝不能再为虎作伥，包庇它们的行踪！
E: After giving it much thought, I came to the conclusion that this is a special scenario that goes against the overall interests of Herta Space Station. Lukacs, the justice fighter, will no longer be aiding and abetting them and covering their tracks!

C: 啊，是阿兰大哥！
E: Oh, it's big brother Arlan!

C: 咳，{NICKNAME}说得对。我一直都想着各位科员的安危。
E: Ahem, {NICKNAME} is right. I'm always thinking about the safety of the staff members.

C: 「呜呜」？
E: Wubbie?
Mmm!?

C: 它们要的东西，是一位名叫「荣仓终」的科员的所有物。
E: The things they want are the belongings of a certain researcher named Eikura Shuu.

C: 怎么会呢，螺丝咕姆先生，欢迎您造访黑塔空间站。
E: Of course not, Mr. Screwllum. Welcome to Herta Space Station.

C: 原来是虚惊一场。
E: So it was a false alarm...?

C: 你感到一阵涟漪，巨大的失重感让你失去了四肢的掌控权，在荡漾的字符与代码中，你猛然醒来——这里是模拟宇宙。
E: You feel a ripple, a great weightlessness that makes you lose control of your limbs, and in a flurry of symbols and code, you wake up with a jolt — this is the Simulated Universe.

C: 这还是…影像记录吗？
E: Is this still just... a record?

C: 不得不说，她也是一位技艺精湛的演员，混淆视听永远是最有效的方法。
E: I must say, she really is a masterful actor. Misdirection is always the most effective method.

C: 所以她必须抓住机会。
E: That's why she had to take the opportunity before it was lost.

C: 那我可要带走这张卡带啦。
E: I'm gonna leave with this cartridge then.

C: 何必搞得这么复杂。
E: Why make it so complicated?

C: 如果你指的是银狼留下的后门，它们已经被全部清理了，只留办公室中这最后一个。
E: If you are referring to the back doors Silver Wolf left behind, we have cleared out all of them except for the one in the office.

C: 对于遵从本能的虫群，也许是停留在它们复眼当中的新鲜肉体，一种食髓知味的躁动与渴望。
E: To The Swarm, that follows its instincts, it might be the sight of fresh meat in their compound eyes and the restless thirst for sustenance.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，也许我们的终点并不一致，但依然会有无数的轨道交错相汇，「求知」永远是开拓路上最好的助力。
E: Well, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}, our destination may differ, but there are still countless opportunities for our paths to cross. The pursuit of knowledge will always be the best driving force for trailblazing.

C: 是、是，那你接下来打算怎么办，找个附近的公司分部骇入，把账号取回来？
E: Uh-huh... anyway, what are you gonna do now, hm? Hack an IPC branch nearby and get your accounts back?

C: 想象自己是一名空间站的普通员工，你必须前往安全的地方，但受病毒影响，设备无法正常运作，你的前进也处处受阻。
E: Imagine you are a regular staff member of the space station. You need to evacuate to a safe place, but many paths are blocked due to malfunctions caused by the virus.

C: 我也会收到吗？
E: Will I get it too?

C: 你的人设是不是变了？
E: Did you switch personalities?

C: 嗯？你是听螺丝咕姆先生说的吗，这事发生时，你应该不在空间站。
E: Huh? Did you hear about it from Mr. Screwllum? You weren't here when it happened.

C: 看来他也不是故意的…你好，银枝！我是三月七。
E: Now we know he didn't do it on purpose... Hi, Argenti! I'm March 7th.

C: 小三月，小三月——听得见吗？
E: March, March... can you hear me?

C: 我十分抱歉——这样的美丽生物竟是种幻觉，它的欺骗与威胁比外表更为…「丑陋」。
E: I must apologize... I cannot believe that such a beautiful creature was merely a hallucination. Its deceptive and threatening nature is much uglier than its appearance would suggest.

C: 好恐怖呀，我房间的小熊和兔子会不会被胃液融化？它们陪我好久了，我得把它们给抢救出来……
E: No... So my teddy bears and bunnies are gonna be liquefied by stomach acid? I've had them for ages... I need to find a way to save them.

C: …我做好准备说再见啦。
E: I'm ready to say goodbye.

C: 所以…我们没得商量啦？必须得在这告别？那……
E: So you still want to do it? Are we going to say goodbye here? Then...

C: {NICKNAME}，这次的危机结束了，偶然的访客也已离开。但我觉得，我们还有些话题可以聊聊。
E: {NICKNAME}, the crisis is over, and our unexpected guest has left, but I think there's still something we should talk about.

C: 列车组，大家之间的…
E: That which exists between the Crew...

C: 唉…帕姆也在想办法帕！让帕姆看看附近有没有什么线索！
E: *sigh* Pom-Pom's still thinking, let me see if there are any clues nearby!

C: 找我有什么事吗？
E: *sigh* Is there something you need?

C: 什么现场这么危险？
E: The scene of what? Is he in danger?

C: 都这么久了，也不见个交代！
E: It's been so long and there's still no response!

C: 诶哟哟，你在我这老婆子面前有什么好谦虚的。
E: No need to be modest — at my age you get a feel for intelligence...

C: 那他有告诉你答案么？
E: Well, did he enlighten you?

C: 一份失踪科员的名单，和他们的详细信息。
E: A list of the missing researchers and their details.

C: 陀斐特的火魔，泯灭帮的大公…<color=#dbc291ff>阿弗利特身上还有一个秘密</color>。
E: The fire demon of Fetora, the Duke of the Annihilation Gang... <color=#dbc291ff>There is another secret with Ifrit</color>.

C: 相位灵火甫一出生就变换到了其他相位，等归来时，丝丝喀尔已然寿终正寝。此后它就这样不断变换相位，再难以被捕捉。
E: The Phase Flame shifted into a different phase as soon as it was created. When it returned to this phase, Sserkal had already passed away. It then continued to shift through phases, making its capture impossible.

C: 比起学者，你的确更像一位「医生」。
E: You are indeed more like a "medical doctor" than a scholar.

C: 你！还愣着干啥？哦，听不懂大人的语言？没关系，为了应对这种情况，我们专门调制了联觉信标！
E: What are you frozen in place for? Oh, you don't understand the honorable tart? That's okay! No worries, for situations like this, we've specifically concocted a Synesthesia Beacon!

C: 它似乎认为，只有充满激情，才能得到阮•梅的肯定。
E: It seems to believe that only by being passionate can it earn Ruan Mei's approval.

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...
(Meow...)

C: 隐藏房间，嘶嘶。仅「阮•梅」女士可使用。请出示凭证，嘶嘶。
E: Hidden room, *buzz*. Only Madam Ruan Mei has permissions. Please submit your ID, *buzz*.

C: 看样子…你生气了，对吧？对不起，我没什么可辩解的。时至今日，我的实验失败了无数次，结局也总在预料之内。
E: You look... upset, correct? I regret my actions. There's no defending what I've done. Time and again, my experiments have fallen short, and they've always yielded predictable results.

C: 希望不要遇到#4波尔卡•卡卡目，不然可能会很麻烦。
E: I hope I won't meet member #4 Polka Kakamond. That would be quite troublesome.

C: 好啊，不着急。
E: Alright. There's no rush.

C: 我要是年轻二十岁，说不定也会奋斗一番。
E: If I were <unbreak>20</unbreak> years younger, maybe I'd want to give it a go myself.

C: 那我推荐您买上一束「七彩虹」——这种小花色彩斑斓艳丽，女士们都很喜欢呢。
E: Then I would recommend a bouquet of "Rainbow." This small flower is colorful and bright — ladies all love them!

C: 塞琳没跟你说吗，我已经不当演员了。
E: Did Celine not tell you? I'm not an actress anymore.

C: 你…你等我适应舞台了再来。
E: Can... Can you come after I get a bit more used to the stage?

C: 尤利安深深地吸了一口气，停止了抽泣。
E: Julian takes a deep breath and stops crying.

C: 那群铁卫…他们…他们看上去…一点都不像活人！
E: Those Silvermane Guards... They... They didn't... They didn't look like they were alive!

C: 你们是什么人？这里是军事禁区，无关人等不能随便闯入！
E: Who are you? This is a military restricted zone. Unauthorized personnels can't enter here!

C: …我反正叫不出口。
E: ...I won't be using those names.

C: 好啦，在外奔波这么久，接下来就好好休息吧。这个小家伙，依我看…可以放在派对车厢里，有什么事可以直接吩咐它去做。
E: Alright, you've spent enough time rushing around helping people. It's time to get some good rest. As for this little guy... Why don't you keep them in Party Car? If you have any issues, you can just ask them to take care of it for you.

C: 也不是很冷嘛。
E: It doesn't feel that cold.

C: ——第七条法则就是：不能留下脚印。我有条独门绝技，可以说踏雪无痕，专门用来摆脱追兵……
E: ...Rule number seven: Never leave a footprint. I have my own special technique called "invisible snow-walking." Helps me throw off pursuers in no...time...

C: 好不容易碰上一次这种场合，不好好打扮一番怎么行？倒是你，不会真的只有这一套衣服吧……
E: This kind of event doesn't come around every day — why shouldn't I dress for the occasion? ...You're not really gonna wear that same old outfit... are you?

C: 出发吧，过节去！
E: You bet! It's time to celebrate!

C: 居然还有这种事！所以…所以，难不成托帕说的「业务」，就是来贝洛伯格讨债？
E: Wow, that's a pretty incredible story. So... does that mean Topaz's "business" here is to collect a debt from Belobog?

C: 负债人无法用现金还债的情况，「战略投资部」早就屡见不鲜了，我们能提供的解决方案也不止一种。
E: The Strategic Investment Department is well-versed in handling such situations. We can offer the debtor various repayment solutions...

C: 祖辈欠下的债务，却要连累后人偿还……
E: So you're basically saying the Belobogians must pay off their ancestors' debts...

C: 话是这么说，但还是感觉很对不住布洛妮娅……
E: Well, yeah, but she'll be really disappointed...

C: 闭，闭嘴！我为了进公司，躲在一颗小行星上备战了六七年，然后又熬过了十七轮面试才成功入职——你们这些无业人员，凭什么对我评头论足？！
E: Sh—Shut up! I spent seven years on a forsaken asteroid preparing to join the IPC — I went through <unbreak>17</unbreak> interviews before they finally hired me... What right do you deadbeats have to criticize me!?

C: 真的假的？！莫非你真的能听懂扑满的语言？
E: Seriously!? You actually speak trotter?

C: 嗯…？债？什么意思？
E: Debt? What do you mean?

C: 你们在贝洛伯格人心中的声望很高，他们肯定愿意对两位吐露心声。
E: The people of Belobog hold both of you in high regard. They'll most certainly be willing to tell you their thoughts.

C: 怎么了，对我的工作流程这么好奇？
E: You're very curious about my work, aren't you?

C: 最近城里不太平啊。突然冒出来的黑衣人四处作乱，铁卫拿他们都没什么办法……
E: It's been pretty hectic in the city lately. All these people dressed in black suddenly showed up, and even the Silvermane Guards have had trouble dealing with them...

C: 娜塔莎的想法，听上去很有说服力耶……
E: ...Wow, that's a pretty convincing argument...

C: …诺尔伯特，倒是跟大家说说，你怎么这么快就被放出来了啊？
E: ...Norbert, why don't you tell everyone how you were released from jail so quickly?

C: …你在讽刺我吗？放弃吧，激将这招对我没用。
E: ...Are you making fun of me? Have at it, you won't change my mind.

C: 患者说愿意承受风险。
E: The patient said he was willing to take the risk.

C: 她的老公和孩子都得了一种怪病，虽说症状不算太严重，但工作生计难免会受些影响。
E: Her husband and child caught a mysterious illness. The symptoms weren't grave, but their livelihood was certainly impacted.

C: 嗯，不管是瓦赫还是「互助会」，他们都把下层区人们的心理拿捏得很准。
E: Be it Vache or the mutual aid society — forces like that can take full advantage of the... the typical Underworld state of mind.

C: 兄弟们，不用再假装客气了，把这家伙给我赶走！
E: Men, look lively and send this idiot packing already!

C: …我就当你是在夸奖我了。
E: ...I'll take that as a compliment.

C: 你太不尊重娜塔莎医生了……
E: Have some respect for Dr. Natasha...

C: 啊…你来了，{NICKNAME}。抱歉，被你看到了尴尬的一幕。
E: Oh... {NICKNAME}, you're here. I apologize, that must have made for uncomfortable viewing.

C: 现在回想起来，的确如此。他的所作所为值得更加严苛的惩罚……
E: *sigh* Looking back, it wasn't. He deserved much worse...

C: 让我们高呼赢家的名字——{NICKNAME}——恭喜{M#他}{F#她}在本场比赛中酣畅大胜！
E: Let me hear you say {M#his}{F#her} name— {NICKNAME}! Congratulations on a phenomenal win in the opening!

C: 虽然那些东西确实只有我经手过，但……
E: It's true I'm the only person who handled those things, but...

C: 为什么帮卡波特办事？
E: Why do you work for Capote?

C: 其实，一切都写在了信里。
E: In fact, everything is written in the letter.

C: 我会珍惜你给我的这次机会，并且证明，经历了这番曲折，我已经做出了改变。
E: I will cherish the opportunity you gave me and I will also prove to you that I have really changed because of this experience.

C: 我可比他帅。
E: I'm better looking than him.

C: 既然没路可逃了，那就让他们见识下{RUBY_B#星穹列车}列车组{RUBY_E#}的厉害！
E: Well, if there's no escape, then maybe it's time we gave them a taste of Astral Express medicine!

C: 这孩子…有点过于厉害了啊。喂，丹恒，快把你隐藏的力量用出来呀！
E: This girl's pretty strong... Hey Dan Heng, maybe now's a good time to show off your secret strength!?

C: 我得带你离开这里，希莉儿。
E: I have to get you out of here, Cyrille.

C: 你到底在说什么…我听不懂。
E: What are you saying... I don't understand.

C: （莫非她所谓的「走出去」，和这些箱子有关系？）
E: (Could it be that her idea of "getting out" is connected to these boxes?)

C: 放弃解锁
E: Give it up.

C: 养父喜欢的花是…
E: What was your father's favorite flower...?

C: …也对，都是些不值一提的陈年旧事而已，不值得浪费你的时间。
E: ...You're right, not the best moment for distant memories, I don't want to waste your time.

C: 放心吧，我觉得爸妈不会太介意花束的品种。那个店员姑娘在盯着我们看呢，快去吧。
E: Don't worry. I don't think my parents will be picky about the flowers they get. Quick, that florist is looking at us.

C: 他每完成一台高难度的手术，我和妈妈都会去买一朵「暖阳花」，别在他医务服的前口袋上。
E: Each time he finished a tricky operation, my mom and I would buy a single stem of Sunshine, then pin it on the chest pocket of his apron.

C: 我们回下层吧，{NICKNAME}。得把这个好消息告诉那些需要帮助的人。
E: Let's head back to the Underworld, {NICKNAME}. We need to spread the good news.

C: 娜塔莎小姐，抱歉！其实…其实我有重要的事必须当面告诉您。
E: I apologize, Miss Natasha! As a matter of fact... there's something I have to tell you in person.

C: 我知道，奥森先生。但我身边有这位拯救了下层区的英雄，{F#她}{M#他}会保护好我的，对吧？
E: I know, Mr. Oswell. But I have a hero with me — {F#she}{M#he} saved the Underworld. I'm sure {F#she'll}{M#he'll} protect me, right?

C: （枪架上摆放着「3把枪支」…这和故事书里的描述一致，应该可以放着不管……）
E: (Three guns are placed up on the gun rack... This is just like in the book, so I'd better leave it alone...)

C: 好好聊聊吧。
E: That sounds nice.

C: 当务之急是找到窃贼，拿回失窃的展品。不过我们还没能揪出对方的身份…这也是让铁卫头疼的主要原因。
E: Our first priority is finding the thief and recovering the stolen item, but we don't even have a suspect yet... That's why this case is such a conundrum for the Silvermane Guards.

C: 再去别处看看吧。
E: Let's keep looking.

C: 装着「流星碎片」的箱子就在旅店房间里，您和佩拉副官随时可以上去查验现场。
E: The box containing the Meteor Fragment is in one of the hotel rooms. You and Miss Pela can go investigate the scene when you're ready.

C: 一点造假的可能性都没有？
E: It couldn't be a fake, could it?

C: 我理解你的担忧，老实说，我也有同感。
E: To be honest, I feel the same way.

C: …哈？什么意思？
E: ...Ha? What does that mean?

C: 不，一定是因为故障才…那个，小机器人，不好意思…你应该是生病了，克拉拉现在要拆开你的外壳，帮你检查一下哦。
E: No, it must be malfunctioning... sorry little robot, but it looks like you're sick. I'm going to take off your shell and give you a checkup.

C: ——做得好，小姑娘。
E: ...excellent job, little girl.

C: 对！大家都一致觉得，没有比你更合适的人选了。
E: You guessed it! Everyone agrees that there is no better candidate than you.

C: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
E: There is only one choice left in front of you...

C: 居然没人怀疑到你身上…
E: It's amazing no one suspected you...

C: 便笺在这里——上面的内容我还没看过，您要不要亲自过目一下？
E: Here — I haven't read the content. Do you want to take a look?

C: 没关系，克拉拉，你别紧张！虎克我已经完全理解面试是什么了，让我们开始吧！
E: Take it easy, Clara! I fully understand what an interview is all about. Let's get started!

C: 志愿者？你是说志愿导览员吗？
E: Volunteer? Do you mean as a volunteer guide?

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 你会指望这样的我给人介绍展品吗？我看还是算了吧，体验好不到哪儿去的。
E: Would you really want someone like me to introduce the exhibits to visitors? Let's just nip this idea in the bud. It won't end well for any of us.

C: 根据简历内容提问就好。
E: Just ask questions based on the resume.

C: 我早就给安东尼娜矿头说过了，就不该让那些流浪者跟我们一起挖矿——要是没有这些惹事儿的家伙，我会在这里受委屈吗？
E: I told Antonia from the beginning: We never should have let those vagrants mine with us. I wouldn't be in this mess if it weren't for those thugs.

C: 史瓦罗不是来抢矿脉的吗？
E: So Svarog wasn't after the vein?

C: …如果奥列格所言非虚，那么史瓦罗就是从旧时代里遗留下来的筑城者产物。
E: ...If what Oleg says is true, then Svarog is an Architect creation leftover from the Old Era.

C: 你们已经做得足够多了。救治伤员的事情就交给医生来做吧。
E: You've done enough. Treating the injured is doctor's work.

C: 慢着！这些都是矿队的资产，可不兴随便破坏。还是想办法把它修好吧。
E: Easy! It belongs to the mining team. We can't just destroy it. We should try and fix it.

C: 什么跟班，是二把手…等等，现在不是说这个的时候！
E: I'm not a sidekick! I'm second-in-command! Argh. You know what? No. This ain't the time.

C: 鼹鼠党的二把手「千面尤——等等，现在不是说这个的时候！
E: You kidding? It's me! The second-in-command of The Moles? Julian of a Thousand— You know what? No. It ain't the time for this.

C: 老爹……
E: Daddy...

C: 什么时候丢的，有印象吗？
E: Do you have any idea when you lost your treasure?

C: 当然啦，也不能指望真正的小偷能老老实实认罪，是吧？依我看，<color=#dbc291ff>这四个人中肯定有一个在说谎</color>。
E: Of course, we could never expect thieves to confess and turn themselves in, right? In my opinion, <color=#dbc291ff>one of those four was lying</color>.

C: 还想用「地火」来压我？说得好像我怕他们一样！
E: Trying to threaten me with Wildfire, huh? Think I'm afraid of them!?

C: 绝对是那个厨子偷走的，千真万确。叔叔我啊，最注重信誉了，不会骗你们的。
E: Look, the cook is definitely the thief, I'm sure about that! I value my reputation more than anything, so you can trust me.

C: 别紧张，这是正常流程。
E: Relax. We're just checking off all the boxes.

C: 虎克来带路，桑博叔叔应该就在那个方向！
E: Follow Hook, Mr. Sampo should be that way!

C: 听说你很狂啊，抢人帽子？
E: I hear you're a tough guy, aren't you? Snatching other people's helmets?

C: 行了行了，快去寻宝吧，我等你的好消息，嘿嘿……
E: Alright, alright, alright. Time for you to go treasure hunting. I'd be waiting for your good news, hehe...

C: 现在战况如何？
E: How's the situation?

C: 还好我们及时赶到。要是再晚点，真不知道那对姐弟俩会出什么事……
E: Thank goodness we got here in time. If we'd arrived any later...

C: 你走得倒是潇洒…你难道就不觉得，自己还欠我一个解释吗？！
E: It was so easy for you to just leave this world behind... Don't you at least owe me an explanation!?
█Serval█S██erval █Ser█ v██ al██ ████ █...

C: 她经常一个人前往雪原考察，我们也一直相信她能保护好自己。但毕竟这次情况特殊——要是她被坏人利用，陷入危险就糟了。
E: She's used to doing research alone in the Snow Plains, and we've always believed she can protect herself, but this is different... I'm worried she could run into bad people.

C: 下次再说。
E: Maybe later.

C: 不出意外的话，雪在入夜前还会越下越大…我们得先找个合适的地方扎营才行。
E: The snow is supposed to get heavier later in the day... We need to find a good place to set up camp first.

C: …不愧是你，记什么都这么清楚。不过，这附近应该很难找到完美符合所有条件的露营地。
E: ...You remembered all that? I expected no less from you! But it's gonna be hard finding a place that fits those criteria.

C: 嗯…那个小家伙的习性就是如此。只要受到惊吓，它就会以一种奇妙的方式立刻消失不见。
E: Yeah... that's the nature of these little things. They disappear in a flash when they get scared.

C: 那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——就让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
E: Well then, this will be the main course for tonight — I'll show you what I can do as a chef!

C: 算了…我已经能猜到个大概了。是哥哥姐姐找你来保护我们的吧？
E: Never mind... I can take a guess. Serval and Gepard sent you to protect us, right?

C: 小心怪物，继续前进吧。
E: Let's keep moving. Watch out for monsters.

C: 不，母亲不会那么对我的…绝对不会。
E: No, mother would never do that to me... there's no way she would.

C: 史瓦罗为什么要攻击我们？
E: Why did Svarog attack us?

C: 不，不是那样的…史瓦罗先生很健康，他的系统一直都有在维护。
E: No, there can't be... Mr. Svarog is healthy, his system is always being maintained.

C: 不过虎克也好好奇呀…这把钥匙是拿来开什么的呢？回去以后再问问尤利安吧。
E: But I'm also curious... What does this key open? Let's ask Julian when we get back.

C: 据说堆在这里是为了挡住怪物。
E: Perhaps these are stacked here to keep the monsters away.

C: 关于你们上次说的「星核」，还有在上层区的遭遇，这两位年轻人又从头帮我捋了一遍。
E: Regarding this "Stellaron" and your predicament in the Overworld, your friends have gone over both with me again.

C: 放心吧大叔，我们会证明你没信错人！
E: Don't worry, Mr. Oleg, we'll make sure you don't regret it!

C: 得想办法让他站在我们一边。
E: We need to find a way to bring him over to our side.

C: 没错，我们得做好两手准备。能和平解决问题当然最好，但假如情况有变，也得时刻做好使用武力的准备。
E: We should make preparations for both approaches. Of course, it's better to settle matters through peaceful means. But if the situation changes, we must be prepared for armed conflict at a moment's notice.

C: 小姑娘，你可真记仇。
E: Y'know missy, you sure know how to bear a grudge.

C: 回答错误。认证结果——失败。
E: Incorrect answer. Certification result: Failure.

C: 真烦啊，又要干活了。把手伸出来。
E: Ugh! Now I have to do this again. Put your hand out.

C: 不不不，微晶单元不能插在散热基板上。
E: No, no, no! You can't insert the microcrystalline unit into the heat sink substrate like that.

C: 的确，一想到那个小姑娘独自进入裂界，我就有点担心。
E: Indeed. And that little girl heading into the Fragmentum all by herself... It doesn't bear thinking about.

C: 咦…人呢？明明刚才还看到她往这边走了。
E: Huh? Where'd she go? We just saw her go this way.

C: 没办法，往前找找看吧。
E: *sigh* We'll just have to head straight and keep looking.

C: 那只大手…好像要爆炸了！
E: That hand of his! It's gonna explode!

C: 但内心是不会变的哦。
E: But our hearts never change.

C: 我当时的任务就是「带你们到史瓦罗的老巢」而已。钱货两讫，我想干啥也不用跟你说啊。
E: My assignment was simply to take you to Svarog's lair. I got the payment and delivered the goods — I wasn't obligated to tell you about my dinner plans!

C: 筑城者机械时期的记录，完整；保卫战争期间的战斗数据，完整；地髓开拓团时期的记录，完整…
E: Architect machine era records: Intact. War of Defense combat data: Intact. Geomarrow Development Group era records: Intact...

C: 主要还是营地里的流浪者——当然了，磐岩镇的居民也可以自由参加！
E: It's mostly vagrants from the camp, but Boulder Town residents are welcome to join as well, of course!

C: 「地髓矿脉探针」？
E: Geomarrow Probe?

C: 拍卖会…竟、竟然还有这种好事？！
E: The auction... So... that's where the probe is!?

C: 那个…这个…喂，荣誉队员！快来帮虎克狡辩一下！
E: I... uh... Psst, honorary member! Think of something!

C: （现在已经可以去找拍卖师等待竞价开始了…）
E: (We could find the auctioneer now and wait for the bidding to begin...)

C: 你记得「矿灯」巴列维吧？那家伙仔仔细细地跟我确认了一遍。
E: Do you remember Balaway the Miner's Lamp? He told me everything.

C: 你们可真是好心，我不会忘了这份恩情的！
E: You two have done me a huge favor, I won't forget it!

C: 我们已经尽力了。
E: We did our best.

C: 刚才…虎克好像看到老巫婆了。不会是错觉吧？
E: Just now... I thought I saw the old witch. Was Hook imagining things?

C: 自从我们离开了矿镇，日子就变得越发难过了。为了养家糊口，老爹总是顾不上照看你，经常连着好几天都回不了家一趟。
E: Life has gotten increasingly difficult since we left the mining town. All those days away at work have meant that your dad hasn't always been around to look after you.

C: 计算重启…结论——「造物引擎」，可能性：<unbreak>97.66%</unbreak>。
E: Recalculating... Conclusion: Engine of Creation. <unbreak>97.66%</unbreak> probability.

C: 我不懂，刚才那是什么情况？
E: I don't understand what just happened.

C: 克拉拉已经把小机器人的芯片拆卸完了，现在…嘿咻…只要把这一大堆线路结构移接到新的外壳里就好……
E: I've finished extracting that chip from the small robot. Now all that's left to do is move all of this circuitry into the new shell...

C: ——风险等级评估：高。克拉拉，立刻远离危险来源！
E: Risk level: High. Clara, get away, now!

C: 这么低的概率都撞上了？！
E: I can't believe such an improbable event has actually happened!

C: 好，交给姐姐我吧。你们跟紧点，别露馅了。
E: Leave it to me. Stick close guys, and don't get spotted.

C: 幸会。
E: Pleased to meet you.

C: 我可不想被人看成「杰帕德的姐姐」…这次是为了你们，否则我才不想借老弟的名字。
E: Hmph, I don't want people to see me that way... I'm doing this for you. Otherwise, I wouldn't be using my brother's name.

C: 对，怎么突然问这个？
E: Yes, but what made you ask that all of a sudden?

C: …或许这份工作真的不适合我？唉……
E: Perhaps this job is not for me after all. *sigh*...

C: 听上去…确实有些离谱，不过想想是从你嘴里说出来的，倒也正常。
E: It sounds... utterly outrageous, but then again, it doesn't seem that strange coming from you.

C: 列车行过一个又一个世界，我等只是过客，是一段故事的见证者。
E: The Express has traveled world after world. We are merely passing travellers — witnesses to part of a grander story.

C: 前人的努力…他们未竟的研究…终于能在这个时代结出果实了！给我一支卫队，让我去找到「星核」，找到拯救家园的办法——
E: The efforts of our predecessors... their unfinished research... we can finally see them come to fruition! Give me some soldiers and I'll locate the Stellaron and find out how to save our world—

C: 这是取舍，布洛妮娅——身为领袖，就一定要有决断的胆识……
E: These are the choices we make, Bronya... As a leader, you must harbor the courage and foresight to choose.

C: 这大家伙到底是怎么动起来的……不过，现在还是让它乖乖别动比较好？接下来，就看你们的啦！
E: So how does this big guy work...? Or more importantly — how do you stop him from working? Over to you guys, I guess!

C: …上次来到这里时，纳努克瞥了我一眼，难道……
E: ...The last time I came here, I drew Nanook's gaze. Could it be...

C: ——我来赐予你绝望吧！
E: Let me bestow upon you... despair!

C: 要做的事还有很多…那台「造物引擎」引发的巨大动静，城里的居民一定都察觉到了。许多疑惑需要解释，许多真相需要公开……
E: There is still much to do... The people will have felt the effects of the Engine of Creation. There are so many questions to answer, so many truths to reveal...

C: 就这么做吧，布洛妮娅。
E: You have to, Bronya.

C: 该说说你想做什么了吧？
E: Is there anything you want to do here?

C: 对不起，斯捷潘先生…我不是…你要找的……
E: I'm sorry. Mr. Stefan... I'm not... who you're looking for...

C: 如今，星核已经被封印，肆虐已久的寒潮想必也会慢慢散去。待此处气候恢复正常，它们从冰封中解脱时又会思考些什么？
E: Now that Stellaron has been sealed, this punishing Eternal Freeze probably will start to dissipate. When the climate here normalizes, what will these creatures think once they've been freed from the ice?

C: 拿好，我们准备开始了。
E: Hold this. We're starting soon.

C: 就当是帮帮我嘛，再来一次。
E: Come on, help me one more time.

C: 开始吧！
E: Let's start!

C: 怎么敢在这里肇事？
E: Who would dare to stir up trouble here?

C: 哎哟哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，俺没事……
E: Oh my, oh dear. {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, I'm doing fine...

C: 这么明显的事故，能没事儿吗？
E: No way you're doing fine in a serious traffic incident like this.

C: 记事、耳背之类的事情放在一边。她这个人思维简单，根本分不清楚什么是好赖话。
E: Her memory and hearing impairment aside, she's rather simple-minded and has difficulty distinguishing between praises and admonishments.

C: 我建议你先不要辞退她。
E: I would suggest that you don't fire her.

C: 还记得什么吗？
E: Do you remember anything else?

C: 哟，看什么看，看什么看，没见过竞赛级的星槎吗？
E: Hey, what are you looking at? You've never seen a competition-level race starskiff before, have you?

C: 一棵普通的树，风穿过树梢的时候，不知为何传来「哗啦哗啦」的纸页声。
E: This is an ordinary tree. You can somehow hear the sound of flipping pages as wind blows through the leaves.

C: 没想到魁首竟将药方作为礼物送给学会。真是出人意料，可这些短生种毕竟不能理解这用药的奥秘。
E: I never thought the master primus gifted this prescription to the Guild. How surprising. It's a pity that the short-life species would never understand the secrets behind this ingredient.

C: 什么？触犯禁忌？我既不寻求不死仙丹，也没打算变成长生种…我会触犯什么禁忌？
E: What? Forbidden secrets? I don't seek medicines to grant immortality, and don't wish to become long-life species... What forbidden secrets am I unveiling?

C: 今天这事，我可以当做没发生过。如果你不想让云骑或十王司找上你，最好现在就离开。否则…别怪我不客气。
E: I can pretend this never happened today, but if you don't want the Cloud Knights or the Ten-Lords Commission giving you trouble, you better leave right now. Otherwise... I can't make any promises.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 这里有你的快递。
E: Here's a package for you.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 噢。你如此高大，我却贫弱又矮小。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, your figure so imposing and tall, while I'm feeble and short. How tragic.

C: 原来如此！好主意，让老夫和你共赴沙场，用炽热的战斗激情碰撞诗歌的灵感吧！
E: Great idea! Let me take the battlefield with you, smashing the inspiration of poetry headfirst into fierce fighting passion!

C: 楼宇空悬并蒂灯，回廊处处斗火层。恋人相逢难长久，无言相望玉界门 / 执手哽咽诉离愁 / 说让我走我就走。你确定要这样写吗？
E: Paired lanterns hang in the building, and the corridors are competing in firelight brightness. A couple's reunion is often brief, as they silently gaze at the Jade Gate. / as they clasp hands in imminent sorrow. / if you want me to go, I'll go.. Are you sure this is what you want to write?

C: 「我给你我设法保全的我自己的爱意…」
E: "I offer you all the love I could muster that I have saved, somehow..."

C: 孤屿是小聪的前世。
E: In Cong's former life, he was Guyu.

C: （不敢说话）
E: (Dare not speak)

C: 我可不是想让你也陷进去啊。
E: I didn't say you should be involved that way.

C: 也许她就是经纪人。
E: Maybe she's the manager herself.

C: 要不，你去与她碰面之前，去找经纪人打听一下，我觉得这样做会比较保险。找得到就问问，找不到就算了，也不麻烦。
E: Here's an idea. What if you go and meet up with the manager before meeting her? I think that might be safer. If you can find him, ask about her, and if you can't, just forget about it. It's not that big of a deal.

C: …其实我是怀疑你在调查我，只是想反过来威胁你…但现在说什么都晚了。
E: ...I was suspecting you were investigating me, so I just wanted to scare you a little... But it's too late now to say anything that will change your mind.

C: 你就知足吧，一般会员做梦也没有这样的资格。
E: Learn to recognize a blessing when you see it! Those with just normal membership could never dream of such a privilege.

C: 神秘的经纪人取得了你们的联系方式，随后，你们成功得到了「高级会员资格」。
E: The mysterious manager obtains your contact information, and you successfully obtain the "premium membership."

C: …陶德？
E: ...Todd?

C: 「贪取不死」，这条十恶逆的禁律是绝对不容触碰的。我会将事情呈报给十王司的。谢啦，{NICKNAME}。
E: "Immortality Theft" is one of the most grievous of felonies and is absolutely unpardonable. I'll report this to the Ten-Lords Commission. Thanks, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过这位白露小姐的性子可不是一般的跳脱，总能找准时机从自己的潜邸里溜出来。
E: However, she also has a somewhat free spirit... She always manages to find a way to escape her residence.

C: 魔阴身并非「疾病」。即便是衔药龙女，也只能稍缓其进程。
E: Being stricken with mara isn't like catching a curable disease. All the Healer Lady can do is slow the process.

C: 你别多虑。看顾孩子确实是桩烦心事，但一定难不倒将军大人的贵客。
E: Bah, don't fret. Looking after children is a pain, but as the general's distinguished guest, I know you'll do great.

C: 药王慈怀，建木生发。
E: Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth.

C: 【叠好的照片】
E: Folded Photo

C: 只有那些最鲜明、最极端的部分还能存在——通常不会是什么快乐的回忆，多是些后悔、痛恨、悲伤之类的负面积淀。
E: Only the most vivid and extreme memories persist... but such memories are usually ones of regret, hatred, grief, and other negative emotions.

C: 你误会了，不是我，而是我的一个朋友。明白吗？我的朋友有星槎通行许可证，能帮你们速速离开…不是我啊，这个人不是我。
E: You've got it wrong. That's not my ship, it's my friend's. My friend has a starskiff travel permit and can help you leave quickly... I'm not the one who owns the ship.

C: …呵呵，没错。
E: ...Hehe, that's right.

C: 假装我不存在是吧？
E: Am I invisible to you or what?

C: 那就好，那就好。
E: I hope so...

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
E: Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—

C: 要是我有面见龙师的意思，我会托浣溪小姐传达的。
E: Should I ever want to meet the Preceptors, Miss Huanxi, I'll ask you to pass on the message.

C: 那些刺客用训练后的云吟法术隐藏身形，但那不过是欺骗视觉的把戏。
E: The assassins are using skilled cloudhymn magic to make themselves invisible... but their presence is all too real.

C: 创造新的生命？
E: Created a new life?

C: 是你，丹枫大人！你为什么要那样做！
E: It's you, Master Dan Feng! Why did you disgrace yourself!

C: 咱们走吧…
E: Let's go...

C: 我必须听完他说的每一句话。也许里面会有重要的信息。
E: I must listen to him very carefully — we cannot afford to miss any information.

C: 谢谢你医士大人，那孽龙真的是丹枫大人所为吗？我不相信。
E: Thank you, healer. Was master Dan Feng really behind that abomination? I don't believe it.

C: 需要我做什么？
E: Is there anything I can do for you?

C: 我知道了。事发前一天他突然带着星核出现在了建木附近。
E: I figured it out! The day before the resurrection, he appeared near the Ambrosial Arbor with a Stellaron!

C: 哦…对哦，确实是这个道理。这案子有点蹊跷，刚开始就叫我神探三月七跌了个跟头……
E: Oh, yeah... Ah Geez, this is gonna be a tough case to crack if even my instincts are off...

C: 首先，这个孩子是黑发。罗刹是金发。
E: *sigh* The child in the footage has black hair. Luocha's hair is blonde.

C: 我的巡镝啊！整整五百镝啊！本姑娘的心在滴血！{NICKNAME}，我们走。
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> strales! <unbreak>500</unbreak>! Ugh, my purse is crying. Come on {NICKNAME}, let's go.

C: 好，那咱们开始吧…第一次当众推理，还真有点紧张。
E: Okay, here we go... Eh-heh, explaining a theory in front of everyone is a more nerve-wracking than I expected.

C: 是啊，毕竟我也曾是个操心孩子课业、还有明天给他做些什么菜的老父亲。
E: Yes. After all, I know what it's like to worry over a kid's homework and whether their lunch is healthy enough.

C: 我已经过了及笄礼，是个成年人了，我有实现梦想的自由吧！可是妈妈却还是把我当个孩子看，把我笼在她的翅膀下。好像离开了她，我就一刻也活不下去一样。
E: But I've had the Hairpin Ceremony — I'm an adult now! I have the right to pursue my dreams! Mom still insists on sheltering me under her wing, as if I can't even stay alive without her.

C: 我承认，未成年人驾驶星槎，该打。只是，妈妈当时似乎不仅是为这事愤怒，而是为我以她为榜样这件事而愤怒，为我有和她一样的天赋而愤怒。我一直想不通为什么。
E: I admit, I deserved to be punished — you can't let a kid get away with stealing a starskiff... but my Mom was angry about more than that. She was angry because I viewed her as a role model — because I had the same talent as her. I don't understand it.

C: {F#本小姐}{M#在下}，正是谛听！
E: Who do you think I am, Diting!?

C: 驭空司舵不愿再飞行的心结，我不便揣测，也不想撕开她的旧伤。
E: I do not wish to speculate on the reason behind Helm Master Yukong's reluctance to fly, nor do I want to open up old wounds.

C: 驭空司舵从没向你提起过这些吗？
E: Did Helm Master Yukong never bring this up with you?

C: 是啊，驭空并不想你背负她的虚名。何况在生死战场上，人的天赋和名声其实并无意义。
E: Yes, Yukong doesn't want you to feel the pressure of her name. Besides, reputation and talent count for something, but you need luck on the battlefield.

C: 这台术算机正在运行一个航路模拟系统，系统显示还需要两个时辰，就能模拟出罗浮到科德莱浮游城的航路。
E: This calculation device is running a voyage simulation. It shows that it needs two more dual-hours to simulate the voyage from the Luofu to the floating city of Cordelia.

C: 请收件人输入取件信息。
E: Please enter package receipt information.

C: 没、没想到啊…
E: Th—That was unexpected...

C: 「魔阴身」——这是长生种无法避免的宿命，那是一种由沉淀的情绪和记忆引发的狂病。阿刃虽然不记得很多事情，魔阴身却依然以某种形式困扰着他……
E: Being stricken with mara is the inescapable destiny of the long-life species. It is a madness triggered by the accumulation of emotions and memories. Blade doesn't remember much, but the mara still haunts him in some form...

C: 没那么快。
E: Not fast enough.

C: 这是我和银狼经常玩的游戏，有点心理博弈的成分：双方交互向对方提问，允许说谎，但答案必须「一真一假」。
E: It's a game I play with Silver Wolf all the time — kinda psychological: Both sides ask each other two questions, then give one true answer and one false answer each.

C: 我不知道，阿刃没有告诉我，他说自己也不知道。
E: I don't know. Bladie didn't tell me — he said he doesn't know either.

C: 我们崇拜纯美的星神伊德莉拉，发誓用手中刀剑守护祂的美貌。可是，某一天祂突然消失了，谁也不知道下落。
E: We worshiped Idrila, the Aeon of Beauty. We vowed to guard THEIR beauty with the sword, but one day THEY suddenly disappeared.

C: （按照规则）我不想再见到你。
E: (Obey the rules of the game) I don't want to see you again.

C: 好吧，我问完了。
E: Okay, I'm done asking.

C: 你之所以不记得，是因为执行黑塔计划前，我让你忘了。
E: The reason you don't remember is that I wiped your memory before the operation at Herta Space Station.

C: （提出「全新」的问题）
E: (Venture into a whole new topic)

C: 纸面上，寄信人与收信者的名字全都付之阙如，只有一丝黯淡墨迹隐隐闪过。
E: On the paper, the names of the sender and recipient are all omitted, with only a faint trace of dim ink vaguely visible.

C: 小弟弟，你可听过狐人飞行士「白珩」的名字？
E: Young man, have you ever heard of Baiheng, the foxian pilot?

C: 缠着绷带？这么宽泛的特征，我可说不上来。仙舟上每天都有数不胜数的伤患来丹鼎司就医，建木灾变之后，受伤的人更是多了不少。
E: Bandages? That's a vague description, y'know... I'm not sure. We get injured patients from all over the Xianzhou for treatment, and the number of injuries we see has skyrocketed since the Ambrosial Arbor crisis.

C: 你的表情很严肃…
E: Why so serious?

C: 我…认得你吗？
E: Do I... know you?

C: 从凶应星，狂悖骄慢，染指丰饶神使血肉，助饮月妄为，终至堕为不死孽物。
E: Yingxing, the accomplice, arrogant and oblivious, used the flesh of the Abundance Emanator to assist Imbibitor Lunae in his evil. He fell, becoming an immortal abomination.

C: 最后是我，我将面临联盟判令，背负永罚。而在此之后…还有更为惨重的「代价」在等待着我。
E: And I... will face the punishment of the Alliance and suffer an eternal punishment... before paying an even worse price...

C: 别看小谛听只是叫了几声，它发言的信息量可是非常大的哟。
E: Diting can convey a lot of information with only a few sounds.

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: 这节骨眼上能让将军侍卫穷追不舍的「要犯」，恐怕也只有星核猎手了。不知这个少年的追捕行动顺不顺利？
E: Given everything that's been happening on the Xianzhou recently, I reckon the only "fugitive" worthy of a retainer's attention... would be a Stellaron Hunter. I wonder how he's getting along?

C: 得向那儿的云骑打听打听……
E: I'll have to ask the Cloud Knights in the area if they saw anything...

C: 且不谈封锁的港口怎么突然多出一个被困的旅客。这一路走来，我瞧你步子轻捷稳健，哪儿有半点盲人的样子。
E: A sealed-off port with a stranded passenger? Unlikely. Not to mention you walking the whole way here without so much as a stumble — you can see as well as I can.

C: 去码头。放心，你不会有危险的。
E: To the docks. Don't worry, you'll be safe.

C: 好了，附近安全了。咱们接着走。
E: Alright, the coast is clear. Let's keep moving.

C: 剑出鞘无功，亵渎帝弓司命的神意，至为不祥。
E: Unsheathing this sword without merit is to blaspheme the divine will of the Reignbow Arbiter, and invite calamity.

C: 以发掘禁忌丹方，复兴所谓的仙道之秘为志业的丰饶信徒。
E: They were disciples of the Abundance that sought to restore the way of immortality by unearthing a forbidden remedial formula.

C: 狐人渴求「治愈」仅有三百年的寿元。持明渴求「治愈」轮回和绝嗣之苦……
E: Foxians yearn to cure themselves of their <unbreak>300</unbreak>-year lifespan. The Vidyadhara yearn to cure themselves of the pain of reincarnation and lack of progeny...

C: 「令诸所求，必有所得」。慈怀药王心胸宽广，绝不会轻易拒绝任何人的祈愿。所以我们药王秘传的入门考验也不会太刁难人。
E: "What you seek, you will surely find." Merciful Medicus is magnanimous — they do not lightly refuse a prayer. As such, the initiation trials for the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are nothing arduous.

C: 的确，以你的能力还轮不上我担心。
E: With your skills, you've got a better chance than most.

C: 对这个组织的现状…我们几乎一无所知。虽然派去了一些卧底，但大都无法像你一样深入敌营，只能在外围徘徊。
E: The current state... I'm afraid we know next to nothing. We dispatched agents, but they were only able to linger on the edges of the organization. Your operation is the furthest anyone's managed to infiltrate.

C: 恭候多时了…{NICKNAME}。
E: I've been looking forward to meeting you... {NICKNAME}.

C: 让阿财在前面给咱探探路吧？
E: Why don't we let Acai scout out the way ahead of us?

C: 罗刹先生，你知道的可真不少啊。
E: You sure know a lot, Mr. Luocha.

C: 你的下一句话多半是「你是怎么猜到的？」但转念又想到本座身份，所以突然闭口不言，对吧？
E: You were about to say something along the lines of: "How did you know I wanted to ask something?" — but then you remembered who you were talking to and decided not to bother, correct?

C: 你还好吧，三月小姐？
E: Are you okay, Miss March?

C: 嗯嗯，原来如此。想用阵法复现过去，唤醒自己的记忆？虽然原理上行得通，但我怕穷观阵未必能做到？
E: Mm, I see. You wish to use the Matrix to relive the past and awaken parts of your memory? Viable in principle, but whether the Matrix is truly capable of achieving this result remains to be seen.

C: 连神通广大的太卜也办不到？
E: Not even the omniscient master diviner can make it happen?

C: 没啊，我都是瞎蒙的。
E: Nope, just wild guesses.

C: 符玄小姐，记忆里的人都会说这种莫名其妙的话吗？
E: Miss Fu Xuan, do people in memories always say weird stuff like this?

C: 列车没有回头，列车驶向了星空的另一端…因为这是它的宿命。就像在时间里前进的我们一样，无法倒回过去。
E: The Express never looked back, it headed straight for the other end of the galaxy... because that was its fate. The same goes for us — we can't return to the past.

C: 这是什么？我瞧瞧…「黑塔空间站自研」？
E: What's this? Let me see... "Developed on Herta Space Station"?

C: 可恶，居然把我的想象都给翻了出来。
E: Great, forget memories, now everyone gets to see my imagination...

C: 我觉得倒也不至于如此悲观啦…至少我知道了流光忆庭这条线索？
E: It's not so bad... At least I know it has to do with the Garden of Recollection, right?

C: 这是什么？
E: What is it?

C: 好没意思。
E: How boring.

C: 好嘞，两位里边请，想吃点什么呢？
E: Alright, come on in. What would you like?

C: 准吧？我猜你平时还总说「规则就是用来打破的」之类的怪话。
E: Amazing, right? And I bet you always say something silly like "Rules are made to be broken."

C: 再过一会儿，怀炎将军就会在司辰宫中举行赠剑仪式。{NICKNAME}不去瞧瞧吗？
E: General Huaiyan will hold the sword-gifting ceremony at the Palace of Astrum soon. Are you interested, {NICKNAME}?

C: 你怎么赶来了，我一个人闯祸就好，不想连累你。
E: What are you doing here? Look, if I get into trouble, it's my problem. I don't want to drag you into it.

C: 话已经说完了，虽然有些对不住爷爷…我还是得熔了这把剑。
E: I've said my piece now. Even though it'll be tough for Grandpa... I still have to melt down the sword.

C: 在无数战斗之后，嗜血、嗔怒、畏怖的情绪被剑中的岁阳汲取，握住它的士兵不仅会继承剑技，还会共享杀戮的情绪，成了被剑操控的杀戮傀儡。
E: After countless battles, all the anger, fear, and bloodlust are soaked up by the heliobi within the swords. The soldiers wielding them not only gain strength, but they also become consumed by the malice, turning into puppets possessed by the swords.

C: …刚才我已经将自己在卡勒瓦拉取出孤云时经历的一切告诉了各位，想必云璃小姐现在也像我那时一样，被剑中流淌着的纯美所感动。
E: ...I've told you everything about my experience with Master Guyun on Kalevala. And now, I'm sure that Miss Yunli is as moved by the sword's flawless beauty as I was back then.

C: 容我纠正您的说法：我从未试图偷窃这件武器。身为伊德莉拉的骑士，我誓言安贫乐道，绝不占有超出必要的财物。
E: Please allow me to correct your statement: I never attempted to steal this weapon. As Idrila's knight, I've sworn to live in poverty and possess only what is necessary.

C: 所以，玫瑰是你故意留下的？
E: So, you intentionally left the rose petal behind?

C: 我…记得！我记得我的第一次死亡。步离人…把我的头切了下来。
E: I... I do! I remember my first death. The borisin... cut off my head.

C: 一张式样普通的古筝。琴身与琴弦似乎由某种特别的金属铸造。
E: An unassuming ancient guzheng, its body and strings appear to be crafted from a unique kind of metal.

C: 没有被撬动痕迹本身就是可疑的证据。
E: No, the fact that there are no signs of a break-in is suspicious in itself.

C: 「花火大人遇害案」？受害者不是星际和平公司的沙马里吗？
E: The Sparkle Murder case? Wasn't the victim Shamari from the IPC?

C: 我得向你表示感谢，「侦探助手」先生。不过…这次的谜题似乎有些奇怪。
E: I have to thank you, Mr. Assistant Detective. But... the puzzle this time is pretty strange.

C: 姑且算是吧。
E: Pretty much.

C: 我只是一介捕快，不清楚和本案无关的事情！
E: I'm just a lowly bailiff. I don't know anything except for this 'ere case!

C: 呃…是这样吗，感觉证据有点对不上号啊？要不，再想想？
E: Er... is that so? I feel like the evidence doesn't really match? How about you think it over again?

C: 打开看看吧。
E: Open it up and take a look.

C: 黑天鹅警探，您是想听听那些你们没猜到的解答吗？
E: Detective Black Swan, would you like to hear about the other answers that you didn't guess?

C: 玉兆嘛…就是玉兆啦！
E: A jade abacus is just... a jade abacus!

C: 本座说不算，自然就不算了。
E: Yes, but you needn't worry. You have my permission.

C: 请、请了！
E: Ugh... Please!

C: 让我瞧瞧，这儿是宙合阵。
E: Let me see, this is the Temporal Terminal.

C: 越是复杂的东西，操使起来越要追求简单——所谓「大道至简」，懂不懂？
E: The more complex something is, the more important it is to keep it simple. Don't you think?

C: 不会又要坑我们吧？
E: Has Kafka pulled one over on us again?

C: 也许是被施了强力的肥料？
E: Maybe someone applied a strong fertilizer?

C: 这么异常的能量…是「星核」。
E: Such extraordinary energy... It's the Stellaron.

C: ——有违规制。我也要提醒符卿，有仙舟而后有规制。危机之际，规制合用则用，不合用抛下便是。
E: A violation of the rules and regulations. I would like to remind you, Lady Fu, that the Xianzhou comes before its rules and regulations — all the more so in times of crisis.

C: 唉，看来只要它还在，咱们几个就寸步难行。
E: *sigh* As long as it's there, we can't get any closer.

C: 你听西衍先生讲了一折评书。他讲得相当精彩，时间很快就过去了。
E: You listen to Mr. Xiyan for a spell. His interpretation of history is fascinating, and time passes quickly while you were entranced by the storytelling.

C: 在下已经将更详细的内容整理成文了，如果你感兴趣的话，可以自己看看。
E: I've compiled the details into a written analysis. If you're interested, feel free to take a look.

C: 我备制了些药物，若是误了时间可不好啦，能否请你代劳，帮我送去？
E: I've already concocted some of the medicine in question, but there can't be any further delays. Could you assist me in ensuring it arrives on time?

C: 抱歉…
E: I'm sorry...

C: 星核？这不可能。
E: A Stellaron...? That's impossible.

C: 我管你什么法什么羊，反正跟我没关系。别在这儿捣乱了，神经病！
E: I don't care what it's called, cos it's not my business. Just stop causing trouble here, you nutcase!

C: 唉…你别见怪啊，大家都是心中有无比坚定的信仰和信念，才会吵起来的。
E: Ahhh... Please don't be offended. We argue only because of the firm conviction we hold in our hearts.

C: 钟珊说得有道理，就用「入帮试炼」来考验一下{NICKNAME}好了。
E: Zhongshan has a point. Let's test {NICKNAME}'s abilities through the newcomer trial.

C: 机器算不算生命，或者说生命算不算一种机器，这都是因人而异的定义罢了。放生嘛…如果是为了保护某些动物不受伤害，我也能理解。
E: Everyone defines machines and living things differently. About releasing the machines... If it's to protect certain animals from being harmed, then I can understand.

C: 这事得怪我们。
E: We're to blame for this.

C: 什么，她走了？怎么和我那三个放生帮的朋友一样，全都不告而别。
E: What? She left? Why did she, too, leave unannounced just like my three buddies?

C: 那是…被控制的幽府武弁……
E: Those are... possessed Wraith Wardens...

C: 闭嘴吧你。
E: Tsk, very funny...

C: 吼吼，第一次听到有人把胆怯夸成谨慎。假到令人作呕。
E: Ha, that's a funny way of describing cowardice. Nauseating.

C: 这绥园中异象频出，十王司也无法保护你们周全，我劝二位趁早离开。
E: Fyxestroll Garden is full of abnormalities — even the Ten-Lords Commission cannot guarantee your safety. I suggest you leave immediately.

C: 她好像很累……
E: She looks really tired...

C: 啊…大概是之前的治疗带来的副作用。
E: Ah... probably side effects from the prior treatment.

C: 感谢您…不过，我已经不需要那种东西了。
E: Thank you... but I don't need such a thing any longer.

C: 我有很不好的预感，要是我们留她一个人在这里的话，会有很不好的事情发生——咱们不能丢下她不管！
E: I've got a bad feeling that if we leave her alone here, something very bad will happen. We can't leave her alone!

C: 我需要一个新的自己。
E: I need a new me.

C: 哪有什么压力？放心吧，能打败我的只有我自己！
E: Me, stressed? Don't worry. I'm the only one who can beat me!

C: 颤抖着接过门票。
E: Receive the tickets with trembling fingers.

C: …您听，它来了——它终于要带我离开这片悲伤之地了。
E: ...Listen, it's here — it's finally taking me away from this place of sorrow.

C: 但你依然没有放手。
E: But you refuse to let go.

C: 她的情商怎么这么低啊？
E: Why's her EQ so low?

C: 当然，您想签在哪里？
E: Of course, where shall I sign?

C: 就算知道了这只是一场梦…那又如何？这个梦境世界足够真实，足以让大多数人沉浸其中、找到活着的感觉，不是吗？
E: Even if I know that this is a dream... So what? This dream world is realistic enough for many people to become immersed and feel alive, is it not?

C: 您、您是哪位？！住在这里的那位先生应该已经被…已经退房了才对啊？
E: Who... who are you!? The gentleman living in this room should have been... Ahem, he should have already checked out of this room?

C: 可惜只凭我自己无法改变任何事…我会在这里等您回心转意。
E: It is just a shame that I cannot change anything with my power alone... I shall wait here for your change of heart.

C: 我并不在意那些站不稳脚跟的诋毁，姬莲小姐——我只想切断这个悲哀的恶意轮回。
E: I no longer care about this baseless slander, Ms. Jillian... I just want to bring this cycle of sadness and malevolence to an end.

C: 芙洛拉——真的是她！
E: Flora... It's really her!

C: <size=36>我一直都爱着你啊！</size>
E: <size=36>I will always love you!</size>

C: 很抱歉，如您所见，我现在有些…忙碌。您有兴致的话，或许晚些时候我们可以多聊聊。
E: Sorry, as you can see, I'm a little... busy. If you're interested, perhaps we could talk properly a little later?

C: 冷芯先生，曾连续五年获得航行家协会评选的「最佳上司」称号，证明了他在人才管理领域的卓越成就。
E: Mr. Caldwick was awarded the title of "Best Superior" five years in a row by the Navigators Association, proving that he has garnered stellar performances in the domain of talent management.

C: …我喜欢垃圾桶。
E: ...I like trashcans.

C: 不错，匹诺康尼特色，而且…也不用担心有版权问题。
E: Not bad, a Penaconian hallmark, and... no worries about copyright infringement.

C: 船员的建议在这里挂上一幅您的画像，在您离航时，也能被所有船员看到。我们是一个团队，大家都想见到您——无论以什么样的方式。
E: The crew member suggests hanging a painting of you here. When you leave the airship, your presence will still be felt here. We are a team. Everyone wishes to see you, no matter the form.

C: 船长，目前大家的反馈与空艇杂务我已汇报完毕，我平时就在舵轮附近待命，有事的话我会再跟您汇报的。回见。
E: I've completed my report on all the feedback from the crew and the administrative staff of the airship. Usually, I'll be standing by the wheel of the airship. I'll report back if anything comes up. Until we meet again.

C: …列车长帕姆。
E: ...Pom-Pom, Conductor of the Astral Express.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，姑且不论您所说的消息是否属实…即便您所代表的星穹列车的确持有了集团的股权，这也不代表您可以……
E: {F#Madam}{M#Sir}, let's first put aside whether your statement is true... But even if the Astral Express has a stake in the organization and you represent that faction, it doesn't mean that you can...

C: 嚯嗬嗬…我看这也未尝不可！
E: Ohoho... I think that's not a bad idea at all!

C: 办不了。
E: I can't check you in.

C: 备忘录…备忘录…噢、噢噢，我找到了！<unbreak>135</unbreak>…是<unbreak>13527</unbreak>号房。
E: Memo memo memo... ah-ha — there it is! It's the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th... it's room number <unbreak>13527</unbreak>.

C: （那群人是…等等，那不是知更鸟小姐吗？）
E: (The crowd over there is... Hold on. Isn't that Miss Robin?)

C: 我和她是熟人。
E: I'm an acquaintance of hers.
...Wow!

C: 回到电视那里去吧……
E: Let's return to the TV...

C: 这次得多拍几张……
E: I must take more photos this time...

C: 谁教你们玩这种牌的？
E: Who taught you this game?

C: 哼，谢谢云璃姑娘高抬贵手，保全我罗浮剑士的面子。
E: Hmph, such gracious generosity, Yunli. You really helped me save face as the Luofu swordmaster.

C: 去哪里都可以，青雀小姐你们说了算。
E: We can go wherever. Miss Qingque, you call the shots.

C: 师傅竟然选择了我，留在了工造司，却没有去星际和平公司吗……
E: He chose me and stayed at the Artisanship Commission. He gave up the Interastral Peace Corporation...

C: （交出邀请函）
E: (Hand over the invite)

C: {NICKNAME}，看不出来你还是个诗人。
E: {NICKNAME}, I didn't know you were a poet.

C: 我，必须完成它，这样才能让一切有意义。
E: I have to complete it, to make everything worthwhile.

C: 不可能！绝不可能！如果有问题，一定是我自己的错，不会是我老师的错。
E: No way! That's impossible! If there's a problem, it must be my fault.

C: 我来试试？
E: Let me try.

C: 以前是有过的，但是，这既然是老师最后一份设计稿了……
E: He did, but this is, after all, his last manuscript...

C: 是喔。过问死生之事，十王司能答应吗？
E: Right. Will the Ten-Lords Commission allow us to meddle in matters of life and death?

C: 我可是无名客…
E: I'm the Nameless...

C: 怎么了，不愿意？
E: What? You don't want to?

C: 关于卢卡，有些事想问你。
E: I wanna ask you some things about Luka.

C: 那大概是…六年，不对，七年之前？当时我带着一帮弟兄在隔壁熔锤镇巡逻，正好路过一个不起眼的工匠铺子。
E: That was... six? Seven years ago? I was patrolling with some comrades in the neighboring town of Moltammerville — we passed an ordinary mechanics shop.

C: 不会是你干的吧…
E: Whoa, hold up! That sounds sus. You didn't do it, did you?

C: 希儿怎么看？
E: What do you think, Seele?

C: …真佩服你们师徒俩，心够大的。既然事关裂界，那的确一秒都拖不起。怪物出没的地方在哪，赶紧带路吧。
E: Like master, like student... I admire your attitude. In any case, if this concerns the Fragmentum, then there's no time to lose. Where are the monsters? Lead the way.

C: 「熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——」
E: "The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion..."

C: 许久不见了，星穹列车的朋友们，不知各位的开拓之旅是否顺利？
E: It's been a while, my friends on the Astral Express. How's your trailblazing expedition going?

C: 去匹诺康尼之前大家也是这么说的！「在『家族』的保护下不会有任何危险～」
E: But that's what everyone said before we went to Penacony! "You'll be totally safe under The Family's protection!"

C: 彦卿说，将军派他来接咱们，可他人在哪儿呢？
E: Yanqing said General Jing Yuan sent him to welcome us, but where is he?

C: 这倒是个好主意。梦境中尽是些恒常不变的人造景观，但这鳞渊境却是「自然」侵蚀「人造」而缔造的独特风景。
E: That's indeed a good idea. While the Dreamscape on Penacony is all artificial, Scalegorge Waterscape is a celebration of nature's resurgence. It has some remarkable scenery.

C: 怪不得这位队长，是朱明使节舰太过热心了。
E: Please don't blame this captain. This incident involves the Zhuming's diplomatic vessel.

C: 我的弟子，彦卿。只因年纪尚浅，晚辈让他待在身边充任侍卫，希望能让他多受历练。这次演武仪典，他会代表罗浮云骑守擂竞锋，接受四方挑战。
E: Yanqing, my apprentice. He remains by my side as my retainer due to his youth, which I hope will season him with experience. He will stand for the Luofu's Cloud Knights in the upcoming Wardance, ready to take on all kinds of challenges.

C: 你挠了挠头，忍不住为彦卿即将到来的苦难头皮发麻。就在你分神的片刻，少女已自顾自不知去向。
E: You scratch your head, feeling a tingling sensation on your scalp at the thought of the impending troubles Yanqing will face. While you're distracted, the young girl has already wandered off on her own, her whereabouts unknown.

C: 好问题，他就在这边，不如你亲自问他？
E: Good question. He's right there, so why don't you ask him yourself?

C: 没想到还能和你再相见，斯科特先生～我还挺怀念咱们在金人巷的对手戏～也许这就是我们之间的缘分吧。
E: I didn't expect to see you again, Mr. Skott! We had such fun in Aurum Alley last time. It seems our paths are destined to cross once more.

C: 与其讲道理不如直接发疯
E: Just skip the reasoning part and resort to good old violence.

C: 你看看这柄飞剑吧，就算我现在还给你，不消一时三刻，它也迟早被人夺了去。
E: Just look at this flying sword. Even if I give it back to you now, it'll just be taken away again in a few hours.

C: 怎么样？两位准备好了么？
E: So, are you both ready?

C: 我不想说的太失礼…但是，这场连续剧看了那么久，我还真想瞧瞧，他们俩到底谁胜谁负。
E: Not to be rude or anything... We've been watching their drama. I'm dying to find out who beats who.

C: 本姑娘一言既出，星槎难追！既然答应了好好学，就从今天开始！
E: Fine. A promise is a promise. Since I promised to study hard, I'll do my best starting today!

C: 我明白了。那鄙人就先告辞了，祝二位明日擂场，各得所愿。
E: I understand. Well, I'll take my leave. I wish you both the best of luck in the ring tomorrow.

C: 啊，对不住，我这就把小不点们带走。
E: Ah, sorry, I'll take the little ones away right now.

C: 你们听到箱子旁有脚步声不断来回。如果在此时有人打开货箱，一定能瞧见你们可笑的躲藏姿态。万幸，事情没有发生。
E: You hear footsteps pacing back and forth beside the crate. If someone were to open the crate at that moment, they would certainly catch you in your ridiculous hiding position. Fortunately, that doesn't happen.

C: 斥候送来的情报说，那东西…不是步离人。那是一个自诩「长生主使者」的女人，「十二重面目，十二对獠牙，残酷如猛毒，变化如流沙」。步离人相信她将为他们带来重新崛起的机会。
E: According to the report, this entity... isn't actually a borisin. It's a woman claiming to be the Messenger of the Master of Immortality. She's described as having "twelve faces and twelve pairs of fangs, as cruel as poison and as elusive as quicksand." The borisin believe she'll give them a chance to rise again.

C: 前往阴寒狱层
E: Go to the Grimfrost Hold Floor

C: 这儿可没什么囚笼啊？
E: Shouldn't there be a cage here?

C: 口出狂言！受死吧！
E: How presumptuous! Die now!

C: 那些和我一样伪装的弟兄们会为您的逃离准备船只。按照计划，我们总共有两个时辰离开这儿。
E: The rest of my crew, who are undercover like me, will secure the vessels for our escape. According to the plan, we only have four hours to get out of here.

C: 守住此地。
E: Hold your position here.

C: 依照计划，仪典将于三个时辰后召开，竞锋舰会即刻启动，允许观众登舰观赛。
E: According to the plan, the ceremony will begin in six hours. The Skysplitter will be activated, and all visitors will board the ship to watch the contest.

C: 可如今呼雷下落不明，一切充满了变数。
E: But now, with Hoolay's whereabouts unknown, everything is filled with uncertainty.

C: 两位，「演武仪典」的召开不容有失。我要托付你们的绝不只是擂台上的胜负荣辱，还有竞锋舰的安全。
E: We can't afford to have any problems during the Wardance. I'm entrusting you not only with the honor of the ring, but also with the security of the Skysplitter.

C: 是我让彦卿挑个能吃饱喝足的地方。在「巡猎」之前，猎人也得做好万全准备。
E: Yes, I suggested to Yanqing that we find a place to have a decent meal. A hunter must be well-fed before "the hunt."

C: 犯人逃离的情况我已有数，说说幽囚狱眼下的状况吧。
E: I've grasped the situation of the prison break. Now, tell me more about the current state of The Shackling Prison.

C: 就从那些伪装成狐人的步离人开始。
E: Let's start with those borisin disguised as foxians.

C: 不过在我看来，持明龙师实在算不上什么幕后黑手。那位看透了罗浮之内的种种裂痕，策动药王秘传叛乱，导致建木重生的绝灭大君——幻胧，她才是这一切背叛的根由。
E: However, I don't think the Preceptors are the true masterminds. If I'm not mistaken, the one behind all this treachery is the Lord Ravager who exploited the weaknesses within the Luofu and instigated the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, ultimately leading to the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection — Phantylia.

C: 把这小子嘴里塞上青椒，入锅煮了。
E: Stuff the kid's mouth with the green peppers and cook him alive in a pot.

C: （我就知道…这家伙是在试探我。）
E: (Just as I suspected... he's testing me.)

C: 那就让我来告诉你，你想知道的答案。
E: Well, then let me tell you the answer you seek.

C: 好了，轮到你告诉我…这位「天击将军」的一切了。
E: Alright, now it's your turn to tell me... everything about the Merlin's Claw.

C: 不过，越是准备周详的计划，一旦被打乱，作出反应的时间也就越长。步离人中如果还有想赌一把，坚持原计划出逃的，一定会回到这里确认迴星港的情况。
E: However, the more well-prepared a plan is, the longer it takes to adjust when it's disrupted. If any borisin wants to stick to the original plan despite the risks, they'll surely come back to Stargazer Navalia to check the situation.

C: 求求你…救…我……
E: Please... save... me...

C: 云璃师父，我还是退赛吧。
E: Master Yunli, I think I should drop out of the contest.

C: 你好，我有些问题需要咨询！
E: Hello, I have some questions I'd like to ask you!

C: 你在想一些不切实际的东西。
E: You're daydreaming about stuff that ain't gonna happen.

C: 远看这竞锋舰很小，登上一看，比想象的还要小。
E: The Skysplitter looks small from a distance, but it's even smaller than I imagined now that I'm on board.

C: 很感谢你接受采访，谢谢！
E: Thank you very much for accepting my interview. Much appreciated!

C: 咱们也算是托工作的福…
E: I guess we got pretty lucky with this job...

C: 云璃小姐，三月小姐！两位这边走！
E: Miss Yunli, Miss March! This way, please.

C: 狩猎可不是什么游戏。它是一场你死我活的战争，准备好受死了吧？孽物！
E: Hunting is not a game, it is a battle of life and death. Are you ready for your death, abomination!?

C: 三月七是谁？
E: Who's March 7th?

C: 像我这样的侍卫，不过是将军身旁一个微不足道的影子。但椒丘不同，若没有他的悉心治疗，便不会有今日的将军。
E: A retainer like myself is nothing more than an insignificant shadow who stands by the general's side. But Jiaoqiu is different. Without his careful treatment, the general wouldn't even be here today.

C: 现在投降还不算晚。告诉我，呼雷…还有，椒丘去了哪儿？
E: It is not too late for you to surrender. Tell me... where are Hoolay and Jiaoqiu?

C: 省省力气吧，曜青的猴子。所有的野兽都明白一个道理，为了摆脱陷阱，就算扯断臂膀也在所不惜。今天，我将成为这只臂膀。
E: Save your energy, Yaoqing monkey. If there is one principle that we beasts know well, it is that we might have to break off an arm to break free from a cage. Today, I will be that arm.

C: 我数十个数，再不出来，我就把船砸了哦？
E: I'm going to count down from ten. If you do not come out, I will destroy the ship.

C: 等等，就算步离人变形伪装，也变不了我这样的小个子吧！快把剑收起来。
E: Wait! Even though the borisin can disguise themselves, they can't turn into someone as short as me! Put your sword away.

C: 仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
E: Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...

C: 那样也好！既然做好了送死的准备，来吧，尽你们所能——让我尽兴吧！
E: That's fine too! Since you have all prepared for your deaths, come, give me all you've got — entertain me!

C: 好惊人的力量——
E: Such insane power...

C: 不必挣扎了，呼雷。回到幽囚狱，你有足够的时间被懊悔折磨。
E: Stop struggling, Hoolay. There's plenty of time for you to be tortured by your regrets when you go back to The Shackling Prison.

C: 这怒火…真让人怀念啊。我知道，它寻求的从来不是胜利，而是狩猎本身。
E: This rage... I remember the taste. I know that it was never victory that it thirsted for, but the hunt itself.

C: *咆哮*
E: *roar*

C: 我会撕开你的伪装，让你认清自己的卑怯无能，呼雷！
E: I will tear back your disguises and show you how cowardly and powerless you truly are, Hoolay!

C: 涛然…长老？我被放逐时，你已接近转世寿限。可…如今你怎么成了这般模样？
E: Taoran... Elder Taoran? I remember when I was exiled, you were on the verge of passing on. What's with this new look?

C: 但是长老的所为，超出了求生者应行的界限…犹如只知「繁育」的兽，却没有一丝人心慈爱可言。
E: But Elder, your actions have gone beyond mere survival... You've become a beast driven solely by the Propagation, devoid of even a hint of empathy.

C: 褪鳞之刑？
E: Exuviation?

C: 我知道了，灵砂姐姐。
E: Got it, Lingsha.

C: 飞霄将军刚从静养病房里溜走了，她自以为身手了得。整个丹鼎司上下动静我可一清二楚。
E: General Feixiao just slipped out of the recovery room. She thinks she's so sneaky, but I know everything that happens in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 原来你也在啊。
E: So you were here too.

C: 玉阙仙舟的深处，一座古老的「钟」被人敲响。它漾开的余波滑过了引力的丘壑。
E: An ancient "bell" has been struck in the depths of the Xianzhou Yuque, its soundwaves rippling over the valleys and hills of gravity.

C: 而真正的目标…是想借此得到面见元帅的机会，献上他们擘画的「与神相争之策」——这一点千真万确。
E: Their real aim was to secure a meeting with the marshal to present their Godslayer Protocol — a strategy they firmly believe in.

C: 再次感谢陛下。我们先回酒店准备谈判了，下次再见。
E: Thank you once again, Your Majesty. We will return to the hotel to prepare for the negotiations. See you next time!

C: 嘿嘿～生在帝王家嘛，耳濡目染。
E: Tee-hee! I was born into imperialty, after all. Just putting what I've learned and heard to practice.

C: 将军，记得吗？朕只是你们手中的傀儡，如何做得出这么残酷的事？
E: General, do you remember? I was a puppet dancing in all your hands — how could I ever commit such a brutal deed?

C: 如此危险的差事，朕怎么会让你白干呢？但朕要批评你一句——你干得有些过火了。
E: How could I not reward you for such an important mission? But I do have some words of criticism — you overdid it this time.

C: 你是将死之人，朕宽恕你的失言。
E: Since you're about to die, I will forgive your verbal indiscretion.

C: 叛军马上就要打进来了…若不是你做的好事，他们会有卷土重来的机会吗？
E: The traitorous army has almost breached this place... If it weren't for you, would they even have had a chance to rise again?

C: 朕在匹诺康尼做了这么多好事，现在又甘愿回国接受审判…这能赎清朕的罪孽吗？
E: I've done so much good in Penacony, and am now willing to return to my kingdom to face judgment... Will this atone for my sins?

C: 哦对，忘了告诉你…查德威克，他以前的确是天才俱乐部的成员。
E: Oh, I've forgotten to tell you... Chadwick was indeed a member of the Genius Society back then.

C: 走吧，我们去前台询问查德威克的下落。
E: Let's head to the reception and ask about Chadwick's whereabouts.

C: 这就是查德威克博士的房间。
E: This is Dr. Chadwick's room.

C: {RUBY_B#存护}琥珀王{RUBY_E#}刚刚挥锤，宣告了一个新世纪的开始，也代表传说中的寰宇巨灾愈发迫近……
E: The {RUBY_B#Preservation}Amber Lord{RUBY_E#} just swung their hammer, announcing the beginning of a new era. It means that the legendary cosmic catastrophe is drawing close...

C: 我想，我们每个人都有权选择自己生活的方式。我们可以放弃那些会令自身迷惘的「冗余思考」，只把视线投向自己身前之物，和自己擅长的领域。
E: I think we're all free to choose the life we prefer. We can put aside those redundant thoughts that distract us and focus on our tasks at hand and areas of expertise.

C: 你能感受到我吗？
E: Can you feel me?

C: 这一路上辛苦你了，查德威克博士。现在，如果你不介意——就由我们来陪你走完这最后一段吧。
E: You've been through a lot, Dr. Chadwick. Now, if you don't mind, please let us be with you as you make your way to the end.

C: 查德威克博士的梦魇成为了现实。他的肉身死去之时，公司用忆庭提供的先进技术提取了他大脑中的忆质，并将其封存在了忆泡之中。
E: What Dr. Chadwick dreaded the most became reality. After his demise, the IPC extracted the memoria in his brain with the advanced technology provided by the Garden of Recollection and sealed it in a Memory Bubble.

C: 那现在呢？
E: What about now?

C: 你无法想象一个正常人能长期生活在如此之低的室温下。
E: You can't imagine a normal person living in a space so cold.

C: 非常整洁的房间…
E: A very tidy room...

C: 带我们醒来吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's wake up, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 滴答，湛蓝爵士不对劲！
E: Tick-tock, something's wrong with Dr. Blues!

C: 当然可以，家族在「太阳的时刻」设立了折纸大学，等到开课之日，我一定会欢迎你来旁听筑梦课程的。
E: Of course you may. The Family has established the Paperfold University in the Moment of Sol. When classes start, I'll be sure to welcome you to sit in on our dreamweaving course.

C: 你是隐夜鸫的筑梦师？
E: You are a Nightingale Dreamweaver?

C: （向湛蓝爵士展示泛黄的相片）
E: (Show Dr. Blues the faded photo)

C: 钟表把戏，强制启动！
E: Clockwork, forced activation!

C: 哈哈，你说的也是，毕竟…咱俩也不怎么正常。
E: Haha, you're right. I mean... neither of us is normal either.

C: 被迷因袭击的乔伊，在实验中失踪的冯恩，还有被你们打压的费歇尔…这些都是为了「安全」？
E: Joey was attacked by memes, Vaughn went missing during an experiment, and Fischer was being muzzled by you lot... Was that for safety too?

C: 咱们快走吧！
E: We have to run!

C: 但你是哪位？
E: But you are?

C: 此后，筑梦师会并入「家族」的管理下——但我们保下了折纸大学。以后所有的筑梦师都可以在那里学习，我们也可以更好地保护我们的成员！我——
E: From now on, the Dreamweavers will be managed by The Family — but we've kept the Paperfold University. In the future, all the Dreamweavers will be able to study there, and we will be able to protect our members better! I...

C: 乔伊曾说，筑梦是一首写在梦中的诗，将这处荒芜之地变为一片美梦，变为能为所有人带来幸福的家……
E: Joey once said that weaving dreams is like writing a poem within a dream, turning this desolate wasteland into Dreamjoy, into a home that brings happiness to all...

C: 正因珍视——才不能用虚伪之物替代。
E: Because it's precious — It should not be replaced by something false.

C: 好心的客人，能帮我们一起拍张合照吗，啾啾？
E: Kind guest, could you help us take a group photo, tweet tweet?

C: 又见面了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: We meet again, {F#madam}{M#sir}.

C: 是的，我已经调查完了。
E: Yes, I'm done with the investigation.

C: （乔伊与冯恩，看样子是「妃色夫人」与「黄金公子」的原型…跟着他们，应该就能了解湛蓝爵士的过去。）
E: (Joey and Vaughn, looks like they're the original Lady Vermilion and Young Master Gold... I can learn about Dr. Blues' past if I follow them.)

C: （筑梦师们的黄金年代就此结束了……）
E: (The Dreamweavers' golden age has ended here...)

C: 你向惠特克爵士转述了那个属于筑梦师的逐梦年代——以及那些文字并未记载的，最真实的他们。
E: You tell Sir Whittaker about the Dreamchaser era that belonged to the Dreamweavers — and the truest form of those people, which was unrecorded in history.

C: 别在那儿狡辩了。除了你，今天还有谁碰过它？你必须赔偿我的损失！
E: Stop making excuses, no one else touched it besides you that day. You will pay for my losses!

C: 那、那是按摩！我看它状态不对，估计平时没少挨累，就想帮它缓解一下……
E: I—I was massaging it! I noticed something off with its behavior, surmising that it was overworked, and wanted to ease its pain...

C: 你…算了，今天的事就先不追究了。但千万别再让我见到那个外邦人搞事！
E: You... Fine, I'm not pursuing this matter today. Just don't let me catch that outlander doing anything funny!

C: 你也是乐子人？
E: You're also looking to revel in others' misery?

C: 那么，<color=#dbc291ff>你愿意用自己桌上的一个苹果，去换陌生人的一条生路吗？</color>
E: Then, <color=#dbc291ff>are you willing to relinquish an apple on your table, in exchange for a stranger's survival?</color>

C: 苏克提瑞斯沉默了片刻，仿佛在思考一道由弟子抛出的谜题。
E: Soctires is silent for a moment, as if contemplating a conundrum that his student threw his way.

C: 眼下他们没有多少食物，又因为刚才的袭击而急需药物。我们可以暂时为他们提供这两样东西，等伤员痊愈之后，再把他们送去避难所。
E: They haven't much food to begin with, and that last attack has left them in urgent need of emergency medical supplies. We can provide them with these two for now. When their wounded are healed, we can escort them to the shelter.

C: 这是你最后一次看见这个商贩。在把货箱交给你之后，她便朝着远离市场的方向狂奔，直到消失在视野尽头。
E: This is the last time you see this peddler. After giving you the crate, she sprints off into the distance, far away from the market, and fades beyond the horizon.

C: 别看了，再看也不会有区别的…唉，随你吧。
E: Forget that, it won't make a difference... Bah, it's your call.

C: （后来苏克提瑞斯邀请我详谈此事。在云石天宫的浴池里，我表达了<color=#dbc291ff>对外邦人的反感</color>。）
E: (Later, Soctires invited me to discuss this. I professed my <color=#dbc291ff>repulsion toward the outlanders</color> at the bath in the Marmoreal Palace.)

C: 公民们陷入了短暂的沉默，主要是因为你的发言太过「新锐」，没人能理解其逻辑。
E: The citizens fall into a temporary silence, mainly because your argument is too avant-garde for them to grasp its logic.

C: 随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了拉莱德的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，感到热情高涨……
E: As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Liluder's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the exchange that just happened, fervor still pulsing through them...

C: 有宝物？不早说！
E: There's a treasure? Why didn't you say sooner!

C: 帕里斯…
E: Paris...

C: 呃…最近手头比较紧，先以此物表达我的心意…我们快走吧，不然她得唠叨到幕匿时了！
E: Ughh... Things have been a bit tight lately. Take these as a token of my gratitude for now... We need to hurry off, or she'll nag me till Curtain-Fall Hour!

C: 别开这种玩笑了，若不是往日的恩情，我连与她对话的资格都没有。
E: Don't joke like that. If I had not saved her life, I would not even have the right to speak with her now.

C: 啊，无姓无名的造物。
E: Ah, nameless creation.

C: 哎呀，这可糟了……
E: Oh no, that's not good...

C: 是纷争，纷争已经来到，相撞的刀枪在讴吟，被切开的骨肉在歌啸。
E: It is strife. It has come. The clashing of blades sounds like singing, a chorus of flesh cleaved from bone.

C: 祝福你，加油！
E: You have my blessings. Go for it!

C: 帕里斯，不要再被那颗带来灾厄的祸星蛊惑了！我已经让你做了错事，绝不能再让你错下去！
E: Paris. You must not allow yourself to be bewitched by this bringer of calamity any longer! I have already allowed you to make one mistake. I cannot allow you to continue!

C: 阿卡…迪亚。
E: Arca... dia.

C: 第三个、第四个、第五个…你不知疲倦地残害着你的同乡，却没有一箭射向奥赫玛人。
E: Number three, number four, number five... You ceaselessly hurt your own kin without stopping for rest. Yet your bow never aimed at any citizen of Okhema.

C: 因她那双失明的眼睛，我们甚至一度怀疑，她也是黄金裔的一员。要不，就是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属。
E: We even once suspected her to be one of the Chrysos Heirs because of her blind eyes. Either that, or one of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin.

C: 圣城的大家都很照顾我，但他们的搜寻全都无功而返。可如果是你的话——欧洛尼斯的赐福或许会指引你找到它。
E: Everyone in the holy city takes care of me, yet their searches yield nothing. If it's you — perhaps Oronyx's blessing will lead you to it.

C: 他们为何不放你自生自灭？因为仅剩的一点点良心。不过这也不重要，他们大概全都死在了黑潮里。
E: Why do they not leave you to your devices? Because they have a mere tinge of conscience left in them. But that is not important, for they are probably all dead in the black tide's deluge.

C: 我已经不想再反抗了。
E: I do not wish to resist any longer.

C: 遗失的记忆和声音越来越清晰了，就在前面。
E: The missing memory and sound are getting clearer. They are right in front.

C: 那就去吧，去播撒文明的种子，创造属于你的故事。
E: Go ahead then, and sow the seeds of civilization. Create a story that belongs to you.

C: 嘻…我承认刚才在陪虎克闹着玩。她就是想见你一面，孩子们都这样。
E: Hehe... I admit I was just playing around earlier. She just wanted to see you. Children are all like that.

C: 可他们没有太阳，只有一种叫「黎明机器」的东西，背在最高的造物引擎身上。
E: But they had no Sun, only something called the "Dawn Device" mounted on the back of the tallest Engine of Creation.

C: 我可以给你一个承诺：《如我所书》一事，天舶司必将鼎力协助。
E: I can make you a promise that the Sky-Faring Commission will provide its full support for matters relating to As I've Written.

C: （叫好）。
E: (cheer)

C: 泰坦、轮回、「智识陨落」…想象力倒是挺丰富。
E: Titans, cycles, "Fall of the Erudition"... Quite the imagination there.

C: 终于，播种之旅告一段落，你回到了星穹列车……
E: At last, your journey of sowing has reached its end, and you return to the Astral Express...

C: 嘘，听了不就知道了！
E: Shh, just listen and you'll find out!

C: 我完成了一趟开拓。
E: I completed a Trailblaze journey.

C: 邂逅了无比珍贵的同道。
E: Met precious kindred spirits.

C: 这是你要的零件。
E: Here are the parts you want.

C: 「网上冲浪」？还有这个说法啊，以前我联网都是为了更新自身固件的版本，等我查询一下，请稍等。
E: "Net Surfing"? So this is a term on the internet. I thought the internet exists to provide me with upgrades and learning materials. One second, let me check.

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 嗯…足够友善，还表露了我对别人的关注，不错不错！
E: Hmm... Friendly enough, plus it demonstrates that I care about others. Not bad!

C: 吃饭事小，但机器人到底出了什么事，你们必须查清楚，免得留下什么隐患！
E: It's one thing to eat late, but you need to figure out what exactly happened with the robots so this won't happen again!

C: 不，餐品是由我们服务科制作的，它们负责配送。
E: No, our Service Department makes the meals. The robots just deliver them.

C: 你怎么会这么问？喔，我懂了…你误会了，我可没偷懒……
E: Why are you asking? Oh, I get it... No, I didn't slack off...

C: 呜呜……
E: Woooo...

C: 非要说细节的话…或许是周围环境很暗？而且感觉自己头重脚轻…哎呀，好像都是我熬夜之后带来的坏毛病，不算细节，当不了伏笔。
E: Details... Maybe it was just really dark? And I felt lightheaded... But those are probably the results of me staying up all night. They aren't details that work as foreshadowing.

C: 我听说就在这附近有个家伙捡了个什么玩意？总之就是能带来好运的东西，从此走向人生巅峰。
E: I heard someone picked something up around here? Something that can bring good luck? They got some big breaks after picking it up.

C: 你过几天记得来找我，这次调查怎么说也有你的功劳，过来拿一份研究报告，就当纪念吧。
E: Come back to find me in a few days. Since you've contributed to the investigation, you should get a copy of the investigation report as a memento of your effort.

C: 呃…所以呢？这和我有什么关系？
E: Uh... so what? What does it have to do with me?

C: 我的心中没有任何杂念，只想交一个真心朋友。反倒是我接触的那些人顾忌太多，或是对我的家世怀有疑问，或是对我抱持着无中生有的偏见。
E: I have no other intentions. I just want to make true friends. It was the people I came into contact with... They were too cautious. Some of them had suspicions about my family background, and some held prejudices against me for no reason.

C: 这是…我之前订的生活物资？
E: This is... the supplies I ordered earlier?

C: 你、你在说啥呢？没有证据的话可不要瞎说哦……
E: Wh—What are you talking about? You can't just say things like that without any proof...

C: 老奶奶吃下了快递包裹里的头晕药……
E: Grandma had the medicines contained in the package...

C: 等会儿，站住——你是谁？难道是非法闯入者？
E: Wait a minute, stop — who are you? Are you an intruder?

C: 这…这写出来谁信啊？算了，我还是写点稍微靠谱的东西吧。
E: This... Who would believe this? Forget it, I'll just write something a little more realistic.

C: 那…我的战功勋章是不是……
E: Then... that means my medal of service...

C: 你们见着莉拉了吗？把我的信转交给她了没？她说什么了吗？
E: Did you go see Lila? And did you give her my letter? What did she say?

C: 最名贵的花…您要送花的对象，她的身份肯定很尊贵吧？
E: The most precious... I assume you're sending flowers to a person of very high status?

C: 还说你没在演话剧…
E: Aren't you being a bit too dramatic?

C: 不行，这口气我可咽不下！去，你现在就给我回去，把正确答案告诉那个出题的！直接拍他脸上！
E: Nope, I can't keep schtum any longer: Go back! You go back — right now — and tell them the correct answer! Right in their face!

C: 但是，在你面前还有最后一道难关。
E: However, there's one last hurdle that stands before you.

C: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
E: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.

C: 我就知道，你这样能答对这么多题目的人，不会是那种赶都赶不走的…科研爱好者。
E: I knew that a person like you who can answer questions correctly would be different from those other pesky... science enthusiasts.

C: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
E: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

C: 是「兹事体大」！
E: No, it made me "realize"...!

C: 现在你也遇到了波瓦大臣，败给了他的那些鬼题…这下你知道我平时有多憋屈了吧！
E: You've met the inscrutable Minister Bova now and his cryptic questions — so now you know how frustrating things usually are for me!

C: 别别别，你别走啊，我就只能指望你了！谁叫你跟那些庸俗的「非科学家」不一样呢！
E: D—D—Don't go! You're all I got! You're just so different from those barbaric "non-scientists"!

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。什么时候您又想活动活动脑筋了，欢迎再来找我。
E: It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. When you want to exercise your brain, please come again.

C: 那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？
E: Then I absolutely cannot let you down. I just so happen to have some advanced quiz questions right here with me. Would you like to give them a try?

C: 关于塔米拉…
E: About Tamila...

C: 说说看吧。
E: Go on.

C: …嗯？我们看的真的是同一本《雪国冒险奇谭》吗？
E: ...Hmmm? Are we talking about the same Tale of the Winterlands here!?

C: 你为小女子带来的情报虽然都很重要，但毕竟还是二手信息…等传到小女子耳朵里，那都成了三手信息啦~
E: All this intel you've brought me is fantastic, but it's still second-hand info... and by the time it reaches me, it's already third-hand...

C: 谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
E: Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 难不成真是…？
E: Could it be true...?

C: 小事一桩，我正好有个朋友…
E: Piece of cake. I've got a friend.

C: 这张证明就给你吧——但我可不保证它真能帮那位艾格尼斯小姐蒙混过关哦。
E: Here's the letter. No guarantees this will pass any detailed scrutiny, though.

C: 噢哟，不小心扯远了。总之，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
E: Anyways, that went off on a tangent. Thank you! These are your rewards...

C: 为了补偿你听我啰啰嗦嗦半天…这是我的一点心意，请你收下吧——我要回去工作了，有空再聊！
E: Here's a little something to compensate you for listening to me. I'm heading back to work now. See you later!

C: 什么？裂界？你在说什么……
E: What? Fragmentum? What are you talking about...

C: 爸爸、妈妈…你们去哪了……
E: Mom, Dad... Where did you go...

C: 多谢，年轻人。希望不会占用你太多时间。
E: Thank you, kid. I hope this won't take a lot of your time.

C: 怎么了，你想让我吃这个？这炒饭看着怪好吃的啊，你做的？
E: What, you want me to eat this? This fried rice looks pretty tasty. Did you make it?

C: 这话不太中听啊…
E: That's a bit rude...

C: 你在和我说话吗？
E: Are you talking to me?

C: …啧，说漏嘴了！
E: ...Tch, slip of the tongue.

C: 这东西…是叫「生命传输器」吗？真是了不起……
E: Is this thing called... Life Transmitter? What an amazing invention...

C: 对不…起……
E: I... I'm sorry...

C: 这个奇怪的人很有可能是放生帮的一员，作为海滩守护者，你理应好好盘问他一番。
