E: This weirdo could be a member of The Unshackled... as the Guardian of the Shoreline, you should question him.

C: 我是为了一件重要的事，非来不可。
E: I had to come here. I must do something very important.

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…今天还会有漂流瓶吗？）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... I wonder if there will be any drift bottles today?)

C: 这算哪门子「太上忘情」啊，你这明明是短暂失忆了！
E: "Forget" anything? You hardly remember anything!

C: 唔，莫不是我薄荷脑放多了所致……
E: Hmm... maybe I added too much peppermint...?

C: 呃，今天衣服穿得有些多，我家里人非跟我说得加件秋衣保暖，没办法，让你见笑——且慢，我方才出了这么多汗吗，连你都看到了……
E: Umm, perhaps it's because I'm wearing thick clothes today as my family insists that it's cold outside. Have I been sweating so much that you've noticed...?

C: 好像没什么特别的…
E: Nothing special, I guess...

C: 浴场的存冰室，低温浴池的浴液似乎出自于此。法吉娜的祝福让冷冻浴液始终保持着最佳的温度。
E: The ice storage room of the baths. Bath liquid in low-temperature pools apparently comes from here. Phagousa's graces allow frozen liquid to maintain its optimal temperature.

C: 不愧是圣城奥赫玛，人们在泡澡这等休憩时间都不忘阅读。不知道瑟希斯知道了会作何感想：它的信徒在浴池里读书，这究竟是对法吉娜的挑衅，还是对瑟希斯献上诚挚的爱？
E: This is the holy city of Okhema indeed — even in their baths, her people have their heads buried in reading books. You wonder what would Cerces think if it knew: Is it a taunt on Phagousa, or a tribute of their devoted love to Cerces, that the Titan's disciples are reading in the bath?

C: 总有人把这东西误认成冰。而当「纷争」眷属砸开他们脑壳的时候，这些家伙认错也晚了。
E: Some would always mistake this thing for ice. And when the Strife's Titankin smashed open their skulls, they would realize their mistake too late.

C: 自然条件下，被地下水充分浸泡的红土足够柔软，可以被轻松塑形；但只要将它晾干，其中硬化固结的难溶盐分就能让红土成为像砖石一样坚固的硬块，足以抵御风雨的侵蚀。
E: Under natural conditions, red clay that has been amply soaked in groundwater is soft enough to be shaped into any form. But once it is dried, the hardened insoluble salts within turn it into a block as durable as brick itself, capable of withstanding erosion from inclement weather.

C: 你正沉醉于阳台外的美景，草坪处却有一对情侣突然闯入，在注意到你的视线后又慌忙退了出去。
E: Your scenic reverie by the balcony is interrupted by a couple who has waded into the meadow. They flee in a flushed panic upon noticing your stare.

C: 你够不着。
E: You can't reach it.

C: 「我宣布个事」——犹豫再三，你还是没有喊出这句话。
E: "I have something to announce" — after a few moments of hesitation, you fail to shout out your declaration.

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 「铁墓」的影响遍及银河，为诸世界带来了沉重打击。危难当头，星际和平公司挺身而出，全面主持了受灾星球的重建工作。
E: With its reach spanning the cosmos, "Irontomb" delivered devastating blows to countless worlds. In response to this catastrophe, the Interastral Peace Corporation took decisive action, overseeing the restoration of all affected planets.

C: 「歌耳戈之子，告诉我，你心底藏着怎样的梦？只要一句愿望，我将为你展开奇迹。」
E: "Child of Gorgo, tell me, what dreams lie at the bottom of your heart? One wish, and I shall perform a miracle for you."

C: 金血随涧泉下降，黎明随云雾上升。
E: The golden blood flows down with spring waters, as dawn rises with the mists.

C: 或许艾格勒早已看透了一切的荒诞。
E: Perhaps Aquila has already seen through the absurdity of it all.

C: 欧利庞，不要说笑了，你比谁都相信迈德漠斯。
E: Do not be ridiculous, Eurypon. You have more faith in Mydeimos than anyone.

C: 闭嘴，欧利庞，你想让他像你一样，也犯下弑父之罪么？我与你做的约定，你可不要忘了。
E: Silence, Eurypon. You wish for him to commit patricide like yourself? You are not to forget the promise you made me.

C: 为了悬锋城的永续…已无回头路可走了。
E: For the eternal future of Castrum Kremnos... I have no other choice.

C: 巨树根系间透出温和的光芒，如同被时光包裹的旧日回响。或许这就是墨涅塔停留在此的意义——就算世界崩塌，总有被值得铭记的东西。
E: Gentle light filters through the giant tree's roots, like echoes of days wrapped in the shroud of time. Perhaps this is why Mnestia lingers here — to remind us that even when the world crumbles, there are always things worth remembering.

C: 好吧，如此简单而纯粹的愿望当然该得到满足。那么，就请坐上你的王位吧。
E: Alright, such a simple and pure wish deserves to be granted. So, go ahead and take a seat.

C: 石桥如同巨人的手臂横亘在深谷之上，将破碎的山体重新连结。远处的行人仿佛凝固在画中，与生机盎然的藤蔓一同点缀着这幅神话图景。
E: A stone bridge stretches across the abyssal chasm like a giant's arm, reconnecting the shattered mountain. In the distance, passersby seem frozen in time, adorning the mythic landscape alongside vibrant vines.

C: 但愿所有在命运的漫漫长路中求索的迷途者，都能在那鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重聚。
E: May all who have lost their way on the long path of fate meet again at the end of the west wind, where flowers bloom in spring.

C: 尼卡多利和艾格勒的战争旷日持久…听说布利萨人早就和悬锋人结怨了。
E: The battle between Nikador and Aquila waged for many years... I hear that the people of Bulsa have a long-held grudge against the Kremnoans.

C: 哎，快看，他出来了！
E: Ah, look! He's back!

C: 抱歉，让我们回到刚才的话题。
E: Sorry, let's pick up from where we left off.

C: 没错，生存就是地狱。
E: Yeah, survival is hell.

C: 泰坦…轮回……
E: Titan... Cyclicality...

C: 答错了吼！粉色小兔子知道的事情太多，超过了本狮的知识范畴吼！
E: Wrong answer! The little pink bunny knows more than I do — way beyond my knowledge!

C: 这里距离我们所生活的年代实在太过遥远，即使阿格莱雅大人的金丝也无法触及。为了更好地完成任务，我必须有自主判断力才行。
E: This place is far too removed from the era we once lived in. Even Lady Aglaea's golden threads cannot reach it. To better fulfill my tasks, I must possess autonomous judgment.

C: o((-'ω´-  )o「人，豹真心诚意地请教你，学习有什么诀窍吗？」)∋
E: o((-'ω´-  )o "Human, this seal humbly requests your wisdom. What's your tip for learning?" )∋

C: 身着绣金长袍的史官时不时抬头看向圣烛流转的光芒，仿佛在确认着它与壁画的关联。
E: The scribe in gilded robe peers up at the shifting glow of the candle from time to time, as if confirming its connection to the murals.

C: 但是……
E: But...

C: 嗯…神速硬币还剩十二枚。只是帮救世小子他们拖延时间的话，肯定够用了吧？
E: There are <unbreak>12</unbreak> Godspeed Coins left. It should be enough if I'm only buying time for the little Deliverer, right?

C: 还是说…你是有什么烦心事，想要找人倾诉一下？
E: Or perhaps... Is there something on your mind that you want to talk about?

C: 没了没了，不都说是门径的尽头了嘛——除非这世界重新来过，不然我也不知道上哪去给你找更多稀奇古怪的东西。
E: Nope, that's it. Didn't I just say it was the end of the Passage? Unless the world resets itself, I've got nowhere else to scavenge more weird and wonderful things for you.

C: 此地不宜久留。你看，这附近也没有圣城卫士，一不小心掉进去了，都不知道谁能来捞你。
E: This is definitely not the place to linger. Look around — there aren't even any Holy City Guards nearby. If you fall in, who's pulling you out?

C: 房间的一角散落着数篇卷籍——残破的「日记」、「岁月祭仪册」、「对塞纳托斯与冥岸的调查记录」、「金色未归」…「若虫食性考」？
E: Scattered in the corner are a collection of tattered texts: "Journals," "Chronicles of Time Rituals," "A Record on Investigations Regarding Thanatos and the Nether Shore," "The Golden Unreturned"... and, uh... "A Study on Nymph Diets"?

C: 会在「宇宙」里游泳！
E: Can swim through the "universe"!?

C: 一种完美是否会比另一种完美更加完美？一个圆形是否会比另一个圆形更加符合圆形的定义？这不过是对方辩友留下的陷阱，我不会回答这样的提问。
E: Can one form of perfection be more perfect than another? Can one circle be more "circular" than another? This is just a trap set by the opposing team, and I won't answer it.

C: 王储大人，你为何无视我，为何对忠诚赴死的战友们付以沉默？
E: Crown prince, why do you ignore me? Why do you stay silent before comrades who died loyally for you?

C: 好！缇安就坐在这里，乖乖等着小小蝶。只要看着这幅画，就绝对不会忘记朋友们了。
E: Alright! We will sit here and wait for Little Cas. While looking at this painting, we won't forget our friends.

C: 告别过去，就意味着接纳过去。
E: Saying goodbye to the past means accepting it.

C: 记得是谁说，要以彼之道还彼之身，你们的计划不也很精彩吗？
E: As someone once said, fight fire with fire. Your plan was rather splendid too, wasn't it?

C: 今天，我也学着仰望一下星空吧。
E: Today, I'll try looking up at the starry sky too.

C: 我都自愿放弃了，还偷它干嘛！
E: Why would I want to steal a material body? I gave up my own willingly!

C: 只有这些啦。我可没有荣幸保留亲睹那位大人的体验。
E: That's all I have. I don't have the honor of keeping the experience of seeing the Aeon, Fuli with my own eyes.

C: 为什么只有我能记得你？
E: Why am I the only one who remembers you?

C: 哔——啵。再见，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Beep-boop. Goodbye, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 最近怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 艾丝妲很担心你…
E: Asta is really worried about you...

C: （信号有点问题，我没法联系上小姐。）
E: (There's some problem with the signal — I can't contact Miss Asta.)

C: （陌生的气息就在这里…{NICKNAME}，过去看看吧？）
E: (There's a strange air about here... {NICKNAME}, come take a look?)

C: （原来丢失的「分装快乐」不止一套，另外一套的下落嘛…我找到线索了。）
E: (There is more than one Joy Filtration Set lost. As for the other set's whereabouts... I've found a clue.)

C: 你决定让佩佩钻到马桶里，但很可惜，以它的小短腿，努力过却并未成功。
E: You decide to let Peppy burrow into the toilet. Sadly, with its short little legs, the effort is in vain.

C: 很抱歉，你属于非人生物，无法为您开启大门。
E: Sorry, you are non-human. Not authorized to open the door.

C: 汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof woof!

C: （{NICKNAME}，我们回去再和他聊聊吧，看看他还有什么话要说，走！）
E: ({NICKNAME}, let's go talk to him more once we're back. We'll see what else he has to say. Let's go!)

C: 你怎么在这里？！
E: What are you doing here?

C: 这么晚了，还不睡呀？人家是该为深夜偶遇感到高兴，还是担心你作息不健康？
E: It's way past bedtime — why are you still up? Should I be glad for this midnight rendezvous, or concerned about your sleep schedule?

C: 说什么呢！自己讲睡前故事，不就完全睡不着了吗？如果是要哄{NICKNAME}睡觉，人家的呼呼声更管用哦。
E: What are you saying! If I told a bedtime story, I wouldn't be able to fall asleep at all! If it's to help {NICKNAME} sleep, though, my soft snores would work much better, hehe.

C: 这…可是，在过去的故事里，泰坦们也有自己的痛苦吧？因为它们的痛苦更…怎么说呢…更大？这样，反而会变得更容易忍受吗？
E: But... in the stories of old, the Titans also had their own suffering, right? Because their pain was... how should I say... greater? Would that somehow make it easier to bear?

C: （呃…流云渡也太危险了……）
E: (Uhh... Even Cloudford is too dangerous...)

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 到底是什么曲线？
E: What exactly is this curve you're talking about?

C: 稍等，我还有事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What's up?

C: 我可不能保证。
E: I can't guarantee it.

C: 嗯，你的水平勉强还可以。当然了，比我差远了。
E: Hm. Your skill is acceptable. Nothing comparable to mine, of course.

C: 也许好像有。
E: Maybe.

C: 当然，我知道自己很棒棒。
E: Of course. I know I'm awesome.

C: 我真的真的真的很不错！
E: I'm really, really, really awesome.

C: 准备好了么，我们继续下棋吧。
E: Are you ready? Let's resume playing.

C: 嗯嗯，等我们能自行运转起来后，就各自照看一个部门，共同维系空艇的秩序。
E: Uh-huh, once we're fully operational on our own, each of us will head a department and work together to keep the airship running smoothly.

C: 这么复杂的吗？
E: Why is it so complicated?

C: 重做之后，我们考虑过副标题要用「Remake」、「Rebirth」、「Remastered」还是「Return」、「Recall」……
E: After the remake, we considered whether to use the terms "Remake," "Rebirth," "Remastered," "Return," or "Recall" in our subheading...

C: 我想换成*普通难度*。
E: I'd like to change to *Normal Difficulty*.

C: 听说，在我们之前，也有许多迷钟被修复，得以继续完成他们的使命。
E: I hear that before us, there were also many Tickers that were fixed, so that they could continue to fulfill their duties.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望揭开世界的真相，正在寻找聪明的伙伴。金丝带来消息，它藏身于<color=#dbc291ff>一个隐秘的竹篮内</color>，得擦亮眼睛才能找到。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of unveiling the world's hidden truths and is searching for a clever companion. The golden thread brings tidings: They now conceal themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a secret woven basket</color>. Look closely, and you may discover them.

C: 再见，期待你的好消息。
E: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

C: 昨天的事，说来实在蹊跷。
E: Honestly, there's something fishy about what went down yesterday...

C: 那老伙计，一言不发多没意思…这世界上除了一致向阳的植物，总归还要有点醉醺醺、不守规矩的动物不是？
E: That old fellow, so silent and dull... This world needs more than just plants growing toward the sun — we need some tipsy, unruly creatures too, don't you think?

C: 万幸的是，您来了。这本应令人高兴，可一旦想到老巴特鲁斯为什么要这么做，我就再次悲伤起来……
E: Thankfully, you came. This should make me happy, but when I ponder why old Bartholos did this, my sorrow returns...

C: 它不在任何地方。可它也无所不在。它出发地很匆忙，你也许能从其他伙伴那里打听到它最后的故事。
E: It's nowhere and everywhere at once. It left in a rush — you might hear its final story from other companions.

C: 别闹了，把宝箱给我。
E: Stop the games and give me the chest.

C: 我闻到了宝藏的气息……
E: I smell treasure...

C: 没有的事。
E: Not true.

C: 啊？这么跳跃的？
E: That's... a huge leap.

C: 诶，凡事总要试试才知道有没有价值吧？如果演化神秘学的理论没错，那么人类或许至今都还保留着泰坦的全部感官，只是退化之后，自己完全意识不到罢了。
E: How will I know if I don't try? If Evoccultism is correct, modern humans still possess all the Titan senses, but we are unaware of them because these senses have atrophied.

C: 感谢阁下的宽宏大量。无论如何，在下还是会为后续的标本支付租借费用。
E: Thank you for your understanding. Regardless, I will still cover the borrowing costs for the remaining specimens as compensation.

C: 不想
E: No.

C: 我去去就回。
E: I'll be on my way then.

C: 您、您怎么抢我的台词呢！
E: Wait — why are you stealing my line!?

C: 封存余火的火种匣由三层秘术锁保护，{NICKNAME}阁下，只差最后一步…相信您一定能把它打开。
E: The Coreflame Casket holding the ember is sealed behind three layers of arcane seals. {NICKNAME}, this is the final step... I know you can do it.

C: 只有凯妮斯女士和「清洗者」知晓余火所在的火种匣。所以在您来之前，我利用被封存的一份遗物，独自完成了成为「清洗者」的仪式。
E: Only Lady Caenis and the Cleaner knew which Casket held the ember. So before you arrived, I used a sealed relic to perform the Cleaner's ritual on myself.

C: 谢谢…您说的是。我确实还不愿放弃…您愿意再尝试的话，我会再唤取一个火种匣，拜托您了！
E: Thank you... You're right. I don't want to give up yet. If you're willing to keep going, I'll summon another Coreflame Casket — please, I'm counting on you!

C: 幽灵一般上镜吗？
E: Can ghosts even be seen on camera?

C: 「『均衡』的『仲裁官』要交给你一项试炼…」许多回音续道，「为了诸界的平衡…展示你的力量，而我们仲裁；强大之人将获得机遇，弱小者亦有喘息之机。」
E: "The Arbitrators of the Equilibrium are giving you a trial." And the echoes continued, "For the equilibrium of all worlds, you must demonstrate your strength. The strong will be given greater opportunities, the weak a chance to breathe."

C: 而且，狐人和持明各有自己的告别仪式。我见过狐族战士将离世同胞安置在星槎里，任它飘向遥远的星辰——他们管这叫「正首青丘」。
E: The foxians and the Vidyadhara have their own ceremonies. Foxian soldiers place their dead in Starskiffs and then let them drift out into the stars. They call it "the Verdantia Returning."

C: 天年有尽，但凡生命皆有定数的极限。即便星神也难称不朽，终会抵达逝去的那一刻吧。
E: Every life has its limit. Even the Aeons are not truly immortal and will eventually reach the end of their lives.

C: 等等！别轻举妄动。
E: Wait! Let's think before we act.

C: 「我突然有了个绝妙的点子。」黑塔突然现身，「上一次，螺丝不是说模拟宇宙的存储功能还需要迭代吗？我们反而可以利用这次代码的漏洞，验证现在『内存』的极限！」
E: "I suddenly had a brilliant idea." Herta suddenly pops up. "Didn't Screwy say last time that the Simulated Universe's storage function still needs iterating? We can actually use the code errors this time to verify the limit of the current 'RAM'!"

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: Got some questions?

C: 嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……
E: Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.

C: 我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
E: I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.

C: [用来买东西。]
E: "Buy something."

C: 勉强能够接受。
E: A borderline acceptable solution.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「希望很快就能修复。」</color>男人诚恳地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「我真的很想你玩得愉快，真的。呃，再次向你道歉。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Hopefully very soon,"</color> the man says earnestly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I really want you to have a good time. Really. Um, once again, I'm really sorry about that."</color>

C: 这场面令人惊奇：这些太阳也变得奇怪，它比正常星寰下应存在的数量更多、温度更加热烈不堪！你发现…那一柄巨锤上掀起怒气的风暴！
E: The scene is a mind-blowing one. The Suns are abnormal, as they are more in number and higher in temperature than normal! You discover that... the giant hammer has conjured up a storm of rage!

C: 「还有『记忆』…真是奇怪，明明没有见到浮黎，却有无数记忆涌进了你的脑子。有人说『记忆』的命途正是在这一浩劫中出现的，为了留存诸星消亡的瞬间，倒是很合理——但太合理了，反而像虚构史学家编的。无论如何，我有点儿来兴致了。」
E: "And the Remembrance... Strangely, the memory fragments flood your brain even though there's no sight of Fuli. Now, it seems reasonable why some claim that the Path of Remembrance came about during this catastrophe to preserve the moment of the stars' demise. Yet, it is so reasonable that it sounds like it is made up by some History Fictionologist. Anyway, I'm intrigued."

C: 「一个没劲的普通人，虫潮和凶兽斗争的时候，他就被崩塌的楼埋下去啦。也没有模拟宇宙英雄来救…他在地震前还在打字！」黑塔突然灵感乍现，「螺丝咕姆，模拟宇宙也许需要模拟英雄。」
E: "He was just a boring, ordinary man. When the war between the Swarm and beasts broke out, he was buried in a collapsing building with no superheroes coming to save him... He was even working before the earthquake!" Herta seems to have a sudden flash of inspiration. "Hey, Screwllum! Maybe we need some simulated superheroes in the Simulated Universe."

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 「螺丝咕姆也会关注这趟研究！毕竟『寰宇蝗灾』的过程也和无机生命息息相关。」黑塔又说道，「如你所见：这『三个位面』分别对应三个不同的历史时期——而你现在所在的第一个时空里，『虫潮』才刚刚振翅。」
E: "Screwllum will follow this study closely too! After all, the process of the Swarm Disaster is also closely related to inorganic beings." Herta adds, "As you can see, the three planes correspond to three different historical periods. You're now in the first plane, and that is when the Swarm has just started."

C: 我能不掺和吗？
E: Can I not be a part of this?

C: 我不等迟到的人。
E: I don't wait for those who are late.

C: 劝她动手杀了你。
E: You persuade her to kill you.

C: 你心怀疑惑，在垃圾堆中匍匐前行。身为德•维恩的雇佣兵，你将自己变成了极致的*机械改造人*。你不甘心就此迎接报废的命运，至少在生命终结前，你要知道真相。然后你抬起头，看到了他——
E: You creep forward in a garbage pile with doubt in your mind. As De Wayne's mercenary, you have turned yourself into a perfect *cyborg*, and it is too early for you to be scrapped. You must at least find out the truth before your life comes to an end. Then, you look up and see him...

C: 筑城者的高墙终于能在众人的诘难中体现它的作用，人们赞扬你的高瞻远瞩，可你的心中却不由地闪过一丝落寞。建造堡垒的你，也是最不希望堡垒派上用场的人。
E: The high walls of the Architects can finally demonstrate their role under close scrutiny. People praise you for your vision, but you can't help but feel a shred of loneliness deep inside. You, the builder of this fortress, are also the one who least wishes to see it put into action.

C: 更别提，以它们的体型，想要在这里移动，和往冰箱里塞进大象没有什么区别。你抬起头，望向那几双血红的热成像传感器，大声挑衅。
E: Not to mention, trying to move around here at their size is like jamming an elephant into your fridge. Lifting your head, you look at the blood-red thermal imaging sensors and let out a provocative roar.

C: 当织布的缺口无法缝补，唯一的方法，便是为破坏者纺织死亡。
E: When the gap in the fabric is too vast to be stitched together, the only choice left is to weave death for those that destroy it.

C: 「这位朋友的审美独特而刁钻，但小小要求不在话下。」面具人打了个响指，一束灯光落在你身上，你惊惶地发现自己变成了祂手里的提线木偶。
E: "You have unique and cunning tastes, my friend. But your requests shall be no challenge." The masked man snaps his fingers as a beam of light falls upon you. Shocked, you realize that you have been transformed into a wooden puppet in the palm of his hands.

C: 其他学生开始窃窃私语，你必须做点什么，以挽救一场教学危机，但那个学生没有给你机会。
E: The other students begin to whisper among themselves. You must do something to avert an educational crisis, but that student will not give you a chance.

C: 记录实验数据。
E: Record experimental data.

C: 「如果说，走出知识圆圈，在未知中创造新的知识，是践行『智识』的道路，那她无疑走得比大多数同僚更远。」
E: "If we consider leaving the Circle of Knowledge and creating new insights from the unknown to be how one walks the Path of Erudition, then there's no doubt that she has gone farther than most of her peers."

C: 希冀独占遗产的斯坦德在唾骂中离场，星际能源学派提出调和式的建议——将<unbreak>95</unbreak>％的算力赐予四道足够伟大的寰宇难题。
E: Stander, who had hoped to usurp the legacy for himself, leaves amid the audience's curses. The School of Interstellar Energy Resources proposes a reconciliatory suggestion — to bequeath <unbreak>95</unbreak>％ of the computational power to the four sufficiently grand Cosmic Conundrums.

C: 你挥舞便携造物机的电源线，冲向纯粹造物学派的阵地，他们蛮横地将你打倒在地，面庞紧贴金属地面，低温的冰晶刺穿细胞。
E: You brandish the power cable of your portable creation machine, charging towards the School of Pure Creation's location. They roughly shove you to the ground, your face pressed tightly against the metal floor, chilling ice crystals piercing your cells.

C: 为寰宇的生灵而建。
E: Built for life across the universe.

C: 这名杀手以天才为目标，她的手术刀即将逼近你们的脖颈。而现在，你们面前有三个避难所。为躲过追捕，挣扎的猎物要逃往何方？
E: This killer regards geniuses as targets, her scalpel closing in on your necks. And now, three shelters lie before you. To avoid capture, where will the struggling prey flee to?

C: 「所以，我来了。但不是为加入你们而来……」
E: "So, I am here. But 'tis not to join you all..."

C: 好吧，你可以去找斯蒂芬反馈。
E: Well, you can give Stephen your feedback.

C: 否则，我就把模拟宇宙的产权转让给公司。
E: Otherwise, I'll transfer the ownership of the Simulated Universe to the IPC.

C: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她对自己捅的篓子毫不在乎。
E: Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She doesn't care about her own mistakes at all.

C: 你吃了甜甜圈，你感觉自己的胃有奇怪的动静……
E: You take a bite of the doughnut and feel your stomach churning...

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 你睡得迷糊不清，空气非常沉闷。你满头大汗，挣扎着无法醒来。你在空中听到一个声音，它在梦里对你呓语：「…星核…将完成你的…任何愿望…」
E: You are in a deep slumber. The air is stuffy, and your forehead is covered with beads of sweat. As hard as you try, you are unable to wake up. Just then, a voice comes from the sky and whispers to you in your dream, "...The Stellaron... will fulfill... any wish of yours..."

C: 你走进圆形房间，绳索捆绑一株枝桠纯白的树。你惊讶于它的纯美，通体圣洁，它像一尊舞动雕像。
E: You enter a circular room where a tree with white branches is tied up in ropes. Its beauty and sacredness, which make it look like a dancing statue, blow you away.

C: 它示意你将在乎的宝贝丢给它进行修理。
E: It gestures for you to let it repair your treasures.

C: *路易斯·弗莱明**奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德*…那些寰宇最顶级、名号最响亮的大人物，他们对你来说曾高不可攀！但——有朝一日，你相信自己能够顶替他们！
E: The most well-known figures in the universe, such as Louis Fleming and Oswaldo Schneider, were once out of your league. But now, you believe you can replace them in the future!

C: 「我是个商业贩子，这是一个神秘的盒子。」星际和平投资机器满不在乎地说，「我的肚子是一个机械口袋，里面有很多数据模拟的『宇宙碎片』。」
E: "I'm a peddler, and this is a mysterious box." The Interastral Peace Investment Device explains nonchalantly. "My belly is a mechanical pocket that stores a lot of data-simulated Cosmic Fragments."

C: 在烛墨学派的记录中，这种运动的危险程度仅次于伊斯特邦联的好孩子愤怒板球。
E: Among the Candelagraphos' records, this sport remains second only to the Isthmian Confederation's angry cricket matches in terms of danger.

C: 「死亡与鲜血无处不在，星际能源战争和第二次帝皇战争几乎在同时兴起，但帝皇手上的鲜血远不如有机体自身浓艳。」画家缓缓抬手，为画布增添上猩红。
E: "There is no land that is not stained with the colors of death and blood. Though the Interstellar Energy War and the Emperor's War were waged almost simultaneously, the blood on the hands of the Emperor is nowhere near as bright and radiant as that on the hands of organic beings." The painter slowly lifted their hand to add bright scarlet to their work.

C: 「总有人试图为时间注解特征，虚构史学家试图为鲁珀特杜撰过去，但在时间面前，这些挣扎毫无意义。」画家落笔之重，差些把画布捅穿。
E: "There are always those who will try to interpret the properties of time. History Fictionologists attempt to fabricate a past for Rubert, but such struggles are meaningless in the face of time itself." The pressure of the artist's brush grows almost heavy enough to pierce the canvas.

C: 普尔普冰晶海的尽头，一望无际的银色平原，你将信将疑地在阳光下点亮了捕虫灯。
E: At the very end of the Purpu Crystal Ocean there lies an endless silver plain. Still unconvinced, you illuminate the insect trap light under the sun.

C: 所有或者一无所有，你选择「或者」。
E: In the choice between "all or nothing," you chose "or."

C: 这城市带给你一种可怕的粘稠感，倘若陷进去，恐怕就再也不得脱身。
E: This city exudes an eerie, sticky sensation — once trapped within, you may not be able to escape its clutches.

C: 骰子停下，数字和你的猜测天差地别。你过滤去失败的哀叹，此时此刻，耳畔尽是成功者雀跃的呐喊。嘿，真的不想再试一试吗？
E: The dice come to a halt, their numbers a far cry from your guess. You ignore the laments of failure — in this moment, only the jubilant cheers of winners can be heard. Hey, don't you want to try again?

C: 在埃普斯的断崖底部，发狂的泰坦眷属和怪物正在你的身后紧追不舍。
E: At the base of Epos' precipice, the maddened Titankin and monsters relentlessly pursue you from behind.

C: 「谢谢你，小友。」他接下硬币，恋恋不舍地看向尚未被冥河淹没的尘世，消失在湍流深处。
E: "Thank you, young friend." He takes the coin, looks forlornly at the world still untouched by the River of Souls, and disappears into the torrential depths.

C: 由记忆模拟出的黑塔出现在商店区域，心情看起来相当愉悦。
E: Herta, a memory simulation, appears in the Store area in surprisingly high spirits.

C: 我想参加特殊测试。
E: I wanna participate in the special test.

C: 于是，如孩童习得语言，幼兽学会撕咬，人类懂得了如何组建军队，如何制造战车，如何行军布阵，如何杀死仇敌。
E: Just as children learn language and young beasts learn to bite, humans learn to assemble armies, craft chariots, march in formation, and slay their foes.

C: 「看看遍布翁法罗斯的贼之手，其实扎格列斯把自己的灵魂藏进了里面。只要集齐所有的手臂，把它们拼接在一起，就能复活千手的扎格列斯！比艾格勒的眼睛还多上十倍！」
E: "Behold the Thief's Hand strewn across Amphoreus — Zagreus has embedded their soul within them. Gather all the limbs, piece them together, and resurrect Zagreus the Thousand Hands, with ten times the power of Aquila!"

C: 传说，陨落的扎格列斯藏在奥赫玛的浴池里，方便它偷走法吉娜信徒的蜜酿。传说，尼卡多利陷入疯狂，正是扎格列斯的恶作剧。
E: Legend has it that the fallen Zagreus hides in the baths of Okhema, making it easier to steal honey brews from Phagousa's disciples. Another tale claims that Nikador's madness was caused by Zagreus's mischief.

C: 传说，扎格列斯的坏主意多到能填满大海。传说，这个传说正出自扎格列斯自己。
E: Legend states Zagreus' misdeeds could fill the seas. Legend admits these stories are spun by Zagreus themself.

C: 雨声是它的欢笑。
E: The sound of rain is their laughter.

C: 直到死亡收回惩罚。
E: Until Death retracts the punishment.

C: 狡黠的海洋。
E: Cunning Ocean.

C: 「您算是赶上时候了，促销活动火热进行中，再不出手下次可就不一定有这个机会了。」商人拼命怂恿你。
E: "Lucky you! We're running a very special promotion right now — hesitate, and you might never see a deal like this again!" The merchant prods.

C: 人子们卑微的智慧，岂能理解塔兰顿的所思所想，要相信公正之秤的判断，绝不会向任何一方偏袒。
E: How could the lowly intellect of a human ever grasp what Talanton is thinking? One must believe in the judgment of the Scale of Justice, for it never leans toward any side.

C: 扎格列斯曾取悦过所有泰坦，唯独没有逗笑塔兰顿，因为它怕自己的笑声会让天平颤抖。
E: Zagreus once pleased every Titan — except Talanton, who feared even their laughter might tremble the scales.

C: 古老的歌谣口口相传，讲述那遥远的过去，巨人刻法勒的死敌。
E: Ancient songs passed down through generations speak of that distant past — Kephale's nemesis.

C: 「只要你巧言说服它，让它用神矛去刺神盾，二者必有一伤。」
E: "If you can convince them to strike their own shield with the spear — one of them is bound to break."

C: 抱歉，我见今天终端上没人预约所以就先休息去了，没想到把你给漏了。
E: There were no appointments listed on the terminal today, so I left for a short break. I wasn't expecting anyone to actually show up.

C: 算了，不拍了。
E: Forget it. You give up.

C: 恭喜您已激活该设备，激活进度为：<unbreak>10%</unbreak>…<unbreak>20%</unbreak>…<unbreak>99%</unbreak>…哎呀！你访问的权限不见了！
E: Congratulations, device activated! Progress: <unbreak>10%</unbreak>... <unbreak>20%</unbreak>... <unbreak>99%</unbreak>... Ah! Please check your permissions!

C: 终于有人能听懂我的话了！
E: Finally, someone who can understand what I'm saying!

C: 还行还行，那些家伙说话也大声。不过喝了水之后确实感觉听力水平恢复了不少。
E: They're alright. Those guys were talking pretty loudly, but in any case — all that water has definitely helped my hearing recover.

C: 那可不？喝了水，皮肤没褶子了，头发都变回嫩绿色了！自然精气神就好了。
E: Don't you think? With that cool drink, my skin is feeling wrinkle-free and my hair's already turned green again! Natural energy is the best.

C: 浅尝一口。
E: Take a sip.

C: 他之前干嘛去了？
E: Why did he leave?

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你很好奇他们中是否有人曾达成了目标——呃，你绝无亵渎他们信念的意思——毕竟你坚信时间是单向的，绝无回环的余地。如此想来，他们的教义就很扯淡……
E: You wonder whether some of them have achieved the goal. Without the intention of disrespecting their faith, you strongly opine that time is unidirectional, and it is impossible to go back in it. When you take that into account, their creed sounds ridiculous...

C: 你发觉手指几乎要被低温斫断，尽管你已穿戴好整套公司配发的尖端户外装备。但老实说，你不在乎——因为你很清楚：这荒诞的赎罪之旅即将迎来终点。
E: Although you are wearing a full set of advanced outdoor equipment prepared by the IPC, you realize your fingers are almost broken because of the cold. You are not bothered by it, as you are very clear that this outrageous journey of redemption is about to come to an end.

C: 你想起这宴席临近尾声。是的…就快要到那位绝灭大君给定的最后期限了。「大人…我们是否应该*归顺*它们？」你的侍从将那可恨的通牒呈上。
E: You realize the banquet is coming to an end. Indeed... the deadline handed down by that Lord Ravager is fast approaching. "My lord... should we SURRENDER to them?" Your attendant presents you with that despicable warning notice.

C: 「以防你们听不懂——这实际上意味着，星球表面的所有活物全部*蒸发*了。」他补充，扶了扶眼镜。虽然这家伙的态度总让你不爽，你想，但这可真是稀奇。
E: "In case you don't understand what this means, I'm saying all living organisms on the surface of the planet have EVAPORATED." He adds while pushing his glasses upward. The nerd's attitude always gets on your nerves, but you still can't help feeling incredulous at this.

C: 你焦躁地甩动触手。吃不到东西令你感到不愉快…这片星云附近难道就没有好吃的东西吗？你有点烦闷，在高速粒子流中苦恼地转来转去。
E: You flail your tentacles restlessly. Not being able to eat makes you feel so hangry... There must be something tasty around the nebula, right? You feel a little annoyed as you circle about in a high-speed particle stream in misery.

C: 你该不会是要吃我吧？别，我、我死啦~
E: Y—You're not going to eat me, are you? D—Don't eat me! I—I'm dead waaah~

C: 哈！您、您可真幽默……
E: Ha! You, you're a funny one...

C: 我站在这里，应该算是变蓝了喀？
E: I'm standing over here. That's blue, right?

C: 嗐，你得是有多绝望，才会想到找我要活干啊？
E: Heh. You must be pretty desperate if you are coming to me for work.

C: 重新选择…做个有趣的人。
E: Make a different decision... be interesting!

C: …明白了，那我就再信你一回。我这儿还有一把闲置的矿镐，你拿去吧。
E: ...I get it. I'll trust you one more time. I have one more pickax lying around. Take it.

C: 喂，你瞧呐！那家伙八成是要吐了。
E: Hey, look! {F#She}{M#He} is gonna throw up.

C: 小朋友嘟哝着，像是在等什么人。
E: A kid is mumbling something. She looks like she's waiting for someone.

C: 荣誉队员…你藏得也太好了吧！但我可不会善罢甘休的！
E: Honorary member... You've hidden yourself too well, but I'm not going to give up so easily!

C: 玩游戏就是要赢，这可是职业玩家的基本操守——捉迷藏当然也不能例外了！
E: You play to win. That's the basic code of conduct for any professional player. Hide-and-seek is no exception!

C: 眼前这位讪笑的居民以迅雷不及掩耳之势，将一沓信用点胡乱塞进你的手里。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。但你其实根本不是这个意思……
E: In a lightning-fast movement, this grinning resident casually stuffs credits into your hand, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

C: 哈哈，你的水平还真不错！我都想请你替我拍杂志封面了呢。
E: Haha. You're not too bad! I want to get you to take my picture for a magazine cover.
Ah...

C: 喀喀！是{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}两面窃贼{RUBY_E#}的大手，为什么要破坏我的小家，为什么要来打扰我安逸的生活喀！
E: Crrk crrk! It's the big hand of {RUBY_B#Zagreus}the two-faced thief{RUBY_E#}. Why is it trashing my humble home? Why do they have to disrupt my peace and quiet?

C: 家人们都在这里了！
E: My family is all here!

C: 看吧喀——伟大的吾主瑟希斯，这威严肃穆的身姿是何其高贵、何其神圣……
E: Observe — our great master Cerces. Such nobility and holiness in that august presence...

C: 哇，竟然是瑟希斯！
E: Wow, it's actually Cerces!

C: 我在观察他们的蜕生过程，如果顺利的话，或许能够感悟出新知识，培养出蝶类的奇兽呢喀！
E: I'm studying their metamorphosis process, and if successful, might gain new knowledge to breed butterfly chimeras, crrk!

C: 那个宝箱还在旁边，哪儿都没去。那个可能装着「幸运」的容器……
E: The chest is still there. It hasn't gone anywhere. There it is, a container that could be holding good luck...

C: （适当的沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: （还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
E: (Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)

C: 嗐，没关系！等虎克长到这么大，肯定不会再玩捉迷藏的啦！
E: Heh. Don't worry! When I get as big as you, I won't be playing hide-and-seek anymore!

C: 但遗憾的是，你手边也没有任何可以出卖的东西……
E: Unfortunately, you don't have anything on hand to sell...

C: 喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
E: Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...

C: 有怪说明我找对路了！
E: If there are monsters, that means I'm on the right track!

C: 就我在这守门。
E: I'm the only one guarding the door.

C: 我也想和它们一起飞翔~
E: I long to soar with them as well~

C: 是不是觉得我能穿墙很奇怪？是不是已经想要打开石板上的问题反馈面板？且慢！
E: You think it's weird that I can phase through walls? You're already reaching for the bug report panel on the slate, aren't you? Hold it right there!

C: 没错，都是我干的，快来追我！
E: Yes, I'm the mastermind. Come and get me!

C: 嗨，不算就不算，我现在也算是搞清楚情况了，你让我跟你打赌，我也不干了。
E: Alright, it doesn't count then. I get it now, and I don't wanna take that bet anymore.

C: 你确实在动。
E: You flinched.

C: 怎么比我还没有耐心，我这就告诉你。
E: You're even less patient than I am. Let me tell you then.

C: 但你还是被我找到了。
E: But I found you.

C: 没错没错，我们还有很多作业要老大指导呢！
E: He's right! We still need you to help us with our homework!

C: 有没有觉得，这儿有个人很闲？
E: Does it ever feel like someone here is slacking off?

C: 确实羞耻…
E: It's pretty shameful...

C: 我吃，我吃！
E: Let's eat. Let's eat!

C: 如此想着，你便以迅雷不及掩耳之势将属于自己的最后几个包子分别放在了男性与女孩的盘中……
E: Taking this idea and running with it, you sleight your remaining few buns with lightning speed onto the plates of the guy and the girl...

C: 我来救你！
E: I'm here to save you!

C: 我忍不了了！事到如今，只能采取最后的手段了——
E: I can't take it anymore! I'll have to use my last resort!

C: 销毁危险的包裹。
E: Destroy the dangerous parcel.

C: 哦，对了！青镞小姐把箱子里的字条留给我了——你看看，兴许有印象呢？
E: Oh, right! Qingzu left the note inside the box for me. Take a look. Maybe it will jog your memory?

C: 别装傻了，是你本人就直说，别磨叽。
E: Don't play dumb. If it's really you, just say it. Don't beat around the bush.

C: 哎，我说什么他就骂什么，骂得可难听了。
E: Eh, he lambasted me on almost every point I made.

C: 但他所爱的那位女士追着黄金的繁华而去，只留下悲痛欲绝的绿光。
E: But the woman that he loved left in search of fortune and prosperity, leaving only the green glow of grief behind.

C: 尊敬的旅客，为保障您的人身安全，请勿在上升途中逗留。
E: Dearest passenger, please do not stop during your ascent for your own personal safety.

C: 一股奇异的香味钻进你的鼻子，带着五分美梦、三分惊悚和两分燃烧的快意。
E: A strange aroma penetrates your nostrils. You sense <unbreak>50%</unbreak> beautiful dreams, <unbreak>30%</unbreak> horror, and <unbreak>20%</unbreak> thrill of something burning.

C: 有机生命说的情调…
E: The emotional appeal of organic beings...

C: 可几个人能成大明星？我们这些小演员，餐厅里那些服务生，可从来没人关心。
E: But how many of us can actually become big stars? No one ever cares about us supporting roles or the attendants in the canteen...

C: 店长…明明去年还在的。
E: The shopkeeper... was still here last year.

C: 「同谐」根本不懂摇滚…
E: Harmony doesn't understand rock 'n' roll at all...

C: 仿佛下一刻，就会有辆诡谲的列车缓缓进站，将你带向不存在归途的黑色世界。
E: It's as if in the next moment, an eerie train will slowly pull into the station, to take you to a dark world of no return.

C: 听说那是法吉娜的试炼。
E: I heard that's part of Phagousa's trial.

C: 嗯，毕竟，我是真心的。
E: Mm, I mean, I really mean it.

C: 真是惬意的生活…
E: What a nice way to live...

C: 如果黑潮来了…
E: If the black tide comes...

C: 圣女大人正在请求神谕。
E: The Holy Maiden is receiving her prophecy.

C: 面对执事的问询调解，你们各执一词，争辩不休。围观的人越来越多，执事不得不将你们都被带到了地衡司公廨。
E: As the officers begin interrogations, each of you argues your position. As the crowd of onlookers grows and grows, the officer is forced to take you both down to the Chancery.

C: 名字很有意思帕，是喝完就能成仙人的意思吗？
E: What an interesting name. If I drink it, can I become immortal, too?

C: 那我再说一遍吧！
E: Then allow me to repeat!

C: 帕姆将视线转向远方，似乎不愿再与你交谈下去。
E: Pom-Pom gazes off into the distance, as if they don't want to talk to you.

C: 「罗浮」上是不是有位龙女？前些日子她托人送来了一些应急药物，说是答谢列车的诸位。我还觉得奇怪呢…原来是这么回事……
E: Did you meet the Dragon Lady aboard the Luofu? She sent someone with emergency medical supplies to the Express, saying that she wanted to express her gratitude toward us. I thought it was strange... So that's how it went...

C: 简易抢救器
E: Simple First-Aid Device

C: 发短信好容易错字，帕姆老是容易按错…{NICKNAME}乘客还是多多回来和帕姆面对面说话帕。
E: Pom-Pom is so clumsy at messaging people and keeps pressing the wrong thing... Come back regularly and see Pom-Pom face-to-face, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我在测量自己的身高，可是怎么测都测不准，每次的数据都不一样……
E: Pom-Pom's trying the measure their height, but Pom-Pom can't get an accurate reading. Every time it's a different number...

C: 我喝水就行了，够健康。
E: A glass of water will do. It's good for health.

C: 好哦，感觉{NICKNAME}乘客的生活作息都很健康嘛。
E: Got it. It seems like you're leading a very healthy lifestyle, {NICKNAME}.

C: 帕姆自顾自地哼着歌，心情显然很不错，也显然不想理你。
E: Pom-Pom is absorbed in their own humming. They seem to be in a buoyant mood and show no interest in talking to you.

C: 还行，挺开心的。
E: I had quite a good time there.

C: 你说这种小机器人，艾丝妲站长之前就下了命令，让我收回所有机器人，准备联络售后呢。
E: You mean this kind of robot? Asta has ordered me to withdraw all of them and contact the after-sales service.

C: 正在处理「外来者」的提问。
E: Question from the outsider is being processed.

C: ——开玩笑的，你看我这体型，拳头根本磨不到一块去！哈！哈！哈！
E: — Just kidding. I'm a robot, and can't itch! Bwahahaha!

C: （居然要战胜四十个铁卫……）
E: (I somehow have to defeat forty Guards...)

C: ——虽然机器人也没法传宗接代，哈！哈！哈！
E: — But robots can't actually have children, bwahaha!

C: （大门依旧紧闭着……）
E: (The door remains tightly closed...)

C: 「照雪灯炉」由两部分组成，第一部分是地髓驱动的<color=#dbc291ff>「热能核心」</color>。别看这小玩意不起眼，里面可是蕴含了巨大的能量。
E: Snowshine Lamps are made from two parts, one of which is the <color=#dbc291ff>thermic core</color> driven by Geomarrow. Don't underestimate this little gizmo, as it's packing some real power inside.

C: …这行动，简单到令人发笑。
E: ...This "operation" was hilariously easy.

C: …就在这里让它结束吧！
E: ...This has to end here!

C: 用惯了移动电子设备的你鲜少与这样古典又笨重的通讯装置打交道。不过，很明显地，如果你现在一定想要用一用电话亭，那么时机已经完全成熟了。
E: You rarely deal with such old and bulky communication devices, though it's obvious you'll get a chance to find out how phone booths work now.

C: 在好运的加持下，你终于给了这骄傲的小朋友一记深刻的教训。或者，用简单的话来说——你赢了！
E: With luck on your side, you taught the arrogant kid a lesson. Or in other words, you won!

C: 你们哪里搞到这种危险玩意的…
E: Where did you get such a dangerous thing?

C: 这是我们「黑暗拳斗大赛地下擂台」的秘密！
E: That's an Underground Ring Dark Fist Tournament secret!

C: 「四大天王」之一
E: First of the Formidable Four

C: 「四大天王」之二
E: Second of the Formidable Four

C: 行了，快走吧。禁区本来就不是任你游荡的地方。
E: All right, you may leave now. The restricted zone is not a hangout.

C: 没问题！那么，你曾受过「崇高道德的赞许」吗？
E: No problem! So, were you ever blessed with "Praise of High Morals"?

C: 呃，不管是谁，你踩在我们基地大门上很久了！能让开不？
E: Um, no matter who you are, can you please just get out of the way? You've been stepping on the door to our base for far too long.

C: 一阵急促的脚步声消失在下水道深处。
E: Hurried footsteps continue to go further down the sewer until they are completely gone.

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 黑夜给了我黑色的眼睛…
E: Dark night gifted me a set of dark eyes...

C: 老实说，你很难认真看待眼前这精美的人像。它与她是那么相似，却又在各种意义上都很不同——非要说的话，或许是少了一些欢乐…？
E: Honestly, it's hard to take seriously this beautiful portrait before you. It looks exactly like her, yet different in every sense — if you twisted my arm, perhaps it's a little less joyful...?

C: ——你先等会儿，我有话要问！
E: — Hang on. I've something to ask you!

C: 你忘了吗？当时可可利亚大人称你们意图颠覆贝洛伯格，下令全军通缉你们。情况紧急，我便亲自画了一版通缉令，让部下张贴在各处。
E: Have you forgotten? Madam Cocolia said you lot were trying to overthrow Belobog, and put out a Wanted order on your heads. It was urgent, so I painted a Wanted poster and got my staff to post them all over the place.

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 你的右脑开始飞速运转，形成一幅图像。你好像看到了浩瀚的蓝洋，造型各异的船只舰艇浮游在粼粼波光之上。
E: Your right cerebral hemisphere is now running at full speed, conjuring up a vision where you seem to catch sight of a blue ocean with vessels of every shape sailing on its dazzling waves.

C: 一片淡绿色的湖泊，那里的气候一定十分温暖，并且栖息着很多奇特的生物——比如翼展两米的蜻蜓，数十吨重的巨鳄，还有……
E: A greenish lake with a warm climate. Many marvelous species choose to reside here, from dragonflies with wings that span six feet to giant crocodiles that weigh dozens of tons, and many besides...

C: …谢谢，你真好！那我就先收下了。这元件肯定能派上用场。
E: ...Thank you! You're so kind! Then I'll hold onto that for you. This component will definitely come in handy.

C: 作为她的朋友，请问我这个时候该说什么？
E: As her friend, what should I say at such a time?

C: 我说你，怎么这么没规矩，乱翻别人的展阅。
E: How are you so rude as to going through someone else's flexible display?

C: 请你替我找五袋垃圾过来。这罐中一尘不染，我总觉得缺了些烟火气。找到以后，投进我这罐里就好。
E: Please find me five bags of trash. Within this vase lies a spotless vacuum, and I've always felt it lacks the hustle and bustle of mortal life. Once you find the trash, simply toss them into my vase.

C: 你很快打开盒子，并在里面发现了一封信，后者崭新得不像是一幢旧商铺该保存的东西。老实说，这气氛可真是有些诡异。
E: You quickly open the box to find a letter inside, which is in surprisingly pristine condition given the state of the old newsstand. To be honest, the whole vibe is starting to feel a little weird.

C: 「读过你的经历，我实在深感……」
E: "Reading about your experiences has left me with a deep sense of..."

C: 「向家人坦白之，举家还债，共谋出路。潜逃避债虽能得一夜安寝，然终究人心惶惶，朝不保夕，更将落得身陷囹圄，此无异于饮鸩止渴！」
E: "Be honest with your family, pay off your debt together with them, and find a way out of this together. You may get temporary respite if you run, but you'll always be looking over your shoulder, and you could land in prison. This is akin to drinking poison to slake your thirst!"

C: 天舶司还挺有手段……
E: The Sky-Faring Commission is quite resourceful...

C: 哎哟哟，我看见玉兆的界面就开始眩晕，还得是您来。
E: Oh, no no no. I get woozy and nauseated the moment I see the interface on the jade abacus. You do it.

C: （嗯…该修理栖木了。）
E: (Hmm... It's time to fix the roost.)

C: 最后一个货物应该丢在了<color=#dbc291ff>大衍穷观阵</color>附近，我们去找找看吧。
E: I think the last item was lost near the <color=#dbc291ff>Matrix of Prescience Ultima</color>. Let's go check it out.

C: 观颐台
E: Elixir Research Terrace

C: 那个…我们的回收预算被砍掉了，就算麻烦您出手帮忙，我也没有办法给你任何回报了…没关系吗？
E: But... our retrieval budget for this has been cut, so we won't able to pay you for your help. Are you still fine with it?

C: 我们两个的家族从三劫时代开始就不怎么融洽，可偏偏到了我们这一代，竟在学宫中义无反顾地相爱了。
E: Ever since the Three Sufferings Era, our families have been at each other's throats — but this generation, we fell head over heels in love with each other at the academy.

C: 没错，工造司原本就有着一群热爱「枘凿六合」的匠人，但是我们的爱好常常不被世人所理解，总是有人对我们抱有不解和敌意。
E: That's right. There used to be a group of us craftsmen in the Artisanship Commission who love the Hexanexus. But normies never really got us, so there's always someone trying to hate on us.

C: 那么，我换个问题吧，我们应该如何让「枘凿六合」变得更好玩一些呢？
E: Then let me change the question. How can we make the Hexanexus even more fun?

C: 除此之外，这次新的「枘凿六合」里面，我们也会放置宝箱，你放心，只要你玩「枘凿六合」，我们就是异父异母的好{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，这些宝箱都归你。
E: Oh yeah, we'll place chests inside our new Hexanexus this time. Don't worry about it. Just play the Hexanexus and you'll get your chests — now that you're my good {F#Sister}{M#Brother}.

C: 年轻人，回头是岸——这是我唯一能对你说的了。
E: Youngster, there's always a pathway back... That's all I can say to you.

C: 什么？！我是说，真的可以吗？
E: What!? I mean, are you sure?

C: 明知道不过是在做梦，但被那群家伙盯上还是挺刺激的…您说是吧？
E: Even though I know it's just a dream, it's still thrilling to have those things staring at me... Don't you think so?

C: 怎么，平时嫌弃我嫌弃得要死，现在才几天不见就跟丢了魂一样。
E: What's up? You usually shun me badly, but now after just a few days of not seeing each other, you seem distracted.

C: 说起来，「梦境鼓励师」还真是个神奇的职业！大概也只有在匹诺康尼才能找到这个工种了吧？
E: Speaking of which, "Dreamscape Motivator" — what a miraculous job! I bet this line of work is only gonna be available in Penacony, right?

C: 但我渐渐开始感到…迷惑…就像被巨浪来回拨弄的小船…它们实在太吵闹、太晃眼了…我渐渐开始感受不到自己了……
E: But I'm gradually beginning to feel... confused... like a tiny boat being tossed around on gigantic waves... they are simply too noisy, too blinding... I'm starting to lose any sense of self...

C: 他们的灵魂摊开在我面前…不断拉扯着我的…我因他们的喜怒而喜怒，为他们的哀惧而哀惧。
E: Their souls are spread out before me... ceaselessly pulling at me... I am happy because of their joy, and I dread because of their fear.

C: 这话问的…看不起谁呢！
E: You even hear yourself? Don't you look down on me!

C: 嗯…我们刚刚说到哪来着…哎呦，怎么这么累啊？
E: Well... What were we just talking about... *sigh* Why am I so tired?

C: 听起来有点扯淡。
E: Sounds like nonsense.

C: 是星核——「万界之癌」就是自那时开始侵害诸界的。
E: It was a stellaron — the Cancer of All Worlds that set out on its invasion of all worlds thereafter.

C: 银河中有亿万颗恒星，在如此广大的尺度上，二人间的执念难免显得渺小。
E: There are hundreds of millions of stars in the cosmos. On such a vast scale, this mutual infatuation between two people seems inevitably insignificant.

C: 那是一段疯狂的日子，每天都有鲸群在炮火中丧生。就连「泯灭帮」都被韦兰的雄心折服，自愿加入这场狩猎——净瞎凑热闹。
E: Those were crazy days, with whales perishing in the cannon fire every day. Even the Annihilation Gang was won over by Wyland's ambition, willingly joining this hunt — just for the thrill of it.

C: 于是我连忙开足马力追了上去——当时真该调头离开的，或许是开拓精神作祟吧。
E: So I quickly chased after him at full speed. I really should have turned around and left at that point, but perhaps it was the Trailblazer inside me.

C: 你时间穿越了？
E: Did you travel through time?

C: 实际上，我是一个海盗。
E: Really, I'm a pirate.

C: 科琳船长眉头微皱，怒意在她表面之下如暗流般涌动。
E: Captain Colleen frowned, her rage bubbling up beneath the surface like an undercurrent.

C: 是啊，最开始许多人都这么认为。但时间一久，再坚定的意志也注定被消磨……
E: Yeah, that's what people thought at first. But as time goes by, your resolve is bound to be ground away no matter how strong it may be...

C: 你，伙计！你正好是我需要的新面孔！
E: You! You happen to be the fresh face that I need!

C: 7分是个合理的评价，符合家族的需求，也符合奇迹本杰明当下的水准。班尼或许会极力否认…但这就是无可辩驳的事实。
E: Seven would be a reasonable score. The project fulfills the needs of The Family and reflects the current standard of Miracle Benjamin. Benny might argue to the contrary, but it's an irrefutable fact.

C: 您瞧，这可是——可贩售的美、美梦，液态的谐乐颂，哈哈…哈哈哈……
E: Look, th—this is... the d—dream we can buy... The liquid form of Odes of Harmony, haha... hahaha...

C: 我从不讨厌有想法、有野心的年轻人。不过这种又蠢又坏的……
E: I never make things difficult for smart and ambitious youngsters. But for a dumb and mean one like him...

C: 我没时间看这些无关紧要的东西。
E: I'm too busy to read useless stuff like this.

C: 您说，我究竟哪里做得不够好呢…是因为我说话太直了吗？是因为我不会讨好人吗？
E: You say, where exactly am I falling short... Is it because I speak too frankly? Is it because I'm not a people-pleaser?

C: 点子的名字就叫「乞丐角色扮演」——乖乖，不愧是我！这想法绝对能火！
E: It's called "Beggar's Life Simulation"! Boy, this idea will be a hit!

C: 哪里出现了文明，哪里就会出现侵权行为…这甚至不能算法律知识了，把它当成客观存在的物理法则都完全合理！
E: Wherever there's civilization, there's infringement... It's not just legal stuff anymore... It's practically a law of physics!

C: 什、什么？！不对，你才没权力这么做！这是我的车，我花了大价钱买下来的！
E: Wh—What!? No way! This is my speedster! I paid a fortune for it!

C: 等这些纸条像牛皮癣一样出现在大街小巷里，到时候你就不这么想了。防患于未然，还是小心点好……
E: What will happen if these notes start appearing everywhere like a bad rash? It's better safe than sorry...

C: 「长效专利捍卫一纸通」的用法简单直接，看到什么可疑的玩意，把它往上面一拍就行了！
E: Using the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier is simple! Whenever you spot something suspicious, just slap the Omnifier on it!

C: …当然是比喻，否则呢？
E: ...Of course it's a metaphor. What else would it be?

C: 我要在这梦境里复制出一个完美的她…一个绝对还原她真实形象的倒影。为此，我需要有人<color=#dbc291ff>帮我记录下她最真实的形象</color>……
E: I need to create a flawless replica of her in the dreamscape... a reflection that perfectly represents her. And for that, I need someone to <color=#dbc291ff>record her true self</color>...

C: 我曾经爱上过一个人——她非常爱「吃」，她人生中最大的乐趣就是品尝来自各个国家、甚至各个星系的美食。
E: Once I fell for someone who had an insatiable love for food. She found great joy in tasting cuisine from every corner of the world, even from other galaxies.

C: 我的职责是帮助家族管理与培养艺者，帮助他们成为万众瞩目的明星，以便向更多宾客宣扬「同谐」的福音。
E: My job is to train and manage artists for The Family, helping them shine like diamonds in the spotlight and spread the message of Harmony.

C: 何出此言？
E: Why would you say that?

C: 可能是鸢尾花家系自己的问题。
E: It could be the Iris Family's problem.

C: 家系的一些高层急于扩大「同谐」在宇宙中的影响力，只想让艺者赶快走红，忽略了培养他们的价值观，搞得像是星际和平娱乐这种唯利是图的产业一样。
E: Some higher-ups are so obsessed with spreading the influence of Harmony throughout the universe that they only want the artists to get famous quickly, forgetting to teach them about morals. It's as if we're as much a profit-driven corporation as Interastral Peace Entertainment.

C: 这群眼高手低的家伙！真是…真是……
E: What a bunch of slackers! This is really... ugh...

C: 但是她没有想过，我不想成为那样的巨星。
E: However, she's never thought that... maybe that's not the kind of star I want to be.

C: 原来这一切在他眼里都不重要…我，做出的所有努力，都变成了他逃离我的原因。
E: It turns out that none of these things actually mattered to him... Everything I've done became the reason he ran away from me.

C: 吃的…呵呵，这其实是声乐之星的名字，不过您的玩笑道出了它最后的命运。
E: Some sort of food... Hehe, it's actually the name of the planet of canticles, but your joke relates to its ultimate fate.

C: 那里逐渐变为了一个安宁祥和的仙境，人们在花林中饭蔬饮水，潜心探究用音律赞颂纯美，终日弦歌不绝，自诩「声乐之星」。
E: Gradually, it became a peaceful wonderland where people indulged in feasts and drinks in the forest of flowers, explored and sang in praise of the Beauty, referring to their homeland as the planet of canticles.

C: 这就是「纯美之歌」？
E: Is this the Song of Beauty?

C: 经纪人告诉我，这种音乐风格根本就没办法吸引受众，只会把追求风雅的宾客吓跑…要想成名，就必须先唱市场认可的歌曲。
E: My manager told me that this style of music doesn't appeal to the audience at all and will only deter guests seeking elegance... To achieve fame, I must first sing songs that are recognized by the market.

C: 我还是会继续支持你的。
E: I'll continue supporting you.

C: 梦里不存在死亡，最大的刑罚就是回到残酷的现实…正如悲剧不会落幕，只会换个形式开场。
E: There's no death in dreams. The greatest punishment is to return to the harsh reality... A tragedy never concludes, but rather takes on a different form to begin anew.

C: 来苏乐达俱乐部吧，我好好跟你喝上几瓶。
E: Come with me to SoulGlad Club. Let's have a few bottles of SoulGlad together.

C: 啧，可不能让这东西大摇大摆地走在街上…既然猎犬不打算管，那就该我这个警探出场了！
E: Tsk, that thing isn't supposed to run free on the streets... Since the Bloodhound Family isn't going to deal with it, I'll carry out my duty as a detective!

C: 粗鲁！我好心抛出橄榄枝，居然落得你这种反应……
E: How boorish! I can't believe this is how you respond to my kind offer...

C: 哈…想我在世间走这一遭，一路磕磕绊绊、始终与梦想相伴…而如今…没想到最后竟是你陪在我身边。
E: Alas... Looking back at my journey, I've never given up my dream, no matter how challenging things are... I didn't expect it was you who stayed by my side in the end.

C: 格-蕾的脸上闪过一丝悲凉。智械本不会有表情，但在梦里，一切皆有可能。
E: A hint of sorrow flashes on Go-Ray's face. Intellitrons aren't supposed to have facial expressions, but everything is possible in a dream.

C: 这些年来，我也听说过一些拥有可怕武器、却彼此形成对等威慑的和平世界。这么看来，武器也不一定会招致毁灭，反倒可能真正地消灭战争。
E: Over the years, I've heard of worlds that own terrible weapons to deter one another from starting a war. In this light, weapons do not necessarily lead to war, but can actually prevent it from happening.

C: 你也是筑梦师吗？
E: Are you a Dreamweaver too?

C: 我带来了垃圾。
E: I've brought trash for you.

C: 让你看笑话了…我知道你有很多问题。
E: Sorry, that must have been embarrassing... I know you must have many questions right now.

C: 为什么…为什么你要让我记起来？谁给了你…这个资格？
E: Why... why do you want to make me remember? Who gave you this... this power?

C: 你真的办到了…谢谢你。
E: You actually did it... Thank you.

C: 我方才想起来，在匹诺康尼有桩重要的生意还没谈成，最近老忙着基金会方面的事，把这茬给忘干净了，可这边的单子一时半会儿也抽不开身。
E: I just remembered an important deal in Penacony that hasn't been settled yet. I've been so busy with the foundation that I completely forgot — and I'm completely tied up with things here for the time being.

C: 哼，对付你这种家伙，我能用的手段多了去了，但…我凭什么告诉你？
E: Hmph, I've got plenty of moves against someone like you, but... why should I tell you?

C: 那群家伙把我五花大绑，还拿好几根香蕉堵上了我的嘴…唉，我再也不想吃香蕉了。
E: Those blasted devices tied my hands behind my back and stuffed my mouth with bananas... Ugh, I'll never eat another banana ever again.

C: 你们星穹列车是匹诺康尼的股东，学生就业率下降的话，匹诺康尼的股价也会受到影响——你肯定不希望这样的事情发生吧？
E: Since the Astral Express is one of Penacony's shareholders, if the employment rate of students drops, Penacony's stock price will be affected as well. Surely you don't wish for such a scenario to occur, do you?

C: 说白了，星际迁居本就是常态，人要往高处走，这没啥不道德。庇尔波因特是发达行星，机会比匹诺康尼多，我去那里发展，跟逐梦客来这儿有什么区别？
E: To put it bluntly, interstellar migration has always been the norm. There's nothing unethical about humanity's wish to soar higher. Since Pier Point is a developed planet, there are naturally more opportunities to be found there than at Penacony. How is my wish to advance my career there any different from the Dreamchasers who come here for a better life?

C: 哈，查德那小子给我发了个视频，说自己正在开拓什么「派对娱乐主播」行业，估计又是他自己造的词……
E: Ha, that brat Chad sent me a video saying that he's about to start a career as something called a "party and entertainment streamer." That sounds like a job title that he came up with himself...

C: 打开木桶。
E: Open a barrel.

C: 就快换班了，到时候可以一起去吃。
E: It's almost time for the shift to change. We can go grab something together then.

C: 黑漆漆的，说好的「空艇十大打卡地」呢？
E: It's completely dark in here! Isn't this one of the airship's ten must-see attractions?

C: 我才不怕，站得高看得远才够爽！
E: I'm not scared. The view is better up here!

C: 你无所畏惧，时刻践行着「开拓」之道——你决定直接发消息问问黑塔本人。
E: Without a shred of fear, you always practice the way of the Trailblaze — You decide to send a message directly to Herta herself.

C: 坐上王座的人是谁？你认为——
E: Who should sit on the throne? You decide...

C: 你看你看，{NICKNAME}也同意了。我早就说过这个方案是可行的。造物引擎很快就要脱胎换骨了！
E: Look, look! {NICKNAME} agrees! I knew my plan could work! The Engine of Creation is about to become a whole new version of itself!

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 哇哦，这么说{NICKNAME}已经开始考虑几百年后的事了...这就是远见吗？！
E: Wow, you mean that you've already begun considering life hundreds of years in the future, {NICKNAME}... are you really that forward-thinking!?

C: 机兵加工厂。
E: An automaton processing factory.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 爱...是一种能源？
E: Love... is a source of energy?

C: 你打算怎么处理这些东西？
E: What are you planning to do with these items?

C: 咱飞两圈消消食再回大树，筑梦鸟也要保持好身材啾~
E: I'm going to fly around and digest some of this food before heading back to the tree. Dreambirds have to watch their weight too, y'know? Tweet~

C: 原来妃色夫人不知道我回来了，这下出糗了啾！
E: Lady Vermilion doesn't know I'm back! This is embarrassing!

C: 阳光洒下来，这里暖暖的啾…
E: The sun's shining down. It's so warm here, tweet...

C: 你发出了一个很酷的「哼」——它真的很酷，以至于眼前的小鸟都被迷住了。
E: You let out a cool "Hmph" — it's super cool, so cool that the birdie is smitten by you.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个喜欢哈努兄弟的孩子总<color=#dbc291ff>守在宝箱边上</color>啾，说着想把宝物留给哈努兄弟呢~
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a child who likes Brother Hanu and is always <color=#dbc291ff>standing guard beside a chest</color>. It said something about wanting to save that treasure for Brother Hanu!

C: 红色小鸟迫不及待地跳了出来，但你似乎并不是它在等待的人。
E: The red bird jumps out eagerly, but it seems you aren't the person it's waiting for.

C: 唔呣呣呣…还没睡醒呢啾……
E: Mmm... I'm not awake yet, tweet...

C: 什么误会！先吃我一招啾——！
E: You call this a misunderstanding!? Eat this strike first, tweet —!

C: 但是「魔法硬币」可以唤醒在下潜藏的记忆啾！
E: But a Magic Coin can awaken my hidden memories, tweet!

C: 是个张扬的家伙
E: It's an ostentatious one.

C: 本公子从不吝啬啾！请把这份礼物也一起带走吧~
E: I'm never a scrooge, tweet! Take this gift with you as well!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个爱耍酷的助手总喜欢在<color=#dbc291ff>广场的喷泉</color>附近炫耀自己的羽毛，不知道会不会被喷泉淋湿啾？
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper that thinks it's super cool, and loves preening its own feathers by the <color=#dbc291ff>plaza's fountain</color>. I wonder if it's drenched by the fountain already, tweet?

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 只要有「魔法硬币」，就可以唤醒在下潜藏的记忆啾！
E: All you need is a Magic Coin, and I can reawaken my latent memories, tweet!

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 哇噢！你居然有魔法硬币！
E: Wow! You have a Magic Coin!

C: 再见，又有新的舞台在召唤我了，期待你的捧场啾。
E: Goodbye, another new stage beckons. I hope you'll be cheering me on, tweet.

C: 它好像弱护盾？
E: It looks like it's got a weak shield?

C: 发出一声失落的*哼*。
E: Let out a grunt of disappointment.

C: 上去的时候，也没感觉它有这么高，结果一回头心脏都快给吓炸了啾。
E: I didn't think it was that high when I was going up. My heart almost exploded when I realized, tweet.

C: 我也很喜欢。
E: I like it very much too.

C: 小鸟的爪子果然不适合弹琴吗？下次我用翅膀试试啾。
E: A bird's claws aren't suited to playing the piano after all? I'll use my wings next time, tweet.

C: 不行，不能气馁，我要找到一台小鸟也能用的乐器啾！
E: No, I can't give up. I must find an instrument that even a birdie can play, tweet!

C: 没关系的，克拉拉也想帮上大家。
E: No problem. I want to help everyone, too!

C: 怎么了，好像很抗拒的样子——莫非你是个害羞的人啾？
E: What, you look put off... Are you too shy, tweet?

C: 再见，朋友，总有一天，我会让清醒村从黑漆漆变成亮堂堂的啾！
E: Goodbye, friend. One day, I'll turn Rouseville's pitch-black darkness into a light show, tweet!

C: 你是幽灵？
E: You're a ghost?

C: …在校庆上，你和路过的同学为了最后一片钟表披萨大打出手，你用球棒把他敲晕，却发现同行的粉色姑娘偷吃了你的战利品啾……
E: ...At the school's festival, you fight over the last piece of a Clockie pizza with a passing classmate. You knock him out with your baseball bat, but you realize that a pink-haired girl with you has eaten your treasure already...

C: 机会是争取来的啾，只要你的产出能达到正式小鸟的要求，就能转正啾！
E: You'll have to fight for opportunities, tweet. As long as your output meets the requirements of a full-time bird, you'll be considered, tweet!

C: 掌管才能的神看了猫头鹰老师一眼，揪走他三根羽毛，又赐予他知识。
E: The god of talent glanced at Professor Owl, plucked out three of his feathers, and granted him knowledge.

C: 我没意见。
E: I have no opinion.

C: 现在道歉还来得及吗？
E: Is it too late to apologize?

C: 道歉？道歉有用的话，还要律师干什么？你必须为你的不文明行为付出代价！
E: Apologize? If apologies served a purpose, do you think we'd have lawyers? You must pay for your uncivilized actions!

C: 给，这是我的账号。有什么事情的话，之后用手机再聊吧。
E: Here, this is my account. If you need anything, just contact me.

C: 精神不正常的变态？
E: A strange pervert?

C: 这个小礼物就送给你吧，有空的话，请帮我回来看望下这些花花草草吧，它们很可爱的。
E: Here's a little something for you. If you ever get the chance, please come back and help me look after the plants here. They're all really cute.

C: 下期彩票号码是多少？
E: What are the winning numbers for the next lottery jackpot?

C: 这里出什么事了？
E: What's going on here?

C: 人生最后一次抽签，结果竟然是…占卜用玉兆坏掉了。
E: The last draw in my life ends up... with the breaking of the jade abacus.

C: 别狡辩了！
E: No excuses!

C: 救、救救命啊——
E: H—Help...!

C: 拜托你了，我想完成这首曲子。
E: Please help me. I want this song completed.

C: 也许我应该觉醒成为音乐天才…
E: Maybe I should become a transcendent musical genius...

C: 不好意思，唐突了。
E: Sorry, my bad.

C: 为什么要给我一些好处？
E: Why do you want to do me a favor?

C: 唔，原来是这样…看来你是用智慧战胜了我。
E: Oh, I see... So, it was your wisdom that allowed you to defeat me.

C: 那小子的车明明没啥大事，却还是狮子大开口…看别人白捡钱真是比我亏钱都难受！
E: That guy's car wasn't really damaged, but he still demanded such an astronomical figure... Seeing other people getting money for nothing somehow feels even worse than me losing money!

C: 我必须穷尽一生去追逐一个幻梦。如果选择拒绝，那在前方等着我的就只有一片黑暗。我别无选择。
E: I must spend my life pursuing my dream. If I chose to refuse it, then all that awaited me was darkness. I had no choice in the matter.

C: 之前有盘磁带由于位置太隐蔽，过了好几天才被发现。当我们接到通知去探查现场时，就连那片区域的梦境都发生了明显的扭曲。
E: One of these tapes was concealed so carefully that it took us many days to locate. When we received word and went to investigate the scene, even the dreamscape land around that area had begun to noticeably warp.

C: 啊，奥洛是我的老朋友，前段时间也在匹诺康尼。怎么了，你见过他吗？
E: Yeah, Oro was my old friend, he was in Penacony recently. Why, did you meet him?

C: …那他现在呢？
E: ...Where is he now?

C: 若是听这小曲，心里头实在喜欢，不妨留点赏钱，小女子也好唱得更卖力些。
E: If this song of mine brings you joy, perhaps you could leave a small tip and I will put even more heart into my performance.

C: 他们目前需偿还的债款是…六万四千八百信用点。先在此谢过了。
E: The amount that they need to repay is... sixty-four thousand and eight hundred credits. Thank you in advance.

C: 我全付了！
E: All shall be cleared!

C: 您的慷慨与仗义，小女子将永远铭记于心。
E: I shall remember your generosity and kindness in my heart for eternity.

C: 就从<color=#dbc291ff>筑梦边境</color>开始吧。听说那儿的风景很独特，但不对宾客开放，只能拜托您偷偷带我过去了。
E: Let's start with the <color=#dbc291ff>Dream's Edge</color>. I hear that the scenery there is like no other, but it is not open to guests, I will have to ask you to sneak me in.

C: 最近这批智械的芯片出了些存储故障，历史数据都丢了。抱歉抱歉。
E: Recently, there has been a storage malfunction with this batch of chips for Intellitrons. We've lost all the historical data. Sorry about that.

C: 望何期…
E: When does hope reign...

C: 你将视线投向笨拙的红色酒瓶。
E: You shift your gaze toward the awkward red wine bottle.

C: 如果它拒绝了我，接受了另外两位酒瓶的示爱，那么它们最后的结局注定会是…不幸福的。
E: If it turns me down and dates one of the other two guys, then their relationship is destined... to have a bad ending.

C: 那瓶金色的香槟和你有着相近的出身和使命，你该选它。
E: That bottle of golden champagne shares a similar background and mission with you. You should choose it.

C: …算了，我不想和你说话了……
E: ...Forget it. I don't want to talk to you anymore...

C: 气氛变得尴尬了起来…你最好还是悄悄离开，假装没来过吧。
E: The atmosphere is getting awkward... You'd better take off discreetly and pretend you have never been there.

C: 你接近金色酒瓶时，旁边的店员狠狠地瞪了你一眼。
E: When you approach the gold wine bottle, the storekeeper shoots you a glare.

C: 不如…我们分开来寻找出路？这样概率会大一些。
E: Why don't we... split up to look for a way out? We'll be more efficient that way.

C: 不过，和大树的日子比起来，这儿的生活确实舒坦得跟醉了一样。
E: Then again, compared to the days at the Great Tree, the life here is almost as comfortable as bein' drunk!

C: 黄，那我呢？
E: Yellow, what about me?

C: 亏我还和小红一起商量怎么给黄庆祝出厂日，它就是这么埋汰我的？
E: I was discussing with little Red how to help celebrate Yellow's bottling day, and this is how they insult me?

C: 关于回去的事，嗯，等我再喝一口就回去，就一口。
E: As for me returning to work. Uh, I'll just have one more sip and then I'll go back, just one sip.

C: 你还挺专业。
E: You're quite the professional.

C: 合影立牌啊…很久没看到过这种网红打卡点了。
E: A group photo board... I haven't seen a viral tourist spot like this for a long time.

C: 啊，我的挚友！没想到你竟愿意邀请我前来合影…我一定不辱使命！
E: Ah, my dear friend! I never would have thought you would invite me for a group picture. I shall not fail my mission!

C: 想加入流梦帮，就要先学会我们独有的一套暗号——别被吓跑了，我们的考核可是很严的。
E: If ya wanna join the Dreamflux Gang, ya have to learn our secret signal... Our assessments are super strict y'know, don't go runnin' off now!

C: 当愤怒达到顶点，压力膨胀，大量的气体就会从我的瓶中喷涌而出。靠着这股怒气，我便会获得无尽的气泡，一举拿下海选的桂冠。
E: When my anger reaches its peak, the pressure will build up and a huge amount of air will come bursting forth from my bottle. With this rage, I'll obtain infinite bubbles and snatch the audition crown!

C: 看看这些快让我炸开的气泡，我承认你编的故事让我愤怒了——你是编的吧？
E: Look at all these bubbles. I'm about to explode! I admit that this story you made up has angered me... You did make it up, right?

C: 就问这一次——要买么？
E: I'll only ask this once: Would you like to buy it?

C: 你瞧这台上台下…对，仔细瞧，有没有看出点什么来？
E: Look at this stage, on and off it... Yep, scrutinize it carefully: What do you see?

C: 我认识一位歌手，叫柯柯娜…
E: I know a singer, and her name is Cocona...

C: 满堂喝彩声中，却见柯柯娜望向你。灯光在她清澈的眼中洒满了星星。
E: Amid the hall of raucous cheers and applause, you see Cocona staring at you. The limelight shining on her highlights the myriad stars in her limpid eyes.

C: 你先冷静一点…
E: All right. Calm down first...

C: 狠狠地按下去。
E: Press it with conviction.

C: 机会难得，您是否要邀请其他贵客前来，与您共同观赏回忆放映？
E: This opportunity doesn't come by often. Would you like to invite any guests to watch the memories with you?

C: 在瑰丽的梦境中，你分不清什么是真，什么是假。但无论发生什么变故，你的同伴始终在你身旁陪伴着你，这就够了。
E: You can't tell what is real and what is fake in this magnificent Dreamscape, but no matter what happens, your companions will always be by your side. That's enough for you.

C: 一间无主牢房孤零零地恭候着你的莅临，犹如无主的王国等待着它的君主。这里原本应关押着穷凶极恶的囚徒，如今空空如也。
E: An empty cell awaits you, much like an unoccupied kingdom awaits its ruler. It was once meant to confine the most notorious prisoner, yet it now stands vacant.

C: 没事，这事交给我吧，我有经验。我知道你们都会叫自己{NICKNAME}，这个名称代号已经没有意义了，一直在这里的这个就叫做「嫌疑人甲」。
E: No need to worry. Leave this matter to me. I have ample experience. Both of you will just claim to be {NICKNAME}, so asking for your name is meaningless. Let's just call the one who has been here for all this time Suspect A.

C: 闭嘴，嫌疑人乙！你说谁不是正常人呢？
E: Shut up, Suspect B! Who are you calling abnormal?

C: 要是大人还想了解「无相者」嘟嘟，可以到囚室当面了解。放心，以后不会再让它离开囚室了。
E: If you wish to know more about Shapeless Doot-Doot, you're welcome to visit its cell. Rest assured, we've taken measures to ensure it won't escape again.

C: 在下一介行商，知晓市值盈亏的规律——凡夺取的，必将偿还；已有之事，必将再来。我终将回到自己的囚室之中…只是在此之前，还有很多事可以做罢了。
E: As a traveling merchant, I understand the laws of profit and loss — what is taken must be repaid in kind. What has happened will happen again. I will eventually return to my own cell... but before that, I have many matters to attend to.

C: 你说话的方式好像一位熟人。
E: The way you speak reminds me of someone familiar.

C: 你的粉头发伙伴已经警告过我们了，是我们自己没控制住好奇心。
E: Even though your pink-haired companion warned us, we could not suppress our curiosity.

C: 你提醒的有道理…我刚才差点就去和他们谈「圣地巡礼」的合作了。
E: Thanks for your timely reminder... I almost went to discuss with them about organizing a pilgrimage here.

C: 这不是给我俩指路的好心人吗？真巧，在这里遇见您了。
E: Hey, isn't that the kind-hearted soul who showed us the way? What a coincidence, I didn't expect to see you here.

C: 我相信，很多事情都无法解释。
E: I believe that they exist. After all, many things in life cannot be explained.

C: 这里有什么你想要的东西？
E: What are you looking for in here?

C: 然后密钥是这样的，「A」为嗯呢，「B」为呢嗯嗯嗯，「C」为呢嗯呢嗯，「D」为呢嗯嗯…「S」为嗯嗯嗯…「W」为嗯呢呢……
E: Here's the encryption key: "A" corresponds to "Ehn-nah," "B" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn-ehn," "C" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-nah-ehn," "D" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn"... "S" corresponds to "Ehn-ehn-ehn"... "W" corresponds to "Ehn-nah-nah," ...

C: 咱们总得试试嘛。
E: We have to start somewhere.

C: 毕竟你没有支付行李费用，你应该是不会被分拣到行李储存区的。
E: Since you didn't pay the luggage handling fee, you wouldn't have been sent to the luggage storage area anyway.

C: 我绝不会害你的，若放完这炮之后惹出祸端，你就说「那都是老白非要我放的，非要怪就怪老白吧！」他们一定会叹口气，然后放了你的。
E: I won't cause you trouble. If things get sticky after you fire the cannons, just tell them, "Old Bai made me do it. If you must blame someone, blame him!" They will just sigh and let you go.

C: 别急！最精彩的部分还没来——
E: Hold on! The best part is still to come —

C: 就像是给别人吹了半天牛「某某电影天下第一」，结果到电影院后才发现它没有上院线排期——你想向世人证明的全部艺术与巧思，竟是如此的一文不值。
E: It's like you excitedly tell your friends about a movie being "the best thing you'll ever see, a work of art" only to get to the cinema and find out it's not even due to be released in theaters... All the artistic talent and ingenuity that you wanted to prove to the world has gone up in smoke, just like that...

C: 你本可以转过头去给仁科说一声「算了吧，下次再来看」，但事情此时出现了转机……
E: Just as you planned to turn back to Renke and tell him, "Let's forget it for today. We'll try again next time..." there was a sudden turn around...

C: 很好，很有精神！
E: There we go. That's the spirit!

C: 听上去都不是攻击。
E: None of those sounds like attack.

C: 别！
E: NO, DON'T!!!

C: 真不愧是你啊，{NICKNAME}！阁下太厉害了，竟能在短时间内完成这样教科书般的人质救援！
E: I should have expected no less from you, {NICKNAME}! To pull off a textbook hostage rescue in such a short amount of time is truly amazing!

C: 就这样，今天的第一堂课在讲师的「下堂课测试」以及学生们的唉声叹气中画上了圆满的句号——
E: Just like that, today's first lesson meets a satisfactory end with the lecturer's announcement of a class quiz for the next session along with the students' collective sighs.

C: 咦，在问我吗？可能是…我想成为所有人目光的中心，在大家面前闪闪发光！这是我始终的梦想，也朝这个目标一直努力到了现在。
E: Huh, you asking me? It's probably because... I want to be in the limelight of everyone's eyes, to shine bright in front of them! This has always been my dream, and I've been working hard to achieve this goal.

C: 不会让给你的！我才是…才是最适合站在舞台中心的酒瓶，没有谁能阻碍我！
E: I won't let you have it! I deserve it the most... The bottle most qualified to stand on stage is me! No one else will get in my way!

C: 太敬业了，愿意为了电影效果而牺牲健康，你就是天生的演员！下次拍摄还找你！
E: Such dedication to your craft, to sacrifice your own health for a better scene. You are a born actor! I must have you the next time we shoot!

C: 这是你所拍摄的电影的剧照——苏乐达汽水瓶独占了整个舞台，在它的光芒之下，任何酒瓶都黯然失色。
E: This is a stage photo of the film you shot — the SoulGlad soda bottle hogging the entire stage. All other bottles dimmed and faded beneath its blinding radiance.

C: 孩子们说不定正在替城中的人们送信，还是发消息试试吧。
E: They may be delivering letters to people in the city. Let's try sending a message anyway.

C: 记得在树庭求学时，我听过几节精彩的辩论。假如逻辑分为正直的逻辑和歪曲的逻辑，后者往往能用诡计把前者驳倒，但歪曲的逻辑本身却是不成立的。
E: I remember that I listened to a few outstanding debate sessions when I was studying at the Grove. Hypothetically speaking, if logic is divided into sound and twisted, the latter often employs trickery to refute the former, but twisted logic is fundamentally flawed.

C: 遐蝶向你和狮口行礼，有些遗憾地离开了……
E: Castorice bows to you and the lion, and departs reluctantly...

C: 祭司阿努说：「此事简单明了，乃是雅努斯的制裁——对神明不敬会招来毁灭。」
E: The priest Anu said: "This accident is simple. It was the judgment of Janus — blasphemy against the gods will only invite destruction."

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 停停停停，稍等！
E: Stop, stop, stop, stop, hold on a second!

C: 呃…这么两句就写完了？
E: Uh... two sentences and you're done writing?

C: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}创造了这片土地，又在其中放置了一个小小的我，有什么用意吗？我会是宏伟预言的一部分吗？
E: {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} created this land, and placed tiny little me among it. What was the purpose? Will I be a part of the magnificent prophecy?

C: 大地从不回答，只以收获回报。
E: The land does not answer, and it only repays with harvest.

C: 不错！看来你确实有几分机灵——垃圾袋正是世间最为包容之物。
E: Not bad! It appears you do possess some wit. Of all things in the world, trash bags are the most vast and tolerant.

C: 呵呵…那就让我看看你的肚子有多抗踹吧！
E: Oh... let's see how well your stomach withstands kicks, then!

C: 是啊，我承认…但你为什么要把它说出来呢？你难道不知道事实会撕裂我的伤口吗？
E: I admit it... but why do you have to point it out? Don't you know that the truth would tear me apart?

C: 谢谢你，陌生的桶，你让我感觉好多了。
E: Thank you, strange trashcan. I'm feeling much better now.

C: 是啊，哥哥，竟能困难如此。可恶的家族……
E: Yeah, it's that hard. Curse The Family...

C: 什么？你不要也就算了，居然还敢侮辱我们的眼光！
E: What? I would've let it slide if you didn't want it, but you dare sully our eye for quality goods!

C: 只是风声而已。
E: It's just the wind.

C: 我们就只有三个垃圾桶，装得下这么多垃圾？贪婪可是堕落的催化剂。
E: We're just three trashcans. How much trashcan we store? Greed is the catalyst of decadence.

C: 你又算哪根葱？
E: And who in the world are you?

C: 白厄，你到底有多少好伙伴！
E: Phainon, just how many pals do you actually have?

C: 一气呵成！不知道咪发迷收到信会是什么表情？
E: Written in one go! Wonder what kind of face Mifamem will make when they get the letter?

C: 很抱歉，不想写。
E: Sorry, I don't want to write.

C: 这个风铃，不管多大的风、多大的雨，用多大的力气敲，都发不出声音。
E: No matter how strong the wind, how heavy the rain, or how hard I strike it, this wind chime won't make a sound.

C: 迷！
E: Memi!

C: 我也想过去迷境外面看看，但每次踏出家门，害怕的念头就又会像跳跳虫一样一蹦一蹦地跳进脑袋迷。
E: I've wanted to see the world outside Maze too, but every time I step out the door, scary thoughts start bouncing into my head like little jumpy bugs, memi.

C: 风铃发出悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都没发生。
E: The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Nothing happens other than that.

C: 对这里感到好奇吗？与世隔绝的小村庄，我的故乡，下一趟「开拓」之旅的起点……
E: Curious about it? A little village cut off from the world... My hometown... and the starting point of our next Trailblazing expedition.

C: 昔涟，去哪儿了？
E: Cyrene, where did you go?

C: 还有……
E: And...

C: 迷迷糊糊地，居然睡过去了……
E: I was so groggy, I actually fell asleep...

C: 想听故事吗？我有好多好多，可以一个个讲给你听。条件只有一个——要仔细听，好吗？
E: A story? I have so many I can tell you, but you'll have to listen to each and every one carefully. Alright?

C: 你好呀…♪
E: Hello... ♪

C: ——你被关在木马里面了！
E: — You're trapped inside the wooden horse!

C: 确认所有声音都消失后，你使尽全身力气，终于砸开了木制的活门，来到了外面——
E: After confirming that all sound outside has disappeared, you use all your strength to burst through the wooden trap door and return to the outside world.

C: 我在城中潜伏了数日，就为刺探疯王的情报，顺便送几个倒霉蛋去见塞纳托斯。可没想到这里的道路竟也如疯王的头脑般令人狂躁，至今仍未有收获。
E: I have been undercover in the city for a number of days. I came to seek out information on the Mad King and send a few unlucky fools to meet Thanatos along the way. Though, I had no idea that the routes around here would be as maddening as the Mad King's mind itself. I've made no progress this whole time.

C: （询问他的仇敌是谁）
E: (Ask who his enemy is)

C: （轻敲三次木马的内侧）
E: (Knock on the inside of the wooden horse three times)

C: （让对方表示对你的虔敬）
E: (Make them show their admiration)

C: 我的使命不可能再完成，我的路也要走到尽头了。陌生人，愿未来的门扉始终向你敞开，不会像我这样，被命运隔绝在紧闭的门外。
E: I can never complete my mission, and my path has come to an end. Stranger, I wish that the door of tomorrow remains ever open to you. That you will not end up like me, isolated from fate on the other side of its door.

C: …是负责整备的辅祭？免去那些繁文缛节吧，我只是回来稍作歇息，很快就离开。
E: ...Oh, you're the maintenance acolyte? No need for formalities — I'm just here for a brief rest before leaving.

C: 我来帮你把门打开！
E: I can help you with that door!

C: 当然。瑟希斯平等地为所有造物赐福，长久停驻在树庭中，我也分得了些许智能。即便是极为有限的知性，维持与你对话的程度也已足够。
E: Of course. Cerces bestows blessings upon all creations equally, and my long stay in the Grove has granted me some wisdom. Though my consciousness remains limited, it's enough for our dialogue.

C: 「不愿思考世界外的事」
E: I don't wanna think about questions out of this world

C: 「入学仪式，其之三：友亲之爱，切莫遗忘。择善论理，相随相伴。」
E: "The Third Rite of Initiation: Never forsake the love of friends and kin. Walk with those who seek truth and wisdom."

C: 呼呼…呼呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 我都快出汗了。你冷吗？
E: I'm almost sweating, are you cold?

C: 大地兽在倾听，在目睹，在向情人说悄悄话，可他们呢，终日沉默劳作，在整座城邦弥漫的香气里，日复一日。
E: The dromases listened, observed, and whispered sweet words to lovers, but the people? They toiled in silence, day after day, enveloped in the ever-present fragrance that filled the city-state.

C: 你听得见吗——
E: Can you hear?

C: 感谢你赐予我们长存不歇的黎明，为我们留下欢笑和幸福的回忆；感谢你松开紧握光阴的双手，在黑夜落下的帷幕里让我们体会离别和痛苦……
E: Thank you for granting us an unceasing dawn, for leaving us with memories of laughter and happiness. Thank you for loosening your grasp on time, allowing us to experience parting and sorrow beneath the falling curtain of night...

C: 明德敛气定心，细细思索一番，方才领悟容纳编外成员才是正道。
E: After calming myself down and giving it some thought, I realized that recruiting external members may be the solution.

C: 哦！太好了！在我大声喧嚷了一天之后，总算遇到了一位明眼人！
E: Oh, great! After yelling and shouting for a whole day, there's finally someone who understands me!

C: 作为拟态保护协会会长，你做过些什么？
E: What have you done as the president of the Mimicry Protection Association?

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 另外…也请你不要给艾丝妲小姐讲这个名字。实在是…太…太羞耻了……
E: Also... please don't tell Lady Asta about the horse thing. It's just ridiculous.

C: 我已经收到对应科员的回复。多亏了你的帮助，才能顺利完成这轮的复兴计划。就连辛克尔夫人都对你夸赞连连！
E: I've got some replies from the researchers. Thanks for helping me with this round of Project Revival. Even Mrs. Hinkel has started to sing your praise!

C: 萍萍姐是我最好的朋友！我们连气味都是差不多的呢，都是桃桃味的，不过她的味道要更浓郁一些。
E: Wenfry is my best friend! We even have a similar peachy scent, though hers is stronger.

C: 你是如何看待阮•梅的？
E: What are your thoughts on Ruan Mei?

C: 阮•梅…阮•梅女士…她是我们伟大的造物主，虽然她总是很忙，但我知道她在创造我们的时候一定倾注了很多很多的爱。
E: Ruan Mei... Miss Ruan Mei is our great creator. Although she's always busy, I know she must have poured a lot of love into creating me back then.

C: 所以，你找我是有什么事吗？长话短说，时间宝贵。
E: So, what can I do for you? Please make it short and sweet, I don't have all day.

C: 阮•梅很欣赏你，所以你的话，我会听的，我想要跟你一样！
E: Ruan Mei admires you, so I'll listen to your advice and be someone like you!

C: 队列清空！当前状态为：空闲。未查询到任务，已自动进入闲聊模式。
E: Task queue cleared! Current status: Idle. No tasks found. Chatting mode activated.

C: 有些客人可能要问了，盾牌哪都有卖，有什么稀奇的呢？
E: Some people may ask: Shields are such a common commodity. What's there to be in awe about?

C: 给我来一面吧。
E: Give me one.

C: 不是说没法击破吗？
E: Didn't you say it was indestructible?

C: 你打心眼里怀疑这俩小贩的说辞，决心不掺和这件事。
E: You've been suspicious of these two merchants' claims from the start, and decide not to get involved.

C: 得。谁都没猜对，押的钱都拿不回来咯。我就不该看这个热闹的。
E: Bah, no one got it right. I've lost all my money. Never should've gotten involved in this fracas.

C: （试试剩下的几支矛吧……）
E: (Try the rest of them...)

C: 我与你恰好相反。「阿卡索斯」不会因为覆灭而消失，我们依旧可以谈论它、怀念它，就好像它仍是个真实存在的城邦似的。
E: I believe precisely the opposite. Icatus does not simply stop existing because it was destroyed. We can still discuss it and reminisce on it as if it were a city that still truly exists.

C: 是我先前的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。
E: I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally come from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.

C: 教师的名头太过响亮，我倒不喜欢。人们总以为能从我这学到些什么，可我能教给他们的，无非是些思考与谈话的技巧。这算得了什么？
E: I find the title of "teacher" overly flashy. I do not enjoy it, personally. People always think that I can teach them something, but all I can teach them are the skills of reflection and debate. Does this really count as anything?

C: 当我提起「阿卡索斯」的时候，所有人都知道说的是什么。当包裹寄往「阿卡索斯」的时候，信使绝不会弄错目的地。是我的故乡，这点永远不会改变。
E: When I mention "Icatus," everyone knows what that is. When you send a parcel to "Icatus," there is no way that the messenger would go to the wrong location. It is my hometown. That will never change.

C: 因此我请求赫卡忒帮我去看看情况…无论如何，我都想让自己心里有个交代……
E: So I asked Hekate to check in on things for me... No matter what, I just need a resolution for myself...

C: 至于哈德斯…啧…我就知道那家伙不是什么好东西！
E: And as for Hadez... Tsk, I always knew that guy was a crook!

C: 文件记录了波瑟芬妮与哈德斯争执的全过程，其中包括波瑟芬妮如何揭露拉达曼的罪行、与哈德斯苍白无力的辩解。
E: It's a record of the entire dispute between Possephone and Hadez, including how Possephone exposed Rhadaman's crimes and Hadez's weak defense.

C: 我的傻瓜，厄琉斯，你还不明白吗？！他们的仇恨只与你那悬锋城的血脉有关。
E: Silly billy, Aelius... Don't you get it!? Their hate is only for your Castrum Kremnos bloodline.

C: 其实，我的出身与宁芙的家庭相互对立…我是悬锋将领的后代，她则来自奥赫玛历史最为悠久的几个权贵家族。
E: Y'know, I come from a completely different class to Nympha... I'm a descendant of a Kremnos general, and she comes from one of the most powerful and long-lasting noble families in Okhema history.

C: 但…刚才看到的这一连串情景，却似乎揭露出了某个奇怪的细节——
E: But... the scenes I just witnessed seem to highlight some odd details—

C: 根据调查结果看来，面对本次黑潮，树庭的学者本应能够有序组织撤离，人员生还率相对较高，但…那位黑衣剑士的出现改变了一切。
E: According to our investigation, the Grove's scholars could have managed an organized evacuation from the black tide, with many survivors, but... everything changed when that black-clad swordmaster appeared.

C: …库娜涅，转头看看吧……
E: Cynane... behind you...

C: 五十信用点卖我可以吗？
E: How about fifty credits? Is that fair?

C: 最近很容易感觉疲惫。
E: It's so easy to get tired these days.

C: 等等，这个是哪个？
E: Hang on, too... what?

C: 人老咯，带不动咯…我感觉我们科的年轻人啊，哎……
E: I'm old and can't carry everyone on my shoulders... It feels like the youngsters in our department are all — *sigh*...

C: 呃，这个…我不好说…因为目前只有文字资料。
E: Er, that's... I can't really say... Because there's only written evidence about it at the moment.

C: 哎，怎么能算找麻烦，奥赫玛的公民们都知道异邦的客人神通广大，说不准您稍微拜拜{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，就能想出什么好法子了呢？
E: Oh, how could it be considered dumping? The citizens of Okhema all know how capable guests from outlands are. Perhaps if you prayed a bit to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, you might come up with a brilliant solution!

C: 我还不够虔诚？
E: Was I not earnest enough?

C: 我只想拿到赔偿金。
E: I just want my compensation.

C: 我是不是该离开了…
E: Should I leave...?

C: 剧本，不就是，他的命运吗？剧作家，就是他的创世神。
E: A script is his fate, and the playwright is the creator.

C: 从未设想的脑回路…
E: I've never imagined that...

C: 「一日塔兰顿」必须是纠纷双方都能信服的公道之人。向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}起誓后，双方也必须接受「一日塔兰顿」的裁决。
E: This arbiter must be someone trusted by both sides to be fair. Once they swear in the name of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, both parties are bound to accept their verdict.

C: 是我告诉他的。
E: I told him.

C: 呵，你以为我会被稚童的胡言乱语扭曲信仰么？祭仪该有的步骤，我一样都不会少做！
E: Heh, you think a child's naive rambling will warp my faith? I'll go through every proper step of the ritual!

C: 谁想要那玩意啊？
E: Who even wants that thing?

C: 克利克搀扶着刻牢刻走下了楼梯。
E: Kilik helped Kelok down the stairs.

C: 你们先去对面避难吧。
E: You guys should go take shelter across the way first.

C: 别做傻事，快跑！
E: Run! Don't do anything stupid!

C: 不过这种紧要关头，能找到它们就已经谢天谢地了。能撑一时是一时吧。
E: But in these desperate times, we're thankful to have found them at all. They'll last as long as they can.

C: 这名守卫的语气和他的盔甲一样坚硬，看起来并不是会轻易心软的类型。
E: The guard's tone is as tough as his armor. He doesn't seem like the type to go tender easily.

C: 我也有机会听到神谕了？
E: I got a chance to hear the prophecy too?

C: 八卦是人们不变的天性。你将维吉妮娅托你给阿波罗尼送信一事如实相告……
E: Gossip is a constant in human nature. You told the truth about how Verginia asked you to deliver a message to Apollonius...

C: 曳石爵，有一封给你的信。
E: Dux Helkolithist, there's a letter for you.

C: 在附近找人打听？
E: Find someone to ask around?

C: 一瓶口感绝佳的蜜酿，堪比神血的精品…但似乎掺杂着硝烟、鲜血与泪水的味道。
E: A bottle of exquisite honey brew, superb as divine blood... yet its flavor carries the smoke of war, the sting of blood, and the salt of tears.

C: 嗯，方向感觉还不错。
E: Mm, feels like a good angle.

C: 留声机…要听歌得用黑胶碟片吧？在空间站里，只有极少数的音乐爱好者才有收集实体唱片的习惯。
E: Phonographs...They use vinyl records, right? There's only a handful of folks on the space station who collect those things.

C: 要不然就是像古恩那种老头子才会用…不过我记得他听的是录音带。
E: I think they're more popular with the older crowd — I bet Gunn would know how to use them. Still, if I remember correctly, Gunn only listens to audio tapes...

C: 感谢你邀请我登上星穹列车，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you for inviting me aboard the Astral Express, {NICKNAME}.

C: 其实不用回答也没关系，孩子会给出自己的答案。
E: Actually, I didn't need any answers — he made them all up himself.

C: 虎克没有！虎克才不会那么做！
E: No way! Hook would never do that!
