C: 想想就很期待~
E: Looking forward to it~

C: 还可以飞上天…飞到宇宙里哦！真的好厉害！
E: They launch themselves into the sky and even into outer space!

C: {NICKNAME}，你说——如果要给你们星穹列车写一首歌，该起什么名字好呢？
E: Hey {NICKNAME}, if you were to write a song about the Express, what would you name it?

C: 《高速之星》！
E: Highway Star!

C: 列车虽然空旷，但到处都有鲜活的生活痕迹。我能想到当大家都在的时候，它是如何活起来的。
E: The Express is pretty empty, but there are traces of life everywhere. I can just imagine how bustling it would be with people here.

C: 要不你叫几个朋友，我教你们玩「星际十三步」——聚会游戏我也很擅长。
E: Why don't you call over some friends, and I'll teach you how to play Thirteen Star-Steps - I'm good at party games too, you know.

C: 天空真是高远啊…
E: The heavens really are boundless...

C: 谢谢你…即使身在列车之中，置身事外地凝望着星海，也会突然感到有些不安……
E: Thank you... I know I'm standing safely here on the Express, but sometimes gazing out at such a vast sea of stars makes me feel a little uneasy...

C: 能有个人陪在我身边，就像以前在天上那样，我就能平静很多…谢谢你……
E: Having someone by my side calms me — it's always been the case... Thank you.

C: 接下来，无论你要去往何方，要经历怎样的艰险…只要我还活着，罗浮就永远是你的港湾。
E: From now on, no matter where you may go, no matter what hardships you may encounter... as long as I am alive, the Luofu will always be an open harbor to you...

C: 我会好好保守秘密的。
E: Your secrets are safe with me.

C: 听病人说，有很多星际旅客不习惯长途旅行，在旅行过程中突发症状。
E: I've heard patients say that interstellar travelers are prone to sudden illness if they're on the road for too long.

C: 尽管问吧！只要是和珍稀物种有关的，我知无不言！
E: Ask away! As long as it's about rare species, I'll tell you everything I know!

C: 大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
E: People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.

C: 所以，我更要坚定自我的职责——成为她们的引路明灯！
E: Therefore, I need to remain steadfast in my duty, and become their guiding light!

C: 但是经过我的深刻反思之后，我才意识到这个想法多么荒谬。如果遭遇无端压迫的人是我，想必应该也没有那份勇气去主动要求和对方谈一谈吧。
E: However, I realized how ludicrous my ideas were after I thought long and hard on them. If I were the one getting endlessly oppressed, then I probably also won't have the courage to actively approach the other party for a conversation.

C: 你是个很有勇气的女孩。
E: You are a very brave person.

C: 原来是这样啊…老师这么说我就放心了。我原本还担心，是自己哪句话太冒失，惹他不开心了呢。
E: Oh, okay — I feel a bit better then. I was worried I spoke out of turn or upset him.

C: 我没啥文化，不像是古恩看得明白愚人戏。我大半辈子都搞机修，和载具称兄道弟，老了也只会折腾点这个。
E: I never got a proper education. I wouldn't understand Fool's Play like Gunn does. My life's work has been all about repairing and handling machines and vehicles, and now that I'm old, that's still the only thing I do.

C: 明明都是克里珀的追随者，他们的做法与我们筑城者却大相径庭——说到底，做买卖真能支援「存护」吗？我在怀疑他们的真实意图为何……
E: They are also followers of Qlipoth, but what they do is drastically different from us Architects. Can businessmen honestly support the Preservation? I'm seriously doubting their true motives...

C: 要是有可能的话…我是不是该找谁帮我改造下这只义手，让它更有威力？
E: I wonder... should I ask somebody here to modify my hand a bit and make it more powerful?

C: 真是两个有趣的家伙，哈哈哈！有他们陪着，旅途肯定不会无聊吧？
E: Interesting duo, haha! Guess they must keep you pretty entertained, huh?

C: 我们都认为，当前的算法并非最优解，也都认为各自对阿僧祇连续统能做出更好的效果。
E: We agree that the current algorithms are sub-optimal, and that the Asamkhyeya Continuum can produce better results.

C: 纯粹理性的乐趣所在，注定不为所有人理解。
E: It is the joy of pure logic, destined not to be comprehended by all.

C: 话说回来，餐车在哪来着……
E: By the way... Where's the dining carriage?

C: 买入。对，现在就买。
E: Buy. Yes, just buy it.

C: 你们帮助贝洛伯格挺过了一次又一次危机，我们实在无以为报。这只是一点小小的谢礼，希望你们能感受到蕴含其中的心意。
E: You all have saved Belobog from danger time and time again. We don't have much, but we'd like to say thank you with this small gesture.

C: 帕姆吗？好像是有点。
E: Pom-Pom? They're a little extraordinary, I guess.

C: 将军干嘛不亲口问他？
E: General, why don't you ask him yourself?

C: 哈哈，在这一点上，他倒是从来也没变过。
E: Haha, well, I suppose that part of him has remained the same.

C: 突然感觉一点点紧张…难道我背后，是、是有人在看着我吗……
E: ...too peaceful... Why do I feel like someone's watching me...?

C: 你也曾遭遇意外，乘上了列车？
E: ...So you didn't mean to board the Express?

C: 星空对我们而言尤为珍贵。
E: The stars are precious to us.

C: 我时常会怀念以前手持纸本书的时光。
E: The touch of a paper book is a sensation I frequently find myself missing.

C: 在面对压力的时候，你会扪心自问么——你所做的哪些事会对自己有所帮助？
E: In moments of stress, do you ever ask yourself — which of my actions truly serve my own interests?

C: {NICKNAME}，能跟我说说帕姆列车长平时喜欢什么吗？我想为刚才的冒失做点什么。
E: {NICKNAME}, could you tell me what Pom-Pom likes? I hope to make up for my previous blunder.

C: 但我觉得挺好玩的，因为有些面具的梦能无缝衔接，就跟走迷宫一样。说不定某一天，我就找到终点了呢！
E: But that's fun too — the masked dreams connect to each other seamlessly, like you're walking in a maze. Maybe one day, I'll find the way out!

C: 游离的记忆碎片…
E: Drifting memory fragments...

C: 在探寻记忆的过程中，相较语言描述，图像的展现更为生动直观。
E: During the course of finding memories, a picture is worth a thousand words.

C: 好精致的福袋！
E: What an exquisite gift!

C: 请再剧透一点！
E: Please tell me a little more!

C: 在仔细阅读了「请提交数据周报」的弹窗提醒后，你试图找熄屏按钮，但不幸的是，你没能找到它。
E: After carefully reading the pop-up notification that reminds you to submit the weekly data report, you fumble for the button to turn off the screen but fail to locate it.

C: 很遗憾，童话故事在科学面前并不奏效，你并没有在冷冻舱里找到故事里的「睡美人」。
E: Unfortunately, fairy tales aren't a thing in the world of science, and you find no legendary Sleeping Beauty in the cryosleep pod.

C: 怪了…什么情绪也没有，我还以为自己会很满足，很高兴……
E: How strange... I feel nothing. I thought I'd be so satisfied and contented...

C: 他是莱姆士汀家的公子。
E: He's a Limestein.

C: 你其实就是在偷懒而已吧…
E: You're just trying to slack off, aren't you?

C: 没什么事了。
E: Nothing else.

C: 交出未妥投的信封•三
E: Hand over the Misdelivered Letter 3

C: 「这个甜味，有点像是煦日节之后，冻河初开，从冰块的缝隙中挤出的第一滴水，凛冽之中又裹挟着一丝温暖……」
E: "This sweet taste is like the first drop of water from the cracks of the ice when the river unfreezes after the Solwarm Festival, a bit of warmth amidst the bitter cold..."

C: 实际涨幅至少是这个数，明白了吧，你不要被吓到啦。我其实是故意往低了说，不能让太多人知道内幕消息，毕竟——
E: The actual number is at least this much. Don't look so scared. See what I mean here? I'm trying to keep it on the down low, because...

C: 啊啊，阿尔乔姆…达米尔…一边是冰霜，一边是火焰……
E: Ah, Artem... Dalmir... One is frost, the other flame...

C: 哎哟，你可瞧瞧吧！这报纸连中缝广告写得都这么气人…我可得好好批评两句！
E: Jeez, have a look at this! Even the advertisement in the middle column of this newspaper is annoying... I've got to say something!

C: 他还说，「如果操作者一直死盯着打印机看，平行世界传输现象就不会发生——要想不干涉传输过程，只有借助『以太透镜』进行观测。」
E: He also said, "If the operator keeps staring at the printer, the parallel universe transmission can't happen. The only way to avoid interfering with the transmission process is to observe it with the help of an aether lens."

C: 哈哈，逗我玩是吧？你指望我相信你吗？
E: Haha, are you kidding me? Do you really expect me to believe that?

C: 我随口就能给你来一段：反正就是他本人隐忍退让、委曲求全、顾全大局；另一方不知好歹、得寸进尺、真不是人。
E: It's always the same thing. The complainant tells me they have been altruistic and taken the big picture into consideration and the offending party has taken advantage of them and is being ungrateful.

C: 行吧，再见。
E: All right, bye.

C: 我听说史瓦罗那里有说唱大赛…
E: I heard there's a rap battle over at Svarog's...

C: 来聊聊吧…
E: Let's get to know each other...

C: 你在等别人送你礼物？
E: Are you expecting a gift?

C: 祝你玩得开心。
E: Hope you enjoy yourself!

C: 呵欠…我这困意好像又有点上来了。今儿就聊到这儿吧，我先休息了……
E: *yawn*...I'm getting sleepy again. We'll stop here today. I want to take a nap...

C: 其实是虎克拜托我来问的…
E: Actually, Hook sent me...

C: 那你可以告诉我她在哪里吗？我想和她说几句话。
E: Can you tell me where she is? I'd like to talk with her.

C: 最近的话，我还在找布洛妮娅姐姐…但她似乎一直都没有在附近出现。她到底住在哪里呢？
E: I'm still looking for Bronya... But she doesn't seem to be anywhere. Where the heck does she live?

C: 你、你们放心！我是「地火」的人，不、不会和别人乱说的。
E: Don't worry! I—I won't tell anyone. I'm from Wildfire.

C: 慢、慢走啊。呼……
E: T—Take care. Phew...

C: 不然呢？除了机械师，也没人会制作机器人了吧？
E: Of course. No one but a mechanic could make robots, could they?

C: 我想问……
E: I want to ask...

C: 欢迎，有空可以常来店里坐坐。
E: Welcome. Please visit us sometime.

C: 想找你闲聊几句。
E: I'd like to chat with you.

C: 没事没事，他人挺好的。
E: He was nice to us.

C: 「蜜饯菇托辣椒」？
E: Candied mushrooms with pepper?

C: 噢，你是说拍卖会那事吧！买到啦买到啦，多谢你关心。
E: Oh, you mean at the auction! Yup, I got something. Thanks for remembering.

C: 算了算了，我理解。外来人嘛，不懂贝洛伯格的历史很正常。
E: Fine, fine. I understand. You are an Outsider. It's normal that you don't know the history of Belobog.

C: 不过我又听说了些传闻，说是这两人过去认识…嗐，谁知道呢！
E: I heard that they knew each other... Hmmm, who knows what's true!?

C: 冬城的孩子，「存护」骄傲的子民，抬起你们的头来！不要被忙碌且庸俗的日常磨平了棱角，时刻铭记筑城者和大守护者的教导！
E: Children of the Everwinter City, proud citizens of Preservation: Hold your heads up high! Grind NOT against the mundane vulgarities of your everyday lives. ALWAYS remember, deep in your hearts, the teachings of the Architects and the Supreme Guardian!

C: 杰帕德大人已经吩咐过我，允许各位「外来者」在禁区中自由活动。
E: Gepard's already instructed me to give Outsiders like yourselves free access here in the restricted zone.

C: 但神奇的是…即便邋遢成这样，他也能给希露瓦提出生活上的建议。那对姐弟的关系…连我这个情报官都无法准确解析啊。
E: Even as unkempt as he is, he is still, for some reason, able to give Serval life advice. The relationship between these siblings is puzzling even to an Intelligence Officer like myself.

C: 机械聚落是个怎样的地方？
E: What sort of place is the Robot Settlement?

C: 这里…原来其实是史瓦罗先生驻守着的载人竖井。如果缆车道没开放的话，这也是这附近通向地表的唯一路径。
E: It's... It used to be a manned well shaft for Mr. Svarog. If the cable car line wasn't open, this would be the only way to the surface around here.

C: 这里为什么叫作「机械聚落」呢？
E: Why is it called the Robot Settlement?

C: 检测到生体热源反应——正在识别生体信息……
E: Bio heat reaction detected — Identifying bio information...

C: 目前，我仍无法演算出使贝洛伯格气温恒定的真正因素。
E: Presently, I am unable to ascertain the true factor for Belobog's temperature consistency.

C: 我明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 哦，这就要走了？我还没聊够呢，哈哈哈！
E: Oh, leaving already? I haven't had my fill, hahaha!

C: 为了面包，为了解放
E: Just for a crust of bread, just for liberation

C: 想听一首积极点的。
E: I want to hear something upbeat.

C: 我拿着笔，但歌词不会开始写自己
E: I got my beat, lyrics falling at my feet

C: 嘿，亲爱的——你最近可有听说？
E: Yeah, baby — have you heard the news?

C: 的确很特别！对我来说，那场比试有很特殊的意义。
E: It was special indeed! That match had a lot of meaning to me.

C: 回见，{NICKNAME}！
E: Yeah, see you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 在我们部门的<unbreak>11</unbreak>位总监里，她算是最不坏的一个了。
E: I think she's probably the least terrible among all the eleven directors in my department.

C: 到现在为止，我们大概干了有四年…不对，五年了。这期间甚至还跨了一个琥珀纪呢，哈哈哈。
E: It's been about four... no, five years since then. Can you believe we've even crossed into a new Amber Era? Hahaha.

C: 哼，哼哼？
E: Oink, oink oink?

C: 「城墙，山峦！」
E: "Walls, mountains!"

C: 说来听听？
E: Like what?

C: 真是她？不会吧，铁卫还让干这个？
E: Really? No way. Is that what a Silvermane Guard is supposed to do?

C: 行啊。你们等会儿，我找找钱包……
E: Okay. Hang on, let me grab my wallet...

C: 不会是我记错时间了吧？
E: Did I get the time wrong?

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆！请问有什么可以帮到您吗？
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 咦，原来你不是来送礼物的呀…是遇到什么困难了吗？如果是的话，一定要告诉阿丽娜喔～
E: Oh, you're not here to give me anything? Do you need help? Just let me know, okay?

C: 你看——这座博物馆如今已经找回了属于她的所有藏品，前来欣赏展览的游客摩肩接踵……
E: Look, the museum has finally recovered all of her exhibits, and visitors are clambering in shoulder-to-shoulder...

C: 妈妈，我想买这个回家！
E: Mommy, I wanna buy this one!

C: 原来如此…
E: I understand now...

C: 嗐，老板，这可不是个什么好兆头啊。
E: Tsk, that can't be a good omen.

C: 但也没有办法，我可能天生就是喜欢这种雄伟壮丽的景观。
E: But I can't help it. I guess I was just born with a love for majestic landscapes like this.

C: 想要随便聊聊…
E: Just a casual chat...

C: 哇，听起来好厉害…
E: Wow, sounds pretty awesome...

C: 可是这大概要请相关部门允许我们去那边拍幻戏吧…听起来就要扯皮很久。
E: However, we'll probably need permits from all the relevant departments before we can shoot immersia scenes there... And we'll probably have to wrangle with that for far too long.

C: 哈哈，看来您确实不太了解我们集团。在这幽囚狱中，人人都是我的客人！
E: Haha, looks like you're not familiar with our group. In The Shackling Prison, everyone's my customer!

C: 真正在做事的地衡司执事。
E: A Realm-Keeping Commission Officer who is actually productive at work.

C: 客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
E: Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!

C: 健身武术了解一下！
E: Martial arts and fitness! Come learn all about it!

C: 很多人没有坚持几天，就再也没来过拳馆。比起担心拳馆跑路，不如多担心下自己到底有没有持之以恒的决心。
E: Lots of people throw in the towel and don't bother coming back after a few times. Rather than worrying about the boxing gym, they should be worrying about whether they've got the perseverance to see things through.

C: 你肯定也听说过，仙舟人饱受魔阴身的困扰。但很少有人知道，其实魔阴身是可以治愈的！这是十王司不敢公开的秘方，只有在我这里，你才能打听到。
E: You must have heard about how the Xianzhou people suffer from the curse of mara. But very few people know that there's actually a cure for it! The Ten-Lords Commission will never admit it, so it's up to people like me to spread the word.

C: 哈哈哈哈，这样就好。
E: Hahaha, that's good then.

C: 我说出了心里的疑问。将军却笑着问我，是否还记得云骑军的誓词？
E: I voiced my doubts. But he simply laughed as he asked me whether or not I remembered the oath of the Cloud Knights.

C: 只是想和你们俩闲聊几句。
E: I'd like to have a little chat with you both.

C: 我嘛…从进入十王司开始，人生就结束了。现在这书吏的身份，只不过是一个永无止境的结局罢了。
E: As for me... Ever since I joined the Ten-Lords Commission, the curtains have essentially already come down on my life. My current role as scribe is but an "ending" that simply stretches on forever instead of ceasing to exist.

C: 想了解太卜司…
E: Tell me about the Divination Commission...

C: 嗯？{F#好妹妹}{M#好兄弟}，偷听别人发牢骚可不是什么好习惯呀。怎么，有事吗？有大事要案的话请去找大毫大人，如果是其他的麻烦事儿，请去找净砚执事。
E: Hm? Eavesdropping is rude, {F#lady}{M#sir}, you know. What's up? If it's something important, please go to Official Dahao, and for literally anything else, please approach Officer Jingyan.

C: 那两个商人啊…他们俩常年在罗浮做进出口贸易，想要贸易的货物重叠度比较高，所以关系相当紧张。
E: Those two merchants... They've been trading on the Luofu for years, and they often trade in the same stuff, so their relationship is pretty tense.

C: 想跟你打听一些事。
E: I'd like to ask you about something.

C: 行商为什么会在流云渡里？
E: Why would a traveling merchant come to Cloudford?

C: 老爷你这问法，确实是一个外行人。
E: You really do sound like an outsider when you ask questions like that, boss.

C: 结果枪手从棺木里掏出了一挺连射型重型能量机枪！哈哈哈哈哈，真是太令人意外了，仔细想想，他就是一名枪手，棺木里还能是什么呢？
E: So in the end, right, what does the gunslinger pull out of the coffin? A fully-automatic heavy energy machine gun! Ahahaha, what a surprise. Think about it! He's a gunslinger, so what else could be in the coffin?

C: 我做什么坏事被你记住了吗？
E: Was it something bad I did?

C: 诶，这位老板！老板好，看您面生，是头一回来「罗浮」吧？我瞧您人生地不熟的，现在到处都人心惶惶的，取货的话恐怕……
E: Hey, look at this bigshot boss over here! Hello, boss, is this your first time aboard the Luofu? You look like a stranger in a strange land, and there's panic in the streets. If you're here to pick up some stock...

C: 至于我，业内都知道我这人做事是最心细的。但凡开工，我都会遵循着严格的安全标准来，这样对人对己都好。
E: As for me, everyone in the business knows I'm the most careful person out there. Every time I start a project, I'll strictly follow safety guidelines and procedures. That typically works out best for both me and the customer.

C: 这种时候你还出来接单？
E: What are you doing out taking orders at this time?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 嘘——小点声。
E: Shh! Keep your voice down.

C: 有关人士？阁下算十王司的有关人士？有意思，在下怎么没听说最近有特赦啊？
E: A concerned party? Concerned with matters of the Ten-Lords Commission? How curious. I didn't hear about any amnesties recently?

C: 这次就这样吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 丹士长做得还顺利吗…
E: How's your life as the chief alchemist?

C: 你先忙，我要走了。
E: I've got to go. I won't disturb you.

C: 我现在负责打理穷观阵的一处阵法，至于具体的内容…无非是推衍卜算，记录涨落幅度之类的事务。
E: I'm now in charge of a matrix at the Matrix of Prescience... My jobs include making divination inferences and recording the changes.

C: {F#小老~妹}{M#小老~弟}说话还挺横的。这要在我的地界上，非得让你明白真志摩的规矩，不过嘛——这是仙舟罗浮，凡事讲究个「以和为贵」。
E: Tough {F#lass}{M#lad}, I see. We aren't on my turf, otherwise you'll be getting a good taste of my fists. But we're on the Xianzhou Luofu, so let's just follow their principle of "harmony" or whatever.

C: 是正经的工作吗？
E: Are your jobs respectable?

C: 随便聊聊，怎样？
E: How about a casual chat?

C: 这样一来，地衡司对我们也宽容了不少，甚至还邀请我参加「保护环境，节约用水」的环保活动呢！
E: Because of that, the Realm-Keeping Commission has become more lenient with us. They've even invited me to join the "Save Water, Save the World" event!

C: 您是想问咱为什么要开这么一家店吗？哎，这可就说来话长了……
E: You're wondering why I opened this restaurant? Well, it's a long story...

C: 会长在我出生之前就已经在这里了，从这个角度上来说，会长早已经是金人巷风景的一部分了。
E: He was already here before I was born. So, in a way, he's long been an integral part of Aurum Alley.

C: 哎，任何地方都有世事变迁，想要延续那些日子并不容易。
E: But alas, things do change. It's not easy to continue those good, old days.

C: 感谢光临，期待您下次再来！
E: Thank you for your patronage. Come back next time!

C: 你为什么会在十王司工作？
E: Why are you working for the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 倒也不是我吹，我家世代就干这个，无数个百年下来也算是有点眼力劲儿，因此挑出来摆上台面的件件都是精品。
E: It's not that I'm bragging, but my family has been in this business for generations. The experience we have passed down for many centuries has allowed me to find the best of the best.

C: 嗯？这不是{NICKNAME}小朋友吗？来来来，节目还没开始，陪姐聊会天。
E: Hmmm? If it isn't my little friend {NICKNAME}? The show has not started yet. Come on over and chat with me.

C: 讲讲「云上五骁」？
E: Can you tell me something about the High-Cloud Quintet?

C: 平时央求将军给彦卿买剑也就罢了，现在总不能央求将军给我另辟一个房间吧？没想到阻挠爱好的不是别的，竟是房子空间……
E: Having pestered the general every now and then to allow me to buy swords, I can't ask the general to arrange another room for me now, can I? Surprisingly, what stands in the way of my hobby is nothing but the size of my room...

C: 将军给彦卿出主意说，可以出掉一些剑来回血…可那些都是彦卿的心头肉啊！彦卿怎么舍得的呢！
E: The general suggests that I can sell some of my swords to get back the money, but they are my prized possessions! I just can't do it!

C: 建木之乱后，联盟的态度如何？
E: What is the Alliance's attitude to all of this, now the Ambrosial Arbor crisis had ended?

C: 天空还是属于年轻人的，到了我这个年纪，抬头看看也就够了。已经不是那个岁数了。
E: The sky belongs to the youngsters. For someone my age, it's better to just admire it from the ground. I'm no longer of the age to fly.

C: 还在玩《以太战线》吗？
E: Are you still playing Aetherium Wars?

C: 有时候他们甚至懒得设计，直接在衣服上印满了店名，偏生在化外民之间大受欢迎，听说二手都炒到天价了…这简直是在亵渎这个行业！
E: Sometimes, they don't even bother with any designs, and plaster the clothes with their shop logo. And they're a hit with Outworlders for some reason! I hear used clothes have been auctioned off for ridiculous prices... It's an affront to this industry, I say!

C: （询问寒鸦的过去）
E: (Ask Hanya about the past)

C: 客气了，欢迎客人下次光临惠顾。
E: You're too kind. You're welcome back any time.

C: 「这里就是牢狱最深处？」这铁皮囚犯声音低沉，就好像是观光游客向当地人打听景点信息，丝毫没有锒铛入狱的荒颓样儿。
E: "Is this the lowest depths of the prison?" This iron-skinned prisoner's voice was deep, his tone akin to a sightseer asking about the scenery. There was not a hint of desperation from one just thrown in prison.

C: 小小老板娘，能说会道。
E: You've really got the gift of the gab.

C: 如果能将它变成机遇，不就可以让茶楼经营得更好了吗？所以，我就去找西衍先生商量这件事了。
E: If I succeeded, it could be a great boost to my tea house's business. So I went to Mr. Xiyan to discuss it.

C: 哎，在规划好下一次的远行之前，我都会暂时留在仙舟，要是想聊天的话，随时欢迎。
E: *sigh* Before the next voyage, I'll be hanging around on the Xianzhou. You're welcome to chat anytime you want.

C: 我会把找来的宝贝卖给「赎珠阁」的瀚典掌柜，我们俩私交甚好，他对我不遮不掩，能当着面指出我高价买到的宝石是「远古玻璃球」。
E: I will sell the treasures I bring back to Pawnbroker Handian at the Jeweler's Pagoda. We get along well, and he never hustles me either — he'll tell me straight to the face that the priceless gem I bought is an "ancient glass ball."

C: 再加之，这段时间仙舟上出了一些情况，我这样的案件就被暂时延后处置了。
E: Something happened in Xianzhou during this time as well, resulting in a processing delay in my case.

C: 记得，我之前还拍过一张照片，怒目圆睁、仰天啸啸，看上去非常威严。
E: Yes, I even took a picture of them before: Big round eyes, roaring at the sky... they look majestic.

C: 再贵点儿也成。
E: I can give something worth a bit more than that.

C: 那我在<unbreak>1501</unbreak>米能用手接住飞箭吗？
E: So you're saying if I stood <unbreak>5001</unbreak> feet away, I could catch her arrows.

C: 将来你俩就成大明星了。
E: You guys are gonna be stars in the future.

C: 要我说真有内幕，那也合着也该是您和那停云姑娘门儿清。
E: If there were any inside stories, you and Miss Tingyun would know it better than anyone else.

C: 别忘了坚持运动，肌肉是不会背叛你的。
E: Don't slack off on your training. Remember, muscles will never betray you!

C: 我去天舶司与仙舟商业代表洽谈的席间，看到驭空大人的爱弓，那真是一柄十足的好武器，不过凑近一看那也并非真正的弓箭。
E: I went to a meeting between the Sky-Faring Commission and the Xianzhou traders' representatives, and I saw Madam Yukong's beloved bow. It's really a fine weapon. But upon closer inspection, I discovered it wasn't a real bow.

C: 博识学会是做什么的？
E: What does the Intelligentsia Guild do?

C: 没什么正事，你忙吧。
E: It's nothing, really. I can see you're busy.

C: 打听到什么长生消息了？
E: Did you get any information on immortality?

C: 如何？春分有没有进步！
E: Well? What do you think?

C: 这样吧，我给你一条忠告，就算再好奇，在仙舟上别问女孩子这样的问题…在任何世界都最好别问。
E: Let me give you some advice: Never ask a girl on Xianzhou that question... Or in any world, for that matter.

C: 能不能把话说完，什么资格？
E: What do you mean by "worthy"?

C: 你到仙舟做什么来了？
E: What are you doing in Xianzhou?

C: 我想和你随便聊聊。
E: I'd like to chat with you.

C: 嘿嘿，官方观赛渠道是在他们售票平台买票，但现在的比赛热度你也知道，抢票时间一开放，你等网络多加载两秒，就什么票都没有了。
E: Heh-heh, the official viewing channel is through purchasing tickets from their platform. But given how popular the competition is right now, if loading the site takes even an additional second or two when the sales go live, there won't be any tickets left.

C: 没让你打这么疼…不过，我确信了，这就是现实！
E: I didn't ask you to hit that hard... But now, I'm certain that it's real!

C: 街上都是军队，我好害怕…
E: This place is packed with soldiers. It's scary...

C: 真的吗？
E: Really?

C: 得了怪病，耳朵掉了…
E: I caught a rare disease and they fell off...

C: 好诶，听起来不错。
E: Great, sounds pretty sweet.

C: 好吧，那你问吧。
E: Sure, ask away.

C: 以前这里还不叫「浥尘客栈」。
E: This place wasn't always known as the Petrichor Inn.

C: 你说说看，星槎竞赛、狐术幻戏，帝垣琼玉棋…哪个娱乐项目不比呆坐一天，喝一壶淡茶，听人叨叨有意思？
E: You tell me: Betting on starskiffs, foxian magic shows, Celestial Jade... Is any of them less amusing than sitting down for an entire day with a pot of watered-down tea while listening to people ramble on?

C: 呃…容许我善意地提醒你一下，劫船一般是劫驾驶舱，你要不换个地方？
E: Err... Might I kindly remind you that skyjackers usually take the cockpit? Consider recalibrating your Navigation device?

C: 那我放心了……
E: Phew, that's good then...

C: 简而言之，就是确保引擎维持正常的运行状态。一旦有任何指标出现异常，我都要及时定位问题，排除故障。
E: In simple terms, it's about ensuring the engines maintain normal functionality. If any indicators show an abnormality, I need to promptly identify and rectify the issue.

C: 毕竟脑袋也是武器的一种…
E: After all, the head can also be used for offensive maneuvers...

C: 不过附身那位判官的时候，我觉得我和她有着完美的适配性，我一度觉得我就是她，她就是我…但是走入她内心后，我觉得不是这样的。
E: However, when I possessed that judge, I could feel that she and I were perfectly compatible. I even thought I was her and her me... but after going deep into her heart, I learned that wasn't the case.

C: …不跟你聊了，回见。
E: ...That's enough talking. Goodbye.

C: 青春伤痛可不是欺负老实人啊！
E: The sorrow of youth shouldn't be used to bully the earnest!

C: 难怪青镞看我的眼神里充满了疑惑。想必是见惯了景元平日里悠哉的样子，瞧我左支右绌，想看我能坚持到几时吧。
E: No wonder Qingzu looks at me with so much confusion in her eyes. She must be used to seeing Jing Yuan taking it easy on a regular basis, and watching me struggle to keep up must've made her wonder how long I can hold on in this post.

C: 太卜司的事务忙得过来吗？
E: How are you coping with your job at the Divination Commission?

C: 想再问些「建木危机」的疑惑…
E: I'd like to know more about your suspicions about the "Ambrosial Arbor Crisis."

C: 我没有！
E: Am not!

C: 或者听听小曲儿也好！
E: Or we can listen to some fresh new beats!

C: 我还是第一次见魔阴身。
E: This is my first time seeing a mara-struck.

C: 因为后来有的你急。
E: Because you are going to have something to panic about real soon.

C: 啊？为啥啊？他们提前放假，我们怎么反而要加班？
E: Mmm? Wha—!? Why are we working overtime, when they get off early?

C: 你们都说货物是自己的。
E: All of you claim ownership of the goods.

C: 因为我有读心术的能力。
E: I can read people's minds.

C: 活了几百年，第一次参加…
E: Having lived for centuries, this has been my first time participating in a funeral...

C: 啧，低价能买到什么好食材，你说做买卖哪有赔本的，那就说明肯定是用了些质量不佳的便宜货！
E: Tsk, how can they afford to use good ingredients with these prices? They'd be doing this business at a loss! They must be using cheap, poor-quality ingredients!

C: 第一次见他如此疯狂
E: This is the first time I've seen him so obsessed.

C: 我也想知道…
E: I'm curious, too...

C: 用料殊异如此之大，容吾猜测…你是炼成捍卫树庭的战略武器，亦或是钻研来自繁星的前沿科技…？
E: With such peculiar materials in such quantities, let me guess... Are you crafting a strategic weapon to protect the Grove, or perhaps researching cutting-edge technology from the stars...?

C: 阿格莱雅小姐…还有那种事？
E: Miss Aglaea... does that kind of thing happen too?

C: 做生意讨生活的事可不能说是受气啊，话又说回来，这么多好东西，你不会是……
E: Hey, doing business to make a living isn't about taking abuse, but come to think of it, with all these nice things, you're not...

C: 爸、妈，大家…我回来了。
E: Dad, Mom, everyone... I'm home.

C: 呜嗡~能解开从前的误会，已经是「大地」赐给我们的宽容了。
E: Grumph~ Being able to resolve past misunderstandings is already a gift of tolerance from Earth to us.

C: 我保证，这绝对是意外！至少这一回是。不过，我突然想到……
E: I swear, it was totally an accident! At least this time. But I just thought of something...

C: 拿着它吧。「贤者之石」——人们曾称它为炼金术至高的冠冕，获得它便能得到此世的一切智慧。但与整个宇宙的知识相比，那不过是冰山一角。
E: Take this. This is the "Philosopher's Stone." Once hailed as the supreme crown of alchemy, possessing it meant gaining all wisdom of this world. But compared to the knowledge of the entire universe, it's merely the tip of an iceberg.

C: 无数选择，才让我们走到今天。
E: It took countless choices for us to reach this day.

C: 要是有一天离开这里。
E: One day if I ever get to leave this place,

C: 这里个个都是人才，讲话又好听，我才不出去呢。
E: Everyone here is so talented and such smooth talkers that there's no way I'll willingly leave this place.

C: 我阿峰大好的男儿，竟然和你这种人齐名。简直是天大的耻辱。
E: I, Feng, am a true man! Why am I put on the same level as someone like you? It's the greatest insult.

C: 不爱看就别看，看你的……
E: Don't watch if you don't like it then! You uncultured...

C: 臭男人，你刚才说的是什么？
E: What did you say, honey?

C: 结果一场比赛都没看着。
E: But I didn't see a single competition.

C: 化外歌民，贪图不死，窃取机要，施真空浮牢，五感尽夺。
E: A balladian who sought immortality and stole important secrets. To be confined to a vacuum-sealed floating prison and robbed of their senses.

C: 材质：木头
E: Materials: Wood

C: 作为一个香炉，它无疑是成功的。点燃的瞬间，所有香客都在急救室见到了帝弓。
E: Its performance as an incense holder was unquestionable. The moment it was lit, all the worshipers could see the Reignbow from inside the emergency room.

C: 瞬间重启引擎。
E: Immediately restart the engine.

C: 这与停靠在星槎海码头的星槎相比，似乎是多了些玦轮。混合动力的星槎引起了一轮星槎革命——超远的行程，超低的能耗，遥遥领先。
E: Compared to the starskiffs docked at Starskiff Haven, this one seems to have a few more jade wheels. The hybrid-powered starskiff has sparked a starskiff revolution — ultra-long haul, ultra-low energy consumption and industry-leading.

C: 我向来是来去自由的。
E: I come and go as I please.

C: 好像是…「枘凿六合Remake」的广告……
E: This looks like... a Hexanexus: Remake ad...

C: 现在只是一只饭盒，但在把食物放进去之前可以是任何容器。
E: It is a lunchbox now, but it can be a vessel of any type before food is put into it.

C: 不会伤到其他选手吧？
E: She won't hurt other contestants, right?

C: 但是飞剑能操纵方向！
E: But the direction of the flying swords can be controlled!

C: 这场比赛你要好好看。
E: You should watch this match carefully.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 加入「歌舞社」——
E: Join the Song and Dance club —

C: 像是在做广播体操。
E: It feels like doing radio calisthenics.

C: 它没有伤到谁吧？如果它太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是某人；如果它不太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是货物…唉，做快递盒真难。
E: It didn't hurt anyone, did it? If it's too sturdy, it might injure someone, but if it's too fragile, the goods inside might be damaged... Alas, it's not easy to be a courier package.

C: 他怒啸着，高举手中的剑，向云骑们反复冲杀。那些他曾经信赖的同僚，那些他礼敬有加的龙师长老，每一张面目都如此清晰，如此可恨。他不想忘记。
E: Roaring, he holds his sword high and charges at the Cloud Knights again and again. He can see his peers whom he used to trust, and the Preceptors whom he used to respect clearly. Their despicable faces are etched in his mind forever. He does not wish to forget

C: 巨大的波涛卷走了它和战友，他们还安好吗？它焦急地向你发问，你却无法回答。
E: Gigantic waves have swept it and its comrades away. In an urgent voice, it asks you about its comrades, but you have no answer.

C: 你轻抚卵壳，看清了那一夜的奇遇，已经去世百年的短生种再次出现在你的面前，牵起你的手，呼唤着你的名字，你对时间的感受开始变得陌生。
E: You stroke the eggshell gently and see the strange encounter that night. The short-life species that have passed away for a hundred years shows up before you again. As she holds your hands and calls your name, the concept of time feels foreign to you.

C: 码头上堆放着各种各样的货物，让人不禁好奇究竟是谁需要街边的长凳、路灯以及石狮子。
E: There are all kinds of things piled up along the docks. One can't help but wonder who needs a streetside bench, a streetlamp, or a stone lion.

C: 天啊，没想到你是认真的，算你整本习题册全对好了。
E: Wow! You were serious about this. Let's count that as you got everything right!

C: 我听到了惊天大瓜！
E: I heard some earth-shattering news!

C: 你狠狠搜刮了一番，将「午夜谜箱」中的贵重物品统统收入了囊中。
E: You mercilessly plunder all the valuables from the Midnight Mystery Boxes and stuff them into your bag.

C: 那都多久以前了？
E: How long ago was that?

C: 不太喜欢，有点齁得慌
E: Don't like those, they're so sickeningly sweet.

C: 或者我们跟你回家…
E: Or let us follow you home...

C: 不不不，他们是脑子里缺根弦。一帮不务正业的年轻人，不知道在哪淘了本书，上面记载了个「见鬼十法」。什么半夜捉迷藏照镜子剁肉馅的，天天就在我耳边吵，一直求我现身。
E: No way. They are a bunch of mindless, unemployed youngsters. I don't know where they found a book that recorded the "Ten Ways of Seeing Ghosts." There was something about playing catch in the middle of the night and chopping meat in front of a mirror. Anyway, they kept bothering me and begging me to show up.

C: 一起吃饭的未必是朋友，愿意借钱的也未必是朋友，但愿意勤来对方墓碑前祭拜的，肯定是真心朋友。
E: Someone who eats with you or lends you money may not be your friend, but the one who is willing to pay you a visit at your grave is certainly a true friend.

C: 你伸出手、踮起脚，试图从中摘下自己的一束幸福——但它实在太高了，而你又太矮……
E: You reach out and stand on your tiptoes, trying to pluck your own little bundle of happiness... But they are too high, and you are too short...

C: 这条路肯定事出有因才会被拦住…还是遵循酒店的规矩吧。
E: This path must be blocked for a reason... Maybe it's best to follow the rules of the hotel.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>「不要打给『安谧的时刻』！重复一遍，不要打给『安谧的时刻』！那里不对外开放！」</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Don't call the Moment of Serenity! I repeat, do not call the Moment of Serenity! It's off-limits!"</color>

C: 架子鼓正在呜咽，你知道这种乐器在现实中绝不可能发出近似的声音。
E: The drum kit whimpers — you know that this instrument would never make a sound remotely close to this in reality.

C: 当你从这情绪中回过神来时，一滴泪已经流到了耳边……
E: When you recover from this emotion, a single tear has reached the side of your ear...

C: 梦泡如虫茧般附在这面屏幕上，使其肮脏如污泥。
E: Dream bubbles are plastered on this screen like insect cocoons, making it dirty as sludge.

C: 可现在…什么都捞不着，产品没人买，住宿费用倒越来越高，想让孩子来玩也付不起……
E: But now... I've come away empty-handed. I've sold nothing, racked up a huge hotel bill, and I can't even take my kids on holiday...

C: …哼，总有天，我要把家族的底全扒出来，丢到所有人面前，再踩上几脚。
E: ...Hmph, one day I'll dig up everything on The Family, throw it at the feet of everyone, and even trample on it for measure.

C: 味觉模组会帮我解析有机生命消费的「食物」，再通过模拟出来的神经元信号让我了解它的「味道」。
E: My taste module helps me analyze this "food" that organic entities consume; the neuronal signals simulated allow me to understand its "taste."

C: 留着总是能派上用场的。
E: There's always value in keeping these around.

C: …只要比你矮就能够进去吗？
E: ...As long as I'm shorter than you... you'll let me in?

C: 等等…这不对劲。
E: Hang on... something isn't right.
...Groo?

C: 我不止一次考虑过换份工作。但亲耳听见来宾们谈论匹诺康尼的近况之后，我意识到这份工作意义重大。
E: I've considered changing careers more than once. But after hearing guests talk about Penacony's current situation, I came to realize how important this line of work is.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 心虚的人才喜欢对号入座，而我甚至不知道你是谁。
E: Only those with a guilty conscience would take these comments as personal attacks. And I don't even know who you are.

C: ——是啊，既然脆筒本就是用来吃的，那我为什么要对你吃脆筒的行为感到愤怒呢？物品就该满足人的需求才对。
E: ...You're right. Since a cone is meant to be eaten, why should I be angry that you ate it? The purpose of an item is to satisfy a human's needs, no?

C: 既然这样，干脆弄点更抓眼球的活动好了——让玻璃瓶走钢丝，让垃圾桶钻火圈什么的；把客人伺候舒服了，还愁钱不来吗？
E: Now that we've come to this, why not introduce more exciting performances — get the glass bottle to walk on tightrope and the trashcan to jump through fire hoops. Once the customers are happy, I won't have to worry about the money!

C: 仔细想想，训练道具跟训练牲畜似乎也没什么不同，最后还是得能赚钱才行……
E: Come to think of it, there's no difference between training props and training animals. Most importantly, I must be able to earn money from it...

C: 匹诺康尼的「十二时分」。
E: The "Twelve Hours" of Penacony.

C: 心脏跳得太快——齿轮会——卡死的——
E: My heart is going too fast... The gears are... Going to jam...

C: 当然，如果有人不把《入梦守则》放在眼里，那么他很快就会意识到猎犬是多么可怕且难缠的对手。
E: Of course, if someone flouts the Dreaming Regulations, he will very quickly learn how frightening and persistent the Bloodhounds are.

C: 那你算问对人了——服务来宾是每一名家族成员的责任。我会尽力回答你的。
E: You've asked the right person then. Servicing guests is one of the duties of every Family member. I will answer as best as I can.

C: 开心不起来的。
E: The one who can't be happy.

C: 老袁突然侧过身，一手捂住腰后，满脸警觉与不耐。
E: Yuan suddenly turns sideways, one hand covering the back of her waist, her face awash with alarm and anxiety.

C: 老妇人眯起眼，喃喃赞叹。你看着她的表情，觉得自己又做了件好事。
E: She closes her eyes and murmurs compliments. Seeing her expression, you feel like you've done another good deed.

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 你会开车吗？
E: Can you drive?

C: 我真傻…真不该劝老爸来这买车的。
E: I'm so stupid... I shouldn't have convinced my dad to buy a car here.

C: 到底什么是「建筑的艺术」？非常简单！就一句话——「建筑是一种机器」！
E: Just what is the "art of architecture"? It's simple! "A building is a type of machine"!

C: 您放心，我会尽快完成调查取证，让您得到应有的处置……
E: Rest assured. I shall complete my investigation quickly and find my conclusive evidence, so that you shall be dealt with as you deserve.

C: 每年都有近百位偷渡客被救出，其后续治疗费用并不在旅游保险范围内。
E: Each year, we rescue nearly a hundred stowaways, and the costs of their treatment are not covered by insurance.

C: 那当然！这里可是匹诺康尼，什么没有？
E: Absolutely! This is Penacony after all. You can literally find anything here!

C: 不可爱。
E: Not cute.

C: 皮皮西一般不会让别人摸球。
E: Pepeshi rarely allows others to touch their fluff ball.

C: 那团绒球随着你指尖的动作摆动，仿佛要维持不住固态……
E: The fluff ball wobbles as your fingertips move, almost as if it is going to lose its solid form...

C: 遗憾的是，我从来没看过那部电影——毕竟我每天都要阅览成千上万个梦境，那可比看电影带劲多了！
E: Unfortunately, I've never seen that movie myself. After all, I need to view thousands of dreams every day, and it's much more entertaining than watching movies!

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 「幽鲁士餐饮连锁，用美味筑梦。」
E: "Yuluxe's Culinary Chain helps build your dream."

C: 你又吃掉了一个脆筒，幸好在梦中吃甜食不用考虑体重负担。
E: You munch on yet another cone. Fortunately, being a sweet tooth in a dream doesn't make you gain weight.

C: 好了，一切搞定。我在这集的戏份终于结束了。
E: Well, it's a wrap! I've finally finished my part in this episode.

C: （忽悠一下）
E: (Make up a meeting)

C: 好在我拥有崇高道德的赞许，这才下得去手。
E: It was only because I had the Praise of High Morals that I could do all these.

C: 感谢你的倾听，再见。
E: Thank you for listening. Goodbye.

C: 这片美梦之所以能够成形，兴许就是因为它能隔绝与它不相干的一切痛苦烦忧——可谁能想到呢？它们并不会凭空消失……
E: Perhaps this dream was able to take shape because it can sever all pains and worries irrelevant to the dream. But who would have guessed that such anguish would not just disappear into thin air...

C: 他的目光落在虚空某处，眼中浮现出一种满溢怀念的欣喜。
E: When he sets his gaze on a spot in the empty air, there is a hint of nostalgic delight in his eyes.

C: 对哦，只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视它的光辉，像你这样的外宾什么也看不到…真可惜。
E: I almost forgot about this — only {RUBY_B#members of The Family}"kinsmen"{RUBY_E#} can see its glow. It's a shame that it isn't visible to an outsider like you.

C: 我想跟你聊聊。
E: Can we talk...?

C: 呃…嗨…这就是个比喻，比喻懂吗！你还是问点实际的吧。
E: Uhh... Hey... It's a metaphor. You know what a metaphor is, right? Why don't you ask me a more realistic question?

C: 不过别担心，钟表小子很快就会重新振作起来的，滴答！
E: But don't worry, Clockie will pull himself together in no time, tick-tock!

C: 抱歉，我想稍微休息一会，就一会……
E: Sorry, I just need to take a quick rest, just a quick one...

C: 倒是您，看着就器宇不凡，您是做哪行的啊？
E: But you, one look at you and I know you're someone special. What do you do?

C: 你不知道这是怎么回事，反正不是你干的。
E: You don't know what this is about, but you know it wasn't you that did it.

C: 她是如此的美丽……
E: She is so beautiful...

C: 要想找个真正能让人放松的地方，这里再合适不过了。
E: If you want somewhere that can really help you relax, you won't find better than here.

C: 不要把我们赶回去啾！
E: Please don't make us go back, tweet!

C: 想到了！听我说——有只狗狗啊，最近换了新主人，它问：「主人，为什么你从来都不肯亲近我」，主人回答：「我始终都把你当成最好的伙伴啊」。
E: I know! Okay... There's this dog, and he recently got a new master. He asked his master: "Hey master, why do you never treat me like you love me?" The master replied: "I've always treated you like my best friend!"

C: 我来到匹诺康尼前就听说过，在梦境里有种供人娱乐的自动道具，很听话，完全按照命令行事。但工具就是工具，替代不了人类。
E: Before my arrival in Penacony, I heard that there are automated machines designed for amusement in the Dreamscape. They're obedient and always do their job well. However, tools are tools, and they'll never replace human beings.

C: 感谢您。希望下次人家也能给您带来幸福呀。
E: Thank you. I hope next time we can bring you happiness, too.

C: …什么都不做？
E: ...Do nothing at all?

C: 不听话的道具就该用鞭子抽！不管什么情绪，给我卖命工作就对了！
E: Disobedient items deserve a good whipping! I don't care about their moods! They're supposed to work hard for me!

C: 它似乎很遗憾自己没能喝到饮料……
E: It seems to regret not getting a drink...

C: 生命形式的差别不能轻易抹平，理解只是空谈！
E: Differences in life forms can't be easily ignored, and mutual understanding is merely empty talk!

C: 想要借「秩序」来实现自己私欲的，往往没法掀起太大的波澜。真正可怕的，是那些自以为在救赎世人的家伙。
E: If these people are using Order to achieve their own desires, then they can never amount to anything. The truly scary ones are those who think they are saving the world.

C: 你是偷偷溜进来的宾客？怎样，实物比参观手册上的厉害多了吧！
E: Did you sneak in here? Well, what do you think? The real thing is much more impressive than what you see in the manual, right?

C: 真是越想越气，这苏乐达我是喝不下去了，送给你算了。
E: I feel furious just thinking about it. I can't keep drinking this SoulGlad. You take it.

C: 男人用某种令人无法拒绝的语气介绍着他的小游戏，你出于好奇，决定尝试一下……
E: In a tone that prevents one from refusing his request, the man introduces his fun little game. Out of sheer curiosity, you decide to try it...

C: 我虽受命修缮此地，心中不免暗生惫怠。美梦往往令人乏味，混沌反而流光溢彩。
E: I may have been instructed to fix up this place, but tiresome darkness fills my heart. Dreams are often mundane, and chaos is just so much more colorful.

C: 男人的目光落在虚空，恬淡笑意中带着某种近乎神圣的喜悦。
E: The man's gaze falls upon the void, his indifferent smile radiating a certain, almost divine joy.

C: 嗐，表情别太难看，朋友，事情不是你想象的那样。
E: Hey, don't look so distraught. It's not as bad as you think.

C: 不知好歹的家伙，必须给你点教训瞧瞧。
E: You just don't know what's best for you. Let's see how you like me teaching you a little lesson.

C: 只能说，懂的都懂，不懂的——也没必要过多解释。
E: All I can say is, if you get it, you get it. There's nothing more to explain.

C: 我想离开这个无聊的地方，去更广阔的宇宙里冒险。我也想像这些选手一样，站在聚光灯下接受欢呼。但…那终究不是属于我的生活。
E: I want to leave this boring place and venture out into the wide open universe. I want to be just like those contestants and stand out in the spotlight as I'm cheered on. But... that's not the life that's been chosen for me.

C: 好了，今天先到这里吧，辛苦你了。
E: Alright. That's it for today. Thank you very much.

C: 而后来通过我那微不足道的人脉，也确定了你们并没有在流程上作弊。
E: Later on, I even asked some of my meager connections about it, and they all confirmed that you guys didn't cheat.

C: 红哨小姐平静了下来。对于熟悉她的人来说，这称得上是个奇迹。
E: Miss Red Whistle calms down, which is a miracle if you ask anyone who knows her.

C: 没有。那是啥？我知道巡海游侠、路灯侠、垃圾桶侠，甚至还有广告牌侠，可这球棒侠还是第一次听说，不会是你瞎编的吧？
E: No. What's that? I've heard of Galaxy Rangers, Street Lamp Man, Trashcan Man, even Billboard Man... I've never heard of this Baseballer. Are you just making this up?

C: 要是真让我碰上家族成员，我才不会给他们好脸色看！
E: If I ever come across a member of The Family, I'll make them regret it!

C: 梦境终究只是逃避的手段。
E: The Dreamscape is just another escape for people.

C: 泛银河市场里的星球基本都被开发了个遍，仅剩的几片净土也都是漫天要价的生态旅游区…只有在梦里，才能找到免费的处女地。
E: Every planet in the pan-cosmic market has been completely developed, and the few remaining areas of untouched land are ecotourism areas with ridiculous prices... It's only inside a dream that I can find free, untouched land.

C: 当然可以！知识理应在梦境中自由流通，每个人都有接受教育的权利与机会。
E: Of course! Knowledge should flow freely in the dreamscape. Everyone should have the rights and opportunity to receive education.

C: 年轻人，愿你们在大海静谧的怀抱中安享美梦之后，为世界献上一束破晓的光。再见。
E: Youngster, I wish that you would offer a ray of light to the world after enjoying the sweet dream in the silent embrace of the ocean. Farewell.

C: 一定是某个大英雄。
E: They must be a great hero.

C: 银河球棒侠是也！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 吃好玩好，小心忆域迷因！我也继续工作了。
E: Enjoy your time here and beware of the Memory Zone Memes! I should continue my work too.

C: 历史的喜悦之处在于，经历百般苦难，故事仍能传承下去，仿佛延续了往者的生命。
E: The joy of history lies in its resilience. Despite countless ordeals, the stories persist as if carrying forward the lives of the dead.

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 我这么大摇大摆地飞过去，它们肯定都会躲着我不出来，但小家伙们都不怕你啾。
E: They'll surely hide from me if I get close, but they're not afraid of you, tweet.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个特别喜欢哈努兄弟的小家伙，非要去见他，现在应该还在<color=#dbc291ff>哈努兄弟的休息室</color>等他啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a fella that loves Brother Hanu and insists on visiting him. It's probably still waiting for him at <color=#dbc291ff>Brother Hanu's lounge</color>, tweet.

C: 好快的动作啾！如果小家伙们都有你这样的速度，就再也不会害怕石头老板了啾。
E: You move fast, tweet! If only the little fellas could be as speedy as you, we'd have nothing to fear from Boss Stone, tweet.

C: 如果人家也有她那么好听的声音，一定能给美梦小镇招揽来更多客人啾。
E: If I had a voice as beautiful as hers, I could definitely attract more visitors to Dreamville, tweet.

C: 在这美梦之中，如何继续酣眠\n星辉失却颜色，霓虹过于耀眼
E: In this dream, how does one sleep soundly.\nThe radiant stars faded, the rainbow saturated.

C: 集团发展至今，人员冗余，流程复杂，是时候该改革了……
E: With the Enterprise' expansion till today, some staff will be made redundant, and with overly complex work flows, it is about time for a restructuring...

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 同样的快感，人类与生俱来就能感受到，但我们必须通过感官硬件与仿生程序才能触发……
E: Humans can feel pleasure the moment they are born, but we have to trigger it through sensory hardware and bionic programming...

C: 呵，没关系，这片该死的梦就是这样，总会把英雄的名字埋在夜里。
E: Heh, no matter. It's this cursed dream that buries the names of heroes in the night.

C: 但这个罪犯入狱后并不安分，还没待上几年，就又策划了一场闻名星海的暴动…致使一个陌生的名字出现在了阿斯德纳星系——你一定知道这个名字。
E: But this criminal was not repentant during his incarceration. Within just a few years, he plotted another riot that is well-known among the stars... giving rise to an unfamiliar name appearing in the Asdana star system — you must know of this name.

C: 关于哈努努…
E: About Hanunue...

C: 把它摆在你的据点吧，你可以随时用它变成哈努兄弟，重温你曾经的冒险…也是那位英雄的故事。
E: Show it off in your stronghold. You can use it to turn into Brother Hanu whenever you like and relive your past adventures... In other words, the story of that hero.

C: 再见，如果想聊哈努努，随时可以来找我。
E: Farewell. If you wish to talk about Hanunue, I'm more than welcome to entertain you anytime.

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 高糖苏打豆汁拌饭，请。
E: May I present Sugary Mung Bean Soda Mixed Rice. Please enjoy.

C: 在美味面前选择困难很容易理解，您可以慢慢考虑。
E: Being indecisive when faced with gourmet cuisine is quite understandable. Feel free to take your time.

C: 除了一份米饭之外，他似乎并没有准备别的什么。
E: Apart from a portion of rice, he does not seem to have prepared anything else.

C: 很久之前，在两位乐手的交谈中，我就学到了一个窍门——
E: A long time ago, I learned a secret from a conversation between two musicians.

C: 结果呢…仅仅是因为不加处理地食用那种珍稀物种，在他的故乡要被判处重罪。
E: Turns out it was merely because it was a felony in his hometown to consume a rare species like that without first processing it.

C: 啊…抱歉，我倒不是被雇来的吟游诗人。
E: Oh, I'm sorry. I'm not a hired poet.

C: 「深潜之后，我要见到从古至今最具智慧的人。」
E: "I want to meet the wisest person in history during my dive."

C: 我几乎没有办法简单说明制作它的难度。
E: I can't even begin to explain the complexities involved in creating this.

C: 当你受困于原始森林，久未进食即将昏厥，爬过的肥美甲虫就是美食。
E: When you're lost and starving in a forest and on the verge of passing out, a plump beetle becomes gourmet.

C: 你和知更鸟比，谁更有名？
E: Who's more famous, you or Robin?

C: 有个很有前瞻性的项目，关系到匹诺康尼的未来。具体的细节属于商业机密，我不方便透露太多。
E: There's a promising project that's going to shape the future of Penacony. Unfortunately, it's still under wraps, so I can't divulge any details just yet.

C: 萨曼莎似乎很放松，但你注意到她的眼神还是一如初见那样犀利。
E: Samantha looks relaxed, yet you notice that her gaze is as sharp as when you first saw her.

C: 商业投资，最重要的就是信任…我真不知道这种人是怎么能混到空艇上来的！
E: Trust is the cornerstone of business investment! I can't fathom how these individuals managed to get on board the airship!

C: 投资实体行业，好歹还能去现场看看，核实下情况。那种看不见摸不着的玩意，我奉劝你：以后要是碰到，可千万要小心！
E: When investing in brick-and-mortar businesses, you can drop by and see their situation for yourself. But with intangible investments, my advice? Be extra cautious!

C: 哈哈，匹诺康尼这个地方真是有趣…遍地是宝藏。
E: Haha, Penacony's an interesting place indeed... There's valuable information everywhere I go.

C: 啾！多亏了客官，大家才能安全团聚，人家一定会报答您的啾！
E: Tweet! Everyone was only reunited safely thanks to you. I will definitely repay you, tweet!

C: 家里人也天天骂我，这些年来我连个礼物钱都出不起，时不时还要靠父母打钱周转…如果我早点转行，我是不是就会拥有一个相对成功的人生了？
E: My family berated me plenty, too. I couldn't even afford to get them gifts for years, and I—I even had to ask them for living allowance every now and then... Would I have led a better life if I went into a new job sooner?

C: 我要点餐。
E: I want to place an order.

C: 我还真信了。
E: I truly fell for that.

C: 可惜我一直没有正式认识她的机会，直到上周，我在朋友的生日派对上遇到了她。
E: I hadn't had the chance to meet her until last week, when I finally ran into her at a friend's birthday party.

C: 我还想和你聊聊。
E: I want to continue chatting with you.

C: 那位教授…我稍稍调查了一下他的背景：匹诺康尼本地人，家境优渥；本校毕业生，成绩一般但有个好舅舅——据说是家族的某位大人物。
E: That professor... I did some secret research into his background: He's a Penacony native from a prestigious family. He graduated from this academy with average grades, but he has an uncle... who coincidentally is a big shot in The Family.

C: 理想，到底算是前进的动力，还是不切实际的幻梦？说实话，我也没想明白。
E: Ideals... Are they a driving force to move one forward, or just unrealistic fantasy? If I'm honest, I haven't figured it out myself either.

C: 我们共同经历了那么多事，彼此都很熟悉啦。在经理看来，最适合我的出路是什么呢？
E: We've gone through so much together. We know each other well. In your eyes, what do you think I'm most suitable for?

C: 继续深造会比较好。
E: It's better to further your studies.

C: 哎，算了算了，也别烦恼了。我还是尽快拿到毕业证书，回去继承家里的企业好了。
E: *sigh* Forget it. I shall not worry anymore. I better quickly get my graduation certificate and return home to take over the family business.

C: 谢谢你帮我做职业分析，经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
E: Thank you for helping me with my career analysis, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager!

C: 好好享受这场音乐派对吧！
E: Enjoy this music party to the fullest!

C: 音乐派对还会继续，因此乱破忍首使用的演出设备就留在了舞台上。
E: The music party will continue, so Head Ninja Rappa left the performance gear on the stage.

C: 我…不太喜欢人多的地方，呆在这会更轻松。经理不用管我，去忙自己的事吧。
E: I... don't really like crowded places. It's much more calming to stay here. Don't worry about me, Manager. You've got stuff to do.

C: 「——我等乃是『缭乱』！！！」
E: "...We are The Dazzling!!!"

C: …忍者，还有稀奇古怪的忍术，呵，谁能想到我这种只在乎音乐、活在闭塞世界里的无聊的人，会和这些闻所未闻的事扯上关系呢。
E: ...Ninja with strange bizarre ninjutsu. Heh, who would've thought someone like me — who only cares about music and lives in my own little world — would be involved in all these unheard-of things?

C: 我觉得就现阶段而言，我和老爹在匹诺康尼相互扶持下去。把日子过好，这对普通人来说比一切都重要。
E: I feel that, at this stage, what matters most is for my old man and me to support each other on Penacony. For ordinary people, it's most important to just live the best we can.

C: 慢慢来，总会成功的！
E: Slow and steady, you'll get there in the end!

C: 真的吗？可我总觉得，再怎么努力，也还是比不上那些有天赋的同学……
E: Really? But I can't shake the feeling that no matter how hard I try, I'll never be able to catch up to those naturally talented students...

C: 等等…原来是{NICKNAME}同学，好久不见！
E: Wait... It's you, {NICKNAME}! It's been a while!

C: 关于你的那本书…
E: About your book...

C: 请勿在赛前四个系统时内饮用，如无视警告，后果由参赛者自负。
E: Do not drink four system hours before a contest. Participants who ignore this warning will be responsible for the consequences.

C: 今夜，群星为你而旋转。
E: The stars are spiraling for you tonight.

C: 可以试试安心住借贷呀。
E: You can try taking out a safe loan.

C: 请阅读设备使用说明。
E: Please read the instructions on how to use the facilities.

C: 你会跳震感舞吗？
E: Can you do a quake dance?

C: 真好看…
E: So beautiful...

C: 总算能买「潘兴」了…
E: Finally, I've got enough money to buy Pershing...

C: 别急，我还没看够呢！
E: Not so fast! I haven't had enough yet!

C: 果然只在梦里才行得通。
E: It can probably only exist in dreams.

C: 往里面塞点什么好呢…
E: What should I stuff in it...?

C: 看来还得再想想。
E: Let's take our time with that one.

C: 看来即使在梦里，人也难免对不属于自己的财富分外眼红。
E: Even in dreams, it's like people are getting all jealous over wealth that is not theirs.

C: 我来视察一下情况。
E: I'm here to keep an eye on the situation.

C: 您是一位优秀的设计师，想必会与隐夜鸫的家人们有许多共同话题。另一方面，梦境里的琐事最近愈发增多，我们需要新的筑梦师来协助维护这场美梦。
E: You are an outstanding designer, I am sure that you would have much to discuss with the Nightingale Family members. What's more, there has been a rise in trifling affairs in the Dreamscape of late, and we require Dreamweavers to assist in maintaining this beautiful dream.

C: 倒霉，他怎么偏偏在最后一轮输了。
E: Rotten luck, he lost in the finals.

C: 不可能，我看中的偶像比她强多了！绝对是他。
E: Impossible. My idol's much better than her! It's gotta be him.

C: 要我说，这才是他的本来面目，还有那个大搞独裁的梦主，多半也不是什么好东西。
E: If I may say so, these are his true colors. And that dictator of a Dreammaster is probably no better himself.

C: 但独立参赛者的上限会更高。
E: But the independent contestants possess a far higher performance ceiling.

C: 好像还不止，听闻是要易主了，这……
E: Not just that, I think. I hear its ownership is also going to change. This...

C: 就是啊，轻飘飘一句话就想我们打发了。拜托，道歉要是有用的话，那公司开的保险业务就没有存在的必要了。
E: Exactly! And you think you can placate us with just empty words. Please, if apologies worked, the IPC's insurance division wouldn't even have a reason to exist.

C: 球杆呢？
E: Where's the bat?

C: 我不会是在做梦吧？
E: Am I dreaming?

C: 我…我恐高……
E: I... I'm afraid of heights...

C: 你们想好拍哪一款了吗？
E: You folks decided on which design yet?

C: 我们已经为您重新预约了。
E: We've rebooked your reservation.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 好吧，名字并不重要，你知道它是个巨大的气球，和折纸小鸟有着相似的外观，这样就够了。比起纠结这个，还是看看不远处的舞台吧。
E: All right. The name isn't important. You know it's a giant balloon, and it looks like an Origami Bird. That's good enough. Rather than struggling over what it's called, how about looking at the stage?

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 天舶司会定期举办微型星槎竞速赛，活动口号是：「快快快！冲冲冲！星槎战士在行动！」
E: The Sky-Faring Commission regularly holds micro-starskiff racing competitions, with the slogan: "Quick quick quick! Rush rush rush! Starskiff Guardians take action!"

C: 喵~
E: Meow~

C: 这里是你的地盘，你的地盘，必须得听你的。
E: This is your territory. Your territory, and it must listen to you.

C: 还是别在这里睡了。
E: Maybe it's better not to sleep here.

C: 说实话，我还怪不习惯的，毕竟不久前我还是个穷困潦倒、无人理睬的街头陶罐小画家，终日闷在自己的世界，偶尔在那儿街对角的广场边上支个铺，画点陶罐卖来糊口。
E: Honestly, it's all a bit surreal to me. Not too long ago, I was still a struggling artist lost in my thoughts, setting up a booth on the plaza across the street, painting on dolia here and there to make ends meet.

C: 你似乎遇到了什么麻烦。
E: You seem to be in a bit of trouble.

C: 首先是前菜——请尝尝您右手边的黄金蛋卷，它由禽蛋配上水犀乳、异果汁小火烧制而成，非常适合开胃。
E: Now, please enjoy the golden egg rolls on your right first — a mix of poultry egg rolls, aquarhino milk, and a special fruit sauce boiled over low heat, a perfect starter.

C: 我明白了现状了。我有道德洁癖，所以，我是{NICKNAME}的超我。
E: I understand the situation now. I have a moral obsession, so I am {NICKNAME}'s superego.

C: 也就是说——没人知道世界的前途究竟会如何。即使黄金裔们也是如此。
E: In other words, no one really knows what's in store for this world in the future, not even the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 这么说吧…如果你在奥赫玛听谁说自己笃信塞纳托斯，那么有很大的可能，这人只是不愿对泰坦顶礼膜拜，或者懒得参加任何祈求赐福的仪式。
E: Listen... If someone in Okhema declares themselves a follower of Thanatos, it's likely because they just prefer not to worship the Titans or partake in any rituals that beg for blessings.

C: 古老黄金裔的情与爱。
E: Love amidst the ancient Chrysos Heirs.

C: 「『为我求取泰坦之火吧，』终于，阿多尼娅如是说，『如此方可与我一生相伴。』」
E: "The one who brings the Titans' fire shall be my eternal mate. So the lady claimed, sealing their fate."

C: 然后，把你感受到的这股力量，像是撒网一样丢出来！
E: Then, cast the power that you sense out like it's a net!

C: 在天谴之矛陷入疯溃前，它也曾是翁法罗斯的守护者。纷争的力量，亦可平息纷争。
E: Before the Lance of Fury fell into madness, they served as the guardian of Amphoreus. The power of Strife is also the queller of strife.

C: 你害怕自己通不过试炼？
E: Are you scared that you would not pass the trial?

C: 我要听正史！
E: I want to hear a formal historical account!

C: 这杯水是由法吉娜虔诚的信徒——我最好的朋友为我准备的，她在每个晨露初现的时刻向法吉娜祈祷，经过复杂的仪式，才能得到宝贵的「祝福」，庇护我的口舌永不打结。
E: That glass of water was prepared for me by my friend, a devout disciple of Phagousa. Every morning when the dew hits, she completes a complicated ritual and prays to Phagousa to receive this precious "blessing." The blessing protects me from ever becoming tongue-tied on stage.

C: 先来说说你的收藏？
E: Why don't you introduce your collection first?

C: 呦，年轻人，需要老婆子为你占卜吗？
E: Oh, youngster: Would you like me to read your fortune?

C: 你这硬币——还有手里的其它东西，来路都不怎么干净吧？
E: This coin — as well as everything else you have on you... You did not come by them through honest means, did you?

C: ——呸呸呸，我怎么全说出来了！得，要不这样……
E: ...Pfft! What am I doing just spilling the beans like that? Well then, how about this...

C: 在我原本的家乡，人们采集种种香料，只是为了给生活平添一份滋润。大部分原材料来自树皮、草根、或者动物的分泌物——都是很原生态的东西。
E: Back in my hometown, people collect all kinds of spices just to zhuzh up their lives a little. Most are sourced from things like tree bark, herbal roots, or animal secretions — all very proto-natural things.

C: …都是些乡间戏言罢了，在这圣城里只能当笑话来讲。而且，如您所见，凡事到了奥赫玛都会变得复杂起来——
E: ...But that's all just rural superstition. Consider it all one big joke while we're here inside the holy city. Plus, as you can see, everything always gets a little more complicated in Okhema...

C: 而且，我相信黄金裔也是通情达理的，要是他们愿意听我讲解我的研究，说不定人家也愿意通融一二呢？
E: Plus, I believe that the Chrysos Heirs are reasonable people. If they're willing to hear me out about my research, perhaps they'd be willing to bend the rules a little for me.

C: 再见，我只是来打个招呼。
E: Goodbye. I just came by to check in.

C: 这未免有些卑鄙吧……
E: Isn't that a little shameless...?

C: 虽说死在战场上是一种荣耀，但送死和牺牲是两码事。倘若一点荣耀都没留下就死掉，除了家人，还有谁会为你哭泣？
E: Though it is an honor to die on the battlefield, self-sabotage and self-sacrifice are two very different things. If you die without leaving a shred of glory, who will cry for you but your family?

C: 出手之前，记得要多想。
E: Remember to always think before you take action.

C: 这便是我设想的，一个战士最好的结局。
E: That's the ideal I harbor — the warrior's ideal ending.

C: 战后，王亲手赐给他一面银色盾牌，以表彰他临危救主的功绩…要是我也有机会留下这等伟业就好了。
E: After the battle, the king gifted him with a silver shield, honoring his feat of saving the king... What I would give to have this chance to perform such a heroic deed.

C: 那时候，咱正巧听到工匠们给这手琢磨透了，我就偷…借了一点经验。
E: At that time, I happened to overhear that the craftsmen had completely figured it all out about this Hand, so I stole... borrowed some experience.

C: 请不要太过当真，我只是一位祭司，领受的欧洛尼斯赐福终归是有限的。
E: Please do not take this too seriously. I am only a priest — there are limits, even if I have received Oronyx's blessing.

C: 聆听市民的蠢动。
E: Listen to the civilians' plights.

C: …这很难理解吗？来，我详细讲给你听。
E: ...Is this so hard to grasp? Never mind, let me explain it in detail.

C: 你甚至不敢确定，在那头盔的深邃缝隙中是否存在着一双眼眸。
E: You can't even be sure whether a pair of eyes lurks behind that deep slit in the helmet.

C: …都一样。
E: ...They're all the same.

C: 希望它们，离远些。真的很难受。
E: Prefer dromases, to stay distant. Very uncomfortable.

C: 异乡的智者，请解答我的疑惑——
E: Wise one from beyond, please enlighten me...

C: 呃，我不太懂这些。
E: I don't know much about these things.

C: 黄土干♪，黑土软♪，红土炒家常♬——
E: Yellow earth so dry, black earth so soft, red earth stirred in a humble fry—

C: 合着您真打算吃啊！没想到除了我之外还有敢尝土的人，既然如此，我就不拦着您了。
E: You really were going to eat it! I didn't think there was anyone else who would try dirt other than me. In that case, I'll leave you to it.

C: 有个人在传信石版上发辩论场说，他在投奔奥赫玛的路上和家人走散了，结果遇到了一个不太会说人话的黑衣人，把刀剑架在他脖子上问他今天是星期几！
E: Someone on the teleslate forum shared that he got separated from his family en route to Okhema and encountered a man in black who was hardly able to talk. He confronted him with a sword, demanding to know the day of the week.

C: 来人，这有变态！
E: Guards, there's a creep here!

C: 烦死了！！！还有完没完？
E: Enough already!!! Are you done or what?

C: 我有充气肌肉衣。
E: I've got an inflatable muscle suit.

C: 我先走了，别太难过哈。
E: I'll be going now. Don't be too upset, okay?

C: 艾格勒在上，我刚刚说的「一跃千里」只是个广告宣传啊！
E: By Aquila, I was only using the term "great distances" for advertising purposes!

C: 在你的帮助下，这位发明家进行了各种测试，一段时间后——
E: With your help, the inventor carried out all sorts of tests and, after some time...

C: 喂，注意你的言辞！思考需要充分的闲暇，我是在厚积薄发，懂吗？
E: Hey, mind your words! Thought requires plenty of leisure. I'm accumulating energy for a sudden burst, you know?

C: 不用了。
E: No, I'm good.

C: 介绍一下？
E: Tell me about it?

C: 「山羊学派」专注于奇兽的繁殖和保护，但说白了，还不就是搞养殖的嘛……
E: The Caprist school focuses on the propagation and protection of bizarre beasts. But really, isn't that just simple breeding...?

C: 做掌粮官时的趣事。
E: Interesting stories of a food provisions officer?

C: 千言万语汇作一句话：给人打工就要做好预期管理。卫兵这活没机会出人头地，但也没有突然暴毙的风险，算是符合我的预期——对你来说就未必了。
E: Long story short: You need to manage your expectations if you're going to work for someone. There's no organizational ladder to climb as a guard, but there's also no risk of sudden death, so it's perfect in line with my expectations. I don't think it's the same for you, though.

C: 呜——困死了，究竟是谁在外面吵。让我看看，这是传到哪了…你是谁啊，找我什么事？
E: Wooo... I'm so tired. Who on earth is making all that ruckus outside? Let me see where this has gone out to... Who are you, and what do you want from me?

C: …是么。随着时间流逝，神驹的灵智也会逐渐磨损，你遇见的，或许只是具空壳。我们活得很久了，久得就像是扇年久失修的铁门。
E: ...Hmm. As time passes, the sentience of the divine foals will gradually dwindle away, and what you saw may have been a husk of its former self. We have lived for many a year, comparable to than an old neglected iron gate that creaks on its hinges.

C: 以斯帖阿姨最近可开心了，我听我那碎嘴子的工程师说，有不少老头在追她呢。
E: Aunt Esther has been in high spirits lately. According to my talkative engineer, she's become quite the heartbreaker with quite a few gentlemen admirers!

C: 你说交朋友这个事情真挺神奇的，之前让你帮我物色了那么多人，没有一个愿意和我做朋友。
E: It's funny how friendship works. I had you scout out so many people, and yet no one wanted to be my friend.

C: 可惜此后爆发了泰坦战争，又有黑潮作祟——人们无法去世界的尽头向{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}朝圣，便只能来到这座城市表达自己的崇敬之情。
E: Unfortunately, the Strife of the Titans broke out and the black tide was born... People were no longer able to make pilgrimages to the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} at the end of the earth. Their only way to express their reverence was to journey to this city.

C: 你需要多留心。
E: You must be cautious.

C: 与它的亘古辉煌相比，其它的泰坦简直…礼貌地说，黯淡无光。
E: When compared to their eternal glory, the other Titans are... to put it politely, a little lackluster.

C: 这些年来，我见过太多人走进神殿，有些人是为了求得泰坦们的神谕，有些人是为了寻找些什么。
E: Over the years, I've seen many come to seek the Titans' prophecy or search for something profound within these temple walls.

C: 就算是只言片语也好，请您讲讲吧！
E: Even a few words would be appreciated. Please share!

C: 嗯…我要留在这里，拥抱自己的命运了。
E: I will stay here and embrace my destiny.

C: 我心中有数：当她念出自己追寻已久的答案后，其命运便能迎来圆满。
E: I knew that once she finds the answer she's long sought, her fate will finally be fulfilled.

C: 用令旗。
E: With banners.

C: 棺材？！是我想的那个，死者长眠所处的大匣子吗？
E: Coffins!? You mean the large boxes where the deceased are laid to rest?

C: 但现在好像不足十二个。
E: But there don't seem to be twelve of you right now.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 这黎明云崖的老顽固们瞧不起我，我也瞧不起他们，但是我总得想办法在这里站稳脚跟，你说对吧？我就特别愿意和你这样年轻有为的人交流。
E: The old geezers on Dawncloud look down on me, and I don't think much of them either, but I still have to establish myself here. You get what I mean? That's why I enjoy talking to young, capable people like you.

C: 他们有权，而我有钱。我该怎么做已经不言而喻了吧！
E: They have power, and I have money. Surely, you can see where this is going.

C: 看来您和我有着相同的烦恼。
E: Seems like we share a similar predicament.

C: …又来一位，饶了我吧。我的魅力简直就是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}刻在我身上的罪恶。来吧，把你的石板交给我吧。
E: ...Another one? Come on. My charm must be a curse engraved upon me by {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. All right, hand over your teleslate.

C: 死难者众多的地方，总有它们翩飞的身影。
E: They are always found in places where many have met their demise.

C: 你似乎很了解*临终遗言*？
E: You seem to know a lot about last words.

C: 之后，六人卷入纷争而亡，三人投狱，两人为追寻法吉娜的秘酿离去。而我的祖先战时资助过一位平民，在她的掩藏下躲过了刺杀，建立了门瑟家的荣耀。
E: Afterward, six of them perished in conflict, three were imprisoned, and two left in search of Phagousa's ambrosia. My ancestor aided a commoner during the war and escaped assassination under her shelter, establishing the honor of House Mentes.

C: 嗯，去吧。愿塔…不，愿刻法勒庇佑我们。
E: Yes, go now. May Talan... No, may Kephale protect us.

C: 是时候打开天窗说亮话了…
E: It's time to speak plainly...

C: 若虫拥有许多种形态。究竟以什么面貌示人，取决于被赐福的灵魂拥有何种品质。
E: Nymphs take on many forms. The appearance they assume depends on the qualities of the blessed soul.

C: 为什么不让自己安心一点、踏实一点？
E: Why not let ourselves feel more secure and calm?

C: 老本行罢了——坠落的巨石砸碎了花园的苗圃，打乱了一部分记录生命质素数据的「种子」，而我正试着把它们恢复。
E: Just my old job — falling rocks have crushed the garden nursery, disrupting some "seeds" that record life essence data, and I'm trying to restore them.

C: 这都多亏了我们在云崖听到的「刻法勒」神谕，你说是吧？
E: All thanks to Kephale's prophecy we heard at Dawncloud, right?

C: 刻法勒它究竟怎么了？
E: What's really happened to Kephale?

C: 阿格莱雅大人对此一直深信不疑，诸位果然做到了。
E: Lady Aglaea has always believed in this, and you have truly achieved it.

C: 它始于一个渺小又崇高的理想：抵御黑潮。准确的说，从中活下来。
E: It began with a small-yet-noble ideal: to resist the black tide. To be precise, to survive it.

C: 总之，感谢你的协助，这是我仅剩的一点薄礼，还请收下。
E: Either way, thank you for your help. This is a small token of my gratitude. Please accept it.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 天外，又是天外…预言中这些我不理解的词似乎在变多，恐怕只能由贵客想办法解读了。
E: Beyond the sky again... The prophecies seem to house many of these cryptic terms I am unable to comprehend. It seems, honored guest, that only you can decipher them.

C: 希望我们在新世界还能相遇，贵客。
E: May we meet again in the new world, esteemed guest.

C: 瞧！这个稻草人的模样，是不是和你特别像？我可是观察了好久才做出来的。
E: Check it out! Doesn't this scarecrow look just like you? I spent ages observing just to get it right!

C: 呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
E: *yawn*~ I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...

C: 后天{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}。你就别送了，大清早的，田里的活忙也忙不完。
E: At the {RUBY_B#morning}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} of the day after tomorrow, you don't have to send me off. It's too early, and the field work never ends.

C: 白厄，你曾说打算离开哀丽秘榭，去外面的广阔天地远行，准备做得怎么样了？
E: Phainon, you once said you wanted to leave Aedes Elysiae and explore the wider world. How's that going?

C: 等我长大了，要像昔涟姐姐那样，变成一个又独立又强大的女孩子，然后去看看外面的世界！
E: When I grow up, I want to be just like her — strong, smart, and independent. Then I'll go out and see the world for myself!

C: 好像大家一起手拉着手转圈圈，我最喜欢了迷~
E: Just like everyone holding hands and spinning in circles. I love that, mem~

C: 嘘，仔细听。
E: Shhh, listen closely.

C: 这就是「咪」的魔力，我的生命和灵魂，统统都可以献给这个音迷～
E: That's the power of "mi." My life, my soul, all of it belongs to that one note, mem!

C: 最早来到这里的妖精，一些去了密林深处嬉游，一些一睡就不愿醒来。我呢，不知该去哪里，哪儿需要就去哪帮上一把。
E: The first fairies to arrive — some ran off to play in the deep woods. Some fell asleep and never wanted to wake up. As for me, I simply wandered to wherever help was needed.

C: 下回再来探望你。
E: I'll see you next time.

C: 还有你尝不出来的吗？
E: Wait, you couldn't tell what it was?

C: 就这样，不要动…
E: Perfect, don't move...

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游吧？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 我还以为你是个文盲。
E: I thought you were illiterate.

C: 我喜、喜欢阿波罗尼，想在这场无休的宴会中陪着他，一直、一直……
E: I l—like Apollonius, I want to accompany him in this endless feast, forever, and ever...

C: …来…来喝呀…来舞蹈啊、歌唱啊——赞美、赞美我主，愿为她…为她奉上世间一切佳酿……
E: Come... drink... dance, sing — praise our Lady, offer her... all the world's finest wines,,,

C: 富贵使我们相遇。
E: Riches brought us together.

C: 迷迷迷！你好好炒菜，等整家餐馆都离不开你的手艺，店长的位置就非你莫属了迷！
E: Mememe! Cook with heart. Once the whole restaurant depends on your cooking, the manager's seat will be yours, mem!

C: 这么说吧，孩子，你觉得我现在所做的事情，与之前在本质上有什么不同吗？
E: Let me put it this way. My child, do you think that what I'm doing now is fundamentally different from what I used to do?

C: 谁问你这个了！真是的，这种破规矩究竟是哪个混蛋定下来的……
E: I wasn't asking! Arrrgh, what kind of idiot came up with rules like that...

C: 别急，好好干，梦想总有天能实现的。我跟你说，圣女大人那飘逸的黑发，就如同最神秘的暗夜般深沉……
E: Patience. Just keep working hard — dreams do come true in time. You know, Holy Maiden's flowing black hair is as deep and mysterious as the darkest night...

C: 孩子，你听我说……
E: Listen to me, kid...

C: 在日常生活中，我更喜欢做一些思想实验。你可以理解为一些短问题测试。
E: Normally I prefer to do thought experiments, such as short quiz questions.

C: 不过……除了展望未来进行复兴，还有很多需要完成的事情吧？
E: However... Other than looking towards the future, there is still a lot to be done.

C: 尽管问吧，我的伙伴。我一定知无不言言无不尽，解答你心中所有的疑惑。
E: Any questions you have, my friend. I will tell you everything I know to solve all the questions in your heart.

C: 不行，就算世界末日也不能阻止我！我必须毕业！这需要你的支持……
E: No way. Not even the apocalypse can stop me! I must graduate! I need your support...

C: 嗯…有位织者正居高望远。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>悬空的断崖边</color>负手而立、审时度势呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is surveying from up high. The golden thread brings tidings: They're standing at the <color=#dbc291ff>edge of a floating cliff</color>, hands behind their back, sizing up the situation.

C: 恭迎伟大的{NICKNAME}回到了{F#她}{M#他}打卡过的王座！你曾在这里与凯撒旗下的众爵把酒畅饮，也曾目睹了一只捷足猫的妙计、一位学者的孤心筹谋……
E: Welcome back, great {NICKNAME}, to the throne where you once sat! Here you shared drinks with the nobles under the Imperator's banner, witnessed the clever schemes of a nimble cat, and the lonely plots of a scholar...

C: 你在叽里咕噜地说些什么呢？满口荒唐的样子真是半分未变。
E: What are you mumbling about? You're still talking nonsense, just like old times.

C: 尽管她在我这里做学徒，不过我倒是觉得她以后更适合当一名刻法勒的祭司呢。
E: Although she's my apprentice, I actually think she'd be better suited as a Kephale priest in the future.

C: 说好的黎明机器灯罩呢？
E: What happened to the Dawn Device's lampshade you promised?

C: 太好了，要说有什么值得我无比欣慰，那必定是奇美拉并未消失在历史的长河中……
E: Fantastic! If there's anything that brings me immense relief, it's definitely that the chimeras haven't vanished into the river of history...

C: 我得赶快给团队里的成员，找些新事情做……
E: I need to find some new tasks for my team members ASAP...

C: 且慢，我似乎遗漏了什么，刚才盘点有可能贴这张贴纸的人，是不是跳过了一位？
E: Wait a minute. I seem to have missed something. While taking stock of the possible culprits behind this sticker, did we skip over someone?

C: 这一声声宝…既有技巧，又有感情，的确很容易让人迷失。
E: All these sweet nicknames... They're delivered with such skill and affection that one can easily get lost in them.

C: 魔术？哎呀，这可伤脑筋了，*我们*也从来没有学过变魔术呀。
E: Magic tricks? Oh dear, that's a tough one. We have never learned how to do magic tricks ourselves.

C: 还有街头读物吗？再来几本。
E: Got any more street reads? Hook me up.

C: 遍布冰雪的大地…
E: A land covered in ice and snow...

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 嗯…有位织者电量告急。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>隐蔽的根系前</color>，用尽最后的力气等待呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's running low on power. The golden thread brings tidings: They're lying <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the concealed roots</color>, hanging in there with its last spark of strength.

C: 怎么不说话？
E: Why aren't you talking?

C: 真是美丽的光芒啊，简直像世界的裂缝一样，我也想投身其中……
E: Such beautiful radiance... It's like a crack in the world itself. Even I want to dive right into it...

C: 关于瓦尔特…
E: About Welt...

C: 等这个世界的事情了结，我们可以休息一阵子。你要是仍然有兴趣听，再来找我吧。
E: We can take a long break after we're done with this world. Come find me if you're still interested then.

C: 我是专程来听你讲故事的…
E: I'm here to listen to your stories...

C: 这是什么超展开啊？
E: What kind of wild plot is this?

C: 哔嘟…根据用户协议，本机不保证搜索结果真实可靠。详情可致电「星际和平家电」门店咨询。
E: Beep, beep, beep... As stated in the Terms of Service, my search result accuracy and reliability are not guaranteed. For more information, please call Interastral Peace Appliances.

C: 三月七、丹恒和我。
E: March 7th, Dan Heng and me.

C: 谈不上喜欢。
E: I can't say I like it.

C: 算了，想这么多也没用…我暂时留在这儿，就当是为了报答师傅的养育之恩吧，这样我心里多少舒服点。
E: Forget it. I guess there's no point thinking so far ahead... I have to stay here for the time being to repay the debt of kindness I owe to my master. If I think like this, I feel more at ease.

C: 那可不！我跟着这矿队走南闯北好多年咯。这片矿区开辟出来也就不到小二十年的事，不过具体啥时候发现的我是记不得了。
E: That's right! I've been with this mining team for many years. I can't remember exactly how long, but this mine has been operating for nearly twenty years now.

C: 没事就好，不知道老大的伤怎么样了…我要是能治好他就好了。
E: That's good to hear. I wonder how Boss is doing... If only I could cure him.

C: 能认识您真是太好了，我感觉工作又有动力了！
E: I'm so glad I get to meet you, I feel my passion for my work returning!

C: 「怪问题。你会一直待在新手村吗？朋克洛德是个人人都自以为能掌控现实的无聊地方，盛产没有保修的义肢、伪造的通行证，还有天才黑客——」
E: "Weird question but okay. Do you always just stay in the beginner's zone, Punklorde? Punklorde is a boring place where everyone thinks they're the master of reality. A place that's full of knock-off prosthetics, fake passes Accounts, and also some genius hackers..."

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}，您找鄙人有何贵干？
E: So then, {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am} {NICKNAME}, what can I humbly do for you?

C: 我早就看出来了，你其实是于尔丹那个老混蛋派来催稿的。但你却没有用他教给你的话术……
E: I can tell that you've been sent up by Uldan to hurry me up. But you haven't spun the same old tricks he taught you...

C: 不好意思，如你所见——虽然我确实是在这里写生，但我可不是画贩子。如果您想买画的话，恐怕得移步别处了。
E: I'm sorry. As you can see — I'm definitely painting here, but I'm no art dealer. If you want to buy something, I'm afraid you'll have to try elsewhere.

C: 我找到藏宝图上的展品了。
E: I found the exhibit item from that treasure map.

C: 不错不错！多亏有你帮忙，这批展品提前修复完成了！
E: Not too bad! Thanks to you, this batch of relics has all been restored ahead of schedule!

C: 先前我们与银鬃铁卫技术部沟通，结果却吃了闭门羹。他们认为铁卫机兵的机体数据属于最高机密，因此不便交给博物馆制作模型。
E: We put in a request with the Silvermane Guards' Technology Division, but they shut us down. They said that data from Silvermane automatons is top secret, so they're unwilling to let it be an exhibit in the Museum.

C: 你找到了一台平平无奇的老式显示屏，虽然做工称得上精细，但布满了划痕。
E: You find an old-fashioned and unremarkable display screen, riddled with scratches despite its fine craftsmanship.

C: 你觉得…在介绍中该如何描述母亲大人的早年比较好呢？
E: What do you think... How should we describe mother's early years in the introduction?

C: 没问题，那我就重新讲述一遍吧。
E: No problem. I will repeat it to you.

C: 我希望你能自己得出答案。
E: I hope you find your own answer.

C: 第二任大守护者斯维特兰娜•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
E: A portrait of Svetlana Rand, the second Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:

C: 仙舟上许多年前失踪过船只吗？
E: Was a missing ship reported from Xianzhou many years ago?

C: 别怕，现在是她比较理亏…
E: Don't be scared. She's the one who broke her own rules...

C: 不管怎样，驭空大人答应了今晚会在绥园与我们见面，到时候应该能问个清楚。
E: Regardless, Madam Yukong agreed to meet us at Fyxestroll Garden tonight. We should clear our doubts with her.

C: 我有什么好处？
E: What's in it for me?

C: （把电视关掉）
E: (Turn off the TV)

C: 喂喂，大名鼎鼎的开拓者不会想耍赖吧？
E: Hey, hey! The great Trailblazer wouldn't be up to anything shameless now, right?

C: 你不是…医生吗？
E: Aren't you... a doctor?

C: 但多一个人又有什么关系嘛，作为到处吃喝…咳，外出看诊的名医，我对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方了如指掌，让我当你的导游可绝不会吃亏的！
E: But the more the merrier, right? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide you could hope for!

C: 哎哟，这不是龙女大人嘛…来来来，我再给你们拿一些，千万不要客气。
E: Ah! It's the Dragon Lady... Here, I'll get you another serving — no need to be shy.

C: 这话说的太难听了。
E: This guy sucks!!!

C: 这要是我，我就不会道歉。
E: If it were me, I wouldn't be apologizing for anything.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
E: I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.

C: 驭空大人也来了？
E: Madam Yukong, you're here too?

C: 建议你听听驭空大人的建议。
E: I suggest you heed the advice of Madam Yukong.

C: {NICKNAME}，明曦，我有事找你们，等此间事毕，记得来找我一下。
E: {NICKNAME}, Mingxi, I have something for you. When you are all finished here, remember to come and see me.

C: 我听夕葵说，是你作为商业顾问协助金人巷商会重整旗鼓…真是多才多艺，还有什么事是你不会做的？
E: I heard from Xikui that it was you who became a business advisor and assisted Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in their dispute with the IPC... How versatile. Is there anything you can't do?

C: 看来家父让各位为难了呀。我叫霄翰，这附近的人叫我小少爷。
E: It sounded like my father was being a little difficult... I'm Xiaohan — people around here call me Little Master.

C: 这样吧，我帮你们想个办法。
E: I see... I'll help you figure something out.

C: …接受那些只有短短几十年的野心家，确实胜过了我们这些活久了的老东西。
E: ...We must come to terms with the fact that short-life ambitions will reshape a world where things were thought to last forever...

C: 我就在这里。
E: I'm right here.

C: …我饿了。
E: ...I'm hungry.

C: 尚滋味名声大噪，吸引了大量游客慕名而来。
E: Due to its wild popularity, Spices Supreme has drawn countless tourists to pay them a visit.

C: 欢迎常来金人巷！
E: Welcome to Aurum Alley!

C: 因为这里是金人巷。
E: Aurum Alley, of course!
Hmm...

C: 这比重新打造优势更简单直接。
E: Building on an existing strength is much easier than starting out from scratch.

C: 有幸运，有巧合，但无关紧要。
E: Not sure... but I don't think it matters.

C: （再仔细观察一下眼前的云骑）
E: (Take a closer look at this Cloud Knight before you)

C: 我还有些问题想问你。
E: I still have a few things to ask you about...

C: 刚才我就觉得你有问题，说吧。
E: I was just thinking about how suspicious you seemed. So go ahead.

C: 矮阿姨，您真是好身手啊！
E: You've got some moves!

C: 那样的话，我就连薪水都拿不到了。
E: If we do that, I won't even be able to draw a salary.

C: 你注意到斯科特虽然戴着墨镜，却掩盖不住慌乱，言语里破绽百出，肯定有什么问题。
E: You noticed that despite wearing sunglasses, Skott couldn't conceal his agitation, and his speech was riddled with inconsistencies, indicating that something was definitely amiss.

C: 它充分证明了即便是最辉煌的时期，金人巷的交易量也几乎是与现在持平的。
E: In the golden era you described, the old Aurum Alley had a trading volume similar to today.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 感觉你学到的经验不太实用。
E: Seems like you didn't really learn the most practical things.

C: 那个，你们是要去哪儿啊？机巧鸟还打什么星槎啊，浪费钱。
E: Where are you going? What kind of cycrane catches a starskiff? Total waste of money.

C: 到底要闹几次啊，有完没完，这一天天的就知道偷懒！
E: How long before that bird comes to its senses? It just won't stop slacking off!

C: 我这里有只机巧鸟，什么都好，就是有个缺点——不定时地偷懒。这不，眼下就赶在大家正忙着的时候又不知道跑哪里歇息去了。
E: My cycrane is actually a great helper, but it has one terrible shortcoming: It likes to slack off from time to time. Now I need it for something, but it's nowhere to be found.

C: 看起来这「残卷」竟然是货真价实的武功秘籍。不过这个招式的作用似乎与想象中不同——并非用来在实战中战胜敌人，而是用来在训练中模拟实战。
E: Looks like this "fragmented record" really is a genuine lost martial arts manual. But these moves seem to be for a different purpose than you expected: Not useful in actual combat, but rather used to simulate actual combat training.

C: 记住——史考特商业联盟，只为最强的你！
E: Remember, the Scott Business Alliance is only made for you, the strongest!

C: （用拳头殴打它）
E: (Punch it)

C: 勘测我可是专业的。
E: I'm a professional scout.

C: （先在附近找找「钥匙」。）
E: (Try to find the "key" around here.)

C: 希望「它」可以打开有意义的谜题，不要让人失望。
E: Hopefully, it can unveil a meaningful puzzle, and not be a disappointment.

C: （希望刚才那么大的动静，没有吓到那个老太太……）
E: (That was a huge ruckus, hopefully that old lady is okay...)

C: 这还怎么谈生意…
E: How are we supposed to talk shop with that...

C: 你的代号是…？
E: What's your code name...?

C: 唯有眼前这块无辜的看板，承受着语言暴力，却仍旧屹立不倒。
E: As for the board, it endures your verbal abuse, unyielding.

C: 光作为粒子，它携带信息；那我接触光，本质就是在接触信息。
E: Light as a particle carries information. Building on that, if I am exposed to light, I am exposed to information.

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: 真可惜，这一颗的口感真的很有趣——当然，没我的笑话有趣。
E: What a pity, the texture of this one is really interesting — of course, not as interesting as my jokes.

C: 不满开始积攒。只要假以时日，它终会演变成怒火……
E: Discontentment among the prisoners is growing. Over time, it will soon escalate into anger...

C: 至于刚才发生的…是意外啾！我要回去提醒大家啾！
E: What happened earlier was... an accident, tweet! I must go back and remind everyone of this hazard!

C: 哈努兄弟拿到了全部四把钥匙，用它们打开了监狱的电脑核心。
E: Hanu has obtained all four keys and used them to open the computer core of the prison.

C: 然而，整座监狱却因此发生了异变……
E: Yet, the entire prison is transformed as a result...

C: 现在的情况你们也看到了，整座监狱都变成了一团糟，路不像路、墙不像墙的。唉，这可如何是好……
E: As you all can see, the prison is now a total mess. Everything is ruined and destroyed. Alas, what should we do about this...

C: 又是…一幅画？而且看上去跟刚才那幅一模一样。
E: Another... painting? And it looks just the same as the one just now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为怪物们提供需要的饮料，获得信任，进而解决它们的情绪困扰</color>——这就是「惊梦酒吧」的调饮师需要完成的工作。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Making drinks for the monsters to gain their trust and help with their emotional troubles</color> is the job of a drinksmith at Dreamjolt Hostelry.

C: 新来的调饮师，以后还要再陪我玩哇！
E: Play with me again sometime, drinksmith!

C: 会有能用的收音机哇？
E: Got a radio that works?

C: 准备好了没？连个酒吧服务员的工作都做不好，就让我来给你上一课！
E: Are you ready? You can't even handle your job as a drinksmith! Let me show you how it's done!

C: （咦，它们还留在酒吧里……）
E: (Huh? They're still at the lounge...)

C: 谢谢！你是真正的好人！
E: Thank you! You've been so kind!

C: 我刚才查看了它的情况，没什么大问题，过段时间就能恢复清醒。
E: I just checked on him, nothing serious. He'll regain his senses soon.

C: 我还有些必须解决的麻烦事，那群孩子就拜托你了。
E: I've got some troubles I need to sort out. Please take care of those kids while I'm gone.

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: （做这个梦可比战斗要累多了……）
E: (Diving into this dream is much more tiring than a fight...)

C: 别傻愣着了，外面来了好多砸场子的人！
E: Don't just stand there. There are troublemakers out there everywhere!

C: 都冷静一下…
E: Everyone, calm down...

C: {NICKNAME}，现在能请再给我调杯饮料吗？
E: Could you please make me a drink now, {NICKNAME}?

C: 这代表我对在场的各位不会再有任何隐瞒，你们将看到——最真实的我。
E: I won't hide anything anymore. You'll all see the real me... the authentic me.

C: 我做好准备了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 就像人类会生病，「美梦剧团」也会受到负面情绪的影响而陷入狂乱。
E: Just like humans can get sick, members of the Sweet Dreams Troupe can be affected by negative emotions and become frenzied.

C: 我很好奇。
E: I'm VERY curious.

C: 在我这里，封存着名为「遥祝启程」的力量——它向无名客们收集「开拓经历」，收集冒险中的好运，为遥远的无名客献上启程的祝福。
E: This power of the Graced Voyager is sealed with me — it collects trailblaze experiences from the Nameless, collects the luck accrued in their adventures, and offers blessings for the journeys of distant Nameless.

C: …谁知道呢？我其实也不知道。
E: ...Who knows? I'm not sure myself to be honest.

C: 当然不是我啦！我能做到的事很有限。
E: Of course not! I'm very limited in what I can do.

C: 「我看你玩得挺开心的，担心你意犹未尽，所以我特意给你留了一个『银河强手棋（没有奖励版）』，喜欢就接着玩吧！——无名客•玛姬」
E: "You seemed to be having a blast, and I was kinda worried that you couldn't get enough of it, so I left you a Cosmodyssey (that doesn't have prizes). Keep playing on if you like it! — Mag the Nameless"

C: 不过闲聊的部分先放到后面，我来为你简单捋一捋现场的状况。
E: But I shall leave the banter for later. I have come to explain the circumstances on the ground in simple terms.

C: 一张…照片？这不是我吗？可为什么——我好像知道照片的主人是谁了。
E: A... photograph? Isn't this me? But why — I think I know who the owner of the photograph is.

C: 我们回去吧，这迷宫搞得我脑子都快炸了，也不知道能不能算工伤。
E: Let's head back. This maze is giving me a splitting headache. I wonder if I can consider this an occupational hazard.

C: 为了打造它，我耗费了家里所有的石头，你那弱小的哈努飞弹对它一点用处都没有！
E: I used all the stone in my house to create it. Your feeble Hanu Rocket stands no chance against its tenacity!

C: 耳边的垃圾话消失了，看来您已经找到了一份隐藏起来的宝物……
E: The whispering trash talk finally disappears. Looks like you've found a hidden treasure already...

C: 我明白了，尊敬的宾客，请跟我前往放映室吧——我来带你看看「钟表匠」先生留下的作品。
E: I've got it, my esteemed guest. Please follow me to the theater... I'll show you the work Mr. Watchmaker left behind.

C: 这就让我当导演了？
E: That's it? I'm the director now?

C: 没什么，请你先离开吧，我还有很多工作需要处理。
E: It's nothing. If you don't mind, I'd like to get back to my work. Please just leave.

C: 也正因如此，我才离开了他，在匹诺康尼寻找更纯粹的艺术，希望能为美梦带来真正的快乐，所以才加入了鸢尾花家系。
E: I decided to leave him because of that. I wanted to look for a purer form of art that could bring true happiness to Penacony, so I joined the Iris Family.

C: 你谁啊？看着不是这儿的人吧？
