E: Who are you? You don't look like a local.

C: 现在，我终于可以物归原主了。
E: Now, I can finally return them to you.

C: 去找胶卷了。
E: I was finding the reel.

C: 不过这部片子还不赖，至少为这个世界贡献了一些不那么无聊的东西，不至于让我在梦中都打瞌睡。
E: But I've got to say, this movie is not bad at all. At least it contributes something less boring to this world, and it doesn't make me doze off even in the dream.

C: 终于结束了…
E: It's finally over...

C: 这也是项庞大的工程，如果您有兴趣继续担任导演，随时欢迎您回来参与制作！
E: It is also a huge project. If you're interested in continuing as our director, you're always welcome to come back and be part of the production!

C: 目前各方已准备就位，您准备好就能开机了。
E: Everyone's at their marks now. You can start filming whenever you're ready.

C: 「看来哈努兄弟已经找齐了所有广告牌！快逃离这里吧。」
E: "Seems like Brother Hanu has already found all the billboards on this level! Let's bounce!"

C: 「距离逃脱仅剩一步之遥。但拦在你们面前的，是难以逾越的天堑——」
E: "Only one step away from escape. But what lies ahead is an insurmountable obstacle..."

C: 是！是！
E: Yes! Yes!

C: 「钟表小子」一向是匹诺康尼最有价值的IP形象，我们鸢尾花家系的「美梦剧团」也是近年来广受游客喜爱的产品形象。
E: Clockie has always been Penacony's most valuable brand figure. The Sweet Dreams Troupe of our Iris Family has also been a popular brand image that's been well-liked by tourists recently.

C: 诶，你快看，这儿的屏幕被修好了。居然可以凭一己之力扭转颓势，导演也太牛了吧！
E: Look, the screen here's been fixed. The director's turning things around on by their lonesome. Astonishing!

C: 咕噜噜，我听说钟表小子中的角色都是「钟表匠」先生的故人…说不定董事长认识的苏萨先生就是这样的人吧。
E: *gurgle* I heard the characters in Clockie are all Mr. Watchmaker's old friends... Maybe the Mr. Sousa known to the chairman was just one such person.

C: 「于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了……」
E: "And so, Mr. Soda began to brew up a mysterious beverage. All of this was to..."

C: 唉，该死的工作，该死的石头老板！
E: Tsk, curse this job and curse Boss Stone!

C: 当然，你帮我解决了一个大麻烦，我肯定随时奉陪。
E: Of course, you did me a massive solid for me, so I'm there for you whenever you need me.

C: 阿斯德纳野狼。
E: An Asdana wolf.

C: 我也这么觉得。
E: I think so, too.

C: 但随着剧集更新，这个角色逐渐发生了转变，从一个温和聪颖的智者转变为了一个专横的老顽固。他的藤蔓缠住了每个镇民的房子，钟表小子也开始反抗他的教导。
E: But as the series progressed, this character gradually shifted from a gentle and wise old man into this arrogant old fogey. His vines start wrapping around the townhouses, and Clockie starts to push back against his teachings.

C: 木头老爷呀…它是美梦小镇的一棵大树，帮助小镇摆脱了毁灭的危机，还为小镇开拓了辽阔的土地。
E: Old Man Wood...? It was a massive tree in Dreamville that helped the town shake off perilous times of uncertainty and develop vast swathes of terrain for expansion.

C: 朋友，谨慎是好事儿——但也可能让你错过许多乐子！
E: My friend, caution is a good thing — but it can also make you miss out on a whole lot of fun!

C: 于是这次我们决定把它做得更*复古*一点儿——请看这边。
E: So this time, we decided to make things just a tad bit retro — check this out.

C: 但请相信我，报酬绝对令你满意。
E: But trust me — you're going to be happy with the rewards.

C: 你描述了一个令人深思的寓言故事。
E: You tell a thought-provoking fable.

C: 我听说，黑塔女士和某几个科室授权给「公司」研发的产品，在运输途中被劫，现在下落不明，害得大家又得返工……
E: I heard Madam Herta and a few of the departments commissioned the IPC to develop some products, but these items were robbed while being transported. Now their whereabouts are unknown, and everyone has to re-do all their work...

C: （在沙子里打滚）
E: (Roll about in the sand)

C: 恭喜两位选手顺利通关！但比起通关，我们更关心——二位玩得还开心吗？「开心」比「成功」更重要！
E: Congrats to both of you for clearing the stage! But more importantly: Are you having fun? Fun is more important than success!

C: 哦！这严丝合缝的畅快感…我的强迫症被完美地治愈了！呵呵……
E: Oh my! The exquisite sensation of perfect alignment... My organizational itch has been quite thoroughly scratched!

C: 哦，又是一组投机取巧的挑战者。很抱歉，虽然我是个失败的钟表，但我也是有底线的。
E: Oh, another group of opportunistic challengers. Sorry, though I may be a failure of a clock, I still have my principles.

C: 在美梦小镇，钟表小子可是无处不在、无所不能的！比如…我现在就可以帮你解决这位谜钟朋友的问题，滴答！
E: In Dreamville, Clockie is everywhere and can do anything! Like... right now, I could solve this problem with your Big Ticker pal, tick-tock!

C: 烤全鸟！这可真是太糟糕了——我们赶紧救它出来吧！
E: A roasted bird! This is horrible — let's save it, quickly!

C: 这是因为那家伙偷走了谜钟先生的零件啾！我想帮它拿回来，结果不小心把自己送进烤炉了啾…你们拿去吧，小心烫手啾！
E: Because that fella stole one of Mr. Big Ticker's parts, tweet! I wanted to help retrieve it, but I accidentally got myself stuck in the oven, tweet... Go ahead and get it, but be careful, it's hot, tweet!

C: 「我们演下去，片刻间如醉如痴，扮演生命而不想到喝彩。」\n
E: "We will keep playing our roles, drunken and foolish in the moment, playing at life but never thinking to celebrate it."\n

C: 引导员
E: Guide

C: 我是「终末」的循迹者，你可以叫我「悼亡诗」。
E: I seek the traces of Finality. You can call me Elegy.

C: 一段时间后，所有人发现，能夺走一切活性的灰色浪潮，是针对整个星球的无差别疾病。
E: After some time, it came to the people's realization that the gray tide that left everything lifeless was a disease that afflicted all indiscriminately.

C: 拜托了，我看幻戏里的大侠都是这么拜师的……
E: Please, that's how those heroes in the immersia show their respect...

C: 我不要，我嫌弃你。
E: Nah, I don't think so. I don't like you.

C: 但是只要你用心学剑，通过考试，我们自然放心你前去应战。
E: But as long as you practice diligently and pass the tests, we'll feel confident about your duel.

C: 抹要圆活！我知道的。
E: And parries should be fluid and nimble! Got it.

C: 少来挑拨离间，我教给三月七的每一招每一式都是朱明剑艺中千锤百炼的技法。
E: Don't try to cause a rift between us. Every move and technique I taught March is straight from the Zhuming art of swordplay.

C: 呼——还真是不容易！
E: Whew... that was tough!

C: 哇，你的字好好看啊！那个…能不能抽空也教教尾巴大爷？
E: Wow, your handwriting is so beautiful! Can you... teach Mr. Tail sometime?

C: 嘿嘿，想利用本姑娘的胜负心是吧？那可不行！藏头露尾的家伙，快给我出来！
E: Heh-heh, trying to appeal to my competitive spirit? No can do! Stop cowering in the shadows and show yourself!

C: 这是内部检举，恕我们保密。
E: An internal tip-off. We're not allowed to disclose any details.

C: 那么着急比武，活不到明天了？
E: What's the rush? You only got one day left to live or something?

C: 你现在更应该关心的是你自己，不要把私人的数据放在公家的电脑里嘛，斯科特。
E: I'd be more concerned about yourself, Skott. Why were you storing your private data on an IPC computer?

C: 我又学了句仙舟俗语，这叫做：「手中无剑，心中有剑」！
E: I've learned another Xianzhou saying: "Though my hands are empty, my heart wields a blade!"

C: 没有自己的生活，你真的很可怜。
E: But you are miserable, because you don't have a life of your own...

C: 降低挑战难度，重新挑战强敌。
E: Lower the difficulty and challenge the formidable foe again.

C: 好、好的，椒丘先生再见！
E: S—Sure! Goodbye, Mr. Jiaoqiu!

C: 椒丘真的会做「灵丹妙药」吗？<color=#dbc291ff>下次遇见椒丘时，再向他问清楚好了。</color>
E: Can Jiaoqiu really make this miracle elixir? <color=#dbc291ff>We should clarify this the next time we meet him.</color>

C: 听上去全是跟书有关的工作……
E: I get the feeling that all these jobs have something to do with books...

C: 武功嘛…只管克敌制胜，哪管你练成后还是不是人形。
E: This is martial arts... All that matters is subduing the enemy and taking victory. Who cares if you're still human-shaped afterward?

C: 刚才那本禁书叫作《孤影剑谱》，难怪三月小姐会好奇……
E: That book was called the Solitary Shadow Sword Scroll, I can see why you would be curious, Miss March.

C: 三月小姐，你将书从头读到尾，又从尾读到头，你并非一无所获，你收获了故事。
E: Miss March. You read the book from start to finish, then from finish to start. You did gain something, you gained a story.

C: 你应该听说过「忆质」这种东西吧？它时刻反映着人类的精神状况。我想做的便是翻找人们的「精神垃圾」。
E: I'm sure you've heard of "memoria" before, right? Memoria constantly reflects the psychological state of people. What I want to do is go trashcan diving into people's "psychological trash."

C: 如此郁积的情绪迟早会把内心变成一个没有出口的垃圾桶，任由烦恼、恐惧之类的情绪填满却无处释放。
E: Sooner or later, these pent-up emotions will transform one's mind and heart into an enclosed trashcan — filled with emotions like worry and fear, with no chance of release.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 拉上朋友成为魔法少女！
E: Become a magical girl with her friends!

C: 呵呵呵…快乐的时光总是苦短，我想是时候和各位道别了。
E: Hehehe... Joyous times always pass so quickly... I think it's time for us to bid one another farewell.

C: （云骑军…不就是银鬃铁卫？银鬃铁卫里除了杰帕德先生，我还真没怕过谁。）
E: (The Cloud Knights... Aren't they just the Silvermane Guards? I'm pretty confident of my odds against them, except Mr. Gepard.)

C: 我想抹平自己与这个世界的差距…{NICKNAME}，能请你帮助我吗？
E: I want to bridge the gap between myself and this world... {NICKNAME}, will you help me?

C: 包在我身上！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 我看到可可利亚大人，站在擂台的对面，对我召唤出刀子似的冰锥……
E: I saw Madam Cocolia, standing at the other end of the ring, summoning blades of ice aimed at me...

C: 去丹鼎司吧，我有熟人。
E: Let's go to the Alchemy Commission. I know someone there.

C: {NICKNAME}？不好意思，玩得有点入迷，没看时间。
E: {NICKNAME}? I'm sorry, I was too engrossed playing, I didn't notice the time.

C: 我来自贝洛伯格。我们最近才和银河重新建立联系，小哥你可能没听说过。
E: I'm from Belobog. We've only recently re-established connections with the cosmos, so you might not have heard of it.

C: 接下来，在大守护者与贝洛伯格民众的见证下，我们将迎来一场历史性的对决。银鬃铁卫戍卫官杰帕德•朗道将应战「熔锤的勇士」铁臂卢卡。
E: Next up, with the Supreme Guardian and Belobog's people as witnesses, let us now unveil the curtains to a historical final: Silvermane Captain Gepard Landau will face off against the "The Moltammerville Warrior" — Luka "Strongarm"!

E: Run, run! Run, you fool! You can't win! You'll die!

E: Luka, the most important thing is to always throw the next punch!

E: Yeah. We're on the Xianzhou after all, so we might even find someone who here who knew him! Haha!

C: 哼哼，我早就是「铁臂之王」了！
E: Heh, I already am the King of the Iron Arms!

C: （卢卡马上就要挑战彦卿了…去休息室和他一起做好准备吧。）
E: (Luka's going to challenge Yanqing soon... I should join him in the lounge to make sure he's ready.)

C: 无论如何，让我们宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——罗浮东道主的守擂剑士彦卿选手！
E: Regardless, I hereby declare the winner of the match: The Luofu's ringmaster, Yanqing!

C: 因为刚才你打下的那场精彩的比赛，也因为七百多年过去了，你是第二个抵达罗浮仙舟，参与「演武仪典」的雅利洛人。
E: Because of that exciting match earlier, and also because you're the second Wardance contestant from Jarilo in the past seven hundred years.

C: 这位对手，看上去似乎不像是格斗家……
E: This opponent, really does not look like a fighter...

C: 也是，仙舟处处卧虎藏龙，以貌取人可不行——就让我好好期待一下吧。
E: Indeed, there are hidden masters everywhere on the Xianzhou, and you can't judge a book by its cover. I shall look forward to it.

C: 检测到进程被人为中断…即将重新同步数据。
E: Human intervention in the process has been detected... Initiating data resynchronization.

C: 观众们好像对这场比赛的评价还挺高的，卢卡的人气又上涨了。
E: It looks like the spectators enjoyed this match. Luka's popularity is on the rise again.

C: 等等，卡美丽小姐…这萨姆是什么来路？怎么突然要拉着我退赛了？
E: Hang on, Miss Carmella... Who is this SAM? And why are you suddenly pulling me out?

C: 打得过卢卡吗？
E: Can they beat Luka?

E: Nah. The Ghosty only allows me to leave Huohuo and come out alone for a dual-hour. If I don't go back soon, she's gonna flip. We'll meet again next time.

C: 气氛逐渐「丰饶」了起来。
E: The atmosphere suddenly becomes more "Abundant."

C: 被{NICKNAME}教练选到的记者将获得提问机会，请注意控制提问的时长。
E: Journalists selected by Coach {NICKNAME} will be given the chance to ask questions. Please keep your words brief.

C: 现在请{NICKNAME}教练再选一个记者提问。
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, please choose another journalist.

C: 他是值得尊敬的对手。
E: He's an opponent that deserves our respect.

C: {NICKNAME}的教练的回答越来越有水平了！
E: Coach {NICKNAME}'s replies are getting more eloquent!

C: 自从卢卡选手获得守擂赛资格后，网络上一些自称仙舟传统武术爱好者声称，卢卡选手不是仙舟人，按照传统根本没有资格参加守擂赛。
E: Ever since Luka attained the right to challenge the ringmaster, some self-proclaimed traditional Xianzhou martial artist hobbyists on the internet have claimed that Luka isn't from the Xianzhou, and according to tradition, shouldn't be allowed to participate in the final defending match.

C: 一段时间后，贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆……
E: After a while, at the Belobog History and Culture Museum...

C: 卢卡哥哥！不要输给史瓦罗啊！
E: Luka, don't lose to Svarog!

C: 你的精神状态真的还正常吗？
E: Are you all right up there?

C: 好嘞！忙完了随时来找我！反正我这也没别的客人……
E: Right you are! Feel free to come to me once you're done! It's not like I have any other guests anyway...

C: 小绿拉着小红跑了好久，才停下脚步。他浑身颤抖，一句话也说不出来。
E: Pulling on Scarlett's hand, Vernon ran for a long time before stopping. His whole body was shivering, and he was at a loss for words.

C: 这关难不倒我。
E: This level is nothing to me.

C: 无妨，命名流派并非小事，阁下应当深思而后行。
E: Let us not be hasty. The naming of a school is a monumental task. My lord ought to be more prudent.

C: 先说清楚，打扮成这样是演出需要，我只是勉强配合你们。
E: Don't get the wrong idea or anything. I'm only dressed like this because it's part of the show. I'll cooperate, but only to a certain extent.

C: …邪恶敌人。
E: ...Evil enemies.

C: 我…会尽我所能的。但请您别抱太高期待。
E: I... will do what I can. But don't get your hopes up.

C: 按以往的经验来看，音乐派对会和彩梦校庆同步结束。但要求延长举办时间的呼声也一直存在，所以这次究竟要办多久，谁都说不准。
E: According to past experience, the music party and the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration will end at the same time. But there are people who are constantly asking for the event time to be extended. No one really knows for sure how long this will last.

C: 我是鼓手。
E: I'm the drummer.

C: 辛苦了。
E: I'm counting on you.

C: 我来负责记录内容，等会就麻烦你实际操作小机器人了。
E: I'll be recording the content, so I'll trouble you to control the little robot.

C: 键盘•忍徒，音律•忍法的修行不可松懈，后续的狩猎还需要阁下……
E: Ninja Initiate Keyboard, the practice of Sound Release ninjutsu cannot slacken. We will need you for future hunts...

C: 行吧。匹诺康尼玩得差不多，也该去探索新的乐趣了。乱破小姐，别忘了你的承诺啊！
E: Alright. I think I've spent enough time in Penacony now. It's time to go in search of new excitement. Miss Rappa, don't forget your promise!

C: 哼哼…哼哼…哼哼…哼…哼哼哼哼——
E: Hum hum... Hum hum... Hum hum hummm...

C: 课堂上、图书馆里、走廊的窗外，还有校长雕像头顶，她总是能从各种意想不到的位置出现，向我阐述她的音乐理念和方法论。我从没见过这么执着的人。
E: She was always popping up in the most unexpected places: In class, in the library, through the windows of the corridors, and even on top of the statue of the dean! She kept telling me about her musical philosophy and methodology. I've never met such a stubborn person.

C: 忍者践行的「忍道」，只能由忍者自己决定。
E: The way of the ninja that we practice may only be decided by the ninja themselves.

C: 正是在下。
E: We are.

C: 你的成员在学校里公然闹事，你是不是也参与了？
E: Are you also involved in your members making a public commotion in the school?

C: （怎么回事…现场突然开始欢呼起来了？）
E: (What's going on... Why is the crowd suddenly cheering?)

C: 喂喂，说好的要教我忍术呢。
E: Hey, you promised to teach me ninjutsu.

C: 咕咕！你回来了，这次的晚会真好看咕！
E: Hoot hoot! You're back! The evening show was amazing!

C: 我选第四个瓶子！是我的幸运数字！
E: I choose the fourth one! It's my lucky number!

C: 哼，等着！就算这次失败了，还有下次！苏乐达天团永远不认输！
E: Hmph, hold it! Even if we lost this time, there's still next time! The SoulGlad Idol Group will never admit defeat!

C: 呜呜…我也想向阮•梅女士表达我对她的爱意。帮帮我吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
E: Boohoo... I want to express my love to Madam Ruan Mei too. Please help me, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}!

C: （收集得差不多，回去跟玲可和邓恩讲讲遇见的情况吧。）
E: (We should be about done with our collection. Let's tell Lynx and Dunn about what we saw.)

C: 你向贝洛伯格的垃圾桶组合讲述了最近发生的事，包括乐队究竟遭遇了怎样不公的对待。
E: You tell the Belobogian trashcan group about recent events, including the part where the band is treated unfairly.

C: 艾尔菲
E: Arfey

C: 财富学院
E: Fortune Academy

C: 行，机器摆在这，想玩的话就自己开吧。有什么建议，记得填在反馈表里。
E: Okay, I'll leave the machine here. You can turn it on if you want to play. Don't forget to fill out the feedback form if you've got any suggestions.

C: 想随便聊两句？我最近琢磨了个笑话，你看看如何——「世上充斥着自以为是的智慧，只有傻子才明白它们都是笑话！」
E: Just wanna chat? I thought of a joke recently. Give me your feedback: "The world brims with narcissistic wisdom. Only a fool knows that they're all a joke!"

C: 怎么，还想听那酒馆的故事？我还以为各位「开拓」朋友早拜访过了呢。可惜，老桑博也不是什么万事通，也有不方便多讲的事。
E: Mm, care to hear the story of the tavern still? I thought the friends of Trailblaze would've already visited it. Alas, Old Sampo's not all-knowing, and there are many stories that aren't convenient for me to share.

C: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
E: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

C: 你们在做什么？
E: What are you people up to?

C: 而且，只有保证好睡眠质量，才能保证应对紧急情况时的精神状态，对吧？
E: Also, you need a good night's sleep to ensure that you're in the best mental shape when emergencies arise, no?

C: 你梦到自己的武器被改造成扫把，说明你和我一样，注意到列车上现在用的扫把太旧了。
E: You dreamt that your weapon was turned into a broom. That means you're just like me — you noticed the broom we have now is too old.

C: 梦到列车长凶巴巴地吼你，恐怕是因为列车长素来勤俭节约，不舍得丢弃旧工具，你也因此不敢和它提起「换扫把」的事。
E: And for the conductor to be yelling at you, that's probably because they've always been thrifty, thus unwilling to discard old tools. This is also why you daren't bring up the matter of changing our tools.

C: 列车长刚刚专门为你设立的帕～
E: I only just invented it for you!

C: 唔，你们在做什么呢？是「闭嘴」出什么故障了吗？
E: Err, what're you guys doing? Is something wrong with Shush?

C: 紧急通知一个坏消息——列车刚才受到了高能粒子流的撞击，虽然整体上并无大碍，但食物储藏库的制冷系统已经完全失效了。
E: An urgent piece of bad news — the Express has just suffered a high-energy particle collision. We're generally okay, but our food storage's cooling system is totally out.

C: 就这样办吧。但我们彼此都要注意安全。
E: Let's do that. But we'll have to take care.

C: 我倒是觉得，「盾构机队」明明都是智械，却只会用蛮力。反倒不如「铁砧队」思维活跃，诡计多端。我现在有点喜欢「铁砧队」了。
E: I was surprised, though. They're all Intellitrons in the Fleet, but all they did was rely on brute force. In contrast, the Anvil Team employed their wits and had many tricks up their sleeves. I'm starting to like the Anvil a little more now.

C: 喵喵喵？
E: Meow meow meow?

C: 看起来还不错呢——巨大的玻璃瓶喷泉，展现了商业帝国不可一世的统治力！
E: Doesn't look too shabby. A giant glass bottle fountain that showcases the sheer dominance of a business empire!

C: 未免太敷衍了吧！至少也得是「一声赞许的*哼*」！
E: So facetious! At least a name like "'Hmph' of Approval"!

C: 诶，那是，那是——美梦剧团？模仿得也太逼真了吧？
E: Hey, that's, that's... the Sweet Dreams Troupe? This impression show is getting too real!

C: 「美梦剧团复出秀」。
E: "Sweet Dreams Troupe Comeback Show."

C: 放心，这回有本姑娘压阵，没人能关得住咱们。
E: Don't worry. No one will be locking us up with me around.

C: 你用安装了「镜头万花筒」的相机对准了藿藿。
E: You aim the camera attached with the Camereidoscope at Huohuo.

C: 怎么，吓得说不出话了？
E: What, so scared you're tongue-tied?

C: 此等境界，妙哉妙哉。
E: Such heights, marvelous indeed.

C: （给大厦上的睡蕉小猴拍张照吧……）
E: (Take a photo of the Slumbernana Monkey on the skyscraper...)

C: 怎么拐我身上了？
E: What's this got to do with me?

C: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
E: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

C: 管得这么烂，还敢要钱？！
E: You handled them like trash, and you want me to pay!?

C: 「奇美拉施工队」
E: "Chimera Operation Team"

C: 现在真是我了。
E: It actually IS me this time.

C: 哈，我都当了好久的管理员，你这队伍到底是个啥样，我还不清楚吗？
E: Ha, I've been an administrator for so long. You think I wouldn't know what your squad is like?

C: 大家还记得我提出的第一个队名方案吗？那就是——开拓者说的都对！
E: Everyone still remember the first squad name I suggested? It was: The Trailblazer is always right!

C: …是不是有点太快了？
E: Isn't this moving a bit too fast?

C: 你可以把它摆在<color=#dbc291ff>你的浴宫</color>或是<color=#dbc291ff>三季海庭</color>，这是冠军的特权！
E: You can place it in <color=#dbc291ff>your bath chamber</color> or <color=#dbc291ff>Court of Seasons</color>. It's your special right as a champion!

C: 你还好吗？还能活下去吗…
E: Are you alright? Will you live?

C: 在短暂的休赛期后，「豹豹碰碰大作战」<color=#dbc291ff>淘汰赛</color>正式开启，所有持有「银盏徽章」的选手，将在这一阶段决出通往冠军赛的胜者。
E: The Seal Slammers <color=#dbc291ff>Elimination Rounds</color> will commence after a short break. All contestants bearing a Silver Chalice Badge will compete for a shot at the championship.

C: 不好了，预言又实现了！
E: This is bad, another prophecy has come true!

C: 啊这…这说明{NICKNAME}选手不忘初心！
E: Oh... {NICKNAME} is certainly sticking to their original goal!

C: 一想到这场比赛会输掉，泡泡也发挥出了比平时更厉害的实力。
E: The thought of possibly losing this match pushed me to unleash even greater strength than usual.

C: 还的到底是真品还是仿品，你自己猜一猜喽！
E: Is it real or counterfeit? Take a guess for yourself!

C: …说到这里，多亏了「金织」大人送来的奖杯，点燃了大家的参赛热情，真是太感谢了！
E: Speaking of, Lady Goldweaver has our utmost gratitude for the trophy. It ignited everyone's passion for the tournament!

C: 好泡泡！快来救我啊！
E: Good Bubbles, save me!

C: 一枚硬币高高抛起，赛飞儿消失了。片刻后，她接住了正在下落的硬币，并带回了…
E: A coin was tossed high in the air, and Cipher disappeared. After a moment, she caught the falling coin and brought it back...

C: 哎呀，要算的数好多，头有点晕了……
E: Ah, I'm dizzy from all these calculations...

C: 有点可疑…
E: Sounds kinda sus...

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑。请放心，我们可是正经项目，从不搞那些邪门歪道。
E: Haha, just kidding. Don't worry, we are a legitimate project. We don't do anything underhanded.

C: 没有什么疑问了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 顺便一提！您之前用过的所有赛车已检修完毕，可以自由选用了！
E: By the way, all your previous cars are tuned and ready. You can now pick your favorite one!

C: 说起来，您出场的时候收视率飙升到历史最高点。
E: By the way, your appearance on the show boosted the viewership ratings to an all-time high.

C: 下了，拜拜！
E: Logging off, bye!

C: 我被幽灵小鸟诅咒了，你被我给诅咒了！{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，要死一起死……
E: The Ghost Bird cursed me, and now I've cursed you! {F#Bestie}{M#Bro}, we're gonna go down together...

C: 玩你呜呜伯的文字游戏呢。看清楚了！究竟是谁拿着枪，究竟是谁掌握了话语权。
E: Playing word games, fudging-serious-ly? You see this? Who's holding the gun, huh? Who do you think makes the rules here?

C: 她说「还是要救啊」！
E: She said, "Of course you've got to save me!"

C: …算了，既然仙舟小妹的事情解决了，我也不打算在这傻呆着了，那就回头见吧。
E: ...Whatever. Since the issue with the Xianzhou girl's been resolved, I'm not sticking around anymore. Catch you all later.

C: {NICKNAME}，问我些什么试试。
E: {NICKNAME}, ask me something and let's see if it works.

C: 能和钟表小子系列联动吗？
E: Can you do a collaboration with the Clockie Cartoon Series?

C: （结束营业）
E: (Close up for the day)

C: 不过，你真的、真的…没有更想成为的人吗？
E: But really, really... is there truly no one else you wish to become?

C: 我在假装四处看风景。
E: I was pretending to admire the view.

C: 花火和你眼神相触，一丝不祥的预感从你的脑海中闪过。
E: Your eyes meet Sparkle's and suddenly, you get the sinking feeling something bad's about to happen.

C: 多来点苏乐达，我爱喝。
E: Make sure there's extra SoulGlad. I'm hooked on that stuff.

C: 垃圾桶早过气了！
E: Trashcans are old news!

C: 不，这是两个热爱咖啡的灵魂之间的共鸣！
E: No, this is a resonance between two coffee-loving souls!

C: 答案当然是——比起「开拓」，你更喜欢这样的生活！
E: The answer is clear. Compared to "Trailblazing," you enjoy this kind of life more!

C: 这…是…哪里？
E: Where... am I?

C: 她又随机抓路人上班了。
E: She's pulled in a random passerby for work again.

C: 花火驻场的惊梦酒吧再次开业啦。走过路过，不要错过哟。
E: Sparkle's Dreamjolt Hostelry is open again! Don't miss out if you're passing by.

C: 我很好奇数字版的我会怎么评价你的表现。或许她会比我更宽容一些，毕竟她还没见识过太多蠢材。
E: I wonder how my AI version will assess your work. She might be more forgiving than I am, since she hasn't been exposed to as many fools yet.

C: 既然人到齐了，那我们就直入正题，聊聊合作内容吧。
E: Now that everyone's here, let's cut to the chase and talk about our collaboration.

C: 最有价值的资产是人——这倒确实是翡翠女士一以贯之的财富哲学。
E: People are the most valuable assets. That has definitely been Madam Jade's consistent philosophy on wealth.

C: 「货币战争」是谁开发的？
E: Who developed the Currency Wars?

C: 什么玄机？
E: What enigma is that?

C: 你管这叫接生？
E: You call that delivering a newborn?

C: 快，趁他们现在势单力薄，做掉他们！上！
E: Quick, take advantage of their weak position to rid them once and for all. Go!

C: 文档目录第三千六百三…
E: Document directory article <unbreak>3630</unbreak>...

C: 要铸造出这把神兵，有三者不可或缺，天材地宝不过其一。{NICKNAME}，你可知还有其他哪两样不可缺少？
E: There are three conditions we need to meet in order to forge this divine weapon, and the sacred materials we have collected so far only count as one. {NICKNAME}, do you know what the other two are?

C: 西衍先生声情并茂地录了几段评书……
E: Mr. Xiyan puts a lot of emotion into his performance...

C: 辛苦你了，有了这玩意的帮忙，客流量一定少不了。
E: Thank you for your help! With these recordings, we'll definitely get more customers.

C: 嘿，来场对决吧，随便玩玩就行。
E: Hey, let's battle. Just a casual match is fine.

C: 呃…哈哈，这个……
E: Uh... Haha, well, that's...

C: 除此之外，我没有其他任何想法了：我可以向你保证——以我的名誉和这副面具起誓！
E: I have no hidden agendas, I can assure you of that — I swear on my reputation and my mask!

C: 如果{M#他们}{F#她们}输了，这枚硬币自然是各位的战利品，任各位随意处置……
E: If they lose, the coin will naturally become yours, and you can do as you wish with it...

C: 那也就是说，这枚硬币不属于托帕——那它的主人是谁呢？硬币上好像也没有相关信息……
E: I suppose that means this coin doesn't belong to Miss Topaz after all. I wonder whose it could be... it doesn't seem to have any info on it...

C: 但这实在是有点奇怪——所有被封装成以太灵的生物数据，应该都不会有特殊性格才是。
E: Hmm, I must say though, this one is a bit peculiar. Aether Spirits are usually just digital representations of creatures — they shouldn't possess any specific traits.

C: 当然，「武器试验场」是过去式了——现在它是「星际决胜庆典」的大赛会场。
E: Haha, don't worry, you won't find any "weapon testing" going on here. Now it's the venue for the Interastral Tournament Festival!

C: （收集更多游离数据，把队伍填满吧……）
E: (Better gather more roaming data and strengthen my team...)

C: 让我们把决胜乐园烧成灰！
E: Why so SERIOUS!? Let's put a happy little fire on this place!

C: 我们走，{NICKNAME}——去挑战希露瓦和佩拉吧！
E: Let's get moving, {NICKNAME}! Time to show Pela and Serval what we're made of!

C: 嗯…咳咳。这位玩家，你们应该是认识的——我和希露瓦也认识，但乔瓦尼先生只让我们透露这些信息了。
E: Ahem, well... This player isn't a stranger — we know them, too, but Mr. Giovanni has asked us not to divulge too much information.

C: …这群人到底怎么回事啊？！一句话也不说就夹着尾巴逃了，刚才不还很神气嘛？
E: ...What's with these people!? They talk the talk then run off with their tails between their legs...

C: …别提了。上次交过手之后，她应该已经满意了。
E: ...Please don't bring her up. I'm sure she's pretty pleased with herself after our last encounter.

C: 好了，事情搞定了就快走吧。难道还指望我给你们泡壶热茶，再开个茶话会不成？
E: Alright, let's wrap things up and get going. Next you'll be asking for a tea party...

C: 太可惜了…
E: I would LOVE to see that happen.

C: …晚啦，眼泪都被我咽回去了！
E: Mm... Too late, the moment's gone!

C: 这个声音…难道是……
E: That sounds like...

C: 接下来，将为两位玩家介绍「决胜乐园『大矿区』」的谜题内容——
E: Allow me to introduce the puzzles for the Great Mine Victory Zone.

C: …真的假的？！
E: What!?

C: 一定要吗？好吧...不知道你们为什么都喜欢玩这游戏......
E: Do we have to? Fine... I don't know why you all like this game so much...

C: 又见面了，看来你是真喜欢《以太战线》这款游戏呀。
E: We meet again! I see you really are an Aetherium Wars super fan!

C: 没事了，谢谢你。
E: Nothing, thanks.

C: 请多指教！
E: Show us what you've got!

C: 呀，我们又见面啦！真没想到会在这儿再见到你们～
E: Fancy running into you two again! What a pleasant surprise~

C: 嘁，想多了。
E: Tsk, don't get ahead of yourself!

C: 他们…不会是来迎接咱们的吧？
E: Do you think... they're here to welcome us?

C: 欸，原来还有奖金的吗？
E: Huh, there's a cash prize?

C: 我们会把次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神还给你。
E: It'd be best if you took Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord back.

C: 「那位丹鼎司医士正要过去抓住白露大人，白露大人竟然凭空消失，让她扑了个空……」
E: "One of the healers from the Alchemy Commission had Lady Bailu cornered, but then she disappeared into thin air..."

C: 藿藿讲起了绥园中发生的岁阳灾异，以及浮烟的要求。
E: Huohuo tells Jing Yuan about the heliobi crisis and Cirrus' demand.

C: 胜败兵家事未期。若你想再来过，我可以随时奉陪，等候你不断挑战。当然，得赢过这四位才行。
E: Should you decide to try again, my offer still stands... but you must defeat them.

C: 喂！你们几个！赌约还没结束，再和我比一场！
E: Hey! We're not done here! You still owe me a fight!

C: 可别等太久啊，我担心她们又趁机逃到别处去。
E: Don't wait too long. They might make a run for it before we get there.

C: 嗯嗯，谢谢几位。我先走啦～
E: Okay, I'm going back now. Thanks for the rescue~

C: 啊，有只虫子飞来了，嗡嗡嗡，{F#她}{M#他}是来嘲笑我这束火焰，还是打算浪费唾沫星子试图用人类的道德感化我？就让咱们拭目以待吧……
E: Speaking of which, it seems one of them has come to visit me. I wonder, is {F#she}{M#he} here to taunt me, or implement some sort of restorative justice? We'll just have to wait and see...

C: 总之，一想到这些妖怪到处乱跑，我还是没法置身事外。尤其是它们之前还把我和小桂子吓得半死，这事可不能就这么算了。
E: Ugh, I can't stand the thought of those things roaming free. After what Little Gui and I went through, I'm not about to let them have their ghostly way.

C: 本想将你们一起带入快乐自由的儿童世界，不过既然你们执意要煞风景…就别怪阿灼用暴力来和你们对话啦！
E: Hmph, I was considering letting you join the club and have fun with us... but since you're so determined to spoil everything... I'm afraid we'll have to settle our differences through violence.

C: 所幸其他人没有受伤。
E: At least no one else got hurt.

C: 岁阳擅长顺着人的弱点趁虚而入…无论是谁都有弱点，这不是符玄大人的错。
E: Heliobi are good at finding people's weaknesses and exploiting them... Everyone has some kind of weakness — you're not to blame.

C: 是你自己来搭话的嘛。
E: You're the one who brought it up.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么了？为何一副上气不接下气的样子？
E: {NICKNAME}, is something the matter? You seem out of breath.

C: 几位来得正好，我刚刚自剑阵中有了些体悟，不如就以你们几位作为砥石，试试它的锋芒？
E: You're just in time. The swords have taught me something already... I'd like to see how sharp my skills have become...

C: 彦卿不会为了向我证明什么而拔剑的。我对他有信心。
E: Yanqing would never draw his sword on me to prove himself. I have confidence in him.

C: 倘若那时，星核猎手的剑刺穿了你的身体，你连站在这儿思考胜负意义的机会也不会有。
E: If the sword of that Stellaron Hunter had pierced your flesh, you wouldn't be standing here pondering the meaning of victory and defeat.

C: 呼，那我们也走吧！
E: Alright, let's get out of here!

C: 彦卿学艺不精，屡次败北…
E: My skills are lacking... I've been through countless defeats...

C: 可是怎么可能有岁阳愿意帮助人类，等等——寒鸦小姐的意思是？
E: But why would a heliobus ever want to help people? Wait... Miss Hanya, do you mean to say that...

C: 不过，就像我之前所说，腾骁与燎原，彼时交战的双方可谓旗鼓相当。
E: As I mentioned previously, when Teng Xiao and Ignamar fought, the scales were balanced.

C: 但对于你，浮烟，这场枰上棋争打从一开始就没有公平的原则——我的实力完全在你之上。
E: But for you, Cirrus, this game was never about fairness, was it? And yet here we are — my power decidedly outmatches yours.

C: 没错没错，这几日全仰赖{NICKNAME}了，景元在此谢过。
E: Not at all. You have been of great assistance these past days, and for that I express my gratitude.

C: 当然啦，我知道大家对这个新型捉鬼方式不是很信任…那你们稍等一下啊，我来翻翻情报，咱们几人挑一个先试试。
E: I feel like some of you aren't convinced by the whole online ghost-hunting thing... How about this — we take a look at the leads we have so far, and pick one to try out as a test run.

C: 你不是装可怜！听说你爸妈也不要你了，确实可怜！
E: I heard your parents don't want you anymore — YOU should be the one feeling sorry.

C: 「每个人都离开了」是吧？简单，看老子把他们都拉回来！
E: "All gone"? Just watch me, I'll drag them all back!

C: 您好，我是十王司的冥差守灵，在这里等候您多时了，我会协助您将岁阳锁进「束形却邪阵」的镇妖塔里。
E: Hello, I am a spiritfarer, guardian spirit of the Ten-Lords Commission. I have awaited you here for a long time. I will assist you in locking the heliobi in the Evil Binding Matrix's suppression tower.

C: 我能理解文远先生的感受，接受「离开」并不容易，我也一样。哎……
E: I can understand Mr. Wenyuan's sentiments. It's hard to accept someone leaving; I'm the same. Sigh...

C: 其实不瞒您说，岁阳天性自由，我也的确想过要逃走。但我改变了想法，我想留在这里。
E: If I'm honest with you, heliobi have a free nature, and I've thought about running off before. But I've changed my mind, and I want to stay here.

C: 这很不对劲…
E: Something is very strange about this...

C: 呃，有时候…当然会有！但也只是一瞬间的事情。向全宇宙证明自己的野心，这样的念头，谁能没有嘛？
E: Ugh well... sometimes, of course! But it's only ever just a fleeting thought. Being able to prove your ambition to the entire universe, who wouldn't want that?

C: 也许一周，也许几个月，谁知道呢？队伍最前头那家伙从三个月前就在这儿排着了。
E: Maybe a week, maybe a few months, who knows? That guy at the front of the queue has been waiting for three months.

C: 不得造次！这位{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}我认得，{F#她}{M#他}是青总发迹前认识的朋友。
E: Not so fast! I know this {F#Miss}{M#Mr} {NICKNAME}, {F#she}{M#he} was a friend with President Qing before her great success.

C: 不会吧？全是毫无价值的东西。
E: No way? It's all useless rubbish.

C: （凑近一些）
E: (Get closer)

C: 对啊，他说他叫雷诺。
E: He said his name was Renault.

C: 放心放心！
E: Don't worry!

C: 不错，操作越发熟练了。

C: 她遇到了灵异事件？
E: She had a paranormal encounter?

C: 我长话短说，刚刚机巧鸟托运了一个包裹给我，我打开一看——
E: I'll keep it quick: A cycrane just delivered us a package. Opening it up, I saw...

C: 其实我们现在所处的地方就是其中一处——这里是我直播事业开始的地方…这里的每一块地砖我都觉得好亲切。
E: Actually, where we are right now is one of the locations... This is where my streaming career first kicked off... I know each and every street paver here intimately.

C: 根据发帖人提供的位置信息来看，是这里没错了。
E: This is the right place, based on the location mentioned in the post.

C: 别自责了，阿兰大哥！
E: Don't blame yourself, Brother Arlan!

C: {NICKNAME}，多亏了你，最近冒出一大批造物，这里也热闹了不少。
E: {NICKNAME}, thanks to your efforts, many batches of creations have spawned. It's getting lively around here.

C: 我们可以改造这个舱段，给它们做好功能分区，让它们的需求最大程度地得到满足。
E: We can modify this zone and divide them by function to try and meet their needs to the greatest extent possible.

C: 阮•梅造物们手拉手～
E: Creations of Ruan Mei, let's join our hands~

C: 它说…它要在酒吧里当调饮师，再也不回去了！！！
E: She said... she's going to be a drinksmith and will never come back!!!

C: （…你倒是说句话啊！难道就这么眼睁睁地看着它们被打吗？）
E: (...Say something! Are you just gonna stand there and watch them get hit?)

C: 蓦然间，眼前的文字开始剧烈抖动起来，笔画纷纷脱落，瞬时组成了新的句子。
E: In an instant, the words start to tremble violently, the strokes cascading off, forming a new sentence entirely.

C: ——向「司令」报告！近期家族封锁了梦境酒店，我打算再次前往深处探索，寻找是否还有像您这样，遭到抛弃的「美梦剧团」成员。请求指示！
E: ...Reporting to Mr. Bigwig! Recently, The Family sealed off the hotel in the Dreamscape. I'm planning to explore its depths again and see if there are any other Sweet Dreams Troupe members who have been abandoned like you. Requesting your instructions!

C: 我在梦境酒店的深处开了家酒吧，专门用来收容像你们这样遭到抛弃的…「美梦剧团」，不用工作，开开心心生活就好。唯一的要求——不准打架。
E: I've opened a lounge in the depths of the hotel in the Dreamscape for those abandoned... Sweet Dreams Troupe members like you. There, you won't have to work, just live happily. The only rule is — no fighting.

C: 当然可以。跟我过来吧。
E: Sure thing. Come with me.

C: 它属于每一个无法享受美梦的成员，我们不被外面的世界接受，因此才聚在这里。
E: It's a place for all those who can't enjoy sweet dreams. We're not accepted by the outside world, so we've gathered here.

C: 果然是小！哎呀，都怪我，抠的时候力气大了点，抠成了个坑！哈哈哈！
E: It was small, just as I expected! Ack, it's my fault. I put in too much force when digging into the dice. Looks like I made a pit instead! Hahaha!

C: 真是怕什么就来什么。这次纯浪费钱了。
E: My fears really came to pass. What a waste of money this time.

C: 你是要和我约会吗？
E: Are you going to ask me out on a date?

C: 我最喜欢吃瓜了！
E: Oh, I love gossip!

C: 是哪种秘密？
E: What kind of secret?

C: 我骗你的。
E: That's a lie, actually.

C: 你觉得我会相信么？
E: Do you expect me to believe that?

C: 对，它的情绪太不稳定，没法记住复杂的东西，最容易闹出事来。就像个小孩子，需要哄，有时候也得好好教训。
E: Yeah, they're emotionally unstable and can't remember complex things, and they're most likely to throw a fit. They need to be treated like a kid, and sometimes they need a lesson.

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: …为什么这么说？
E: ...Why do you say that?

C: 你很关心其他怪物。
E: You really care about the other monsters.

C: 你可真会说话，就是这么把那群孩子骗得服服帖帖的？别多想，是在夸你呢。
E: You're quite a smooth talker. Is this how you tricked those children? Oh, don't get me wrong. It's a compliment.

C: 呼…有点困了。
E: Well... I'm getting a bit sleepy.

C: …是时候面对现实了。
E: ...It's time to face reality.

C: 你比那个黑桃讨厌多了！
E: You're a bigger pain than that Spade!

C: 有吗？或许有吧，那要不咱们约定，要是谁再用言语攻击对方，谁就是狗狗哇。
E: Am I? I mean, maybe. Let's make a deal. Whoever uses their words to attack the other person will be declared a dog.

C: 味道真的好棒！从现在起，你就是狗狗心目中最优秀的调饮师了！
E: The flavor is amazing! From now on, you are the best drinksmith in my heart!

E: Well, you were just a kid back then...

C: 踏足圣城之日难以忘却——\n信仰纷争之人，\n必将身受非议。
E: He still recalls the day he entered the holy city —\nOne who worships strife,\nIs bound to have rumors rife.

C:
妇人拭去孩童的泪珠，
祷告者虔诚地为她们祝福。
迷途者牵住孩童的手，
正如神谕为他们指引前路：
E:
The matron wipes away the tears on the children's faces.
The praying ones piously bless them in faith.
The lost ones take the children's hands,
Just as the prophecy guides their path:

C:
她并非将诗用以消遣，
据说，她曾以数百个名字留下著作。

在不同的时代里，
她甚至批判自己曾经的观念，
因此，她的身份难以勘破。
E:
She did not write poetry as a pastime.
It is said that she left great works under hundreds of names.

In different times,
She even criticized her previous beliefs,
Making her identity even harder to assume.

C: 她那用来遮蔽身形的披风，\n如今成了盖过发梢的兜帽。
E: The cloak once used to conceal her entire body\nNow only suffices as a hood that barely covers her fringe.

C: 「它由神物织就，就连神明也会着迷。」\n「但纵然万般诡计，也无法在金丝下佻窃。」
E: "It is woven by divine threads, it captivates even the gods.\nBut all the lies and deceit are revealed under the golden thread's query."

C: 「但若骗术再高明点，」\n「黎明能否延续不息？」
E: "But if my lies are more sophisticated,"\n"Can the dawn last forever, no end in sight?"

C:
在那无边的黑暗中，
你的容貌曾被无数次雕琢。
一抹微笑、一句不安，
或是一滴泪水、一声长叹。
E:
In the boundless dark,
your face is sculpted again and again.
A smile, a faltering word,
or a tear, a lingering sigh.

C:
你忘记了自己的身份，
甚至忘记了刚得到的名字。
只记得一个愿望：
翻开未来故事的下一页。
E:
You lose yourself,
forgetting even the name you were given.
But one desire lingers:
to turn the next page of the unfolding story.

C: 而<color=#9e5738>「往昔的涟漪」</color>，\n却能将勇敢的诗篇念与过往。
E: And though only <color=#9e5738>ripples of past reverie</color> remain,\nthey still sing brave poems alongside it.

C: 我看到你啦，<color=#9e5738>「昔涟」</color>。\n在为来古士揭露的真相忧心？\n我相信你会做出勇敢的决定。
E: I see you, <color=#9e5738>Cyrene</color>.\nConcerned about the truth Lygus unveiled?\nI trust you to face it with courage and make the right choice.

C: 相机里存了好多帕姆的照片，\n给列车长换装真好玩。
E: My camera's full of Pom-Pom's photos,\nIt's so much fun dressing up the conductor!

C: 许多的信使结伴而来，\n好动的小猫藏在金鳟身后，\n死荫的蝴蝶翩跹行礼。
E: Many messengers came in company.\nThe playful kitten hid behind the golden trout.\nThe butterfly of the deadly shadow fluttered in courtesy.

C: 「可天空分明那么冷漠！」\n「目睹信徒彼此攻讦，」\n「却可耻地逃避一切。」
E: "And yet, the sky remains so cold!\nIt witnesses believers tear each other apart,\nAnd still, it cowardly flees from all responsibility."

C: 圣城的元老不屑，\n冷笑间将他投入军营。
E: The Elders in the holy city scorned,\nCasting him into barracks in derision.

C: 他自称清醒的导师，引领迷茫的门生，\n除去赠予每人一句箴言，少有教诲和指引。
E: He calls himself a clear-headed teacher leading lost students,\nYet he rarely guides or teaches, apart from gifting a single saying.

C: 「回去吧，生者未尽苦思。」 「回去吧，死者无心授业。」 那机巧言辞冰冷， 一如逝者本人。
E: "Go back. The living have not exhausted their thoughts." "Go back. The dead have no desire to teach their works." The ingenium's words are cold and detached, Like the deceased man himself.

C: 正如白昼永驻的圣城，\n是如何区分黎明的温暖……\n和夜色的冰冷？
E: As with the holy city that's perpetually bathed in light.\nHow do people tell apart cozy mornings...\nand frosty nights?

C: 「但凡有形的丝线，\n足以织就无缝的华衣。」\n或是密密细缝，或是一刀直剪。
E: "As long as the thread has form,\nit is enough to craft seamless finery."\nBe it stitched finely and tightly, or cut cleanly with a single stroke.

C: 请向前奔跑吧，缇缇
E: Run Forward, Trity

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: 「叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯！」绿发的少年不悦冷笑。
E: "Call me Anaxagoras!" The green-haired youth sneered with displeasure.

C: 此后，无论缇里西庇俄丝去往何处，她的耳边总会回响起孩童们的声音。
E: From then on, wherever Tribios went, the voices of children would echo in her ears.

C: 花海的中央，一袭白衣的少女向死龙飞奔而来，她就是「冥地之春」花店的店主。「欢迎回来，玻吕茜亚！」少女搂住死龙的脖子，「…这次你又带回这么多东西呀，真是辛苦你了。」
E: At the center of the sea of flowers, a girl in white ran toward Netherwing. She was the owner of the flower shop "Spring of the Underworld." "Welcome back, Polyxia!" She wrapped her arms around Netherwing's neck. "...You've brought back so many things again this time. Thank you so much."

C: 死龙轻柔地呼噜着。
E: Netherwing rumbled softly.

C: 众人陷入沉思。不久前，金牌厨师们挫败了保守派美食评论团队「圆酪院」的寻衅，又战胜了美食鉴赏智械「神礼吃货」吕枯耳戈斯。一时间，黄金Aurum风光无两，有许多厨师借此风头来挑战黄金Aurum，无不铩羽而归。
E: The room fell silent. Not long ago, the master chefs had fended off the conservative food critic group, the "Council of Cheddars," and later defeated the gourmet Intellitron, "Sacred Glutton" Lycurgus. Grand Chrysos was riding high, and challenger chefs flocked to its doors, yet none had prevailed.

C: 黄金Aurum派出了大厨万敌，对阵星穹餐车的大厨丹恒。这两位冷面男子只是互相看了一眼，随后各自忙活起来，于三刻后万敌率先交出自己的答卷。
E: Grand Chrysos sent out master chef Mydei, matched against the Astral Food Express's master chef Dan Heng. The two stoic men exchanged a single glance, then silently went to work. After forty-five minutes, Mydei was the first to present.

C: ████████████，███，误入死循环的外部变量。\n█████岁月████████，███泰坦██████。\n▇▇在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中▇▇接替了空缺的▇▇路径▇▇▇▇
被遗忘的岁月
E: Forgotten Years

C: 永劫回归
E: Eternal Recurrence

C: 迷迷
E: Mem

C: 实验归档
E: Experiment Archive

C: 队伍包含黑天鹅
E: Team must include Black Swan

C: 星穷列车
E: Arstral Express

C: 舞动青春
E: Disco Youth

C: 有心事的石雕群像
E: A group of stone statues that have something on their minds

C:
贝洛伯格史前音乐研究与演奏，
基于地髓能源的电气集成系统设计与控制工程，
信息工程，
机械设计制造及其自动化，
武器系统与武器发射工程，
自动机兵设计、制造、控制与信息工程，
探测制导与控制技术，
弹药工程与爆炸技术，
密码科学与技术，
应急装备技术与工程，
等。
E:
Research and performance of prehistoric Belobog music
Design and control engineering of Geomarrow-energy-based electrical integration systems
Information engineering
Mechanical design, manufacturing, and automation
Weapon systems and weapon launch engineering
Design, manufacturing, and information engineering of automation hardware and control systems
Navigation, guidance, and control technology
Ammunition engineering and explosive technology
Cryptography
Emergency equipment technology and engineering, etc.

C: 虚数内能便携式战术激光炮
E: Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon

C: 四足
E: four legs

C: 危险目光
E: Dangerous Gaze

C: 动画放映
E: Animation Screening

C: S
E: S

C: S
E: S

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 动画师的强心剂
E: Animator's Stimulant

C: 舒舒服服地泡了个澡，感觉浑身充满力气。攻击力有所提高。
E: Had a comfortable bath and felt full of energy. ATK has been increased.

C: 登上列车后第一次看到家乡的全貌，我会努力用自己的双手建设它，让它重新变回那个生机勃勃的星球！
E: Boarding the Express let me see my home in its entirety for the first time. I'll do everything I can to build it back up, to restore the lushness and vitality it once possessed!

C:
虽常常在银河旅行，我却因商事繁忙从未有机会驻足欣赏星空之美。

如今登上列车，饱览银河美景，忽然想起仙舟的一句古语，「漂逍遥以远游，遵大路之无穷」。

此种生活，真令人羡慕之极。
E:
Though I often travel across the cosmos, my attention is usually too consumed by matters of business and rarely have had the opportunity to marvel at the beauty of the stars.

Today, as a guest on the Express and taking in the visual feast of the universe's glory, I find myself thinking of an ancient Xianzhou expression: "The path to drift is free and unfettered, and the way to tread is wide and infinite."

Such a life is worthy of utmost envy.

C: *少女的长梦已抵达终点，此处再无人能够回应了。*
E: *The girl's long dream has reached its end. No one can respond here anymore.*

C: 如果你的记忆亦有形体，你认为它会是蓊郁幽静的丛林——混杂着扑面而来的土壤味道和神秘的气息。\n哪怕是你自己走入其中，恐怕也有可能在浓雾中迷失。
E: If your memories have shape, you believe it would be a lush and secluded forest, mixed with a rush of the scents of the soil and something more mysterious.\nEven if you enter this dominion yourself, you run the danger of becoming lost in the fog.

C: 如果你的记忆亦有形体，你认为它会是被霓虹灯和物欲照亮的大都市——浮华的外表下，冰冷的内核被刻意遮掩。\n若是让你走入这座城市，你害怕自己会变得和街边流浪汉一样一无所有。
E: If your memories have shape, you believe it would be a grand city enshrouded by neon-lit monuments and material desires. Beyond the pretentious exterior, the inner coldness remains intentionally concealed.\nShould you enter this city, you fear you might become as destitute as the homeless wandering the streets.

C: 你放弃了做选择的权力——你宁愿独自与命运抗争。\n任何善意的信号都有可能是一种伪装，在强者的世界里，尔虞我诈乃家常便饭。那就一个人上路吧，贯彻你倔强且孤独的「开拓」。
E: You've surrendered the right to choose. You'd rather go to war against fate alone.\nAny signals of kindness could be a camouflage. All's fair in a war between the strong. Then, take the journey on your own, and carry through your stubborn and lonely "Trailblaze."

C: ——小心，埋伏的强敌将会发动突袭，削减你的耐力值。
E: — Be careful. Hidden formidable foes here will drain your Stamina by launching Surprise Attacks against you.

C: ——这里的敌人团结一致，互相照应。它们会一起狩猎寻宝者。
E: — Enemies here are united and look out for each other. They hunt treasure hunters together.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「朋比为奸」</color>请注意敌人组合，谨慎采取行动。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Gang Up</color>: Take note of enemy formations and act with caution.

C: 遭遇和首领节点的战斗中存在最低进度要求。\n未在倒计时结束前达到最低进度要求，会失去更多小队生命值。
E: The Encounter and Boss Nodes have minimum progress requirements.\nFailing to meet the minimum progress requirements before the countdown ends will result in losing more squad HP.

C: 在比赛过程中，玩家可以使用<color=#f29e38ff>赛场道具</color>来影响比赛。使用任意道具后，<color=#f29e38ff>所有道具</color>都会进入冷却。
E: During the match, players can use <color=#f29e38ff>arena items</color> to influence the game. After using any item, <color=#f29e38ff>all items</color> will enter cooldown.

C: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER_PS#长按控制器的<color=#f29e38ff>L1键</color>，激活<color=#f29e38ff>轮盘</color>。激活轮盘的状态下，使用控制器进入各个<color=#f29e38ff>功能</color>。}
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER_PS#Hold down the <color=#f29e38ff>L1 button</color> on the controller to activate the <color=#f29e38ff>Wheel</color>. When the Wheel is activated, use the controller to access various <color=#f29e38ff>functions</color>.}

C: <color=#f29e38ff>战利品</color>分布在世界的各个角落，努力探索世界、战胜敌人的话，可能会有更珍贵的发现…
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Treasures</color> are scattered across the world. You may find things of great value by exploring the world and defeating your enemies.

C: 收集到的阅读物，可以通过手机菜单中的「书架」功能快速查看。
E: Collected readables can be quickly accessed via the Bookshelf function in the Phone menu.

C: 只有在身处匹诺康尼的场景中时才能通过便捷按钮打开梦境护照；身处其它世界时，需要通过背包内的「梦境护照」道具将其打开
E: While in Penacony, you can use the shortcut button to open your Dreamscape Pass. While in other worlds, you will need to use the "Dreamscape Pass" item in your Inventory to open it.

C: 当遗器的主属性或副属性是当前查看角色的建议属性，会在属性面板中<color=#f29e38ff>高亮显示</color>。
E: When the Relic's Main Stat or Subsidiary Stats is the recommended stat for the character currently being viewed, they would be <color=#f29e38ff>highlighted</color> in the Stats interface.

C: 与<color=#f29e38ff>未被使用的「梦泡酒塔」</color>交互将会<color=#f29e38ff>提高「梦泡充能」的可用次数</color>。可以携带的「梦泡充能」次数最多不超过<color=#f29e38ff>5次</color>。
E: Interacting with <color=#f29e38ff>unused Bubble Tower</color> will <color=#f29e38ff>increase the number of Bubble Charges that can be used</color>. The number of Bubble Charges that can be carried at any time cannot exceed <color=#f29e38ff>5</color>.

C: 按下轨道上的按钮，选择前往的挑战场地。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} the button on the tracks and select the challenge arena to go to.

C: 在两个不同的时空间，<color=#f29e38ff>道路，障碍，机关，战利品</color>等事物可能存在差异。\n<color=#f29e38ff>主要的道路差异</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>重要的目标</color>会在当前时空以<color=#f29e38ff>金色的记忆尘影</color>的形式呈现，可通过观察金色的记忆尘影来<color=#f29e38ff>预测另一个时空的样貌</color>。
E: Between two different space-times, objects such as <color=#f29e38ff>roads, obstacles, mechanisms, and treasures</color> may appear differently.\n<color=#f29e38ff>Main road differences</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>key targets</color> are presented in the current space-time as <color=#f29e38ff>golden memory dust</color>, which can be observed to <color=#f29e38ff>predict their appearance in the other space-time</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>点击货物</color>进行快速码放，<color=#f29e38ff>拖拽或旋转货物</color>以调整其摆列位置
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Select goods</color> to perform rapid arrangement. <color=#f29e38ff>Drag or rotate the goods</color> to change their positions

C: 我方编队中第一位角色会在<color=#f29e38ff>其他角色</color>释放终结技时获得<color=#f29e38ff>充能</color>，并有概率使自身下次攻击伤害提高。
E: The ally positioned first in the Team Lineup <color=#f29e38ff>gains Energy</color> when <color=#f29e38ff>other allies</color> use their Ultimates, and there is a chance that the ally positioned first will have their next attack's DMG increased.

C: 我方角色在施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>攻击敌人后，将使敌人的<color=#f29e38ff>行动提前</color><unbreak>100%</unbreak>且攻击力降低，并为其附加多种<color=#f29e38ff>持续伤害</color>效果。
E: After allies attack enemies with their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimates</color>, enemy <color=#f29e38ff>actions will be Advanced Forward</color> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, and they will deal less DMG and be inflicted with various <color=#f29e38ff>DoT</color> effects.

C: 你将作为剑术助教，安排三月七的练剑日程，并帮助她领悟剑招，在<unbreak>15</unbreak>日后击败斯科特。
E: As the swordplay assistant, you will be arranging March 7th's Swordplay Sessions and helping her with mastering Sword Moves to prepare her to defeat Skott in <unbreak>15</unbreak> days.

C: 选择行动卡， 推进值日日程，提升队员<color=#f29e38ff>「值日等级」</color>，最终在<color=#f29e38ff>「晚餐会议」</color>中汇报值日报告，获取<color=#f29e38ff>「列车基金」</color>！
E: Select an Action Card, progress your duty schedule, raise your members' <color=#f29e38ff>Duty Level</color>, and submit your Duty Reports at the <color=#f29e38ff>Dinner Meeting</color> to gain <color=#f29e38ff>Express Funds</color> when the day ends!

C: 通过完成装修推进房间装修完成度，可以提高家居评级，获取装修津贴。
E: Completing renovations to increase the renovation progress of the room and raise your Décor Rating. This will earn you Renovation Subsidy.

C: 瓦尔特担任领队时，可获得特殊行动卡<color=#f29e38ff>「热血激励」</color>，使用后在日程中生成<color=#f29e38ff>「激励格」</color>。
E: When Welt is the leader, you can gain the special <color=#f29e38ff>Passion Booster</color> Action Card. After using this card, you can create an <color=#f29e38ff>Incentive Tile</color> in the schedule.

C: 在骑士关卡中，当剩余轮次较少时，我方将在轮次开始时获得战斗增益。
E: In Knight Stages, when there are only a few Cycles remaining, allies will receive Combat buffs at the start of each Cycle.

C: 在决战中，你的队伍将挑战<color=#f29e38ff>难度最高</color>的工作！
E: In the final battle, your squad will challenge the <color=#f29e38ff>most difficult</color> task!

C: 祝福扑满信标：带有该信标的区域中战斗会出现扑满，消灭后可获得额外的祝福。\n奇物扑满信标：带有该信标的区域中战斗会出现扑满，消灭后可获得额外的奇物。
E: Blessing Trotter Beacon: There will be a Trotter in domains with this beacon. Defeat it to obtain additional Blessings.\nCurio Trotter Beacon: There will be a Trotter in domains with this beacon. Defeat it to obtain additional Curios.

C: 常规位面探索中，「区域-休整」商店均为<color=#f29e38ff>特殊商店</color>，会提供不同的商店功能。
E: During exploration of Ordinary Planes, stores in "Domain — Respite" are all <color=#f29e38ff>Special Stores</color> that provide different store functions.

C: 覆写方程所需的宇宙碎片数量随覆写次数上升。每个造物调试台的方程覆写次数存在上限。
E: The number of Cosmic Fragments required to overwrite an Equation increases with each overwriting attempt. There is a limit to the number of times each Workbench of Creation can overwrite Equations.

C: 不同品质的垃圾桶<color=#f29e38ff>得分不同</color>。拍摄<color=#f29e38ff>尽可能多</color>的垃圾桶，达成关卡目标吧。
E: Different qualities of trashcans will give <color=#f29e38ff>different scores</color>. Take <color=#f29e38ff>as many pictures of trashcans as possible</color> and complete the stage objective.

E: Character Technique

E: Ultimate

E: Clockie's Extras: Hanu Wars (II)

C: 点击即可使用金币招募。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} to recruit with Gold Coins.

C: 翡翠是一名<color=#f29e38ff>后台</color>角色。
E: Jade is an <color=#f29e38ff>off-field</color> character.

C: 黑塔和缇宝都是<color=#f29e38ff>前后台</color>角色，砂金是<color=#f29e38ff>前台</color>角色。
E: Herta and Tribbie are <color=#f29e38ff>on/off-field</color> characters, while Aventurine is an <color=#f29e38ff>on-field</color> character.

C: 轻松获胜，打得不错！
E: An easy win, well done!

C: 我们开始进阶测试吧。
E: Let's begin the Advanced Test.

C: 贡献的「开拓券」越多，奖励也会越丰富。
E: The more Trailblaze Funds you contribute, the greater your rewards.

C: 当然，也可以通过<color=#f29e38ff>消除内部水果</color>的操作来解除封印啾~
E: Of course, you can also <color=#f29e38ff>clear the fruit inside</color> to dispel the seal, tweet~

C: 滴答，这里是产生分支剧情的段落，你投入的骰子方向会走向<color=#f29e38ff>不同的结局</color>
E: Tick-tock, this is where the storylines can branch. The dice you invest here will push the story toward <color=#f29e38ff>different endings</color>

C: 第一次登场，当然要全力以赴。让这些敌人好好见识球棒侠的厉害吧！
E: You gotta give it your all since this is your first time on the field. Let these enemies see what the baseballer can do!

C: 还不知道会在哪派上用场，总之先塞进兜里！
E: We won't know when that'll come in handy, so let's put it in our pocket first!

C:
游鱼洄游于漆黑渊底，在昏暗之海追寻光明。
苦厄的波涛，谎言的潮汐，宿命的骇浪，冲刷她空无的魂灵。
她是一柄冰冷的剑旗，为一颗灼热的野心起舞，最终破碎零星。
空留缥缈乐音，不知为谁而鸣。
E:
The fish swims and meanders on the pitch-black bottom of the abyss, seeking light in the gloomy seas.
The waves of agony, tides of lies, and the torrents of destiny all batter and wash against her empty soul.
She is a cold sword banner that once danced for a person's burning ambition, only to shatter into pieces.
Leaving behind only echoing music that sings for none.

C: 「星际和平公司」的基层员工，主要负责维持公司管辖地区的治安秩序。工资不高，只能在公司旗下的企业舰上合租房间。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation grunt worker whose job mainly involves maintaining order in locations ruled by the IPC. With a meager salary, the only lodging they can afford is a shared room on one of the IPC's enterprise ships.

C: 贝洛伯格的守护者，永屹之城贝洛伯格无可质疑的统治者。\n可可利亚秉持传承自历代守护者的神迹权能，在战斗中号令冰雪的力量冻结敌人。
E: The Guardian of Belobog, and the indisputable ruler of the Towering Citadel, Belobog.\nCocolia possesses the divine authority passed down through the generations of Guardians, giving her command over ice and snow to freeze her enemies in battle.

C: 我会提供充足的支援…就按你想的来吧，丹恒。
E: I'll be right behind you with all the support you need, Dan Heng.

C: 列车也曾迎来无数性格各异的搭车客，他们心怀远方，目的各异，但这不妨碍他们会与列车共度一段美妙的旅程——希望他也能如愿前往自己的终点。
E: The Express has welcomed countless passengers with different personalities. They all have their own destinations and purposes, but this doesn't stop them from sharing a wonderful journey with the Express. I hope he can also reach his desired destination.

C: 只是我的推测，列车本应从阿基维利的故乡出发，最终也回到那儿，开始下一段旅程。所以列车并没有终点，旅程所谓的「终点」，只有你能决定。
E: I'm speculating, but I think the Express departs from Akivili's home world and returns there before starting the journey anew. So the Express doesn't have a "final stop" per se — it's up to you where you disembark.

C: 同大家相处久了，总觉得自己也在越来越年轻。
E: After spending so much time with everyone, I feel like I'm starting to age backwards.

C: 能同姬子小姐一起战斗的机会不多，这次该轮到我们表现了。
E: I don't often get the chance to fight alongside you, Himeko. It's time to show everyone what we can do.

C: 该下决断了。
E: Better make a choice.

C: 有一颗星球，每到夏天，我都会去那里看海。那时海潮最为汹涌，只能远远地站在岸边。直到某一年，他们在海上架起了长长的观景栈道，我便再也没去过。
E: There's a planet I go to every summer to look at the sea. That's when the tides are fiercest — you have to stand far away on the shore. Then, one year, they constructed a long observation pier. I haven't been back since.

C: 重要的不是数值，是体验，是操作！
E: Stop worrying about the stats — have some fun!

C: 真是不懂礼貌的客人。
E: A guest with no manners, huh?

C: 品质还算上乘。
E: Definitely worth our while.

C: 上次的伤口愈合得如何了，希儿？
E: Has that wound fully healed, Seele?

C: 这样…然后这样……
E: This... that... Oh!

C: 《雪国冒险奇谭》画册再版？这可是圈子里最难抢的系列之一…要、要买几本好…十本，十本够么……
E: *gasp* A new edition of the fanbook "Tale of the Winterlands?" That's one of the most sought-after series out there... H—How many copies should I get... Ten? Is ten enough...?

C: 娜塔莎姐姐…为了下层区，我们一起加油吧！
E: Miss Natasha... Let's make the Underworld a better place!

C: 又学会了新的生存技巧……
E: Nice to have new survival skills under my belt...

C: 和人聊天时要拼命找话题，还得时时揣摩对方的意思，好麻烦…只有和佩拉聊天的时候才不用顾虑那么多……
E: It's such a bother to talk to people and try to figure out what they mean... *sigh* At least when I talk to Pela, I don't have to think so much...

C: 工作不算争取价值，是劳动换取酬劳；工作的时候偷闲才是为自己争取价值。
E: Work is not about increasing value. It just pays your bills. The trick is to increase value for yourself at your employer's expense.

C: 富贵逼人啊！
E: Jackpot!

C: 你的戏法总是令人琢磨不透…按你想的来吧。
E: I don't understand your games and tricks, but suit yourself.

C: 以掌中之剑，送你一程。
E: I will dispatch you by my sword.

C: 收好。
E: Take them.

C: 今天也是「乐于助人」的一天！本姑娘对自己相当满意，歇了！
E: Today was another day of being eager to help! I am very happy with myself. Time to rest!

C: 驭空大人，素裳不才、不行…不精？请…请多多指点！
E: Madam Yukong, my skills are not yet adopt... Uh, adapt? Adept? F—Feel free to give me some advice!

C: 凤凰，显形！
E: Rise, phoenix!

C: 彦卿，剑术上我没什么可提点你的。若有余裕，便多多关注身旁的同袍吧。
E: Yanqing, your swordsmanship needs no guidance from me. But I encourage you to learn from your friends.

C: 天舶司的现在与过去，并非「新旧」之间的简单关系，过去的种种造就了它今日的腾飞。
E: The past and present of the Sky-Faring Commission do not have such a simple relationship. The events of the past crafted its current greatness.

C: 本座乃罗浮太卜司之首，符玄。初次见面——不，该说久见了…我已在法眼中遍历了与你之间的二十二次初会场面。
E: I am Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission. This is our first encounter... or perhaps I should say — our twenty-second first encounter... Through the omniscia, I have met you for the first time, many times...

C: 哼哼~想不到我还懂这个吧！
E: Hehe⁓ A healer knows a little something about everything!

C: 自艺成以来，我无日不寻求着突破，此行终点，自然也不会落在这里。
E: Pushing my limits is what made me who I am today. I will not stop here.

C: 又见面了，幸会。
E: We meet again, a pleasant surprise.

C: 又可增添几日阳寿……
E: A few more days to my wakespan...

C: 狐人的生命不过三百余载，但却胜过近千岁却碌碌无为的仙舟人…淡忘了对死亡的感知，生命也就毫无意义可言。寿瘟祸祖为生命带来的祸害，便在于此。
E: The foxian lifespan is only <unbreak>300</unbreak> years, but that is better than the Xianzhou natives who spend nearly a thousand years bumbling around... When one has forgotten the concept of death, life also becomes meaningless. Such is the curse placed by the Plagues Author.

C: 姐姐，我……
E: Sister, I...

C: 云璃小姐是「焰轮八叶」中次年幼的一位，但只论剑法，她可不比其余七人差…虽说她和炎老的关系非同一般，但若不是可造之材，也经不起如此打磨啊。
E: Miss Yunli may be the second youngest member of the Flamewheel Octet, but she is no less a swordsmaster than the other seven. Some might suspect her of benefitting from her connection to Huaiyan, but she could not have endured such rigor and refinement if she were not a valuable talent in her own right.

C: 以眼还眼，百倍奉还。
E: An eye for an eye, and a hundred times more.

C: 在朱明仙舟的时候，我有空就会去找灵砂姐姐和炎庭君玩。玩累了，就躺在灵砂姐姐的膝枕上休息，她真的…好香好香。
E: Whenever I'm on the Zhuming and I have time, I go visit Lingsha and Ardens Regia. Then, when I'm tired of playing, I rest my head on her lap... Lingsha always has this sweet sweet aroma about her.

C: 景元将军，请放心信任妾身吧。
E: General Jing Yuan, please put your faith in me.

C: 灵魂的悸动，最为珍贵。
E: A beating soul is the most precious thing.

C: 同心一意可好？
E: Shall we unite our goals?

C: 很好，优美的姿势。
E: A picture of grace and elegance.

C: 提问前不如先想一想，你的答案是不是已经先于问题确定？这种问题不问出口，对大家都好。
E: Before you ask a question, why don't you consider whether the answer has already been determined? It is better for everyone if such questions are not asked.

C: 你说，到底什么人会拒绝我们「酒馆」的邀请，跑去和公司混？不过比起和他成为同伴，还是现在的关系更有意思！
E: Seriously, who'd ditch an invite to our "tavern" to go rub shoulders with the corporation's drones? Still, if he'd simply become a friend, our relationship with him today would be far less interesting...

C: 动作真快…我仿佛能看见你抬起的枪口。
E: You're fast... hand at the holster already?

C: 又是这样。
E: Again?

C: 谢谢，喉咙舒服多了。
E: Thank you, my throat is feeling much better.

C: 小时候哥哥常常会哼摇篮曲哄我入睡，那是我学会的第一首曲子…虽然它没有歌词，但依旧是我最喜欢的一段旋律。
E: My brother often hummed a lullaby to help me fall asleep when I was young. That was the first piece of music I learned... Even without lyrics, it's still the melody I hold dearest.

C: 小时候我经常偷喝苏乐达，等到爷爷发现的时候，我已经蛀牙了…所以一定不能多喝苏乐达…不对，小朋友不可以，大人可以！
E: When I was little, I used to sneak sips of SoulGlad, and by the time Grandpa found out, I already had cavities... So, we definitely shouldn't drink too much... Wait, actually it's okay for adults, but little kids shouldn't drink it!

C: 理想的火焰若在一个人心中燃起，就会留下难以磨灭的印记。那个男人一定有着足以被称作「英雄」的过去。
E: When the flames of an ideal are ignited within a person, they leave an indelible mark. That man must have a past worthy of being called "heroic."

C: 以此身躯……
E: In this mortal form...

C: 银枪•修罗殿下的弹丸，万里封喉；银枪•修罗殿下的意志，金刚不坏。若用银枪•修罗殿下的弹丸射击他的意志…抱歉，话题似乎不该是这个流向。
E: The bullet of Lord Silvergun Shura seals throats far and wide. The will of Silvergun Shura is indestructible. If you fire at his will with the bullet of Silvergun Shura... Sorry, seems like the conversation went in an unexpected direction.

C: 押忍！四苦八苦，盛衰枯荣。
E: Ossu! Enduring the four stresses and eight sufferings, experiencing prosperity and decline.

C: 温润的触感，品质尚佳。
E: A gentle texture, and of fine craftsmanship.

C: 蝶总是一个人，失落的时候，悲伤的时候，连开心的时候也是。*我们*好想抱抱她，告诉她没事的。但不管怎么接近，她都离*我们*好远……
E: Cas is always alone — when she's lost or sad or even when she's happy. We want to hug her and tell her it's okay. But no matter how close we get, she always feels so far away...

C: 每一道纹饰，都是一行往日的血。
E: Each pattern is a mark of blood from the past.

C: 悬锋人的字典没有「退缩」二字。
E: There is no word for "cower" in the Kremnoan language.

C: 猫咪…大开口！
E: This cat~ Will take it all!

C: 听说三月小姐也很喜欢写日记与做手工，她会更喜欢毛绒玩偶…还是奇美拉抱枕呢？如果我们有机会一起旅行，一定永远不会寂寞吧。
E: I heard that Miss March also likes journaling and doing arts and crafts. Would she prefer plushies... or chimera pillows? If we get a chance to travel together, I bet we'll never feel lonely.

C: 我能看出，虽然丹恒阁下平时不爱言语表达，但他的确发自真心地珍惜身边的每一个生命，无论它们多么渺小。
E: I can tell that while Lord Dan Heng usually avoids expressing himself through words, he genuinely treasures every life he encounters... no matter how insignificant they may be.

C: 破茧而生。
E: Emerge from your cocoon.

C: 愿这一抹微光……
E: May this faint light...

C: 看看有鱼儿上钩么？
E: Any fish taken the bait?

C: 不算难…莫非是放水了吗？
E: That felt too easy... surely not intentional?

C: 岁月爵，随意发挥你的奇思妙想吧。
E: Let your imagination run wild, Dux Temporum.

C: 胆量不小。
E: You've got nerve.

C: 记忆的种子，将在雨中萌发。
E: The seeds of memories shall sprout in the rain.

C: 收好了，总会有些妙用。
E: Hey, hold on to that. Never know when it might help.

C: 收下吧，我们的答案~
E: Take our answer~

C: 即便互不相识，我们也会为同一目标，做出同一选择。
E: Unknown to each other, yet united in purpose, we make the same choices.

E: Auto-Battle

E: Beginner Tips

E: Switch to Basic ATK

E: Skill

E: Cast Character 3 Ultimate

E: Gift of Odyssey

E: Aptitude Showcase

E: The Cremators

E: Complete the Hard difficulty challenge with all ally characters having at least <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "HP Count"

C: 祈祷自己能够活下去。
E: And pray that I can stay alive.

C: 直至灰烬，浴火新生。
E: Until new life rises from the ashes.

C: 我为甘露赐下鸩毒，春种秋收，
E: I grant poison for nectar. Sow in spring to reap in fall.

C: 爱学习
E: Studyholic

C: 蜜果羹
E: Fig Stew

C: 回合开始时：自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: At the start of the turn: This unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 穿戴者每场对战中首次攻击时：造成伤害提升<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>
E: For the wearer's first attack in each battle: Increases DMG dealt by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 前1格同伴受到伤害时：与其交换位置，使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>。若受伤者为呜利呜，则提升双倍属性
E: When the companion 1 tile ahead takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. If the hurt unit is Wooreo, doubles the stat bonuses.

C: 队伍中最强的燕麦粥被击倒时：使所有同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>。穿戴【金丝装备】的同伴会额外<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=3 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When the strongest Oatmeal in the team is knocked out: Causes all companions' <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. Companions wearing "Golden Thread Equipment" additionally have their <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>ATK be increased by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=3 width=1 height=1>HP be increased by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 在遥远的造物世，艾格勒打造黎明机器后，它又在刻法勒协助下创造了代表各种泰坦的奇兽。据信，月夜天马象征着它的老对手欧洛尼斯。
E: In the ancient Era Creatura, Aquila, after forging the Dawn Device, collaborated with Kephale to bring forth the legendary beasts embodying the Titans. The Moonlit Pegasus is believed to represent Aquila's eternal rival, Oronyx.

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n原本可用来经世济民的学识反转为文明的恶敌，擅长潜伏与博弈的它们如同贪婪的秃鹫，渴望为黑潮不断奉上新的牺牲。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nKnowledge that once could have served humanity has inverted into civilization's foe. Specializing in ambush and strategic maneuvers, they hover like ravenous vultures, craving to deliver fresh sacrifices to the black tide.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成物理属性伤害，目标生命值越高造成的伤害越高。
E: Consecutively deals Physical DMG to one random target. The higher the target's HP, the higher the DMG dealt.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，并大概率降低目标的防御力和全属性抗性。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets and has a high chance to decrease the targets' DEF and All-Type RES.

C: 大丽花与黑天鹅在此遭遇砂金，他刚接下「虚无」令使的一刀。大丽花认为砂金不该找到这里，威胁对其开战，砂金却不以为意。
E: The Dahlia and Black Swan encountered Aventurine here, who had just taken a blow from the Emanator of Nihility. The Dahlia believed Aventurine shouldn't have found this place and threatened to initiate combat, but Aventurine remained unfazed.

C: 花火出现在流萤身边，称「梦主」的所有阴谋都会在某个噩梦里实行。花火叮嘱流萤：在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣。
E: Sparkle appeared beside Firefly, saying that all of the Dreammaster's schemes would unfold in a certain nightmare. Sparkle advised her: "After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown."

C: 你与砂金等人重聚，商讨对策。「秩序」正在复兴，距离星期日化身「太一」仅一步之遥。但只要能破除太一之梦，星期日的神格也将随之陨落。
E: You regrouped with Aventurine and the others to plan your next move. The Order was rising again, and Sunday stood only one step away from becoming Ena. Yet if Ena's Dream could be broken, Sunday's divinity would fall with it.

C: 梦主与星期日的计划被挫败，「秩序」星神再度沉睡。但在美梦之地，故事还未结束。
E: The Dreammaster and Sunday's plans were destroyed, and the Aeon of Order slumbered once again. Yet in the Land of the Dreams, the story had not yet reached its end.

C: 共舞的渴望
E: Yearning for a Shared Dance

C: 若让她参演「终末」的剧目，在亿万种可能性的汇流中，她都将以各种方式叛离。 星核猎手有太多关于银河的秘密，当她窥探这些记忆，「毁灭」终有一日将向她投来注视。 她将厌倦无休止的苦旅，转而加速终末的到来——以「须臾」为名，升格为毁灭「记忆」的大君。 在一种可能性中，她会令银河所有人遗忘她的晋升，似乎从没有第八位绝灭大君出现。 当时间走向尽头，她的火焰将燃遍善见天，将宇宙过去的摹本付之一炬。由此，她向所有的无漏净子宣告，她会为银河留下「记忆」的坟茔。 …… 所以，我拒绝了她加入「星核猎手」的请求，以断绝这汹涌的可能性。 ——剧本的批注 「记忆，毁灭，终末……」 嘴角扬起，裙裾飘飘，不停旋转。 到头来，她仍不知道自己到底要投向何种命运，或许永远不会有事物能令她满足—— 「但如此一来，我便永远不会是命运的奴隶。」 一曲舞毕，只剩下余音在灰烬中缭绕—— 「那便再度痴爱，再度叛离，再度投身命运的洋流吧。」
E: If she were to be cast in the play of the Finality, among the confluence of countless possibilities, she would find ways to rebel in every single one. The Stellaron Hunters hold too many secrets of the cosmos, and as she peers into these memories, the Destruction will one day cast THEIR gaze upon her. Weary of her endless suffering journey, she hastens the coming of Finality by becoming the Overlord who destroys Remembrance, taking the name "Ephemera." In one possibility, she would make everyone in the cosmos forget her ascension, as if the eighth Lord Ravager had never existed. When time reaches its end, her flames will engulf the Eden of Blessed Insight, burning every trace of the universe's past to ashes. Thus, she declares to all Pure Children of Anāsrava that she will leave behind a tomb of the Remembrance for the cosmos. ... Therefore, I rejected her request to join the Stellaron Hunters, to sever this raging possibility. — Script Notes "Remembrance, Destruction, Finality..." With a smile and flowing skirt, she twirls ceaselessly. In the end, she still doesn't know which destiny she should embrace, perhaps nothing will ever truly satisfy her... "But this way, I'll never be Destiny's Slave." As the dance ends, only echoes linger in the ashes. "So let us fall in love again, rebel again, and cast ourselves into destiny's currents once more."

C: 流萤：万火归一

C: 无论你我行于怎样的道路，{RUBY_B#虚无}死亡{RUBY_E#}总是注定的终局。
E: No matter which path you and I walk, {RUBY_B#Nihility}death{RUBY_E#} is the inevitable finale.

C: 虫群引发的每一场灾难，都伴随着无数的牺牲者。一些名字留下了，但还有一些人…不但被遗忘，还遭到了背叛。
E: Every disaster brought by the Swarm was accompanied by countless sacrifices. Some names were remembered, but others... were not only forgotten, but betrayed.

C: 可有件事，我不明白。就算「梦主」意在「繁育」的力量，银河中不乏残存的虫群。为何非得痛下杀手？
E: But there's one thing I don't understand. Even if the Dreammaster is after the power of the Propagation, there are plenty of Swarms left in the cosmos. Why resort to killing?

C: 「若你受到伤害，愿那伤害不致使你堕落」——这是在家族中流传已久的祝福。我不希望所有信任，都建立于相互威胁之上。
E: "May the harm that befalls you never lead to your downfall." This is a blessing that has been passed down through The Family for generations. I don't want all trust to be built upon mutual threats.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我的天性不是背叛，而是「贪心」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Betrayal isn't in my nature. "Greed" is.</color>

C: 所有人都认为，她已然遇难，至死没能解开梦境之谜。可这并非真相。
E: Everyone believed she had perished, taking the mysteries of the Dreamscape to her grave. But that wasn't the truth.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而「满心茫然，不知去处」的人，将会重返十二时刻，于自身的过往中，寻回方向。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And those who are "lost and directionless" will return to the Twelve Hours, seeking their path within their own past.</color>

C: 她向你展示了自己的一切，以星核猎手的身份与你重逢。
E: She revealed her true self to you, reuniting with you as a Stellaron Hunter.

C: 为了赢取大剧院的门票，你与流萤参与了热砂时刻的海选。你们配合得如此默契，就像是朝夕相处的同伴。
E: In order to win tickets to the Grand Theater, you and Firefly participated in the Moment of Scorchsand auditions. Your coordination was so perfect, like you were companions who'd long shared the same rhythm.

C: 不久后，公馆便有了这番布置。
E: Soon after, the manor was decorated this way.

C: 而我似乎也已理解，自己为何会存在于此。
E: And I think I've come to understand why I exist here.

C: 「梦主」悬河注火般的一击，也正藏于彩窗之后，只待将其戳破，再度催生寰宇蝗灾。
E: The Dreammaster's devastating strike, like a torrent of fire, lies hidden behind the stained glass, waiting to shatter it and unleash the Swarm Disaster once again.

C: 恐怕，是苦痛。
E: I'm afraid it's... pain.

C: 似曾相识…我似乎嗅到了此处的「不甘」啊。
E: Déjà vu... I can smell the "resentment" lingering in this place.

C: 不可能……
E: No... Impossible...

C: 此时此刻的你，也要迎来相似的死斗。<color=#dbc291ff>以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。</color>
E: At that moment, you, too, would face a similar deathmatch. <color=#dbc291ff>Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.</color>

C: 我这是在列车里睡着了？
E: Did I fall asleep on the Express?

C: 我也是费心挑选了一个{NICKNAME}全无防备的时刻，引导{M#他}{F#她}亲自揭开真相，才得以让{M#他}{F#她}取回清醒。
E: Therefore, I carefully selected a moment where {NICKNAME} was completely unguarded, guiding {M#him}{F#her} to uncover the truth {M#himself}{F#herself} to make {M#him}{F#her} regain {M#his}{F#her} consciousness.

C: 黄泉，知道这是什么吗？
E: Do you know what it is, Acheron?

C: 希望所有人总能和家人团聚，有炖菜吃，一直大笑。
E: I hope everyone can always reunite with their family, enjoy home-cooked stew, and keep on laughing.

C: 「可是…领导，追赶进度是不可能的事情！」小奇美拉开始了它的论证，「因为若要追赶其他同事的进度，就先要追上现在的进度。可是追上了现在的进度后，其他同事的进度就又往前推进了！」
E: "But... boss, keeping up with the schedule is impossible!" The little chimera begins to argue for itself, "Because to catch up with other coworkers' progress, I first need to catch up with the current progress. But once I catch up with the current progress, the others will have moved even further ahead!"

C: 「如此反复下去，我永远也不可能追得上其他同事的进度！」小奇美拉义正言辞地说道。
E: "At this rate, I'll never catch up with my coworkers!" The little chimera declared blatantly.

C: 「叮！啪！」武器碰撞的声音在校场的天空回荡，是圣城卫队在例行训练。
E: "Clang! Bang!" The sounds of clashing weapons echo across the training grounds as the Holy City Guards carry out their routine drills.

C: 啊，是受这猩红星空蛊惑的缘故吗？一股难以抵抗的饥饿攫住了我的心灵，我感到桶身里空无一物，只有寂寞在桶中回响。
E: Ah, is it because I'm ensnared by this crimson starry sky? An irresistible hunger has seized my soul, and I feel utterly empty inside my hollow torso, with only loneliness echoing within.

C: 来我的肚子里赎罪吧！
E: Time to repent in my belly!

C: 你让我想起了不愉快的事，看打！
E: You just reminded me of something unpleasant... Take this!

C: 你是在质疑我强健的双腿吗？那么我就用它来说服你吧！
E: Are you casting doubt upon my strong legs? Then I'll use them to convince you!

C: 受繁育沾染的巨大蕈菌，想必一次可以吃很久。
E: This massive mushroom, tainted by the Propagation, could probably provide sustenance for ages.

C: 就没有我专属的奇美拉吗？
E: Don't I get my own chimera?

E: Playtime's over. Let's kick it up a notch!

E: Little chimera, grow up quickly, nurtured by love♪
